changes.title: Release/插件 publishing: 重试 transient ClawHub CLI dependency install failures, keep preview-passing 插件 publishable 当 one preview cell flakes, 和 verify every expected ClawHub package version 之后 publish so maintenance releases are faster to recover 和 less likely to hide partial 插件 publishes.
changes.rawTitle: Release/plugin publishing: retry transient ClawHub CLI dependency install failures, keep preview-passing plugins publishable when one preview cell flakes, and verify every expected ClawHub package version after publish so maintenance releases are faster to recover and less likely to hide partial plugin publishes.

changes.title: OpenAI: 支持 `OpenAI/chat-latest` as an explicit direct API-密钥 模型 override 为了 trying the moving ChatGPT Instant API alias 不适用 changing the stable default 模型.
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI: support `openai/chat-latest` as an explicit direct API-key model override for trying the moving ChatGPT Instant API alias without changing the stable default model.

changes.title: Cron CLI: include computed `status` 在 `cron list --json` 和 `cron show --json` output so external tooling can read disabled/running/ok/错误/skipped/idle state 不适用 reimplementing cron status derivation. (#78701) Thanks @aweiker.
changes.rawTitle: Cron CLI: include computed `status` in `cron list --json` and `cron show --json` output so external tooling can read disabled/running/ok/error/skipped/idle state without reimplementing cron status derivation. (#78701) Thanks @aweiker.

changes.title: Channels CLI: make `openclaw channels list` channel-only, 添加 `--all` 为了 bundled 和 catalog channels, render installed/configured/enabled state, 和 move 模型 认证/usage details to `openclaw 模型 认证 list`, `openclaw status`, 和 `openclaw 模型 list`. (#78456) Thanks @sliverp.
changes.rawTitle: Channels CLI: make `openclaw channels list` channel-only, add `--all` for bundled and catalog channels, render installed/configured/enabled state, and move model auth/usage details to `openclaw models auth list`, `openclaw status`, and `openclaw models list`. (#78456) Thanks @sliverp.

changes.title: Native commands: honor owner enforcement 为了 native 命令 handlers. (#78864) Thanks @pgondhi987.
changes.rawTitle: Native commands: honor owner enforcement for native command handlers. (#78864) Thanks @pgondhi987.

changes.title: Active 内存: require admin scope 为了 global 内存 toggles. (#78863) Thanks @pgondhi987.
changes.rawTitle: Active Memory: require admin scope for global memory toggles. (#78863) Thanks @pgondhi987.

changes.title: 网关/sessions: clear cached skills snapshots 期间 `/new` 和 `sessions.reset` so long-lived channel sessions rebuild the visible skill list 之后 skills 更改. (#78873) Thanks @Evizero.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/sessions: clear cached skills snapshots during `/new` and `sessions.reset` so long-lived channel sessions rebuild the visible skill list after skills change. (#78873) Thanks @Evizero.

changes.title: Auto-reply: gate inline skill 工具 dispatch through 之前-工具-call authorization hooks. (#78517) Thanks @pgondhi987.
changes.rawTitle: Auto-reply: gate inline skill tool dispatch through before-tool-call authorization hooks. (#78517) Thanks @pgondhi987.

changes.title: Tavily: 解决 dedicated `tavily_search` 和 `tavily_extract` 工具 credentials 从 the active runtime 配置 snapshot, so `exec` SecretRef-backed API keys do not reach the tools unresolved. (#78610) Thanks @VACInc.
changes.rawTitle: Tavily: resolve dedicated `tavily_search` and `tavily_extract` tool credentials from the active runtime config snapshot, so `exec` SecretRef-backed API keys do not reach the tools unresolved. (#78610) Thanks @VACInc.

changes.title: 插件/install: use the same absolute POSIX npm lifecycle shell 为了 managed 插件 install, rollback, repair, 和 uninstall npm operations as staged package updates, preventing restricted 路径 shells 从 破坏性变更 cleanup. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: use the same absolute POSIX npm lifecycle shell for managed plugin install, rollback, repair, and uninstall npm operations as staged package updates, preventing restricted PATH shells from breaking cleanup. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/context engine: invalidate cached assembled context views 当 source history shrinks 或 assembly fails, preventing stale pre-reset history 从 being reused. 修复 #77968. (#78163) Thanks @brokemac79 和 @ChrisBot2026.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/context engine: invalidate cached assembled context views when source history shrinks or assembly fails, preventing stale pre-reset history from being reused. Fixes #77968. (#78163) Thanks @brokemac79 and @ChrisBot2026.

changes.title: Discord/message: parse provider-prefixed targets like `Discord:channel:<id>` as channel sends 而不是 legacy Discord DM targets, so cross-channel Agent `message(action="send")` calls no longer misroute channel IDs 进入 misleading `Unknown Channel` failures. 修复 #78572.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/message: parse provider-prefixed targets like `discord:channel:<id>` as channel sends instead of legacy Discord DM targets, so cross-channel agent `message(action="send")` calls no longer misroute channel IDs into misleading `Unknown Channel` failures. Fixes #78572.

changes.title: Agent/compaction: clamp compaction summary reserve tokens to each 模型's output limit so high-context compaction no longer requests invalid `max_tokens` values. (#54392) Thanks @adzendo.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/compaction: clamp compaction summary reserve tokens to each model's output limit so high-context compaction no longer requests invalid `max_tokens` values. (#54392) Thanks @adzendo.

changes.title: Commands/BTW: show the `/btw` missing-question usage placeholder 使用 brackets so outbound channel sanitization keeps it visible. 修复 #62877. Thanks @RajvardhanPatil07.
changes.rawTitle: Commands/BTW: show the `/btw` missing-question usage placeholder with brackets so outbound channel sanitization keeps it visible. Fixes #62877. Thanks @RajvardhanPatil07.

changes.title: Cron/诊断工具: repair persisted cron jobs whose `payload.模型` was stored as `"default"`, `"null"`, blank, 或 JSON `null` 通过 removing the bad override 期间 `openclaw 诊断工具 --修复` while keeping cron runtime 模型 validation strict. 修复 #78549. Thanks @bizzle12368239.
changes.rawTitle: Cron/doctor: repair persisted cron jobs whose `payload.model` was stored as `"default"`, `"null"`, blank, or JSON `null` by removing the bad override during `openclaw doctor --fix` while keeping cron runtime model validation strict. Fixes #78549. Thanks @bizzle12368239.

changes.title: Telegram: honor `accessGroup:*` sender allowlists 为了 DMs, groups, native commands, 和 callback authorization 之前 applying Telegram's numeric sender-ID checks. 修复 #78660. Thanks @manugc.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram: honor `accessGroup:*` sender allowlists for DMs, groups, native commands, and callback authorization before applying Telegram's numeric sender-ID checks. Fixes #78660. Thanks @manugc.

changes.title: Agent delivery: report `deliverySucceeded=false` 当 outbound delivery returns no adapter result, so claimed/empty delivery paths no longer masquerade as successful sends. 修复 #78532. Thanks @joeyfrasier.
changes.rawTitle: Agent delivery: report `deliverySucceeded=false` when outbound delivery returns no adapter result, so claimed/empty delivery paths no longer masquerade as successful sends. Fixes #78532. Thanks @joeyfrasier.

changes.title: Cron/isolated runs: fail implicit announce delivery 之前 模型 execution 当 `delivery.channel=last` has no previous route, so recurring jobs do not spend tokens 之前 hitting a permanent delivery-target 错误. 修复 #78608. Thanks @sallyom.
changes.rawTitle: Cron/isolated runs: fail implicit announce delivery before model execution when `delivery.channel=last` has no previous route, so recurring jobs do not spend tokens before hitting a permanent delivery-target error. Fixes #78608. Thanks @sallyom.

changes.title: 网关/sessions: persist a new generated transcript file 当 daily 网关-Agent session rollover changes the session id, while preserving custom transcript paths. 修复 #78607. Thanks @nailujac, @zerone0x, 和 @sallyom.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/sessions: persist a new generated transcript file when daily gateway-agent session rollover changes the session id, while preserving custom transcript paths. Fixes #78607. Thanks @nailujac, @zerone0x, and @sallyom.

changes.title: 诊断工具/Codex OAuth认证: 保留 working `OpenAI-Codex/*` PI routes 期间 `诊断工具 --修复` 和 recover 2026.5.5-rewritten `OpenAI/*` GPT-5 routes 当 only Codex OAuth认证 认证 is available, so 更新 repair does not break subscription-认证 setups. 修复 #78407. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/Codex OAuth: preserve working `openai-codex/*` PI routes during `doctor --fix` and recover 2026.5.5-rewritten `openai/*` GPT-5 routes when only Codex OAuth auth is available, so update repair does not break subscription-auth setups. Fixes #78407. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: Telegram: keep the polling watchdog tied to `getUpdates` liveness so unrelated outbound Bot API calls cannot mask a wedged inbound poller. 修复 #78422. Thanks @ai-hpc.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram: keep the polling watchdog tied to `getUpdates` liveness so unrelated outbound Bot API calls cannot mask a wedged inbound poller. Fixes #78422. Thanks @ai-hpc.

changes.title: Agent/subagents: have completed session-mode subagent registry rows honor `Agent.defaults.subagents.archiveAfterMinutes` 而不是 a hardcoded 5-minute TTL, so registry-backed surfaces keep one retention knob across spawn modes. (#78263) Thanks @arniesaha.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/subagents: have completed session-mode subagent registry rows honor `agents.defaults.subagents.archiveAfterMinutes` instead of a hardcoded 5-minute TTL, so registry-backed surfaces keep one retention knob across spawn modes. (#78263) Thanks @arniesaha.

changes.title: 插件/channel setup: forward `setChannelRuntime` 从 non-bundled external 插件 setup entries so deferred external channel runtime initializers are installed 之前 startup polling. 修复 #77779. (#77799) Thanks @openperf.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/channel setup: forward `setChannelRuntime` from non-bundled external plugin setup entries so deferred external channel runtime initializers are installed before startup polling. Fixes #77779. (#77799) Thanks @openperf.

changes.title: Telegram: treat successful same-chat `message` 工具 outbound sends 期间 an inbound Telegram turn as delivered 当 deciding whether to emit the rewritten silent reply fallback. (#78685) Thanks @neeravmakwana.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram: treat successful same-chat `message` tool outbound sends during an inbound Telegram turn as delivered when deciding whether to emit the rewritten silent reply fallback. (#78685) Thanks @neeravmakwana.

changes.title: 网关/tasks: reconcile stale CLI run-context tasks whose live run context disappeared 和 bound channel hot-reload deferrals so stale task records cannot block Discord/Slack/Telegram reloads forever.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/tasks: reconcile stale CLI run-context tasks whose live run context disappeared and bound channel hot-reload deferrals so stale task records cannot block Discord/Slack/Telegram reloads forever.

changes.title: Discord/语音: audit Discord 语音-channel permissions 在 `channels capabilities` 和 `channels status --probe`, including auto-join targets, so missing Connect/Speak/Read Message History permissions show up 之前 `/vc join`.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/voice: audit Discord voice-channel permissions in `channels capabilities` and `channels status --probe`, including auto-join targets, so missing Connect/Speak/Read Message History permissions show up before `/vc join`.

changes.title: Discord/语音: make 语音 capture less choppy 通过 extending the default post-speech silence grace to 2.5s, 添加 `语音.captureSilenceGraceMs` 为了 noisy Discord sessions, 和 tighten the spoken-output prompt around live STT fragments. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/voice: make voice capture less choppy by extending the default post-speech silence grace to 2.5s, add `voice.captureSilenceGraceMs` for noisy Discord sessions, and tighten the spoken-output prompt around live STT fragments. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: WhatsApp: route proactive phone-number sends through Baileys LID forward mappings 当 available, so LID-addressed contacts receive Agent messages 而不是 creating sender-only ghost chats. 修复 #67378. (#74925) Thanks @edenfunf.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp: route proactive phone-number sends through Baileys LID forward mappings when available, so LID-addressed contacts receive agent messages instead of creating sender-only ghost chats. Fixes #67378. (#74925) Thanks @edenfunf.

changes.title: WhatsApp: send captioned `MEDIA:` directive auto-replies once 而不是 emitting an empty media message 之前 the captioned media reply. (#78770) Thanks @ai-hpc.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp: send captioned `MEDIA:` directive auto-replies once instead of emitting an empty media message before the captioned media reply. (#78770) Thanks @ai-hpc.

changes.title: Codex/approvals: 在 Codex approval modes, 停止 installing the pre-guardian native `PermissionRequest` hook 通过 default so Codex's reviewer can approve safe commands 之前 OpenClaw surfaces an approval, remember `允许-always` decisions 为了 identical Codex native `PermissionRequest` payloads within the active session window, 和 make 插件 approval requests validate/render their actual allowed decisions so Telegram 和 other native approval UIs cannot offer stale actions. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Codex/approvals: in Codex approval modes, stop installing the pre-guardian native `PermissionRequest` hook by default so Codex's reviewer can approve safe commands before OpenClaw surfaces an approval, remember `allow-always` decisions for identical Codex native `PermissionRequest` payloads within the active session window, and make plugin approval requests validate/render their actual allowed decisions so Telegram and other native approval UIs cannot offer stale actions. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 模型 providers: normalize APNG sniffed PNG uploads, 保留 Gemini 3 工具-call thought-signature replay 使用 fallback signatures, accept legacy `__env__:VAR` custom-provider keys, 和 repair snake_case 工具-call transcript sanitization. 修复 #51881, #48915, #77566, 和 #42858.
changes.rawTitle: Model providers: normalize APNG sniffed PNG uploads, preserve Gemini 3 tool-call thought-signature replay with fallback signatures, accept legacy `__env__:VAR` custom-provider keys, and repair snake_case tool-call transcript sanitization. Fixes #51881, #48915, #77566, and #42858.

changes.title: Telegram/模型: parse provider ids containing dots 在 `/模型` callback buttons so `hf.co` 模型 lists render as inline keyboard buttons. 修复 #38745.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/models: parse provider ids containing dots in `/models` callback buttons so `hf.co` model lists render as inline keyboard buttons. Fixes #38745.

items.rawTitle: Doctor/Codex OAuth: preserve working `openai-codex/*` PI routes during `doctor --fix` and recover 2026.5.5-rewritten `openai/*` GPT-5 routes when only Codex OAuth auth is available, so update repair does not break subscription-auth setups. Fixes #78407. Thanks @shakkernerd.

items.title: 模型 providers: normalize APNG sniffed PNG uploads, 保留 Gemini 3 工具-call thought-signature replay 使用 fallback signatures, accept legacy `__env__:VAR` custom-provider keys, 和 repair snake_case 工具-call transcript sanitization. 修复 #51881, #48915, #77566, 和 #42858.
items.rawTitle: Model providers: normalize APNG sniffed PNG uploads, preserve Gemini 3 tool-call thought-signature replay with fallback signatures, accept legacy `__env__:VAR` custom-provider keys, and repair snake_case tool-call transcript sanitization. Fixes #51881, #48915, #77566, and #42858.

changes.title: 诊断工具/OpenAI Codex: revert the 2026.5.5 `诊断工具 --修复` repair that rewrote valid `OpenAI-Codex/*` ChatGPT/Codex OAuth认证 routes to `OpenAI/*`, which could break OAuth认证-only GPT-5.5 setups 或 accidentally move users onto the OpenAI API-密钥 route. If 2026.5.5 already changed your default 模型, run `openclaw 模型 set OpenAI-Codex/gpt-5.5 && openclaw 配置 validate` to switch the default Agent back to the Codex OAuth认证 PI route. 修复 #78407.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/OpenAI Codex: revert the 2026.5.5 `doctor --fix` repair that rewrote valid `openai-codex/*` ChatGPT/Codex OAuth routes to `openai/*`, which could break OAuth-only GPT-5.5 setups or accidentally move users onto the OpenAI API-key route. If 2026.5.5 already changed your default model, run `openclaw models set openai-codex/gpt-5.5 && openclaw config validate` to switch the default agent back to the Codex OAuth PI route. Fixes #78407.

changes.title: 插件/runtime fetch: drop third-party symbol metadata 从 plain request header dictionaries 之前 passing them 进入 native `fetch` 或 `Headers`, so SDK 和 guarded/代理 fetch paths do not reject otherwise valid 插件 requests. 修复 #77846. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/runtime fetch: drop third-party symbol metadata from plain request header dictionaries before passing them into native `fetch` or `Headers`, so SDK and guarded/proxy fetch paths do not reject otherwise valid plugin requests. Fixes #77846. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: Debug 代理: normalize captured fetch header dictionaries 之前 replaying requests so symbol metadata 从 caller-owned header objects cannot make debug-代理 fetches fail.
changes.rawTitle: Debug proxy: normalize captured fetch header dictionaries before replaying requests so symbol metadata from caller-owned header objects cannot make debug-proxy fetches fail.

changes.title: Web fetch: bound guarded dispatcher cleanup 之后 request timeouts so timed-out fetches return 工具 errors 而不是 leaving 网关 工具 lanes active. (#78439) Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Web fetch: bound guarded dispatcher cleanup after request timeouts so timed-out fetches return tool errors instead of leaving Gateway tool lanes active. (#78439) Thanks @obviyus.

items.title: 诊断工具/OpenAI Codex: revert the 2026.5.5 `诊断工具 --修复` repair that rewrote valid `OpenAI-Codex/*` ChatGPT/Codex OAuth认证 routes to `OpenAI/*`, which could break OAuth认证-only GPT-5.5 setups 或 accidentally move users onto the OpenAI API-密钥 route. If 2026.5.5 already changed your default 模型, run `openclaw 模型 set OpenAI-Codex/gpt-5.5 && openclaw 配置 validate` to switch the default Agent back to the Codex OAuth认证 PI route. 修复 #78407.
items.rawTitle: Doctor/OpenAI Codex: revert the 2026.5.5 `doctor --fix` repair that rewrote valid `openai-codex/*` ChatGPT/Codex OAuth routes to `openai/*`, which could break OAuth-only GPT-5.5 setups or accidentally move users onto the OpenAI API-key route. If 2026.5.5 already changed your default model, run `openclaw models set openai-codex/gpt-5.5 && openclaw config validate` to switch the default agent back to the Codex OAuth PI route. Fixes #78407.

items.title: 插件/runtime fetch: drop third-party symbol metadata 从 plain request header dictionaries 之前 passing them 进入 native `fetch` 或 `Headers`, so SDK 和 guarded/代理 fetch paths do not reject otherwise valid 插件 requests. 修复 #77846. Thanks @shakkernerd.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/runtime fetch: drop third-party symbol metadata from plain request header dictionaries before passing them into native `fetch` or `Headers`, so SDK and guarded/proxy fetch paths do not reject otherwise valid plugin requests. Fixes #77846. Thanks @shakkernerd.

items.title: Debug 代理: normalize captured fetch header dictionaries 之前 replaying requests so symbol metadata 从 caller-owned header objects cannot make debug-代理 fetches fail.
items.rawTitle: Debug proxy: normalize captured fetch header dictionaries before replaying requests so symbol metadata from caller-owned header objects cannot make debug-proxy fetches fail.

items.title: Web fetch: bound guarded dispatcher cleanup 之后 request timeouts so timed-out fetches return 工具 errors 而不是 leaving 网关 工具 lanes active. (#78439) Thanks @obviyus.
items.rawTitle: Web fetch: bound guarded dispatcher cleanup after request timeouts so timed-out fetches return tool errors instead of leaving Gateway tool lanes active. (#78439) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: 飞书: hydrate missing native topic starter thread IDs 之前 session routing so first turns 和 follow-ups stay 在 the same topic session. 修复 #78262. Thanks @joeyzenghuan.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu: hydrate missing native topic starter thread IDs before session routing so first turns and follow-ups stay in the same topic session. Fixes #78262. Thanks @joeyzenghuan.

changes.title: LINE: reject `dmPolicy: "open"` configs 不适用 wildcard `allowFrom` so Webhook DMs fail validation 而不是 being acknowledged 和 静默地 blocked 之前 inbound processing. 修复 #78316.
changes.rawTitle: LINE: reject `dmPolicy: "open"` configs without wildcard `allowFrom` so webhook DMs fail validation instead of being acknowledged and silently blocked before inbound processing. Fixes #78316.

changes.title: Telegram/Codex: keep message-工具-only progress drafts visible 和 render native Codex 工具 progress once per 工具 而不是 duplicating item/工具 draft lines. 修复 #75641. (#77949)
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/Codex: keep message-tool-only progress drafts visible and render native Codex tool progress once per tool instead of duplicating item/tool draft lines. Fixes #75641. (#77949)

changes.title: Providers/xAI: 停止 sending OpenAI-style reasoning effort controls to native Grok Responses 模型, so `xai/grok-4.3` no longer fails live Docker/网关 runs 使用 `Invalid reasoning effort`.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/xAI: stop sending OpenAI-style reasoning effort controls to native Grok Responses models, so `xai/grok-4.3` no longer fails live Docker/Gateway runs with `Invalid reasoning effort`.

changes.title: Providers/xAI: clamp the bundled xAI thinking profile to `off` so live 网关 runs cannot send unsupported reasoning levels to native Grok Responses 模型.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/xAI: clamp the bundled xAI thinking profile to `off` so live Gateway runs cannot send unsupported reasoning levels to native Grok Responses models.

changes.title: Matrix/approvals: 重试 approval delivery up to 3 times 使用 a short backoff so transient Matrix send failures do not strand pending approval prompts. (#78179) Thanks @Patrick-Erichsen.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix/approvals: retry approval delivery up to 3 times with a short backoff so transient Matrix send failures do not strand pending approval prompts. (#78179) Thanks @Patrick-Erichsen.

changes.title: Discord/网关: measure heartbeat ACK timeouts 从 the actual heartbeat send, preventing late initial heartbeats 从 triggering false reconnect loops while the channel is still awaiting readiness. 修复 #77668. (#78087) Thanks @bryce-d-greybeard 和 @NikolaFC.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/gateway: measure heartbeat ACK timeouts from the actual heartbeat send, preventing late initial heartbeats from triggering false reconnect loops while the channel is still awaiting readiness. Fixes #77668. (#78087) Thanks @bryce-d-greybeard and @NikolaFC.

changes.title: Discord/guilds: route plain text control commands such as `/steer` through the normal authorization 和 mention gate 而不是 静默地 dropping them 之前 an Agent session can see them. 修复 #78080. Thanks @ramitrkar-hash.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/guilds: route plain text control commands such as `/steer` through the normal authorization and mention gate instead of silently dropping them before an agent session can see them. Fixes #78080. Thanks @ramitrkar-hash.

changes.title: Control 界面/Sessions: make the compaction count a compact `N Checkpoint(s)` disclosure 和 show expanded session-level details 使用 modern checkpoint history cards across responsive table layouts. Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/Sessions: make the compaction count a compact `N Checkpoint(s)` disclosure and show expanded session-level details with modern checkpoint history cards across responsive table layouts. Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.title: Control 界面/性能: keep chat 和 channel tabs responsive while history payloads 和 channel probes are slow, label partial channel status, 和 record slow chat/配置 render timings 在 the event log. Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/performance: keep chat and channel tabs responsive while history payloads and channel probes are slow, label partial channel status, and record slow chat/config render timings in the event log. Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.title: Control 界面/sessions: fire the documented `/new` 命令 和 lifecycle hooks only 为了 explicit Control 界面 session creation, restoring session-内存 和 custom hook capture 不适用 changing SDK parent-session creates. 修复 #76957. Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/sessions: fire the documented `/new` command and lifecycle hooks only for explicit Control UI session creation, restoring session-memory and custom hook capture without changing SDK parent-session creates. Fixes #76957. Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.title: Exec approvals: fall back to a guarded copy 当 Windows rejects rename-overwrite 为了 `exec-approvals.json`, while preserving symlink, hard-link, 和 owner-only permission safeguards. 修复 #77785. (#77907) Thanks @Alex-Alaniz 和 @MilleniumGenAI.
changes.rawTitle: Exec approvals: fall back to a guarded copy when Windows rejects rename-overwrite for `exec-approvals.json`, while preserving symlink, hard-link, and owner-only permission safeguards. Fixes #77785. (#77907) Thanks @Alex-Alaniz and @MilleniumGenAI.

changes.title: Slack: 保留 Socket Mode SDK 错误 context 和 structured Slack API fields 在 reconnect logs, so startup failures no longer collapse to a bare `unknown 错误`.
changes.rawTitle: Slack: preserve Socket Mode SDK error context and structured Slack API fields in reconnect logs, so startup failures no longer collapse to a bare `unknown error`.

changes.title: iOS pairing: 允许 setup-code 和 manual `ws://` connects 为了 private LAN 和 `.local` gateways while keeping Tailscale/public routes 在 `wss://`, 和 prefer explicit 网关 passwords over stale bootstrap tokens 在 mixed-认证 reconnects. 修复 #47887; carries forward #65185. Thanks @draix 和 @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: iOS pairing: allow setup-code and manual `ws://` connects for private LAN and `.local` gateways while keeping Tailscale/public routes on `wss://`, and prefer explicit gateway passwords over stale bootstrap tokens in mixed-auth reconnects. Fixes #47887; carries forward #65185. Thanks @draix and @BunsDev.

changes.title: 插件/diagnostics: make source-only TypeScript package warnings actionable 通过 explaining that missing compiled runtime output is a publisher packaging issue 和 pointing users to 更新/reinstall 或 禁用/uninstall the 插件. 修复 #77835. Thanks @googlerest.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/diagnostics: make source-only TypeScript package warnings actionable by explaining that missing compiled runtime output is a publisher packaging issue and pointing users to update/reinstall or disable/uninstall the plugin. Fixes #77835. Thanks @googlerest.

changes.title: Control 界面/chat: keep persisted assistant progress text visible 当 the same transcript turn also contains 工具-use metadata, so chat.history reloads no longer make those replies vanish 之后 the next user message. 修复 #77374. Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/chat: keep persisted assistant progress text visible when the same transcript turn also contains tool-use metadata, so chat.history reloads no longer make those replies vanish after the next user message. Fixes #77374. Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.title: TUI: skip the generic CLI respawn wrapper 为了 interactive launches, exit cleanly 在 terminal loss, 和 refuse to restore heartbeat sessions as the remembered chat session, preventing stale heartbeat history 和 orphaned `openclaw-tui` processes 在 first boot. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: TUI: skip the generic CLI respawn wrapper for interactive launches, exit cleanly on terminal loss, and refuse to restore heartbeat sessions as the remembered chat session, preventing stale heartbeat history and orphaned `openclaw-tui` processes on first boot. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 诊断工具/sessions: move heartbeat-poisoned default main session store entries to recovery keys 和 clear stale TUI restore pointers, so `诊断工具 --修复` can repair instances already stuck 在 `Agent:main:main` heartbeat history. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/sessions: move heartbeat-poisoned default main session store entries to recovery keys and clear stale TUI restore pointers, so `doctor --fix` can repair instances already stuck on `agent:main:main` heartbeat history. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/context engines: keep hidden OpenClaw runtime-context custom messages out 的 context-engine assemble, afterTurn, 和 ingest hooks so transcript reconstruction 插件 only see conversation messages. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/context engines: keep hidden OpenClaw runtime-context custom messages out of context-engine assemble, afterTurn, and ingest hooks so transcript reconstruction plugins only see conversation messages. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/shutdown: cancel delayed post-ready maintenance 期间 close 和 suppress maintenance/cron startup 之后 quick restarts, preventing orphaned background timers. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/shutdown: cancel delayed post-ready maintenance during close and suppress maintenance/cron startup after quick restarts, preventing orphaned background timers. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/generated media: treat attachment-style message 工具 actions as completed chat sends, preventing duplicate fallback media posts 当 generated files were already uploaded.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/generated media: treat attachment-style message tool actions as completed chat sends, preventing duplicate fallback media posts when generated files were already uploaded.

changes.title: Control 界面/sessions: show each session's Agent runtime 在 the Sessions table 和 允许 filtering 通过 runtime labels, matching the Agent panel runtime wording. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/sessions: show each session's agent runtime in the Sessions table and allow filtering by runtime labels, matching the Agents panel runtime wording. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Discord/streaming: show live reasoning text 在 progress drafts 而不是 a bare `Reasoning` status line.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/streaming: show live reasoning text in progress drafts instead of a bare `Reasoning` status line.

changes.title: 网关/status: 避免 marking fast repeated health/status samples as event-loop degraded 从 CPU/utilization alone until the 网关 has accumulated a sustained sampling window. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/status: avoid marking fast repeated health/status samples as event-loop degraded from CPU/utilization alone until the Gateway has accumulated a sustained sampling window. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 插件/更新: keep installed official npm 和 ClawHub 插件 such as Codex, Discord, WhatsApp, 和 diagnostics 插件 synced 期间 host updates even 当 disabled 或 previously exact-pinned, while preserving third-party 插件 pins. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/update: keep installed official npm and ClawHub plugins such as Codex, Discord, WhatsApp, and diagnostics plugins synced during host updates even when disabled or previously exact-pinned, while preserving third-party plugin pins. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 诊断工具/status: warn 当 `OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN` would shadow a different active `网关.认证.令牌` source 为了 local CLI commands, while avoiding false positives 当 配置 points at the same env 令牌. 修复 #74271. Thanks @yelog.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/status: warn when `OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN` would shadow a different active `gateway.auth.token` source for local CLI commands, while avoiding false positives when config points at the same env token. Fixes #74271. Thanks @yelog.

changes.title: 网关/HTTP: 避免 loading managed outgoing-image media handlers 为了 unrelated requests, so disabled OpenAI-compatible routes return 404 不适用 waiting 在 lazy media sidecars. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/HTTP: avoid loading managed outgoing-image media handlers for unrelated requests, so disabled OpenAI-compatible routes return 404 without waiting on lazy media sidecars. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/OpenAI-compatible: send the assistant role SSE chunk as soon as streaming chat-completion headers are accepted, so cold Agent setup cannot leave `/v1/chat/completions` clients 使用 a bodyless 200 response until their idle 超时 fires.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/OpenAI-compatible: send the assistant role SSE chunk as soon as streaming chat-completion headers are accepted, so cold agent setup cannot leave `/v1/chat/completions` clients with a bodyless 200 response until their idle timeout fires.

changes.title: Agent/media: 避免 direct generated-media completion fallback while the announce-Agent run is still pending, so async video 和 music completions do not duplicate raw media messages. (#77754)
changes.rawTitle: Agents/media: avoid direct generated-media completion fallback while the announce-agent run is still pending, so async video and music completions do not duplicate raw media messages. (#77754)

changes.title: WebChat/Codex media: stage Codex app-server generated local images 进入 managed media 之前 网关 display, so Codex-home image paths no longer hit `LocalMediaAccessError` while keeping Codex home out 的 the display allowlist. Thanks @frankekn.
changes.rawTitle: WebChat/Codex media: stage Codex app-server generated local images into managed media before Gateway display, so Codex-home image paths no longer hit `LocalMediaAccessError` while keeping Codex home out of the display allowlist. Thanks @frankekn.

changes.title: TUI/sessions: bound the session picker to recent rows 和 use exact lookup-style refreshes 为了 the active session, so dusty stores no longer make TUI hydrate weeks-old transcripts 之前 becoming responsive. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: TUI/sessions: bound the session picker to recent rows and use exact lookup-style refreshes for the active session, so dusty stores no longer make TUI hydrate weeks-old transcripts before becoming responsive. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 诊断工具/网关: report recent supervisor restart handoffs 在 `openclaw 诊断工具 --deep`, using the installed service environment 当 available so service-managed clean exits are visible 在 guided diagnostics. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/gateway: report recent supervisor restart handoffs in `openclaw doctor --deep`, using the installed service environment when available so service-managed clean exits are visible in guided diagnostics. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: 网关/status: show recent supervisor restart handoffs 在 `openclaw 网关 status --deep`, including JSON details, so clean service-managed restarts are reported as restart handoffs 而不是 opaque stopped-service diagnostics. Thanks @shakkernerd.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/status: show recent supervisor restart handoffs in `openclaw gateway status --deep`, including JSON details, so clean service-managed restarts are reported as restart handoffs instead of opaque stopped-service diagnostics. Thanks @shakkernerd.

changes.title: Providers/Fireworks: expose Kimi 模型 as thinking-off-only 和 keep K2.5/K2.6 requests 在 `thinking: disabled`, so manual 模型 switches do not send Fireworks-rejected `reasoning*` parameters. Refs #74289. Thanks @frankekn.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Fireworks: expose Kimi models as thinking-off-only and keep K2.5/K2.6 requests on `thinking: disabled`, so manual model switches do not send Fireworks-rejected `reasoning*` parameters. Refs #74289. Thanks @frankekn.

changes.title: WhatsApp responsiveness: 停止 only verified stale local TUI clients 当 they degrade the 网关 event loop 和 delay replies. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp responsiveness: stop only verified stale local TUI clients when they degrade the Gateway event loop and delay replies. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/更新: repair stale managed npm-root `openclaw` peer packages 之前 插件 installs, so beta-channel official 插件 updates are not downgraded 通过 old core package-lock state. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/update: repair stale managed npm-root `openclaw` peer packages before plugin installs, so beta-channel official plugin updates are not downgraded by old core package-lock state. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/install: reassert managed npm 插件 `openclaw` peer links 之后 shared-root npm installs, updates, 和 uninstalls, so mutating one 插件 does not leave previously installed SDK-using 插件 unable to 解决 `openclaw/插件-sdk/*`.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: reassert managed npm plugin `openclaw` peer links after shared-root npm installs, updates, and uninstalls, so mutating one plugin does not leave previously installed SDK-using plugins unable to resolve `openclaw/plugin-sdk/*`.

changes.title: Hooks/session-内存: 添加 collision suffixes to fallback 内存 filenames so repeated `/new` 或 `/reset` captures 在 the same minute do not overwrite the earlier session archive. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Hooks/session-memory: add collision suffixes to fallback memory filenames so repeated `/new` or `/reset` captures in the same minute do not overwrite the earlier session archive. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/配置: 移除 the ambiguous legacy `main` Agent dir helper 从 runtime paths; 模型, 认证, 网关, bundled 插件, 和 test helpers 现在 解决 default/session Agent dirs through `Agent.list`/Agent-scope helpers while 插件 SDK keeps a deprecated compatibility export.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/config: remove the ambiguous legacy `main` agent dir helper from runtime paths; model, auth, gateway, bundled plugin, and test helpers now resolve default/session agent dirs through `agents.list`/agent-scope helpers while plugin SDK keeps a deprecated compatibility export.

changes.title: CLI/status: show the selected Agent runtime/harness 在 `openclaw status` session rows so terminal status matches the `/status` runtime line. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/status: show the selected agent runtime/harness in `openclaw status` session rows so terminal status matches the `/status` runtime line. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: CLI/sessions: prune old unreferenced transcript, compaction checkpoint, 和 trajectory artifacts 期间 normal `sessions cleanup`, so 网关 restart 或 崩溃 orphans do not accumulate indefinitely outside `sessions.json`. 修复 #77608. Thanks @slideshow-dingo.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/sessions: prune old unreferenced transcript, compaction checkpoint, and trajectory artifacts during normal `sessions cleanup`, so gateway restart or crash orphans do not accumulate indefinitely outside `sessions.json`. Fixes #77608. Thanks @slideshow-dingo.

changes.title: 诊断工具/Codex: repair legacy `OpenAI-Codex/*` routes 在 primary 模型, fallbacks, heartbeat/subagent/compaction overrides, hooks, channel overrides, 和 stale session pins to canonical `OpenAI/*`, selecting `agentRuntime.id: "Codex"` only 当 the Codex 插件 is installed, enabled, contributes the `Codex` harness, 和 has usable OAuth认证; otherwise select `agentRuntime.id: "pi"`. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/Codex: repair legacy `openai-codex/*` routes in primary models, fallbacks, heartbeat/subagent/compaction overrides, hooks, channel overrides, and stale session pins to canonical `openai/*`, selecting `agentRuntime.id: "codex"` only when the Codex plugin is installed, enabled, contributes the `codex` harness, and has usable OAuth; otherwise select `agentRuntime.id: "pi"`. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/更新: keep installed official npm 和 ClawHub 插件 such as Codex, Discord, WhatsApp, 和 diagnostics 插件 synced 期间 host updates even 当 disabled 或 previously exact-pinned, while preserving third-party 插件 pins. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/update: keep installed official npm and ClawHub plugins such as Codex, Discord, WhatsApp, and diagnostics plugins synced during host updates even when disabled or previously exact-pinned, while preserving third-party plugin pins. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Video generation: accept provider-specific aspect-ratio 和 resolution hints at the 工具 boundary, normalize `720P` to MiniMax's supported `768P`, 和 停止 sending Google `generateAudio` 在 Gemini video requests so provider fallback can recover 从 模型-specific parameter differences. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Video generation: accept provider-specific aspect-ratio and resolution hints at the tool boundary, normalize `720P` to MiniMax's supported `768P`, and stop sending Google `generateAudio` on Gemini video requests so provider fallback can recover from model-specific parameter differences. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Status: show compact 网关 process uptime 和 host system uptime 在 `/status`, making restart 和 host-lifetime checks visible 从 chat. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Status: show compact Gateway process uptime and host system uptime in `/status`, making restart and host-lifetime checks visible from chat. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: WhatsApp responsiveness: 停止 only verified stale local TUI clients 当 they degrade the 网关 event loop 和 delay replies. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp responsiveness: stop only verified stale local TUI clients when they degrade the Gateway event loop and delay replies. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Hooks/session-内存: run reset 内存 capture off the 命令 reply 路径 和 make 模型-generated 内存 filename slugs opt-在 使用 `llmSlug: true`, so `/new` 和 `/reset` no longer block WhatsApp 和 other message-channel reset replies 在 hook housekeeping 或 a nested 模型 call. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Hooks/session-memory: run reset memory capture off the command reply path and make model-generated memory filename slugs opt-in with `llmSlug: true`, so `/new` and `/reset` no longer block WhatsApp and other message-channel reset replies on hook housekeeping or a nested model call. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: CLI/网关: pause non-TTY stdin 之后 full CLI 命令 completion 和 停止 `openclaw Agent` 从 falling back to embedded mode 之后 网关 request/认证 failures, so parent help commands exit cleanly 和 scoped delivery probes surface the real 网关 错误 immediately. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/gateway: pause non-TTY stdin after full CLI command completion and stop `openclaw agent` from falling back to embedded mode after gateway request/auth failures, so parent help commands exit cleanly and scoped delivery probes surface the real Gateway error immediately. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/模型 catalog: cache empty read-only 模型 catalog results until reload, so TUI 和 control-plane refresh loops cannot hammer 插件 metadata reads 当 no usable 模型 are currently discovered. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/model catalog: cache empty read-only model catalog results until reload, so TUI and control-plane refresh loops cannot hammer plugin metadata reads when no usable models are currently discovered. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Hooks/session-内存: 添加 collision suffixes to fallback 内存 filenames so repeated `/new` 或 `/reset` captures 在 the same minute do not overwrite the earlier session archive. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Hooks/session-memory: add collision suffixes to fallback memory filenames so repeated `/new` or `/reset` captures in the same minute do not overwrite the earlier session archive. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: TUI/sessions: bound the session picker to recent rows 和 use exact lookup-style refreshes 为了 the active session, so dusty stores no longer make TUI hydrate weeks-old transcripts 之前 becoming responsive. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: TUI/sessions: bound the session picker to recent rows and use exact lookup-style refreshes for the active session, so dusty stores no longer make TUI hydrate weeks-old transcripts before becoming responsive. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Agents/context engines: keep hidden OpenClaw runtime-context custom messages out of context-engine assemble, afterTurn, and ingest hooks so transcript reconstruction plugins only see conversation messages. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: TUI: skip the generic CLI respawn wrapper 为了 interactive launches, exit cleanly 在 terminal loss, 和 refuse to restore heartbeat sessions as the remembered chat session, preventing stale heartbeat history 和 orphaned `openclaw-tui` processes 在 first boot. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 诊断工具/sessions: move heartbeat-poisoned default main session store entries to recovery keys 和 clear stale TUI restore pointers, so `诊断工具 --修复` can repair instances already stuck 在 `Agent:main:main` heartbeat history. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: Exec approvals: fall back to a guarded copy 当 Windows rejects rename-overwrite 为了 `exec-approvals.json`, while preserving symlink, hard-link, 和 owner-only permission safeguards. 修复 #77785. (#77907) Thanks @Alex-Alaniz 和 @MilleniumGenAI.
items.rawTitle: Exec approvals: fall back to a guarded copy when Windows rejects rename-overwrite for `exec-approvals.json`, while preserving symlink, hard-link, and owner-only permission safeguards. Fixes #77785. (#77907) Thanks @Alex-Alaniz and @MilleniumGenAI.

items.title: 插件/diagnostics: make source-only TypeScript package warnings actionable 通过 explaining that missing compiled runtime output is a publisher packaging issue 和 pointing users to 更新/reinstall 或 禁用/uninstall the 插件. 修复 #77835. Thanks @googlerest.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/diagnostics: make source-only TypeScript package warnings actionable by explaining that missing compiled runtime output is a publisher packaging issue and pointing users to update/reinstall or disable/uninstall the plugin. Fixes #77835. Thanks @googlerest.

items.title: 诊断工具/网关: report recent supervisor restart handoffs 在 `openclaw 诊断工具 --deep`, using the installed service environment 当 available so service-managed clean exits are visible 在 guided diagnostics. Thanks @shakkernerd.
items.rawTitle: Doctor/gateway: report recent supervisor restart handoffs in `openclaw doctor --deep`, using the installed service environment when available so service-managed clean exits are visible in guided diagnostics. Thanks @shakkernerd.

items.title: 插件/install: reassert managed npm 插件 `openclaw` peer links 之后 shared-root npm installs, updates, 和 uninstalls, so mutating one 插件 does not leave previously installed SDK-using 插件 unable to 解决 `openclaw/插件-sdk/*`.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/install: reassert managed npm plugin `openclaw` peer links after shared-root npm installs, updates, and uninstalls, so mutating one plugin does not leave previously installed SDK-using plugins unable to resolve `openclaw/plugin-sdk/*`.

items.title: Agent/配置: 移除 the ambiguous legacy `main` Agent dir helper 从 runtime paths; 模型, 认证, 网关, bundled 插件, 和 test helpers 现在 解决 default/session Agent dirs through `Agent.list`/Agent-scope helpers while 插件 SDK keeps a deprecated compatibility export.
items.rawTitle: Agents/config: remove the ambiguous legacy `main` agent dir helper from runtime paths; model, auth, gateway, bundled plugin, and test helpers now resolve default/session agent dirs through `agents.list`/agent-scope helpers while plugin SDK keeps a deprecated compatibility export.

items.title: 网关/模型 catalog: cache empty read-only 模型 catalog results until reload, so TUI 和 control-plane refresh loops cannot hammer 插件 metadata reads 当 no usable 模型 are currently discovered. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/model catalog: cache empty read-only model catalog results until reload, so TUI and control-plane refresh loops cannot hammer plugin metadata reads when no usable models are currently discovered. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 更新/插件: tolerate corrupt managed 插件 records 期间 更新 so core package updates can still complete 和 report the 插件 repair 路径.
items.rawTitle: Update/plugins: tolerate corrupt managed plugin records during update so core package updates can still complete and report the plugin repair path.

items.title: TUI: skip the generic CLI respawn wrapper 为了 interactive launches, exit cleanly 在 terminal loss, 和 refuse to restore heartbeat sessions as the remembered chat session, preventing stale heartbeat history 和 orphaned `openclaw-tui` processes 在 first boot. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: TUI: skip the generic CLI respawn wrapper for interactive launches, exit cleanly on terminal loss, and refuse to restore heartbeat sessions as the remembered chat session, preventing stale heartbeat history and orphaned `openclaw-tui` processes on first boot. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Google Meet/语音 Call: make Twilio dial-在 joins speak through the realtime Gemini 语音 bridge 使用 paced audio streaming, backpressure-aware buffering, barge-在 queue clearing, 和 no TwiML fallback 期间 realtime speech, giving Meet participants a much snappier OpenClaw 语音 Agent. (#77064) Thanks @scoootscooob.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet/Voice Call: make Twilio dial-in joins speak through the realtime Gemini voice bridge with paced audio streaming, backpressure-aware buffering, barge-in queue clearing, and no TwiML fallback during realtime speech, giving Meet participants a much snappier OpenClaw voice agent. (#77064) Thanks @scoootscooob.

changes.title: 网关/Windows: bind the default loopback 网关 listener only to `127.0.0.1` 在 Windows so libuv's dual-stack `::1` behavior cannot wedge localhost HTTP requests. (#69701, 修复 #69674) Thanks @SARAMALI15792.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/Windows: bind the default loopback gateway listener only to `127.0.0.1` on Windows so libuv's dual-stack `::1` behavior cannot wedge localhost HTTP requests. (#69701, fixes #69674) Thanks @SARAMALI15792.

changes.title: 插件/migration: emit catalog-backed install hints 当 `插件.entries` 或 `插件.允许` references an official external 插件 that is not installed, so upgraded configs point operators to `openclaw 插件 install <spec>` 而不是 telling them to 移除 valid 插件 配置. (#77483) Thanks @hclsys.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/migration: emit catalog-backed install hints when `plugins.entries` or `plugins.allow` references an official external plugin that is not installed, so upgraded configs point operators to `openclaw plugins install <spec>` instead of telling them to remove valid plugin config. (#77483) Thanks @hclsys.

changes.title: OpenAI/Codex media: advertise Codex audio transcription 在 runtime 和 manifest metadata 和 route active Codex chat 模型 to the OpenAI transcription default 而不是 sending chat 模型 ids to audio transcription. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI/Codex media: advertise Codex audio transcription in runtime and manifest metadata and route active Codex chat models to the OpenAI transcription default instead of sending chat model ids to audio transcription. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Dependencies: refresh runtime 和 provider packages including Pi 0.73.0, ACPX adapters, OpenAI, Anthropic, Slack, 和 TypeScript native preview, while keeping the Bedrock runtime installer override pinned below the Windows ARM Node 24 npm resolver failure.
changes.rawTitle: Dependencies: refresh runtime and provider packages including Pi 0.73.0, ACPX adapters, OpenAI, Anthropic, Slack, and TypeScript native preview, while keeping the Bedrock runtime installer override pinned below the Windows ARM Node 24 npm resolver failure.

changes.title: Agent/性能: pass the resolved workspace through BTW, compaction, embedded-run 模型 generation, 和 PDF 模型 setup so explicit Agent-dir 模型 refreshes can 复用 the current workspace-scoped 插件 metadata snapshot 而不是 falling back to cold 插件 metadata scans. (#77519, #77532)
changes.rawTitle: Agents/performance: pass the resolved workspace through BTW, compaction, embedded-run model generation, and PDF model setup so explicit agent-dir model refreshes can reuse the current workspace-scoped plugin metadata snapshot instead of falling back to cold plugin metadata scans. (#77519, #77532)

changes.title: 插件/性能: let unscoped 模型 catalog 和 manifest-contract readers 复用 the current workspace-compatible 插件 metadata snapshot, avoiding repeated cold 插件 metadata scans 在 hot control-plane paths while preserving env/配置/workspace compatibility checks. (#77519, #77532)
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/performance: let unscoped model catalog and manifest-contract readers reuse the current workspace-compatible plugin metadata snapshot, avoiding repeated cold plugin metadata scans on hot control-plane paths while preserving env/config/workspace compatibility checks. (#77519, #77532)

changes.title: 配置/插件 auto-启用: prefer the claiming 插件 manifest id over a built-在 channel alias 当 auto-allowlisting a configured channel, so WeCom/Yuanbao-style aliases 解决 to the installed 插件 id. Thanks @Beandon13.
changes.rawTitle: Config/plugin auto-enable: prefer the claiming plugin manifest id over a built-in channel alias when auto-allowlisting a configured channel, so WeCom/Yuanbao-style aliases resolve to the installed plugin id. Thanks @Beandon13.

changes.title: Secrets/apply: 保留 认证-profile `keyRef` 和 `tokenRef` fields 当 scrubbing provider-target secrets, so the canonical SecretRef metadata survives `secrets apply` 不适用 keeping plaintext values. Thanks @Beandon13.
changes.rawTitle: Secrets/apply: preserve auth-profile `keyRef` and `tokenRef` fields when scrubbing provider-target secrets, so the canonical SecretRef metadata survives `secrets apply` without keeping plaintext values. Thanks @Beandon13.

changes.title: 插件/active-内存: skip session-store channel entries that contain `:` 当 resolving the recall subagent's channel, so QQ c2c Agent IDs (e.g. `c2c:10D4F7C2…`) 和 other scoped conversation IDs do not reach bundled-插件 `dirName` validation 和 崩溃 the recall run. The same guard already applied to explicit `channelId` params (#76704); this extends it to store-derived channels. (#77396) Thanks @hclsys.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/active-memory: skip session-store channel entries that contain `:` when resolving the recall subagent's channel, so QQ c2c agent IDs (e.g. `c2c:10D4F7C2…`) and other scoped conversation IDs do not reach bundled-plugin `dirName` validation and crash the recall run. The same guard already applied to explicit `channelId` params (#76704); this extends it to store-derived channels. (#77396) Thanks @hclsys.

changes.title: Secrets/external channel contracts: also look 在 `<rootDir>/dist/` 当 resolving the `secret-contract-API` sidecar, so npm-published externalized channel 插件 (e.g. `@openclaw/Discord` since 2026.5.2) whose compiled artifacts live under `dist/` actually contribute their channel SecretRef contracts to the runtime snapshot. 不适用 this, env-backed `channels.Discord.令牌` SecretRefs 静默地 failed to 解决 at 网关 start 在 2026.5.3, leaving the channel `not configured` even though #76449 had landed the generic external-contract loader. Thanks @mogglemoss.
changes.rawTitle: Secrets/external channel contracts: also look in `<rootDir>/dist/` when resolving the `secret-contract-api` sidecar, so npm-published externalized channel plugins (e.g. `@openclaw/discord` since 2026.5.2) whose compiled artifacts live under `dist/` actually contribute their channel SecretRef contracts to the runtime snapshot. Without this, env-backed `channels.discord.token` SecretRefs silently failed to resolve at gateway start on 2026.5.3, leaving the channel `not configured` even though #76449 had landed the generic external-contract loader. Thanks @mogglemoss.

changes.title: 模型/认证: 添加 `openclaw 模型 认证 list [--provider <id>] [--json]` so users can inspect saved per-Agent 认证 profiles 不适用 dumping secrets 或 hitting the old “too many arguments” 路径. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Models/auth: add `openclaw models auth list [--provider <id>] [--json]` so users can inspect saved per-agent auth profiles without dumping secrets or hitting the old “too many arguments” path. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Control UI/header: show the active agent name in dashboard breadcrumbs without adding the current session key, keeping non-chat views oriented without crowding the topbar.

changes.title: Channels/WhatsApp: 支持 explicit WhatsApp Channel/Newsletter `@newsletter` outbound message targets 使用 channel session metadata 而不是 DM routing. 修复 #13417; carries forward the narrow outbound target idea 从 #13424. Thanks @vincentkoc 和 @agentz-manfred.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/WhatsApp: support explicit WhatsApp Channel/Newsletter `@newsletter` outbound message targets with channel session metadata instead of DM routing. Fixes #13417; carries forward the narrow outbound target idea from #13424. Thanks @vincentkoc and @agentz-manfred.

changes.title: Exec approvals: 添加 a tree-sitter-backed shell 命令 explainer 为了 future approval 和 命令-review surfaces. (#75004) Thanks @jesse-merhi.
changes.rawTitle: Exec approvals: add a tree-sitter-backed shell command explainer for future approval and command-review surfaces. (#75004) Thanks @jesse-merhi.

changes.title: Agent/sandbox: store sandbox container 和 浏览器 registry entries as per-runtime shard files, reducing unrelated session lock contention while `openclaw 诊断工具 --修复` migrates legacy monolithic registry files. (#74831) Thanks @luckylhb90.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/sandbox: store sandbox container and browser registry entries as per-runtime shard files, reducing unrelated session lock contention while `openclaw doctor --fix` migrates legacy monolithic registry files. (#74831) Thanks @luckylhb90.

changes.title: 插件/ClawHub: annotate 429 errors 从 ClawHub 使用 the reset window 从 `RateLimit-Reset`/`重试-之后` 和 append a `Sign 在 为了 higher rate limits.` hint 当 the request was unauthenticated, so users can see 当 downloads will recover 和 how to lift the cap. Thanks @romneyda.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/ClawHub: annotate 429 errors from ClawHub with the reset window from `RateLimit-Reset`/`Retry-After` and append a `Sign in for higher rate limits.` hint when the request was unauthenticated, so users can see when downloads will recover and how to lift the cap. Thanks @romneyda.

changes.title: 插件/runtime state: 添加 `registerIfAbsent` 为了 atomic keyed-store dedupe claims that return whether a 插件 成功地 claimed a 密钥 不适用 overwriting an existing live value. Thanks @amknight.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/runtime state: add `registerIfAbsent` for atomic keyed-store dedupe claims that return whether a plugin successfully claimed a key without overwriting an existing live value. Thanks @amknight.

changes.title: 插件 SDK: 添加 插件-owned `SessionEntry` slot projection 和 scoped trusted-policy session extension reads. (#75609; replaces part 的 #73384/#74483) Thanks @100yenadmin.
changes.rawTitle: Plugin SDK: add plugin-owned `SessionEntry` slot projection and scoped trusted-policy session extension reads. (#75609; replaces part of #73384/#74483) Thanks @100yenadmin.

changes.title: Sandbox/Windows: accept drive-absolute Docker bind sources while keeping sandbox blocked-路径 和 allowed-root policy comparisons Windows-case-insensitive. (#42174) Thanks @6607changchun.
changes.rawTitle: Sandbox/Windows: accept drive-absolute Docker bind sources while keeping sandbox blocked-path and allowed-root policy comparisons Windows-case-insensitive. (#42174) Thanks @6607changchun.

changes.title: 插件/install: honor the beta 更新 channel 为了 onboarding 和 诊断工具-managed 插件 installs 通过 requesting floating npm 和 ClawHub specs 使用 `@beta` while keeping persistent install records 在 the catalog default. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: honor the beta update channel for onboarding and doctor-managed plugin installs by requesting floating npm and ClawHub specs with `@beta` while keeping persistent install records on the catalog default. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: WhatsApp/onboarding: canonicalize setup 和 pairing allowlist entries to WhatsApp's digit-only phone ids while still accepting E.164, JID, 和 `WhatsApp:` inputs, so personal-phone allowlists match WhatsApp Web sender ids 之后 setup. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp/onboarding: canonicalize setup and pairing allowlist entries to WhatsApp's digit-only phone ids while still accepting E.164, JID, and `whatsapp:` inputs, so personal-phone allowlists match WhatsApp Web sender ids after setup. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/startup: load provider 插件 that own explicitly configured image, video, 或 music generation defaults so generation tools become live 之后 网关 restart 而不是 remaining catalog-only. 修复 #77244. Thanks @buyuangtampan, @Nikoxx99, 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: load provider plugins that own explicitly configured image, video, or music generation defaults so generation tools become live after gateway restart instead of remaining catalog-only. Fixes #77244. Thanks @buyuangtampan, @Nikoxx99, and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Slack/subagents: keep resumed parent `message.send` calls 在 the originating Slack thread 当 ambient session thread context is present, 和 suppress successful silent child completion rows 从 follow-up findings. Thanks @bek91.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/subagents: keep resumed parent `message.send` calls in the originating Slack thread when ambient session thread context is present, and suppress successful silent child completion rows from follow-up findings. Thanks @bek91.

changes.title: Slack/mentions: record thread participation 为了 successful visible threaded Slack sends, including message-工具 和 media delivery paths, so unmentioned replies 在 bot-participated threads can bypass mention gating as documented. 修复 #77648. Thanks @bek91.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/mentions: record thread participation for successful visible threaded Slack sends, including message-tool and media delivery paths, so unmentioned replies in bot-participated threads can bypass mention gating as documented. Fixes #77648. Thanks @bek91.

changes.title: Infra/Windows: skip the POSIX `/tmp/openclaw` preferred 路径 在 Windows 在 `resolvePreferredOpenClawTmpDir` so log files, TTS temp files, 和 other writes land 在 `%TEMP%\openclaw-<uid>` 而不是 `C:\tmp\openclaw`. 修复 #60713. Thanks @juan-flores077.
changes.rawTitle: Infra/Windows: skip the POSIX `/tmp/openclaw` preferred path on Windows in `resolvePreferredOpenClawTmpDir` so log files, TTS temp files, and other writes land in `%TEMP%\openclaw-<uid>` instead of `C:\tmp\openclaw`. Fixes #60713. Thanks @juan-flores077.

changes.title: Media/Windows: open saved attachment temp files read/write 之前 fsync so Windows WebChat 和 `chat.send` media offloads no longer fail 使用 EPERM 期间 durability flush. (#76593) Thanks @qq230849622-a11y.
changes.rawTitle: Media/Windows: open saved attachment temp files read/write before fsync so Windows WebChat and `chat.send` media offloads no longer fail with EPERM during durability flush. (#76593) Thanks @qq230849622-a11y.

changes.title: Agent/tools: honor narrow runtime 工具 allowlists 当 constructing embedded-runner 工具 families 和 bundled MCP协议/LSP runtimes, so cron/subagent runs that request tools such as `update_plan`, `浏览器`, `x_search`, channel login tools, 或 `group:插件` no longer start 使用 missing tools 或 unrelated bootstrap work. (#77519, #77532)
changes.rawTitle: Agents/tools: honor narrow runtime tool allowlists when constructing embedded-runner tool families and bundled MCP/LSP runtimes, so cron/subagent runs that request tools such as `update_plan`, `browser`, `x_search`, channel login tools, or `group:plugins` no longer start with missing tools or unrelated bootstrap work. (#77519, #77532)

changes.title: Codex 插件: mirror the experimental upstream app-server protocol 和 format generated TypeScript 之前 drift checks, keeping OpenClaw's `experimentalApi` bridge compatible 使用 latest Codex while preserving formatter gates.
changes.rawTitle: Codex plugin: mirror the experimental upstream app-server protocol and format generated TypeScript before drift checks, keeping OpenClaw's `experimentalApi` bridge compatible with latest Codex while preserving formatter gates.

changes.title: Telegram/media: derive no-caption inbound media placeholders 从 saved MIME metadata 而不是 the Telegram `photo` shape, so non-image 和 mixed attachments no longer reach the 模型 as `<media:image>`. 修复 #69793. Thanks @aspalagin.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/media: derive no-caption inbound media placeholders from saved MIME metadata instead of the Telegram `photo` shape, so non-image and mixed attachments no longer reach the model as `<media:image>`. Fixes #69793. Thanks @aspalagin.

changes.title: Telegram/streaming: 复用 the active preview as the first chunk 为了 long text finals, so multi-chunk replies no longer create a transient extra bubble that appears 和 then disappears. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/streaming: reuse the active preview as the first chunk for long text finals, so multi-chunk replies no longer create a transient extra bubble that appears and then disappears. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/cache: keep per-turn runtime context out 的 ordinary chat system prompts while still delivering hidden current-turn context, restoring prompt-cache 复用 在 chat continuations. 修复 #77431. Thanks @Udjin79.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/cache: keep per-turn runtime context out of ordinary chat system prompts while still delivering hidden current-turn context, restoring prompt-cache reuse on chat continuations. Fixes #77431. Thanks @Udjin79.

changes.title: 网关/startup: include resolved thinking 和 fast-mode defaults 在 the `Agent 模型` startup log line, defaulting unset startup thinking to `medium` 不适用 mixing 在 reasoning visibility.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: include resolved thinking and fast-mode defaults in the `agent model` startup log line, defaulting unset startup thinking to `medium` without mixing in reasoning visibility.

changes.title: 网关/更新: 解决 local 网关 probe 认证 从 the installed 配置 期间 post-更新 restart verification, so 令牌/device-authenticated VPS gateways are not misreported as unhealthy port conflicts 之后 a package swap. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/update: resolve local gateway probe auth from the installed config during post-update restart verification, so token/device-authenticated VPS gateways are not misreported as unhealthy port conflicts after a package swap. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/Tools: 添加 post-compaction loop guard 在 `pi-embedded-runner` that arms 之后 auto-compaction-重试 和 aborts the run 使用 `compaction_loop_persisted` 当 the Agent emits the same `(工具, args, result)` triple `windowSize` times (default 3) within that window. 禁用 via existing `tools.loopDetection.enabled`; tune via `tools.loopDetection.postCompactionGuard.windowSize`. Targets the failure mode where context-overflow + compaction does not break a 工具-call loop. Refs #77474; carries forward #21597. Thanks @efpiva.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Tools: add post-compaction loop guard in `pi-embedded-runner` that arms after auto-compaction-retry and aborts the run with `compaction_loop_persisted` when the agent emits the same `(tool, args, result)` triple `windowSize` times (default 3) within that window. Disable via existing `tools.loopDetection.enabled`; tune via `tools.loopDetection.postCompactionGuard.windowSize`. Targets the failure mode where context-overflow + compaction does not break a tool-call loop. Refs #77474; carries forward #21597. Thanks @efpiva.

changes.title: 网关/watch: suppress sync-I/O trace output 期间 `pnpm 网关:watch --benchmark` unless explicitly requested, so CPU profiling no longer floods the terminal 使用 stack traces.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/watch: suppress sync-I/O trace output during `pnpm gateway:watch --benchmark` unless explicitly requested, so CPU profiling no longer floods the terminal with stack traces.

changes.title: 网关/watch: 当 benchmark sync-I/O tracing is explicitly enabled, tee trace blocks to the benchmark output log 和 filter them 从 the terminal pane while keeping normal 网关 logs visible.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/watch: when benchmark sync-I/O tracing is explicitly enabled, tee trace blocks to the benchmark output log and filter them from the terminal pane while keeping normal Gateway logs visible.

changes.title: 插件/runtime-deps: include `json5` 在 the 内存-core 插件 runtime dependency set so packaged `memory_search` sandboxes can 解决 generated OpenClaw runtime chunks that parse JSON5 配置. 修复 #77461.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/runtime-deps: include `json5` in the memory-core plugin runtime dependency set so packaged `memory_search` sandboxes can resolve generated OpenClaw runtime chunks that parse JSON5 config. Fixes #77461.

changes.title: 插件/Windows: show a Git install hint 当 npm 插件 installation fails 使用 `spawn git ENOENT`, 和 document the WhatsApp 插件's Git-在-路径 requirement 为了 Baileys/libsignal installs.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Windows: show a Git install hint when npm plugin installation fails with `spawn git ENOENT`, and document the WhatsApp plugin's Git-on-PATH requirement for Baileys/libsignal installs.

changes.title: Codex harness: 保留 app-server usage-limit reset details 和 deliver OpenClaw-owned runtime failure notices through 工具-only source-reply mode, so Telegram 和 other chat channels tell users 当 Codex subscription limits 或 API failures block a turn 而不是 going silent. (#77557) Thanks @pashpashpash.
changes.rawTitle: Codex harness: preserve app-server usage-limit reset details and deliver OpenClaw-owned runtime failure notices through tool-only source-reply mode, so Telegram and other chat channels tell users when Codex subscription limits or API failures block a turn instead of going silent. (#77557) Thanks @pashpashpash.

changes.title: Agent/OpenAI: default direct OpenAI Responses 模型 to the SSE transport 而不是 WebSocket auto-selection, preventing pi runtime chat turns 从 hanging 在 servers where the WebSocket 路径 stalls while the OpenAI HTTP stream works. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/OpenAI: default direct OpenAI Responses models to the SSE transport instead of WebSocket auto-selection, preventing pi runtime chat turns from hanging on servers where the WebSocket path stalls while the OpenAI HTTP stream works. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/更新: repair missing 插件-local `openclaw` peer links 之前 skipping unchanged npm 插件 updates, so current external Codex installs can recover `openclaw/插件-sdk/*` resolution 期间 OTA repair. (#77544) Thanks @ProspectOre.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/update: repair missing plugin-local `openclaw` peer links before skipping unchanged npm plugin updates, so current external Codex installs can recover `openclaw/plugin-sdk/*` resolution during OTA repair. (#77544) Thanks @ProspectOre.

changes.title: Discord/replies: treat failed final reply delivery as a failed turn 而不是 counting it as a delivered automatic visible reply, so guild/channel turns no longer show done 当 the final message was dropped. 修复 #77520. Thanks @Patrick-Erichsen.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/replies: treat failed final reply delivery as a failed turn instead of counting it as a delivered automatic visible reply, so guild/channel turns no longer show done when the final message was dropped. Fixes #77520. Thanks @Patrick-Erichsen.

changes.title: Discord: prefer IPv4 为了 Discord REST 和 网关 WebSocket startup paths so IPv4-only networks no longer stall 之前 网关 READY 和 inbound message dispatch. 修复 #77398; refs #77526. Thanks @Beandon13.
changes.rawTitle: Discord: prefer IPv4 for Discord REST and gateway WebSocket startup paths so IPv4-only networks no longer stall before Gateway READY and inbound message dispatch. Fixes #77398; refs #77526. Thanks @Beandon13.

changes.title: Channels/插件: 密钥 bundled package-state probes, env/配置 presence, 和 read-only 命令 defaults 通过 channel id 而不是 manifest 插件 id, preserving setup 和 native-命令 detection 为了 channel 插件 whose package id differs 从 the channel alias. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/plugins: key bundled package-state probes, env/config presence, and read-only command defaults by channel id instead of manifest plugin id, preserving setup and native-command detection for channel plugins whose package id differs from the channel alias. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Docker: prune package-excluded 插件 dist directories 从 runtime images unless the build explicitly opts that 插件 在, so official external 插件 such as 飞书 stay install-在-demand 而不是 shipping partial metadata 不适用 compiled runtime output. 修复 #77424. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Docker: prune package-excluded plugin dist directories from runtime images unless the build explicitly opts that plugin in, so official external plugins such as Feishu stay install-on-demand instead of shipping partial metadata without compiled runtime output. Fixes #77424. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 模型 switching: include the exact additive allowlist repair 命令 当 `/模型 ... --runtime ...` targets a blocked 模型, 和 make Telegram's 模型 picker say that it changes only the session 模型 while leaving the runtime unchanged. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Model switching: include the exact additive allowlist repair command when `/model ... --runtime ...` targets a blocked model, and make Telegram's model picker say that it changes only the session model while leaving the runtime unchanged. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Mattermost: clarify that the 模型 picker only changes the session 模型 和 that runtime switches require `/oc_model <provider/模型> --runtime <runtime>`. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Mattermost: clarify that the model picker only changes the session model and that runtime switches require `/oc_model <provider/model> --runtime <runtime>`. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 诊断工具/配置: keep active `认证.profiles` metadata intact 当 `诊断工具 --修复` strips stale secret fields 从 configs, repairing legacy `<provider>:default` API-密钥 profile metadata 当 模型 fallbacks 或 explicit `模型@profile` refs still depend 在 it. 修复 #77400.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/config: keep active `auth.profiles` metadata intact when `doctor --fix` strips stale secret fields from configs, repairing legacy `<provider>:default` API-key profile metadata when model fallbacks or explicit `model@profile` refs still depend on it. Fixes #77400.

changes.title: 诊断工具/插件: include `插件.允许`-only official 插件 ids 在 the release configured-插件 repair set, so `诊断工具 --修复` installs official external 插件 that are configured 但是 not yet loaded 而不是 removing them as stale 允许 entries. 修复 #77155. Thanks @hclsys.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/plugins: include `plugins.allow`-only official plugin ids in the release configured-plugin repair set, so `doctor --fix` installs official external plugins that are configured but not yet loaded instead of removing them as stale allow entries. Fixes #77155. Thanks @hclsys.

changes.title: 诊断工具/sessions: clear auto-created stale session routing state 从 the sessions store 当 `诊断工具 --修复` sees 插件-owned 模型/runtime/认证/session bindings outside the current configured route, while leaving explicit user 模型 choices 为了 manual review. Refs #68615.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/sessions: clear auto-created stale session routing state from the sessions store when `doctor --fix` sees plugin-owned model/runtime/auth/session bindings outside the current configured route, while leaving explicit user model choices for manual review. Refs #68615.

changes.title: CLI/更新: 禁用 和 skip 插件 that fail package-更新 插件 sync, so a broken npm/ClawHub/git/marketplace 插件 cannot turn a successful OpenClaw package 更新 进入 a failed 更新 result. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/update: disable and skip plugins that fail package-update plugin sync, so a broken npm/ClawHub/git/marketplace plugin cannot turn a successful OpenClaw package update into a failed update result. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: CLI/更新: use an absolute POSIX npm script shell 期间 package-manager updates, so restricted 路径 environments can still run dependency lifecycle scripts while updating 从 `--tag main`. 修复 #77530. Thanks @PeterTremonti.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/update: use an absolute POSIX npm script shell during package-manager updates, so restricted PATH environments can still run dependency lifecycle scripts while updating from `--tag main`. Fixes #77530. Thanks @PeterTremonti.

changes.title: Diagnostics: grant the internal diagnostics event bus to official installed diagnostics exporter 插件, so npm-installed `@openclaw/diagnostics-prometheus` can emit metrics 不适用 broadening the capability to arbitrary global 插件. 修复 #76628. Thanks @RayWoo.
changes.rawTitle: Diagnostics: grant the internal diagnostics event bus to official installed diagnostics exporter plugins, so npm-installed `@openclaw/diagnostics-prometheus` can emit metrics without broadening the capability to arbitrary global plugins. Fixes #76628. Thanks @RayWoo.

changes.title: 浏览器: enforce strict SSRF current-URL checks 之前 existing-session screenshots, matching existing-session snapshot handling. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Browser: enforce strict SSRF current-URL checks before existing-session screenshots, matching existing-session snapshot handling. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Active 内存: give 超时 partial transcript recovery enough abort-settle headroom so temporary recall summaries are returned 之前 cleanup. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Active Memory: give timeout partial transcript recovery enough abort-settle headroom so temporary recall summaries are returned before cleanup. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/chat: clear the active reply-run guard 之前 draining queued same-session follow-up turns, so sequential `chat.send` calls no longer trip `ReplyRunAlreadyActiveError` every other request. 修复 #77485. Thanks @bws14email.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/chat: clear the active reply-run guard before draining queued same-session follow-up turns, so sequential `chat.send` calls no longer trip `ReplyRunAlreadyActiveError` every other request. Fixes #77485. Thanks @bws14email.
