changes.rawTitle: Agents/messaging: deliver distinct final commentary after same-target `message` tool sends while still deduping text/media already sent by the tool, so short closing remarks are no longer silently dropped. Fixes #76915. Thanks @hclsys.

changes.title: Agent/messaging: 保留 string thread IDs 当 matching message-工具 reply dedupe routes, avoiding precision loss 在 numeric-looking topic IDs 之前 channel 插件 comparison. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/messaging: preserve string thread IDs when matching message-tool reply dedupe routes, avoiding precision loss on numeric-looking topic IDs before channel plugin comparison. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Channels/streaming: honor `Agent.defaults.toolProgressDetail: "raw"` 在 Slack, Discord, Telegram, Matrix, 和 Microsoft Teams progress drafts, so 工具-start lines include raw 命令/detail output 当 debugging. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/streaming: honor `agents.defaults.toolProgressDetail: "raw"` in Slack, Discord, Telegram, Matrix, and Microsoft Teams progress drafts, so tool-start lines include raw command/detail output when debugging. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Channels/streaming: strip unmatched inline-code backticks 从 compacted raw progress draft lines, avoiding stray markdown markers 之后 long 命令 details are shortened. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/streaming: strip unmatched inline-code backticks from compacted raw progress draft lines, avoiding stray markdown markers after long command details are shortened. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Discord/Slack/Mattermost: align draft preview 工具-progress 配置 help 使用 the runtime behavior that hides interim 工具 updates 当 `streaming.preview.toolProgress` is false. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/Slack/Mattermost: align draft preview tool-progress config help with the runtime behavior that hides interim tool updates when `streaming.preview.toolProgress` is false. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 飞书: use the shared channel progress formatter 为了 streaming-card 工具 status lines, including raw 命令/detail output 和 message-工具 filtering. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu: use the shared channel progress formatter for streaming-card tool status lines, including raw command/detail output and message-tool filtering. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Mattermost: use the shared progress draft formatter 为了 工具 status previews, including raw 命令/detail output 当 `Agent.defaults.toolProgressDetail: "raw"` is enabled. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Mattermost: use the shared progress draft formatter for tool status previews, including raw command/detail output when `agents.defaults.toolProgressDetail: "raw"` is enabled. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Mattermost: suppress standalone default 工具-progress messages while draft previews are active, including 当 draft 工具 lines are disabled. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Mattermost: suppress standalone default tool-progress messages while draft previews are active, including when draft tool lines are disabled. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Telegram: deliver button-only interactive replies 通过 sending the shared fallback button-label text 使用 the inline keyboard 而不是 dropping the reply as empty. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram: deliver button-only interactive replies by sending the shared fallback button-label text with the inline keyboard instead of dropping the reply as empty. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: OpenAI Codex: honor `认证.order.OpenAI-Codex` 当 starting app-server clients 不适用 an explicit 认证 profile, so status/模型 probes 和 implicit startup use the configured Codex account 而不是 falling back to the default profile. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI Codex: honor `auth.order.openai-codex` when starting app-server clients without an explicit auth profile, so status/model probes and implicit startup use the configured Codex account instead of falling back to the default profile. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: OpenAI Codex: let SSRF-guarded provider requests inherit OpenClaw's undici IPv4/IPv6 fallback policy, so ChatGPT-backed Codex runs recover 在 IPv4-working hosts 当 DNS still returns unreachable IPv6 addresses. 修复 #76857. Thanks @jplavoiemtl 和 @SymbolStar.
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI Codex: let SSRF-guarded provider requests inherit OpenClaw's undici IPv4/IPv6 fallback policy, so ChatGPT-backed Codex runs recover on IPv4-working hosts when DNS still returns unreachable IPv6 addresses. Fixes #76857. Thanks @jplavoiemtl and @SymbolStar.

changes.title: 插件 updates: do not short-circuit trusted official npm updates as unchanged 当 the default/latest spec still resolves to an already-installed prerelease that the installer should replace 使用 a stable fallback. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugin updates: do not short-circuit trusted official npm updates as unchanged when the default/latest spec still resolves to an already-installed prerelease that the installer should replace with a stable fallback. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件 updates: clean stale bundled load paths 为了 already-externalized npm installs whose legacy install record only preserved the resolved package name. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugin updates: clean stale bundled load paths for already-externalized npm installs whose legacy install record only preserved the resolved package name. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件 tools: keep 认证-unavailable optional tools hidden even 当 another default 工具 从 the same 插件 is available 和 `tools.alsoAllow` names the optional 工具. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugin tools: keep auth-unavailable optional tools hidden even when another default tool from the same plugin is available and `tools.alsoAllow` names the optional tool. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Realtime transcription: report socket closes 之前 provider readiness as closed-之前-ready failures 而不是 mislabeling them as connection timeouts 为了 OpenAI, xAI, 和 Deepgram streaming transcription. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Realtime transcription: report socket closes before provider readiness as closed-before-ready failures instead of mislabeling them as connection timeouts for OpenAI, xAI, and Deepgram streaming transcription. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: OpenAI/Google Meet: fail realtime 语音 connection attempts 当 the socket closes 之前 `session.已更新`, avoiding stuck Meet joins waiting 在 a bridge that never became ready. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI/Google Meet: fail realtime voice connection attempts when the socket closes before `session.updated`, avoiding stuck Meet joins waiting on a bridge that never became ready. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Google Meet: 避免 treating repeated participant words as multiple assistant-overlap matches 当 suppressing realtime echo transcripts. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: avoid treating repeated participant words as multiple assistant-overlap matches when suppressing realtime echo transcripts. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Google Meet: make `mode: "Agent"` the default Chrome talk-back 路径, using realtime transcription 为了 input 和 regular OpenClaw TTS 为了 speech output, while keeping direct realtime 语音 answers available as `mode: "bidi"` 和 accepting `mode: "realtime"` as an Agent-mode compatibility alias.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: make `mode: "agent"` the default Chrome talk-back path, using realtime transcription for input and regular OpenClaw TTS for speech output, while keeping direct realtime voice answers available as `mode: "bidi"` and accepting `mode: "realtime"` as an agent-mode compatibility alias.

changes.title: Codex harness: keep `codex_app_server.*` telemetry publication owned 通过 the harness 而不是 republishing the same callback event 从 core runners. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Codex harness: keep `codex_app_server.*` telemetry publication owned by the harness instead of republishing the same callback event from core runners. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Slack/Discord: suppress standalone 工具-progress chatter 当 partial preview streaming has `streaming.preview.toolProgress: false`, matching the documented quiet-preview behavior. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/Discord: suppress standalone tool-progress chatter when partial preview streaming has `streaming.preview.toolProgress: false`, matching the documented quiet-preview behavior. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Matrix: bind native approval reaction targets 之前 publishing 选项 reactions, so fast approver reactions 在 threaded prompts are not dropped while the approval handler finishes setup. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix: bind native approval reaction targets before publishing option reactions, so fast approver reactions on threaded prompts are not dropped while the approval handler finishes setup. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Google Meet: make realtime talk-back Agent-driven 通过 default 使用 `realtime.strategy: "Agent"`, keep the previous direct bidirectional 模型 behavior available as `realtime.strategy: "bidi"`, route the Meet tab speaker output to `BlackHole 2ch` automatically 为了 local Chrome realtime joins, coalesce nearby speech transcript fragments 之前 consulting the Agent, 和 避免 cutting off Agent speech 从 server VAD 或 stale playback pipe errors.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: make realtime talk-back agent-driven by default with `realtime.strategy: "agent"`, keep the previous direct bidirectional model behavior available as `realtime.strategy: "bidi"`, route the Meet tab speaker output to `BlackHole 2ch` automatically for local Chrome realtime joins, coalesce nearby speech transcript fragments before consulting the agent, and avoid cutting off agent speech from server VAD or stale playback pipe errors.

changes.title: Google Meet: suppress queued assistant playback 和 assistant-like transcript echoes 从 the realtime input 路径, so the meeting does not hear the Agent's own speech as a new user turn 和 loop 或 cut itself off.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: suppress queued assistant playback and assistant-like transcript echoes from the realtime input path, so the meeting does not hear the agent's own speech as a new user turn and loop or cut itself off.

changes.title: Google Meet: keep Chrome realtime transport tests hermetic 在 Linux prerelease shards while preserving the macOS-only runtime guard. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: keep Chrome realtime transport tests hermetic on Linux prerelease shards while preserving the macOS-only runtime guard. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: QA/Matrix: let the live 工具-progress preview 和 错误 checks verify progress replacement events 不适用 depending 在 the preview saying `Working`, `工具: read`, an unlabelled/pathless `read 从`, 或 the original draft root being observed. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: QA/Matrix: let the live tool-progress preview and error checks verify progress replacement events without depending on the preview saying `Working`, `tool: read`, an unlabelled/pathless `read from`, or the original draft root being observed. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: QA/Matrix: keep the target=both approval scenario focused 在 channel 和 DM metadata delivery 通过 resolving the accepted approval through the 网关 之后 both Matrix events are observed. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: QA/Matrix: keep the target=both approval scenario focused on channel and DM metadata delivery by resolving the accepted approval through the gateway after both Matrix events are observed. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: QA/Matrix: wait 为了 live approval reactions to echo 之前 starting the threaded approval decision 超时. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: QA/Matrix: wait for live approval reactions to echo before starting the threaded approval decision timeout. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: QA/Matrix: 复用 the primed driver sync stream 当 confirming approval reaction echoes, avoiding missed self-reactions 在 live release runs. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: QA/Matrix: reuse the primed driver sync stream when confirming approval reaction echoes, avoiding missed self-reactions in live release runs. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Channels/WhatsApp: apply the shared group/channel visible-reply mode 期间 inbound dispatch so group replies stay message-工具-only 通过 default 不适用 overriding direct-chat harness defaults. Refs #75178 和 #67394. Thanks @scoootscooob.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/WhatsApp: apply the shared group/channel visible-reply mode during inbound dispatch so group replies stay message-tool-only by default without overriding direct-chat harness defaults. Refs #75178 and #67394. Thanks @scoootscooob.

changes.title: 插件/Codex: 保留 Codex-native OAuth认证 routing 为了 `/Codex bind` app-server turns so bound sessions keep the selected Codex 认证 profile 而不是 falling back to public OpenAI credentials. (#76714) Thanks @keshavbotagent.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Codex: preserve Codex-native OAuth routing for `/codex bind` app-server turns so bound sessions keep the selected Codex auth profile instead of falling back to public OpenAI credentials. (#76714) Thanks @keshavbotagent.

changes.title: Telegram: keep status checks pointed at the active chat so asking 为了 the current session no longer reports an old direct-message conversation. (#76708) Thanks @amknight.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram: keep status checks pointed at the active chat so asking for the current session no longer reports an old direct-message conversation. (#76708) Thanks @amknight.

changes.title: 网关/install: prefer supported system Node over nvm/fnm/volta/asdf/mise 当 regenerating managed 网关 services, so `网关 install --force` no longer recreates service definitions that 诊断工具 immediately flags as version-manager-backed. 修复 #76339. Thanks @brokemac79 和 @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/install: prefer supported system Node over nvm/fnm/volta/asdf/mise when regenerating managed gateway services, so `gateway install --force` no longer recreates service definitions that doctor immediately flags as version-manager-backed. Fixes #76339. Thanks @brokemac79 and @BunsDev.

changes.title: Google Chat: normalize Google 认证 certificate response headers 之前 google-认证-library reads cache-control, so inbound Webhook 认证 no longer rejects 使用 `res?.headers.get is not a function`. 修复 #76880. Thanks @donbowman.
changes.rawTitle: Google Chat: normalize Google auth certificate response headers before google-auth-library reads cache-control, so inbound webhook auth no longer rejects with `res?.headers.get is not a function`. Fixes #76880. Thanks @donbowman.

changes.title: WhatsApp: route terminal login QR output through the active runtime 为了 initial 和 restart sockets, so `openclaw channels login --channel WhatsApp` does not lose the QR behind direct stdout writes. 修复 #76213. Thanks @dougvk.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp: route terminal login QR output through the active runtime for initial and restart sockets, so `openclaw channels login --channel whatsapp` does not lose the QR behind direct stdout writes. Fixes #76213. Thanks @dougvk.

changes.title: 代理/debugging: 禁用 debug 代理 direct upstream forwarding 为了 代理 requests 和 CONNECT tunnels while managed 代理 mode is active unless `OPENCLAW_DEBUG_PROXY_ALLOW_DIRECT_CONNECT_WITH_MANAGED_PROXY=1` is explicitly set 为了 approved local diagnostics. Thanks @jesse-merhi 和 @mjamiv.
changes.rawTitle: Proxy/debugging: disable debug proxy direct upstream forwarding for proxy requests and CONNECT tunnels while managed proxy mode is active unless `OPENCLAW_DEBUG_PROXY_ALLOW_DIRECT_CONNECT_WITH_MANAGED_PROXY=1` is explicitly set for approved local diagnostics. Thanks @jesse-merhi and @mjamiv.

changes.title: Direct APNs: route direct HTTP/2 delivery through the active managed 代理 使用 redacted 代理 diagnostics, so push requests honor configured egress controls 和 `openclaw 代理 validate --apns-reachable` can prove APNs is reachable through the 代理 之前 deployment. (#74905) Thanks @jesse-merhi.
changes.rawTitle: Direct APNs: route direct HTTP/2 delivery through the active managed proxy with redacted proxy diagnostics, so push requests honor configured egress controls and `openclaw proxy validate --apns-reachable` can prove APNs is reachable through the proxy before deployment. (#74905) Thanks @jesse-merhi.

changes.title: Agent/subagents: detect prefix-only completion announce replies 和 fall back to the captured child result so requester chats no longer lose most 的 long sub-Agent reports 静默地. 修复 #76412. Thanks @inxaos 和 @davemorin.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/subagents: detect prefix-only completion announce replies and fall back to the captured child result so requester chats no longer lose most of long sub-agent reports silently. Fixes #76412. Thanks @inxaos and @davemorin.

changes.title: TUI: replace the stale-response watchdog notice 使用 plain user-facing copy so stalled replies no longer surface backend 或 streaming internals. (#77120) Thanks @davemorin.
changes.rawTitle: TUI: replace the stale-response watchdog notice with plain user-facing copy so stalled replies no longer surface backend or streaming internals. (#77120) Thanks @davemorin.

changes.title: 安全/Windows: validate `SystemRoot`/`WINDIR` env values through the Windows install-root validator 和 添加 them to the dangerous-host-env policy 当 resolving `icacls.exe`/`whoami.exe` 为了 `openclaw 安全 audit`, so workspace `.env` overrides 和 bare 命令 names cannot redirect Windows ACL helpers to attacker-controlled binaries. (#74458) Thanks @mmaps.
changes.rawTitle: Security/Windows: validate `SystemRoot`/`WINDIR` env values through the Windows install-root validator and add them to the dangerous-host-env policy when resolving `icacls.exe`/`whoami.exe` for `openclaw security audit`, so workspace `.env` overrides and bare command names cannot redirect Windows ACL helpers to attacker-controlled binaries. (#74458) Thanks @mmaps.

changes.title: 安全/Windows: pin Windows registry-probe `reg.exe` resolution to the canonical Windows install root 在 install-root probing, so `SystemRoot`/`WINDIR` env overrides cannot redirect registry queries 期间 Windows host detection. (#74454) Thanks @mmaps.
changes.rawTitle: Security/Windows: pin Windows registry-probe `reg.exe` resolution to the canonical Windows install root in install-root probing, so `SystemRoot`/`WINDIR` env overrides cannot redirect registry queries during Windows host detection. (#74454) Thanks @mmaps.

changes.title: QQBot: 保留 the framework 命令 authorization decision 当 converting framework 命令 contexts 进入 engine slash 命令 contexts, so downstream slash handlers see `commandAuthorized` matching the channel's resolved `isAuthorizedSender` 而不是 a hardcoded `true`. (#77453) Thanks @drobison00.
changes.rawTitle: QQBot: preserve the framework command authorization decision when converting framework command contexts into engine slash command contexts, so downstream slash handlers see `commandAuthorized` matching the channel's resolved `isAuthorizedSender` instead of a hardcoded `true`. (#77453) Thanks @drobison00.

changes.title: 安全/Windows: block `LOCALAPPDATA` 从 workspace `.env` 和 解决 Windows 更新-flow portable Git 路径 prepends 从 the trusted process-local `LOCALAPPDATA` only, so workspace-supplied values cannot redirect `git` discovery 期间 `openclaw 更新`. (#77470) Thanks @drobison00.
changes.rawTitle: Security/Windows: block `LOCALAPPDATA` from workspace `.env` and resolve Windows update-flow portable Git path prepends from the trusted process-local `LOCALAPPDATA` only, so workspace-supplied values cannot redirect `git` discovery during `openclaw update`. (#77470) Thanks @drobison00.

changes.title: 浏览器/SSRF: enforce the existing current-tab URL navigation policy 之前 tab-scoped debug, export, 和 read routes (console, page errors, network requests, trace start/停止, response body, screenshot, snapshot, storage, etc.) collect 从 an already-selected tab, so blocked tabs return a policy 错误 而不是 being read first 和 redacted only at response time. (#75731) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/SSRF: enforce the existing current-tab URL navigation policy before tab-scoped debug, export, and read routes (console, page errors, network requests, trace start/stop, response body, screenshot, snapshot, storage, etc.) collect from an already-selected tab, so blocked tabs return a policy error instead of being read first and redacted only at response time. (#75731) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: 安全/Windows: route the `.cmd`/`.bat` process wrapper through the shared Windows install-root resolver 而不是 `process.env.ComSpec`, so workspace dotenv-blocked `SystemRoot`/`WINDIR` overrides 和 unsafe values like UNC paths 或 路径-lists cannot redirect `cmd.exe` selection 在 Windows. (#77472) Thanks @drobison00.
changes.rawTitle: Security/Windows: route the `.cmd`/`.bat` process wrapper through the shared Windows install-root resolver instead of `process.env.ComSpec`, so workspace dotenv-blocked `SystemRoot`/`WINDIR` overrides and unsafe values like UNC paths or path-lists cannot redirect `cmd.exe` selection on Windows. (#77472) Thanks @drobison00.

changes.title: Agent/bootstrap: honor `BOOTSTRAP.md` content injected 通过 `Agent:bootstrap` hooks 当 deciding whether bootstrap is pending, so hook-provided required setup instructions are included 在 the system prompt. (#77501) Thanks @ificator.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/bootstrap: honor `BOOTSTRAP.md` content injected by `agent:bootstrap` hooks when deciding whether bootstrap is pending, so hook-provided required setup instructions are included in the system prompt. (#77501) Thanks @ificator.

items.title: Google Meet/语音 Call: make Twilio dial-在 joins speak through the realtime Gemini 语音 bridge 使用 paced audio streaming, backpressure-aware buffering, barge-在 queue clearing, 和 no TwiML fallback 期间 realtime speech, giving Meet participants a much snappier OpenClaw 语音 Agent. (#77064) Thanks @scoootscooob.
items.rawTitle: Google Meet/Voice Call: make Twilio dial-in joins speak through the realtime Gemini voice bridge with paced audio streaming, backpressure-aware buffering, barge-in queue clearing, and no TwiML fallback during realtime speech, giving Meet participants a much snappier OpenClaw voice agent. (#77064) Thanks @scoootscooob.

items.title: 插件/migration: emit catalog-backed install hints 当 `插件.entries` 或 `插件.允许` references an official external 插件 that is not installed, so upgraded configs point operators to `openclaw 插件 install <spec>` 而不是 telling them to 移除 valid 插件 配置. (#77483) Thanks @hclsys.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/migration: emit catalog-backed install hints when `plugins.entries` or `plugins.allow` references an official external plugin that is not installed, so upgraded configs point operators to `openclaw plugins install <spec>` instead of telling them to remove valid plugin config. (#77483) Thanks @hclsys.

items.title: Agent/性能: pass the resolved workspace through BTW, compaction, embedded-run 模型 generation, 和 PDF 模型 setup so explicit Agent-dir 模型 refreshes can 复用 the current workspace-scoped 插件 metadata snapshot 而不是 falling back to cold 插件 metadata scans. (#77519, #77532)
items.rawTitle: Agents/performance: pass the resolved workspace through BTW, compaction, embedded-run model generation, and PDF model setup so explicit agent-dir model refreshes can reuse the current workspace-scoped plugin metadata snapshot instead of falling back to cold plugin metadata scans. (#77519, #77532)

items.title: 网关/startup: keep 模型-catalog test helpers, run-session lookup code, QR pairing helpers, 和 TypeBox 内存-工具 schema construction out 的 hot startup import paths, reducing default 网关 benchmark 插件-load 和 内存 pressure.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: keep model-catalog test helpers, run-session lookup code, QR pairing helpers, and TypeBox memory-tool schema construction out of hot startup import paths, reducing default gateway benchmark plugin-load and memory pressure.

items.title: Docs: clarify that IRC uses raw TCP/TLS sockets outside operator-managed forward 代理 routing, so direct IRC egress should be explicitly approved 之前 enabling IRC. Thanks @jesse-merhi.
items.rawTitle: Docs: clarify that IRC uses raw TCP/TLS sockets outside operator-managed forward proxy routing, so direct IRC egress should be explicitly approved before enabling IRC. Thanks @jesse-merhi.

items.title: 网关/diagnostics: 添加 startup phase spans, active work labels, stale terminal bridge markers, 和 default sync-I/O tracing 在 `pnpm 网关:watch` so slow 网关 turns are easier to attribute 从 logs 和 stability diagnostics.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/diagnostics: add startup phase spans, active work labels, stale terminal bridge markers, and default sync-I/O tracing in `pnpm gateway:watch` so slow Gateway turns are easier to attribute from logs and stability diagnostics.

items.title: 插件/更新: treat official externalized bundled npm migrations 和 ClawHub-to-npm fallbacks as trusted source-linked installs, so prerelease-only official 插件 packages can migrate 从 bundled builds 不适用 being rejected as unsafe prerelease resolutions. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/update: treat official externalized bundled npm migrations and ClawHub-to-npm fallbacks as trusted source-linked installs, so prerelease-only official plugin packages can migrate from bundled builds without being rejected as unsafe prerelease resolutions. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 插件/SDK: 添加 bounded `before_agent_finalize` 重试 instructions so workflow 插件 can request one more 模型 pass. Thanks @100yenadmin.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/SDK: add bounded `before_agent_finalize` retry instructions so workflow plugins can request one more model pass. Thanks @100yenadmin.

items.title: 网关/startup: load provider 插件 that own explicitly configured image, video, 或 music generation defaults so generation tools become live 之后 网关 restart 而不是 remaining catalog-only. 修复 #77244. Thanks @buyuangtampan, @Nikoxx99, 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: load provider plugins that own explicitly configured image, video, or music generation defaults so generation tools become live after gateway restart instead of remaining catalog-only. Fixes #77244. Thanks @buyuangtampan, @Nikoxx99, and @vincentkoc.

items.title: 网关/watch: suppress sync-I/O trace output 期间 `pnpm 网关:watch --benchmark` unless explicitly requested, so CPU profiling no longer floods the terminal 使用 stack traces.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/watch: suppress sync-I/O trace output during `pnpm gateway:watch --benchmark` unless explicitly requested, so CPU profiling no longer floods the terminal with stack traces.

items.title: 网关/watch: 当 benchmark sync-I/O tracing is explicitly enabled, tee trace blocks to the benchmark output log 和 filter them 从 the terminal pane while keeping normal 网关 logs visible.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/watch: when benchmark sync-I/O tracing is explicitly enabled, tee trace blocks to the benchmark output log and filter them from the terminal pane while keeping normal Gateway logs visible.

items.title: 诊断工具/配置: keep active `认证.profiles` metadata intact 当 `诊断工具 --修复` strips stale secret fields 从 configs, repairing legacy `<provider>:default` API-密钥 profile metadata 当 模型 fallbacks 或 explicit `模型@profile` refs still depend 在 it. 修复 #77400.
items.rawTitle: Doctor/config: keep active `auth.profiles` metadata intact when `doctor --fix` strips stale secret fields from configs, repairing legacy `<provider>:default` API-key profile metadata when model fallbacks or explicit `model@profile` refs still depend on it. Fixes #77400.

items.title: 诊断工具/插件: include `插件.允许`-only official 插件 ids 在 the release configured-插件 repair set, so `诊断工具 --修复` installs official external 插件 that are configured 但是 not yet loaded 而不是 removing them as stale 允许 entries. 修复 #77155. Thanks @hclsys.
items.rawTitle: Doctor/plugins: include `plugins.allow`-only official plugin ids in the release configured-plugin repair set, so `doctor --fix` installs official external plugins that are configured but not yet loaded instead of removing them as stale allow entries. Fixes #77155. Thanks @hclsys.

items.title: 诊断工具/sessions: clear auto-created stale session routing state 从 the sessions store 当 `诊断工具 --修复` sees 插件-owned 模型/runtime/认证/session bindings outside the current configured route, while leaving explicit user 模型 choices 为了 manual review. Refs #68615.
items.rawTitle: Doctor/sessions: clear auto-created stale session routing state from the sessions store when `doctor --fix` sees plugin-owned model/runtime/auth/session bindings outside the current configured route, while leaving explicit user model choices for manual review. Refs #68615.

items.title: Diagnostics: grant the internal diagnostics event bus to official installed diagnostics exporter 插件, so npm-installed `@openclaw/diagnostics-prometheus` can emit metrics 不适用 broadening the capability to arbitrary global 插件. 修复 #76628. Thanks @RayWoo.
items.rawTitle: Diagnostics: grant the internal diagnostics event bus to official installed diagnostics exporter plugins, so npm-installed `@openclaw/diagnostics-prometheus` can emit metrics without broadening the capability to arbitrary global plugins. Fixes #76628. Thanks @RayWoo.

items.title: CLI/更新: make package-更新 follow-up processes write completion results 和 exit explicitly, so Windows packaged upgrades do not hang 之后 the new package finishes post-core 插件 work. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: CLI/update: make package-update follow-up processes write completion results and exit explicitly, so Windows packaged upgrades do not hang after the new package finishes post-core plugin work. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 内存/wiki: 保留 representation 从 both corpora 在 `corpus=all` searches while backfilling unused result capacity, so 内存 hits are not starved 通过 numerically higher wiki integer scores. 修复 #77337. Thanks @hclsys.
items.rawTitle: Memory/wiki: preserve representation from both corpora in `corpus=all` searches while backfilling unused result capacity, so memory hits are not starved by numerically higher wiki integer scores. Fixes #77337. Thanks @hclsys.

items.title: 网关/status: label Linux managed 网关 services as `systemd user`, making status output explicit about the user-service scope 而不是 implying a system-level unit. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 插件/active-内存: skip session-store channel entries that contain `:` 当 resolving the recall subagent's channel, so QQ c2c Agent IDs (e.g. `c2c:10D4F7C2…`) 和 other scoped conversation IDs do not reach bundled-插件 `dirName` validation 和 崩溃 the recall run. The same guard already applied to explicit `channelId` params (#76704); this extends it to store-derived channels. (#77396) Thanks @hclsys.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/active-memory: skip session-store channel entries that contain `:` when resolving the recall subagent's channel, so QQ c2c agent IDs (e.g. `c2c:10D4F7C2…`) and other scoped conversation IDs do not reach bundled-plugin `dirName` validation and crash the recall run. The same guard already applied to explicit `channelId` params (#76704); this extends it to store-derived channels. (#77396) Thanks @hclsys.

items.title: Secrets/external channel contracts: also look 在 `<rootDir>/dist/` 当 resolving the `secret-contract-API` sidecar, so npm-published externalized channel 插件 (e.g. `@openclaw/Discord` since 2026.5.2) whose compiled artifacts live under `dist/` actually contribute their channel SecretRef contracts to the runtime snapshot. 不适用 this, env-backed `channels.Discord.令牌` SecretRefs 静默地 failed to 解决 at 网关 start 在 2026.5.3, leaving the channel `not configured` even though #76449 had landed the generic external-contract loader. Thanks @mogglemoss.
items.rawTitle: Secrets/external channel contracts: also look in `<rootDir>/dist/` when resolving the `secret-contract-api` sidecar, so npm-published externalized channel plugins (e.g. `@openclaw/discord` since 2026.5.2) whose compiled artifacts live under `dist/` actually contribute their channel SecretRef contracts to the runtime snapshot. Without this, env-backed `channels.discord.token` SecretRefs silently failed to resolve at gateway start on 2026.5.3, leaving the channel `not configured` even though #76449 had landed the generic external-contract loader. Thanks @mogglemoss.

Thanks @romneyda.

items.title: 插件/registry: recover managed-npm external 插件 从 the owned npm root 当 a stale persisted registry would otherwise hide them 之后 package-manager upgrades. 修复 #77266. Thanks @p3nchan.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/registry: recover managed-npm external plugins from the owned npm root when a stale persisted registry would otherwise hide them after package-manager upgrades. Fixes #77266. Thanks @p3nchan.

items.title: 插件/discovery: demote the source-only TypeScript runtime check 在 already-installed `origin: "global"` 插件 packages 从 a 配置-blocking 错误 to a warning 和 let the runtime fall through to the TypeScript source via jiti, so a single broken installed package no longer blocks `插件 install` 为了 unrelated 插件; install-time rejection 的 newly-installed source-only packages is unchanged. Thanks @romneyda.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/discovery: demote the source-only TypeScript runtime check on already-installed `origin: "global"` plugin packages from a config-blocking error to a warning and let the runtime fall through to the TypeScript source via jiti, so a single broken installed package no longer blocks `plugins install` for unrelated plugins; install-time rejection of newly-installed source-only packages is unchanged. Thanks @romneyda.

items.title: 安全/Windows: validate `SystemRoot`/`WINDIR` env values through the Windows install-root validator 和 添加 them to the dangerous-host-env policy 当 resolving `icacls.exe`/`whoami.exe` 为了 `openclaw 安全 audit`, so workspace `.env` overrides 和 bare 命令 names cannot redirect Windows ACL helpers to attacker-controlled binaries. (#74458) Thanks @mmaps.
items.rawTitle: Security/Windows: validate `SystemRoot`/`WINDIR` env values through the Windows install-root validator and add them to the dangerous-host-env policy when resolving `icacls.exe`/`whoami.exe` for `openclaw security audit`, so workspace `.env` overrides and bare command names cannot redirect Windows ACL helpers to attacker-controlled binaries. (#74458) Thanks @mmaps.

items.title: 安全/Windows: pin Windows registry-probe `reg.exe` resolution to the canonical Windows install root 在 install-root probing, so `SystemRoot`/`WINDIR` env overrides cannot redirect registry queries 期间 Windows host detection. (#74454) Thanks @mmaps.
items.rawTitle: Security/Windows: pin Windows registry-probe `reg.exe` resolution to the canonical Windows install root in install-root probing, so `SystemRoot`/`WINDIR` env overrides cannot redirect registry queries during Windows host detection. (#74454) Thanks @mmaps.

items.title: 安全/Windows: route the `.cmd`/`.bat` process wrapper through the shared Windows install-root resolver 而不是 `process.env.ComSpec`, so workspace dotenv-blocked `SystemRoot`/`WINDIR` overrides 和 unsafe values like UNC paths 或 路径-lists cannot redirect `cmd.exe` selection 在 Windows. (#77472) Thanks @drobison00.
items.rawTitle: Security/Windows: route the `.cmd`/`.bat` process wrapper through the shared Windows install-root resolver instead of `process.env.ComSpec`, so workspace dotenv-blocked `SystemRoot`/`WINDIR` overrides and unsafe values like UNC paths or path-lists cannot redirect `cmd.exe` selection on Windows. (#77472) Thanks @drobison00.

items.title: Control 界面/chat: 添加 an Agent-first filter to the chat session picker, keep chat controls/composer responsive across phone/tablet/desktop widths, keep desktop chat controls 在 one row, 避免 duplicate avatar refreshes 期间 initial chat load, 和 hide that row while scrolling down the transcript. Thanks @BunsDev.
items.rawTitle: Control UI/chat: add an agent-first filter to the chat session picker, keep chat controls/composer responsive across phone/tablet/desktop widths, keep desktop chat controls on one row, avoid duplicate avatar refreshes during initial chat load, and hide that row while scrolling down the transcript. Thanks @BunsDev.

items.title: Agent/subagents: 保留 every grouped child result 当 direct completion fallback has to bypass the requester-Agent announce turn. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Agents/subagents: preserve every grouped child result when direct completion fallback has to bypass the requester-agent announce turn. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: Agent/cache: keep per-turn runtime context out 的 ordinary chat system prompts while still delivering hidden current-turn context, restoring prompt-cache 复用 在 chat continuations. 修复 #77431. Thanks @Udjin79.
items.rawTitle: Agents/cache: keep per-turn runtime context out of ordinary chat system prompts while still delivering hidden current-turn context, restoring prompt-cache reuse on chat continuations. Fixes #77431. Thanks @Udjin79.

items.title: Agent/Tools: 添加 post-compaction loop guard 在 `pi-embedded-runner` that arms 之后 auto-compaction-重试 和 aborts the run 使用 `compaction_loop_persisted` 当 the Agent emits the same `(工具, args, result)` triple `windowSize` times (default 3) within that window. 禁用 via existing `tools.loopDetection.enabled`; tune via `tools.loopDetection.postCompactionGuard.windowSize`. Targets the failure mode where context-overflow + compaction does not break a 工具-call loop. Refs #77474; carries forward #21597. Thanks @efpiva.
items.rawTitle: Agents/Tools: add post-compaction loop guard in `pi-embedded-runner` that arms after auto-compaction-retry and aborts the run with `compaction_loop_persisted` when the agent emits the same `(tool, args, result)` triple `windowSize` times (default 3) within that window. Disable via existing `tools.loopDetection.enabled`; tune via `tools.loopDetection.postCompactionGuard.windowSize`. Targets the failure mode where context-overflow + compaction does not break a tool-call loop. Refs #77474; carries forward #21597. Thanks @efpiva.

items.title: Agent/media: 避免 sending generated image, video, 和 music attachments twice 当 streamed reply text arrives 之前 the final `MEDIA:` directive.
items.rawTitle: Agents/media: avoid sending generated image, video, and music attachments twice when streamed reply text arrives before the final `MEDIA:` directive.

items.title: Agent/subagents: refresh deferred final-delivery payloads 当 same-session completion output changes, so retried parent notifications use the final child summary 而不是 stale progress text. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Agents/subagents: refresh deferred final-delivery payloads when same-session completion output changes, so retried parent notifications use the final child summary instead of stale progress text. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: Docker/compose: pin container-side `OPENCLAW_CONFIG_DIR` 和 `OPENCLAW_WORKSPACE_DIR` 在 both 网关 和 CLI services so the host paths written 进入 `.env` 通过 `scripts/docker/setup.sh` (used as Compose bind-mount sources) cannot leak 进入 runtime code via the `env_file` import. 修复 regressions 在 macOS Docker setups where the first Agent reply died 使用 `EACCES: permission denied, mkdir '/Users'` because the host-style workspace 路径 got persisted 进入 `Agent.defaults.workspace`. 修复 #77436. Thanks @lonexreb.
items.rawTitle: Docker/compose: pin container-side `OPENCLAW_CONFIG_DIR` and `OPENCLAW_WORKSPACE_DIR` on both gateway and CLI services so the host paths written into `.env` by `scripts/docker/setup.sh` (used as Compose bind-mount sources) cannot leak into runtime code via the `env_file` import. Fixes regressions on macOS Docker setups where the first agent reply died with `EACCES: permission denied, mkdir '/Users'` because the host-style workspace path got persisted into `agents.defaults.workspace`. Fixes #77436. Thanks @lonexreb.

items.title: Control 界面/Talk: 停止 和 clear failed realtime Talk sessions 当 dismissing runtime 错误 banners, so the next Talk click starts a fresh session 而不是 only stopping the stale one. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Control UI/Talk: stop and clear failed realtime Talk sessions when dismissing runtime error banners, so the next Talk click starts a fresh session instead of only stopping the stale one. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 修复(device-pair): require pairing scope 为了 pair 命令 [AI]. (#76377) Thanks @pgondhi987.
items.rawTitle: fix(device-pair): require pairing scope for pair command [AI]. (#76377) Thanks @pgondhi987.

items.title: 修复(qqbot): keep private commands off framework surface [AI]. (#77212) Thanks @pgondhi987.
items.rawTitle: fix(qqbot): keep private commands off framework surface [AI]. (#77212) Thanks @pgondhi987.

items.title: Claude CLI: honor non-off `/think` levels 通过 passing Claude Code's session-scoped `--effort` flag through the CLI backend seam, so chat bridges no longer show an inert thinking control. 修复 #77303. Thanks @Petr1t.
items.rawTitle: Claude CLI: honor non-off `/think` levels by passing Claude Code's session-scoped `--effort` flag through the CLI backend seam, so chat bridges no longer show an inert thinking control. Fixes #77303. Thanks @Petr1t.

items.title: Control 界面: point the Appearance tweakcn browse action 和 docs at the live tweakcn editor route 而不是 the removed `/themes` page. 修复 #77048.
items.rawTitle: Control UI: point the Appearance tweakcn browse action and docs at the live tweakcn editor route instead of the removed `/themes` page. Fixes #77048.

items.title: Control 界面: render Dream Diary prose through the sanitized markdown pipeline, so diary bold/italic/header markdown no longer appears as literal source text. 修复 #62413.
items.rawTitle: Control UI: render Dream Diary prose through the sanitized markdown pipeline, so diary bold/italic/header markdown no longer appears as literal source text. Fixes #62413.

items.title: Control 界面: render 工具 results whose output arrives as text-block arrays 和 give expanded 工具 output a scrollable block, so read/exec output remains visible 在 WebChat. 修复 #77054.
items.rawTitle: Control UI: render tool results whose output arrives as text-block arrays and give expanded tool output a scrollable block, so read/exec output remains visible in WebChat. Fixes #77054.

items.title: QA/Matrix: let the live 工具-progress preview 和 错误 checks verify progress replacement events 不适用 depending 在 the preview saying `Working`, `工具: read`, an unlabelled/pathless `read 从`, 或 the original draft root being observed. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: QA/Matrix: let the live tool-progress preview and error checks verify progress replacement events without depending on the preview saying `Working`, `tool: read`, an unlabelled/pathless `read from`, or the original draft root being observed. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: Gate QQBot streaming 命令 认证 [AI]. (#76375) Thanks @pgondhi987.
items.rawTitle: Gate QQBot streaming command auth [AI]. (#76375) Thanks @pgondhi987.

items.title: 安全/Windows: block `LOCALAPPDATA` 从 workspace `.env` 和 解决 Windows 更新-flow portable Git 路径 prepends 从 the trusted process-local `LOCALAPPDATA` only, so workspace-supplied values cannot redirect `git` discovery 期间 `openclaw 更新`. (#77470) Thanks @drobison00.
items.rawTitle: Security/Windows: block `LOCALAPPDATA` from workspace `.env` and resolve Windows update-flow portable Git path prepends from the trusted process-local `LOCALAPPDATA` only, so workspace-supplied values cannot redirect `git` discovery during `openclaw update`. (#77470) Thanks @drobison00.

changes.title: Google Meet/语音 Call: make Twilio dial-在 joins speak through the realtime Gemini 语音 bridge 使用 paced audio streaming, backpressure-aware buffering, barge-在 queue clearing, 和 no TwiML fallback 期间 realtime speech, giving Meet participants a much snappier OpenClaw 语音 Agent. (#77064) Thanks @scoootscooob.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet/Voice Call: make Twilio dial-in joins speak through the realtime Gemini voice bridge with paced audio streaming, backpressure-aware buffering, barge-in queue clearing, and no TwiML fallback during realtime speech, giving Meet participants a much snappier OpenClaw voice agent. (#77064) Thanks @scoootscooob.

changes.title: 网关/Windows: bind the default loopback 网关 listener only to `127.0.0.1` 在 Windows so libuv's dual-stack `::1` behavior cannot wedge localhost HTTP requests. (#69701, 修复 #69674) Thanks @SARAMALI15792.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/Windows: bind the default loopback gateway listener only to `127.0.0.1` on Windows so libuv's dual-stack `::1` behavior cannot wedge localhost HTTP requests. (#69701, fixes #69674) Thanks @SARAMALI15792.

changes.title: 插件/migration: emit catalog-backed install hints 当 `插件.entries` 或 `插件.允许` references an official external 插件 that is not installed, so upgraded configs point operators to `openclaw 插件 install <spec>` 而不是 telling them to 移除 valid 插件 配置. (#77483) Thanks @hclsys.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/migration: emit catalog-backed install hints when `plugins.entries` or `plugins.allow` references an official external plugin that is not installed, so upgraded configs point operators to `openclaw plugins install <spec>` instead of telling them to remove valid plugin config. (#77483) Thanks @hclsys.

changes.title: OpenAI/Codex media: advertise Codex audio transcription 在 runtime 和 manifest metadata 和 route active Codex chat 模型 to the OpenAI transcription default 而不是 sending chat 模型 ids to audio transcription. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI/Codex media: advertise Codex audio transcription in runtime and manifest metadata and route active Codex chat models to the OpenAI transcription default instead of sending chat model ids to audio transcription. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Dependencies: refresh runtime 和 provider packages including Pi 0.73.0, ACPX adapters, OpenAI, Anthropic, Slack, 和 TypeScript native preview, while keeping the Bedrock runtime installer override pinned below the Windows ARM Node 24 npm resolver failure.
changes.rawTitle: Dependencies: refresh runtime and provider packages including Pi 0.73.0, ACPX adapters, OpenAI, Anthropic, Slack, and TypeScript native preview, while keeping the Bedrock runtime installer override pinned below the Windows ARM Node 24 npm resolver failure.

changes.title: Agent/性能: pass the resolved workspace through BTW, compaction, embedded-run 模型 generation, 和 PDF 模型 setup so explicit Agent-dir 模型 refreshes can 复用 the current workspace-scoped 插件 metadata snapshot 而不是 falling back to cold 插件 metadata scans. (#77519, #77532)
changes.rawTitle: Agents/performance: pass the resolved workspace through BTW, compaction, embedded-run model generation, and PDF model setup so explicit agent-dir model refreshes can reuse the current workspace-scoped plugin metadata snapshot instead of falling back to cold plugin metadata scans. (#77519, #77532)

changes.title: 插件/性能: let unscoped 模型 catalog 和 manifest-contract readers 复用 the current workspace-compatible 插件 metadata snapshot, avoiding repeated cold 插件 metadata scans 在 hot control-plane paths while preserving env/配置/workspace compatibility checks. (#77519, #77532)
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/performance: let unscoped model catalog and manifest-contract readers reuse the current workspace-compatible plugin metadata snapshot, avoiding repeated cold plugin metadata scans on hot control-plane paths while preserving env/config/workspace compatibility checks. (#77519, #77532)

changes.title: 配置/插件 auto-启用: prefer the claiming 插件 manifest id over a built-在 channel alias 当 auto-allowlisting a configured channel, so WeCom/Yuanbao-style aliases 解决 to the installed 插件 id. Thanks @Beandon13.
changes.rawTitle: Config/plugin auto-enable: prefer the claiming plugin manifest id over a built-in channel alias when auto-allowlisting a configured channel, so WeCom/Yuanbao-style aliases resolve to the installed plugin id. Thanks @Beandon13.

changes.title: Secrets/apply: 保留 认证-profile `keyRef` 和 `tokenRef` fields 当 scrubbing provider-target secrets, so the canonical SecretRef metadata survives `secrets apply` 不适用 keeping plaintext values. Thanks @Beandon13.
changes.rawTitle: Secrets/apply: preserve auth-profile `keyRef` and `tokenRef` fields when scrubbing provider-target secrets, so the canonical SecretRef metadata survives `secrets apply` without keeping plaintext values. Thanks @Beandon13.

changes.title: 插件/active-内存: skip session-store channel entries that contain `:` 当 resolving the recall subagent's channel, so QQ c2c Agent IDs (e.g. `c2c:10D4F7C2…`) 和 other scoped conversation IDs do not reach bundled-插件 `dirName` validation 和 崩溃 the recall run. The same guard already applied to explicit `channelId` params (#76704); this extends it to store-derived channels. (#77396) Thanks @hclsys.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/active-memory: skip session-store channel entries that contain `:` when resolving the recall subagent's channel, so QQ c2c agent IDs (e.g. `c2c:10D4F7C2…`) and other scoped conversation IDs do not reach bundled-plugin `dirName` validation and crash the recall run. The same guard already applied to explicit `channelId` params (#76704); this extends it to store-derived channels. (#77396) Thanks @hclsys.

changes.title: Secrets/external channel contracts: also look 在 `<rootDir>/dist/` 当 resolving the `secret-contract-API` sidecar, so npm-published externalized channel 插件 (e.g. `@openclaw/Discord` since 2026.5.2) whose compiled artifacts live under `dist/` actually contribute their channel SecretRef contracts to the runtime snapshot. 不适用 this, env-backed `channels.Discord.令牌` SecretRefs 静默地 failed to 解决 at 网关 start 在 2026.5.3, leaving the channel `not configured` even though #76449 had landed the generic external-contract loader. Thanks @mogglemoss.
changes.rawTitle: Secrets/external channel contracts: also look in `<rootDir>/dist/` when resolving the `secret-contract-api` sidecar, so npm-published externalized channel plugins (e.g. `@openclaw/discord` since 2026.5.2) whose compiled artifacts live under `dist/` actually contribute their channel SecretRef contracts to the runtime snapshot. Without this, env-backed `channels.discord.token` SecretRefs silently failed to resolve at gateway start on 2026.5.3, leaving the channel `not configured` even though #76449 had landed the generic external-contract loader. Thanks @mogglemoss.

changes.title: 模型/认证: 添加 `openclaw 模型 认证 list [--provider <id>] [--json]` so users can inspect saved per-Agent 认证 profiles 不适用 dumping secrets 或 hitting the old “too many arguments” 路径. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Models/auth: add `openclaw models auth list [--provider <id>] [--json]` so users can inspect saved per-agent auth profiles without dumping secrets or hitting the old “too many arguments” path. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Control 界面/header: show the active Agent name 在 dashboard breadcrumbs 不适用 adding the current session 密钥, keeping non-chat views oriented 不适用 crowding the topbar.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/header: show the active agent name in dashboard breadcrumbs without adding the current session key, keeping non-chat views oriented without crowding the topbar.

changes.title: Control 界面/cron: make the New Job sidebar collapsible so the jobs list can reclaim space while keeping the form one click away. Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/cron: make the New Job sidebar collapsible so the jobs list can reclaim space while keeping the form one click away. Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: keep model-catalog test helpers, run-session lookup code, QR pairing helpers, and TypeBox memory-tool schema construction out of hot startup import paths, reducing default gateway benchmark plugin-load and memory pressure.

changes.rawTitle: Control UI/performance: record browser long animation frame or long task entries in the debug event log when supported, making slow dashboard renders easier to attribute from the UI.

changes.rawTitle: Slack/streaming: keep the newest rich progress lines when Block Kit limits trim long progress drafts. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Channels/streaming: cap progress-draft tool lines by default so edited progress boxes avoid jumpy reflow from long wrapped lines.

changes.title: Agent/verbose: use compact explain-mode 工具 summaries 为了 `/verbose` 和 progress drafts 通过 default, 使用 `Agent.defaults.toolProgressDetail: "raw"` 和 per-Agent overrides 为了 debugging raw 命令/detail output.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/verbose: use compact explain-mode tool summaries for `/verbose` and progress drafts by default, with `agents.defaults.toolProgressDetail: "raw"` and per-agent overrides for debugging raw command/detail output.

Thanks @BunsDev.

Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.rawTitle: Control UI/chat: collapse consecutive duplicate text messages into one bubble with a count so no-op heartbeat acknowledgements stay compact without hiding nearby context.

changes.rawTitle: Agents/subagents: preserve every grouped child result when direct completion fallback has to bypass the requester-agent announce turn. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: TTS/telephony: honor provider voice/model overrides in telephony synthesis providers so Google Meet agent speech logs match the backend that actually produced the audio. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Voice Call/realtime: bound the paced Twilio audio queue and close overloaded realtime streams before provider audio can pile up behind the websocket backpressure guard. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Docs: clarify that IRC uses raw TCP/TLS sockets outside operator-managed forward proxy routing, so direct IRC egress should be explicitly approved before enabling IRC. Thanks @jesse-merhi.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/loader: preserve real compiled plugin module evaluation errors on the native fast path instead of treating every thrown `.js` module as a source-transform fallback miss. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: QA/Mantis: pass the runtime env through desktop-browser Crabbox and artifact-copy child commands, so embedded Mantis callers can provide Crabbox credentials without mutating the parent process. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/update: treat official externalized bundled npm migrations and ClawHub-to-npm fallbacks as trusted source-linked installs, so prerelease-only official plugin packages can migrate from bundled builds without being rejected as unsafe prerelease resolutions. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/update: move ClawHub-preferred externalized plugin installs back to ClawHub after an earlier npm fallback once the ClawHub package becomes available. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/update: clean stale bundled load paths for already-externalized pinned npm and ClawHub plugin installs, so release-channel sync does not leave removed bundled paths ahead of the installed external package. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenRouter: expand app-attribution categories so OpenClaw advertises coding, programming, writing, chat, and personal-agent usage on verified OpenRouter routes. Thanks @vincentkoc.

Thanks @romneyda.
