changes.title: Google Meet/语音 Call: make Twilio dial-在 joins speak through the realtime Gemini 语音 bridge 使用 paced audio streaming, backpressure-aware buffering, barge-在 queue clearing, 和 no TwiML fallback 期间 realtime speech, giving Meet participants a much snappier OpenClaw 语音 Agent. (#77064) Thanks @scoootscooob.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet/Voice Call: make Twilio dial-in joins speak through the realtime Gemini voice bridge with paced audio streaming, backpressure-aware buffering, barge-in queue clearing, and no TwiML fallback during realtime speech, giving Meet participants a much snappier OpenClaw voice agent. (#77064) Thanks @scoootscooob.

changes.title: 插件/migration: emit catalog-backed install hints 当 `插件.entries` 或 `插件.允许` references an official external 插件 that is not installed, so upgraded configs point operators to `openclaw 插件 install <spec>` 而不是 telling them to 移除 valid 插件 配置. (#77483) Thanks @hclsys.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/migration: emit catalog-backed install hints when `plugins.entries` or `plugins.allow` references an official external plugin that is not installed, so upgraded configs point operators to `openclaw plugins install <spec>` instead of telling them to remove valid plugin config. (#77483) Thanks @hclsys.

changes.title: OpenAI/Codex media: advertise Codex audio transcription 在 runtime 和 manifest metadata 和 route active Codex chat 模型 to the OpenAI transcription default 而不是 sending chat 模型 ids to audio transcription. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI/Codex media: advertise Codex audio transcription in runtime and manifest metadata and route active Codex chat models to the OpenAI transcription default instead of sending chat model ids to audio transcription. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Dependencies: refresh runtime 和 provider packages including Pi 0.73.0, ACPX adapters, OpenAI, Anthropic, Slack, 和 TypeScript native preview, while keeping the Bedrock runtime installer override pinned below the Windows ARM Node 24 npm resolver failure.
changes.rawTitle: Dependencies: refresh runtime and provider packages including Pi 0.73.0, ACPX adapters, OpenAI, Anthropic, Slack, and TypeScript native preview, while keeping the Bedrock runtime installer override pinned below the Windows ARM Node 24 npm resolver failure.

changes.title: Agent/性能: pass the resolved workspace through BTW, compaction, embedded-run 模型 generation, 和 PDF 模型 setup so explicit Agent-dir 模型 refreshes can 复用 the current workspace-scoped 插件 metadata snapshot 而不是 falling back to cold 插件 metadata scans. (#77519, #77532)
changes.rawTitle: Agents/performance: pass the resolved workspace through BTW, compaction, embedded-run model generation, and PDF model setup so explicit agent-dir model refreshes can reuse the current workspace-scoped plugin metadata snapshot instead of falling back to cold plugin metadata scans. (#77519, #77532)

changes.title: 插件/性能: let unscoped 模型 catalog 和 manifest-contract readers 复用 the current workspace-compatible 插件 metadata snapshot, avoiding repeated cold 插件 metadata scans 在 hot control-plane paths while preserving env/配置/workspace compatibility checks. (#77519, #77532)
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/performance: let unscoped model catalog and manifest-contract readers reuse the current workspace-compatible plugin metadata snapshot, avoiding repeated cold plugin metadata scans on hot control-plane paths while preserving env/config/workspace compatibility checks. (#77519, #77532)

changes.title: 配置/插件 auto-启用: prefer the claiming 插件 manifest id over a built-在 channel alias 当 auto-allowlisting a configured channel, so WeCom/Yuanbao-style aliases 解决 to the installed 插件 id. Thanks @Beandon13.
changes.rawTitle: Config/plugin auto-enable: prefer the claiming plugin manifest id over a built-in channel alias when auto-allowlisting a configured channel, so WeCom/Yuanbao-style aliases resolve to the installed plugin id. Thanks @Beandon13.

changes.title: Secrets/apply: 保留 认证-profile `keyRef` 和 `tokenRef` fields 当 scrubbing provider-target secrets, so the canonical SecretRef metadata survives `secrets apply` 不适用 keeping plaintext values. Thanks @Beandon13.
changes.rawTitle: Secrets/apply: preserve auth-profile `keyRef` and `tokenRef` fields when scrubbing provider-target secrets, so the canonical SecretRef metadata survives `secrets apply` without keeping plaintext values. Thanks @Beandon13.

changes.title: 插件/active-内存: skip session-store channel entries that contain `:` 当 resolving the recall subagent's channel, so QQ c2c Agent IDs (e.g. `c2c:10D4F7C2…`) 和 other scoped conversation IDs do not reach bundled-插件 `dirName` validation 和 崩溃 the recall run. The same guard already applied to explicit `channelId` params (#76704); this extends it to store-derived channels. (#77396) Thanks @hclsys.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/active-memory: skip session-store channel entries that contain `:` when resolving the recall subagent's channel, so QQ c2c agent IDs (e.g. `c2c:10D4F7C2…`) and other scoped conversation IDs do not reach bundled-plugin `dirName` validation and crash the recall run. The same guard already applied to explicit `channelId` params (#76704); this extends it to store-derived channels. (#77396) Thanks @hclsys.

changes.title: Secrets/external channel contracts: also look 在 `<rootDir>/dist/` 当 resolving the `secret-contract-API` sidecar, so npm-published externalized channel 插件 (e.g. `@openclaw/Discord` since 2026.5.2) whose compiled artifacts live under `dist/` actually contribute their channel SecretRef contracts to the runtime snapshot. 不适用 this, env-backed `channels.Discord.令牌` SecretRefs 静默地 failed to 解决 at 网关 start 在 2026.5.3, leaving the channel `not configured` even though #76449 had landed the generic external-contract loader. Thanks @mogglemoss.
changes.rawTitle: Secrets/external channel contracts: also look in `<rootDir>/dist/` when resolving the `secret-contract-api` sidecar, so npm-published externalized channel plugins (e.g. `@openclaw/discord` since 2026.5.2) whose compiled artifacts live under `dist/` actually contribute their channel SecretRef contracts to the runtime snapshot. Without this, env-backed `channels.discord.token` SecretRefs silently failed to resolve at gateway start on 2026.5.3, leaving the channel `not configured` even though #76449 had landed the generic external-contract loader. Thanks @mogglemoss.

changes.title: 模型/认证: 添加 `openclaw 模型 认证 list [--provider <id>] [--json]` so users can inspect saved per-Agent 认证 profiles 不适用 dumping secrets 或 hitting the old “too many arguments” 路径. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Models/auth: add `openclaw models auth list [--provider <id>] [--json]` so users can inspect saved per-agent auth profiles without dumping secrets or hitting the old “too many arguments” path. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Control 界面/header: show the active Agent name 在 dashboard breadcrumbs 不适用 adding the current session 密钥, keeping non-chat views oriented 不适用 crowding the topbar.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/header: show the active agent name in dashboard breadcrumbs without adding the current session key, keeping non-chat views oriented without crowding the topbar.

changes.title: Control 界面/cron: make the New Job sidebar collapsible so the jobs list can reclaim space while keeping the form one click away. Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/cron: make the New Job sidebar collapsible so the jobs list can reclaim space while keeping the form one click away. Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.title: 网关/startup: keep 模型-catalog test helpers, run-session lookup code, QR pairing helpers, 和 TypeBox 内存-工具 schema construction out 的 hot startup import paths, reducing default 网关 benchmark 插件-load 和 内存 pressure.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: keep model-catalog test helpers, run-session lookup code, QR pairing helpers, and TypeBox memory-tool schema construction out of hot startup import paths, reducing default gateway benchmark plugin-load and memory pressure.

changes.title: Control 界面/性能: record 浏览器 long animation frame 或 long task entries 在 the debug event log 当 supported, making slow dashboard renders easier to attribute 从 the 界面.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/performance: record browser long animation frame or long task entries in the debug event log when supported, making slow dashboard renders easier to attribute from the UI.

changes.title: Slack/streaming: 添加 `streaming.progress.render: "rich"` 为了 Block Kit progress drafts backed 通过 structured progress line data.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/streaming: add `streaming.progress.render: "rich"` for Block Kit progress drafts backed by structured progress line data.

changes.title: Slack/streaming: keep the newest rich progress lines 当 Block Kit limits trim long progress drafts. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/streaming: keep the newest rich progress lines when Block Kit limits trim long progress drafts. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Channels/streaming: cap progress-draft 工具 lines 通过 default so edited progress boxes 避免 jumpy reflow 从 long wrapped lines.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/streaming: cap progress-draft tool lines by default so edited progress boxes avoid jumpy reflow from long wrapped lines.

changes.title: Agent/verbose: use compact explain-mode 工具 summaries 为了 `/verbose` 和 progress drafts 通过 default, 使用 `Agent.defaults.toolProgressDetail: "raw"` 和 per-Agent overrides 为了 debugging raw 命令/detail output.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/verbose: use compact explain-mode tool summaries for `/verbose` and progress drafts by default, with `agents.defaults.toolProgressDetail: "raw"` and per-agent overrides for debugging raw command/detail output.

changes.title: Control 界面/chat: 添加 an Agent-first filter to the chat session picker, keep chat controls/composer responsive across phone/tablet/desktop widths, keep desktop chat controls 在 one row, 避免 duplicate avatar refreshes 期间 initial chat load, 和 hide that row while scrolling down the transcript. Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/chat: add an agent-first filter to the chat session picker, keep chat controls/composer responsive across phone/tablet/desktop widths, keep desktop chat controls on one row, avoid duplicate avatar refreshes during initial chat load, and hide that row while scrolling down the transcript. Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.title: Control 界面/chat: collapse consecutive duplicate text messages 进入 one bubble 使用 a count so no-op heartbeat acknowledgements stay compact 不适用 hiding nearby context.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/chat: collapse consecutive duplicate text messages into one bubble with a count so no-op heartbeat acknowledgements stay compact without hiding nearby context.

changes.title: Agent/subagents: 保留 every grouped child result 当 direct completion fallback has to bypass the requester-Agent announce turn. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/subagents: preserve every grouped child result when direct completion fallback has to bypass the requester-agent announce turn. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: TTS/telephony: honor provider 语音/模型 overrides 在 telephony synthesis providers so Google Meet Agent speech logs match the backend that actually produced the audio. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: TTS/telephony: honor provider voice/model overrides in telephony synthesis providers so Google Meet agent speech logs match the backend that actually produced the audio. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 语音 Call/realtime: bound the paced Twilio audio queue 和 close overloaded realtime streams 之前 provider audio can pile up behind the websocket backpressure guard. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Voice Call/realtime: bound the paced Twilio audio queue and close overloaded realtime streams before provider audio can pile up behind the websocket backpressure guard. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Docs: clarify that IRC uses raw TCP/TLS sockets outside operator-managed forward 代理 routing, so direct IRC egress should be explicitly approved 之前 enabling IRC. Thanks @jesse-merhi.
changes.rawTitle: Docs: clarify that IRC uses raw TCP/TLS sockets outside operator-managed forward proxy routing, so direct IRC egress should be explicitly approved before enabling IRC. Thanks @jesse-merhi.

changes.title: 网关/性能: defer non-readiness sidecars until 之后 the ready Signal, 避免 hot-路径 channel 插件 barrel imports, 和 fast-路径 trusted bundled 插件 metadata 期间 网关 startup.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/performance: defer non-readiness sidecars until after the ready signal, avoid hot-path channel plugin barrel imports, and fast-path trusted bundled plugin metadata during Gateway startup.

changes.title: 网关/性能: 避免 importing `jiti` 在 native-loadable 插件 startup paths, so compiled bundled 插件 surfaces do not pay source-transform loader cost unless fallback loading is actually needed.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/performance: avoid importing `jiti` on native-loadable plugin startup paths, so compiled bundled plugin surfaces do not pay source-transform loader cost unless fallback loading is actually needed.

changes.title: 网关/diagnostics: 添加 startup phase spans, active work labels, stale terminal bridge markers, 和 default sync-I/O tracing 在 `pnpm 网关:watch` so slow 网关 turns are easier to attribute 从 logs 和 stability diagnostics.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/diagnostics: add startup phase spans, active work labels, stale terminal bridge markers, and default sync-I/O tracing in `pnpm gateway:watch` so slow Gateway turns are easier to attribute from logs and stability diagnostics.

changes.title: 插件/loader: 保留 real compiled 插件 module evaluation errors 在 the native fast 路径 而不是 treating every thrown `.js` module as a source-transform fallback miss. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/loader: preserve real compiled plugin module evaluation errors on the native fast path instead of treating every thrown `.js` module as a source-transform fallback miss. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: QA/Mantis: 添加 `pnpm openclaw qa mantis Slack-desktop-smoke` to run Slack live QA inside a Crabbox VNC desktop, open Slack Web, 和 capture desktop screenshots beside the Slack QA artifacts.
changes.rawTitle: QA/Mantis: add `pnpm openclaw qa mantis slack-desktop-smoke` to run Slack live QA inside a Crabbox VNC desktop, open Slack Web, and capture desktop screenshots beside the Slack QA artifacts.

changes.title: QA/Mantis: pass the runtime env through desktop-浏览器 Crabbox 和 artifact-copy child commands, so embedded Mantis callers can provide Crabbox credentials 不适用 mutating the parent process. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: QA/Mantis: pass the runtime env through desktop-browser Crabbox and artifact-copy child commands, so embedded Mantis callers can provide Crabbox credentials without mutating the parent process. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: QA/Mantis: return the copied Slack desktop screenshot 路径 even 当 remote Slack QA fails, so the CLI still prints the failure screenshot artifact. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: QA/Mantis: return the copied Slack desktop screenshot path even when remote Slack QA fails, so the CLI still prints the failure screenshot artifact. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: QA/Mantis: accept Blacksmith Testbox `tbx_...` lease ids 从 desktop smoke warmup, so provider overrides do not fail 之前 inspect/run. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: QA/Mantis: accept Blacksmith Testbox `tbx_...` lease ids from desktop smoke warmup, so provider overrides do not fail before inspect/run. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: QA/Codex harness: 添加 targeted live Docker/Testbox diagnostics, 认证 preflight checks, cache mount 修复, 和 app-server protocol checkout discovery so maintainer harness failures are easier to reproduce. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: QA/Codex harness: add targeted live Docker/Testbox diagnostics, auth preflight checks, cache mount fixes, and app-server protocol checkout discovery so maintainer harness failures are easier to reproduce. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/更新: treat official externalized bundled npm migrations 和 ClawHub-to-npm fallbacks as trusted source-linked installs, so prerelease-only official 插件 packages can migrate 从 bundled builds 不适用 being rejected as unsafe prerelease resolutions. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/update: treat official externalized bundled npm migrations and ClawHub-to-npm fallbacks as trusted source-linked installs, so prerelease-only official plugin packages can migrate from bundled builds without being rejected as unsafe prerelease resolutions. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/更新: move ClawHub-preferred externalized 插件 installs back to ClawHub 之后 an earlier npm fallback once the ClawHub package becomes available. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/update: move ClawHub-preferred externalized plugin installs back to ClawHub after an earlier npm fallback once the ClawHub package becomes available. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/更新: clean stale bundled load paths 为了 already-externalized pinned npm 和 ClawHub 插件 installs, so release-channel sync does not leave removed bundled paths ahead 的 the installed external package. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/update: clean stale bundled load paths for already-externalized pinned npm and ClawHub plugin installs, so release-channel sync does not leave removed bundled paths ahead of the installed external package. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Telegram: accept 插件-owned numeric forum-topic targets 在 the Agent message 工具 和 keep reply-dispatch provider chunks behind a real stable runtime alias 期间 在-place package updates. 修复 #77137. Thanks @richardmqq.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram: accept plugin-owned numeric forum-topic targets in the agent message tool and keep reply-dispatch provider chunks behind a real stable runtime alias during in-place package updates. Fixes #77137. Thanks @richardmqq.

changes.title: Google Meet: 保留 `realtime.introMessage: ""` so realtime Chrome joins can stay silent 而不是 restoring the default spoken intro. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: preserve `realtime.introMessage: ""` so realtime Chrome joins can stay silent instead of restoring the default spoken intro. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/SDK: 添加 bounded `before_agent_finalize` 重试 instructions so workflow 插件 can request one more 模型 pass. Thanks @100yenadmin.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/SDK: add bounded `before_agent_finalize` retry instructions so workflow plugins can request one more model pass. Thanks @100yenadmin.

changes.title: Discord/status: 添加 degraded Discord transport 和 网关 event-loop starvation signals to `openclaw channels status`, `openclaw status --deep`, 和 fetch-超时 logs so intermittent socket resets do not look like a healthy running channel. (#76327) Thanks @joshavant.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/status: add degraded Discord transport and gateway event-loop starvation signals to `openclaw channels status`, `openclaw status --deep`, and fetch-timeout logs so intermittent socket resets do not look like a healthy running channel. (#76327) Thanks @joshavant.

changes.title: Providers/OpenRouter: 添加 opt-在 response caching params that send OpenRouter's `X-OpenRouter-Cache`, `X-OpenRouter-Cache-TTL`, 和 cache-clear headers only 在 verified OpenRouter routes. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenRouter: add opt-in response caching params that send OpenRouter's `X-OpenRouter-Cache`, `X-OpenRouter-Cache-TTL`, and cache-clear headers only on verified OpenRouter routes. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Providers/OpenRouter: expand app-attribution categories so OpenClaw advertises coding, programming, writing, chat, 和 personal-Agent usage 在 verified OpenRouter routes. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenRouter: expand app-attribution categories so OpenClaw advertises coding, programming, writing, chat, and personal-agent usage on verified OpenRouter routes. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/更新: make package upgrades swap pnpm/npm-prefix installs cleanly, keep legacy 插件 install runtime chunks working, 和 在 the beta channel fall back default-line npm 插件 to default/latest 当 插件 beta releases are missing 或 fail install validation. Thanks @vincentkoc 和 @joshavant.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/update: make package upgrades swap pnpm/npm-prefix installs cleanly, keep legacy plugin install runtime chunks working, and on the beta channel fall back default-line npm plugins to default/latest when plugin beta releases are missing or fail install validation. Thanks @vincentkoc and @joshavant.

changes.title: Channels/WhatsApp: 支持 explicit WhatsApp Channel/Newsletter `@newsletter` outbound message targets 使用 channel session metadata 而不是 DM routing. 修复 #13417; carries forward the narrow outbound target idea 从 #13424. Thanks @vincentkoc 和 @agentz-manfred.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/WhatsApp: support explicit WhatsApp Channel/Newsletter `@newsletter` outbound message targets with channel session metadata instead of DM routing. Fixes #13417; carries forward the narrow outbound target idea from #13424. Thanks @vincentkoc and @agentz-manfred.

changes.title: Exec approvals: 添加 a tree-sitter-backed shell 命令 explainer 为了 future approval 和 命令-review surfaces. (#75004) Thanks @jesse-merhi.
changes.rawTitle: Exec approvals: add a tree-sitter-backed shell command explainer for future approval and command-review surfaces. (#75004) Thanks @jesse-merhi.

changes.title: Agent/sandbox: store sandbox container 和 浏览器 registry entries as per-runtime shard files, reducing unrelated session lock contention while `openclaw 诊断工具 --修复` migrates legacy monolithic registry files. (#74831) Thanks @luckylhb90.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/sandbox: store sandbox container and browser registry entries as per-runtime shard files, reducing unrelated session lock contention while `openclaw doctor --fix` migrates legacy monolithic registry files. (#74831) Thanks @luckylhb90.

changes.title: 插件/ClawHub: annotate 429 errors 从 ClawHub 使用 the reset window 从 `RateLimit-Reset`/`重试-之后` 和 append a `Sign 在 为了 higher rate limits.` hint 当 the request was unauthenticated, so users can see 当 downloads will recover 和 how to lift the cap. Thanks @romneyda.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/ClawHub: annotate 429 errors from ClawHub with the reset window from `RateLimit-Reset`/`Retry-After` and append a `Sign in for higher rate limits.` hint when the request was unauthenticated, so users can see when downloads will recover and how to lift the cap. Thanks @romneyda.

changes.title: 插件/runtime state: 添加 `registerIfAbsent` 为了 atomic keyed-store dedupe claims that return whether a 插件 成功地 claimed a 密钥 不适用 overwriting an existing live value. Thanks @amknight.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/runtime state: add `registerIfAbsent` for atomic keyed-store dedupe claims that return whether a plugin successfully claimed a key without overwriting an existing live value. Thanks @amknight.

changes.title: 插件 SDK: 添加 插件-owned `SessionEntry` slot projection 和 scoped trusted-policy session extension reads. (#75609; replaces part 的 #73384/#74483) Thanks @100yenadmin.
changes.rawTitle: Plugin SDK: add plugin-owned `SessionEntry` slot projection and scoped trusted-policy session extension reads. (#75609; replaces part of #73384/#74483) Thanks @100yenadmin.

changes.title: Infra/Windows: skip the POSIX `/tmp/openclaw` preferred 路径 在 Windows 在 `resolvePreferredOpenClawTmpDir` so log files, TTS temp files, 和 other writes land 在 `%TEMP%\openclaw-<uid>` 而不是 `C:\tmp\openclaw`. 修复 #60713. Thanks @juan-flores077.
changes.rawTitle: Infra/Windows: skip the POSIX `/tmp/openclaw` preferred path on Windows in `resolvePreferredOpenClawTmpDir` so log files, TTS temp files, and other writes land in `%TEMP%\openclaw-<uid>` instead of `C:\tmp\openclaw`. Fixes #60713. Thanks @juan-flores077.

changes.title: Media/Windows: open saved attachment temp files read/write 之前 fsync so Windows WebChat 和 `chat.send` media offloads no longer fail 使用 EPERM 期间 durability flush. (#76593) Thanks @qq230849622-a11y.
changes.rawTitle: Media/Windows: open saved attachment temp files read/write before fsync so Windows WebChat and `chat.send` media offloads no longer fail with EPERM during durability flush. (#76593) Thanks @qq230849622-a11y.

changes.title: Agent/tools: honor narrow runtime 工具 allowlists 当 constructing embedded-runner 工具 families 和 bundled MCP协议/LSP runtimes, so cron/subagent runs that request tools such as `update_plan`, `浏览器`, `x_search`, channel login tools, 或 `group:插件` no longer start 使用 missing tools 或 unrelated bootstrap work. (#77519, #77532)
changes.rawTitle: Agents/tools: honor narrow runtime tool allowlists when constructing embedded-runner tool families and bundled MCP/LSP runtimes, so cron/subagent runs that request tools such as `update_plan`, `browser`, `x_search`, channel login tools, or `group:plugins` no longer start with missing tools or unrelated bootstrap work. (#77519, #77532)

changes.title: Codex 插件: mirror the experimental upstream app-server protocol 和 format generated TypeScript 之前 drift checks, keeping OpenClaw's `experimentalApi` bridge compatible 使用 latest Codex while preserving formatter gates.
changes.rawTitle: Codex plugin: mirror the experimental upstream app-server protocol and format generated TypeScript before drift checks, keeping OpenClaw's `experimentalApi` bridge compatible with latest Codex while preserving formatter gates.

changes.title: Telegram/media: derive no-caption inbound media placeholders 从 saved MIME metadata 而不是 the Telegram `photo` shape, so non-image 和 mixed attachments no longer reach the 模型 as `<media:image>`. 修复 #69793. Thanks @aspalagin.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/media: derive no-caption inbound media placeholders from saved MIME metadata instead of the Telegram `photo` shape, so non-image and mixed attachments no longer reach the model as `<media:image>`. Fixes #69793. Thanks @aspalagin.

changes.title: Agent/cache: keep per-turn runtime context out 的 ordinary chat system prompts while still delivering hidden current-turn context, restoring prompt-cache 复用 在 chat continuations. 修复 #77431. Thanks @Udjin79.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/cache: keep per-turn runtime context out of ordinary chat system prompts while still delivering hidden current-turn context, restoring prompt-cache reuse on chat continuations. Fixes #77431. Thanks @Udjin79.

changes.title: 网关/startup: include resolved thinking 和 fast-mode defaults 在 the `Agent 模型` startup log line, defaulting unset startup thinking to `medium` 不适用 mixing 在 reasoning visibility.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: include resolved thinking and fast-mode defaults in the `agent model` startup log line, defaulting unset startup thinking to `medium` without mixing in reasoning visibility.

changes.title: Agent/Tools: 添加 post-compaction loop guard 在 `pi-embedded-runner` that arms 之后 auto-compaction-重试 和 aborts the run 使用 `compaction_loop_persisted` 当 the Agent emits the same `(工具, args, result)` triple `windowSize` times (default 3) within that window. 禁用 via existing `tools.loopDetection.enabled`; tune via `tools.loopDetection.postCompactionGuard.windowSize`. Targets the failure mode where context-overflow + compaction does not break a 工具-call loop. Refs #77474; carries forward #21597. Thanks @efpiva.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Tools: add post-compaction loop guard in `pi-embedded-runner` that arms after auto-compaction-retry and aborts the run with `compaction_loop_persisted` when the agent emits the same `(tool, args, result)` triple `windowSize` times (default 3) within that window. Disable via existing `tools.loopDetection.enabled`; tune via `tools.loopDetection.postCompactionGuard.windowSize`. Targets the failure mode where context-overflow + compaction does not break a tool-call loop. Refs #77474; carries forward #21597. Thanks @efpiva.

changes.title: 网关/watch: suppress sync-I/O trace output 期间 `pnpm 网关:watch --benchmark` unless explicitly requested, so CPU profiling no longer floods the terminal 使用 stack traces.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/watch: suppress sync-I/O trace output during `pnpm gateway:watch --benchmark` unless explicitly requested, so CPU profiling no longer floods the terminal with stack traces.

changes.title: 网关/watch: 当 benchmark sync-I/O tracing is explicitly enabled, tee trace blocks to the benchmark output log 和 filter them 从 the terminal pane while keeping normal 网关 logs visible.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/watch: when benchmark sync-I/O tracing is explicitly enabled, tee trace blocks to the benchmark output log and filter them from the terminal pane while keeping normal Gateway logs visible.

changes.title: 插件/runtime-deps: include `json5` 在 the 内存-core 插件 runtime dependency set so packaged `memory_search` sandboxes can 解决 generated OpenClaw runtime chunks that parse JSON5 配置. 修复 #77461.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/runtime-deps: include `json5` in the memory-core plugin runtime dependency set so packaged `memory_search` sandboxes can resolve generated OpenClaw runtime chunks that parse JSON5 config. Fixes #77461.

changes.title: Codex harness: 保留 app-server usage-limit reset details 和 deliver OpenClaw-owned runtime failure notices through 工具-only source-reply mode, so Telegram 和 other chat channels tell users 当 Codex subscription limits 或 API failures block a turn 而不是 going silent. (#77557) Thanks @pashpashpash.
changes.rawTitle: Codex harness: preserve app-server usage-limit reset details and deliver OpenClaw-owned runtime failure notices through tool-only source-reply mode, so Telegram and other chat channels tell users when Codex subscription limits or API failures block a turn instead of going silent. (#77557) Thanks @pashpashpash.

changes.title: Agent/OpenAI: default direct OpenAI Responses 模型 to the SSE transport 而不是 WebSocket auto-selection, preventing pi runtime chat turns 从 hanging 在 servers where the WebSocket 路径 stalls while the OpenAI HTTP stream works. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/OpenAI: default direct OpenAI Responses models to the SSE transport instead of WebSocket auto-selection, preventing pi runtime chat turns from hanging on servers where the WebSocket path stalls while the OpenAI HTTP stream works. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Discord/replies: treat failed final reply delivery as a failed turn 而不是 counting it as a delivered automatic visible reply, so guild/channel turns no longer show done 当 the final message was dropped. 修复 #77520. Thanks @Patrick-Erichsen.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/replies: treat failed final reply delivery as a failed turn instead of counting it as a delivered automatic visible reply, so guild/channel turns no longer show done when the final message was dropped. Fixes #77520. Thanks @Patrick-Erichsen.

changes.title: Discord: prefer IPv4 为了 Discord REST 和 网关 WebSocket startup paths so IPv4-only networks no longer stall 之前 网关 READY 和 inbound message dispatch. 修复 #77398; refs #77526. Thanks @Beandon13.
changes.rawTitle: Discord: prefer IPv4 for Discord REST and gateway WebSocket startup paths so IPv4-only networks no longer stall before Gateway READY and inbound message dispatch. Fixes #77398; refs #77526. Thanks @Beandon13.

changes.title: Channels/插件: 密钥 bundled package-state probes, env/配置 presence, 和 read-only 命令 defaults 通过 channel id 而不是 manifest 插件 id, preserving setup 和 native-命令 detection 为了 channel 插件 whose package id differs 从 the channel alias. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/plugins: key bundled package-state probes, env/config presence, and read-only command defaults by channel id instead of manifest plugin id, preserving setup and native-command detection for channel plugins whose package id differs from the channel alias. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Docker: prune package-excluded 插件 dist directories 从 runtime images unless the build explicitly opts that 插件 在, so official external 插件 such as 飞书 stay install-在-demand 而不是 shipping partial metadata 不适用 compiled runtime output. 修复 #77424. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Docker: prune package-excluded plugin dist directories from runtime images unless the build explicitly opts that plugin in, so official external plugins such as Feishu stay install-on-demand instead of shipping partial metadata without compiled runtime output. Fixes #77424. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 模型 switching: include the exact additive allowlist repair 命令 当 `/模型 ... --runtime ...` targets a blocked 模型, 和 make Telegram's 模型 picker say that it changes only the session 模型 while leaving the runtime unchanged. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Model switching: include the exact additive allowlist repair command when `/model ... --runtime ...` targets a blocked model, and make Telegram's model picker say that it changes only the session model while leaving the runtime unchanged. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Mattermost: clarify that the 模型 picker only changes the session 模型 和 that runtime switches require `/oc_model <provider/模型> --runtime <runtime>`. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Mattermost: clarify that the model picker only changes the session model and that runtime switches require `/oc_model <provider/model> --runtime <runtime>`. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 诊断工具/配置: keep active `认证.profiles` metadata intact 当 `诊断工具 --修复` strips stale secret fields 从 configs, repairing legacy `<provider>:default` API-密钥 profile metadata 当 模型 fallbacks 或 explicit `模型@profile` refs still depend 在 it. 修复 #77400.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/config: keep active `auth.profiles` metadata intact when `doctor --fix` strips stale secret fields from configs, repairing legacy `<provider>:default` API-key profile metadata when model fallbacks or explicit `model@profile` refs still depend on it. Fixes #77400.

changes.title: 诊断工具/插件: include `插件.允许`-only official 插件 ids 在 the release configured-插件 repair set, so `诊断工具 --修复` installs official external 插件 that are configured 但是 not yet loaded 而不是 removing them as stale 允许 entries. 修复 #77155. Thanks @hclsys.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/plugins: include `plugins.allow`-only official plugin ids in the release configured-plugin repair set, so `doctor --fix` installs official external plugins that are configured but not yet loaded instead of removing them as stale allow entries. Fixes #77155. Thanks @hclsys.

changes.title: 诊断工具/sessions: clear auto-created stale session routing state 从 the sessions store 当 `诊断工具 --修复` sees 插件-owned 模型/runtime/认证/session bindings outside the current configured route, while leaving explicit user 模型 choices 为了 manual review. Refs #68615.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/sessions: clear auto-created stale session routing state from the sessions store when `doctor --fix` sees plugin-owned model/runtime/auth/session bindings outside the current configured route, while leaving explicit user model choices for manual review. Refs #68615.

changes.title: CLI/更新: 禁用 和 skip 插件 that fail package-更新 插件 sync, so a broken npm/ClawHub/git/marketplace 插件 cannot turn a successful OpenClaw package 更新 进入 a failed 更新 result. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/update: disable and skip plugins that fail package-update plugin sync, so a broken npm/ClawHub/git/marketplace plugin cannot turn a successful OpenClaw package update into a failed update result. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: CLI/更新: use an absolute POSIX npm script shell 期间 package-manager updates, so restricted 路径 environments can still run dependency lifecycle scripts while updating 从 `--tag main`. 修复 #77530. Thanks @PeterTremonti.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/update: use an absolute POSIX npm script shell during package-manager updates, so restricted PATH environments can still run dependency lifecycle scripts while updating from `--tag main`. Fixes #77530. Thanks @PeterTremonti.

changes.title: Diagnostics: grant the internal diagnostics event bus to official installed diagnostics exporter 插件, so npm-installed `@openclaw/diagnostics-prometheus` can emit metrics 不适用 broadening the capability to arbitrary global 插件. 修复 #76628. Thanks @RayWoo.
changes.rawTitle: Diagnostics: grant the internal diagnostics event bus to official installed diagnostics exporter plugins, so npm-installed `@openclaw/diagnostics-prometheus` can emit metrics without broadening the capability to arbitrary global plugins. Fixes #76628. Thanks @RayWoo.

changes.title: 浏览器: enforce strict SSRF current-URL checks 之前 existing-session screenshots, matching existing-session snapshot handling. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Browser: enforce strict SSRF current-URL checks before existing-session screenshots, matching existing-session snapshot handling. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Active 内存: give 超时 partial transcript recovery enough abort-settle headroom so temporary recall summaries are returned 之前 cleanup. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Active Memory: give timeout partial transcript recovery enough abort-settle headroom so temporary recall summaries are returned before cleanup. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/chat: clear the active reply-run guard 之前 draining queued same-session follow-up turns, so sequential `chat.send` calls no longer trip `ReplyRunAlreadyActiveError` every other request. 修复 #77485. Thanks @bws14email.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/chat: clear the active reply-run guard before draining queued same-session follow-up turns, so sequential `chat.send` calls no longer trip `ReplyRunAlreadyActiveError` every other request. Fixes #77485. Thanks @bws14email.

changes.title: Agent/media: 避免 sending generated image, video, 和 music attachments twice 当 streamed reply text arrives 之前 the final `MEDIA:` directive.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/media: avoid sending generated image, video, and music attachments twice when streamed reply text arrives before the final `MEDIA:` directive.

changes.title: CLI/sessions: cap `openclaw sessions` output to the newest 100 rows 通过 default 和 添加 `--limit <n|all>` plus JSON pagination metadata, so repeated machine polling 的 large session stores cannot fan out 进入 unbounded per-row enrichment/output work. 修复 #77500. Thanks @Kaotic3.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/sessions: cap `openclaw sessions` output to the newest 100 rows by default and add `--limit <n|all>` plus JSON pagination metadata, so repeated machine polling of large session stores cannot fan out into unbounded per-row enrichment/output work. Fixes #77500. Thanks @Kaotic3.

changes.title: 诊断工具/配置: restore legacy group chat 配置 migrations 为了 `routing.allowFrom`, `routing.groupChat.*`, 和 `channels.Telegram.requireMention` so upgrades keep WhatsApp, Telegram, 和 iMessage group mention gates 和 history settings 而不是 leaving configs invalid 或 静默地 blocked. Thanks @scoootscooob.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/config: restore legacy group chat config migrations for `routing.allowFrom`, `routing.groupChat.*`, and `channels.telegram.requireMention` so upgrades keep WhatsApp, Telegram, and iMessage group mention gates and history settings instead of leaving configs invalid or silently blocked. Thanks @scoootscooob.

changes.title: CLI/更新: make package-更新 follow-up processes write completion results 和 exit explicitly, so Windows packaged upgrades do not hang 之后 the new package finishes post-core 插件 work. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/update: make package-update follow-up processes write completion results and exit explicitly, so Windows packaged upgrades do not hang after the new package finishes post-core plugin work. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Release validation: skip Slack live QA unless Slack credentials are explicitly configured, so release gates can keep proving non-Slack surfaces while Slack is still local 和 credential-gated. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Release validation: skip Slack live QA unless Slack credentials are explicitly configured, so release gates can keep proving non-Slack surfaces while Slack is still local and credential-gated. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/更新: treat OpenClaw CalVer correction versions like `2026.5.3-1` as satisfying base 插件 API ranges, so correction builds can install 插件 that require the base runtime API. 修复 #77293. (#77450) Thanks @p3nchan.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/update: treat OpenClaw CalVer correction versions like `2026.5.3-1` as satisfying base plugin API ranges, so correction builds can install plugins that require the base runtime API. Fixes #77293. (#77450) Thanks @p3nchan.

changes.title: Discord/网关 startup: 重试 Discord READY waits 使用 backoff, defer startup `sessions.list` 和 native approval readiness failures until sidecars recover, 和 保留 component-only Discord payloads 当 final reply scrubbing removes all text. (#77478) Thanks @NikolaFC.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/Gateway startup: retry Discord READY waits with backoff, defer startup `sessions.list` and native approval readiness failures until sidecars recover, and preserve component-only Discord payloads when final reply scrubbing removes all text. (#77478) Thanks @NikolaFC.

changes.title: CLI/launcher: forward termination signals to compile-cache respawn children, so killing a wrapper process no longer leaves the 安全 audit worker orphaned. 修复 #77458. Thanks @jaikharbanda.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/launcher: forward termination signals to compile-cache respawn children, so killing a wrapper process no longer leaves the security audit worker orphaned. Fixes #77458. Thanks @jaikharbanda.

changes.title: 插件/registry: recover managed-npm external 插件 从 the owned npm root 当 a stale persisted registry would otherwise hide them 之后 package-manager upgrades. 修复 #77266. Thanks @p3nchan.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/registry: recover managed-npm external plugins from the owned npm root when a stale persisted registry would otherwise hide them after package-manager upgrades. Fixes #77266. Thanks @p3nchan.

changes.title: 修复(网关): clamp unbound websocket 认证 scopes [AI]. (#77413) Thanks @pgondhi987.
changes.rawTitle: fix(gateway): clamp unbound websocket auth scopes [AI]. (#77413) Thanks @pgondhi987.

changes.title: Gate zalouser startup name matching [AI]. (#77411) Thanks @pgondhi987.
changes.rawTitle: Gate zalouser startup name matching [AI]. (#77411) Thanks @pgondhi987.

changes.title: Active 内存: send a bounded latest-message search query to the recall worker so channel/runtime metadata does not become the 内存 search string. 修复 #65309. Thanks @joeykrug, @westley3601, @pimenov, 和 @tasi333.
changes.rawTitle: Active Memory: send a bounded latest-message search query to the recall worker so channel/runtime metadata does not become the memory search string. Fixes #65309. Thanks @joeykrug, @westley3601, @pimenov, and @tasi333.

changes.title: 修复(device-pair): require pairing scope 为了 pair 命令 [AI]. (#76377) Thanks @pgondhi987.
changes.rawTitle: fix(device-pair): require pairing scope for pair command [AI]. (#76377) Thanks @pgondhi987.

changes.title: Providers/OpenRouter: keep DeepSeek V4 `reasoning_effort` 在 OpenRouter-supported values, mapping stale `max` thinking overrides to `xhigh` so `OpenRouter/deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro` no longer fails 使用 OpenRouter's invalid-effort 400. 修复 #77350. (#77423) Thanks @krllagent, @mushuiyu886, 和 @sallyom.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenRouter: keep DeepSeek V4 `reasoning_effort` on OpenRouter-supported values, mapping stale `max` thinking overrides to `xhigh` so `openrouter/deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro` no longer fails with OpenRouter's invalid-effort 400. Fixes #77350. (#77423) Thanks @krllagent, @mushuiyu886, and @sallyom.

changes.title: 修复(qqbot): keep private commands off framework surface [AI]. (#77212) Thanks @pgondhi987.
changes.rawTitle: fix(qqbot): keep private commands off framework surface [AI]. (#77212) Thanks @pgondhi987.

changes.title: Claude CLI: honor non-off `/think` levels 通过 passing Claude Code's session-scoped `--effort` flag through the CLI backend seam, so chat bridges no longer show an inert thinking control. 修复 #77303. Thanks @Petr1t.
changes.rawTitle: Claude CLI: honor non-off `/think` levels by passing Claude Code's session-scoped `--effort` flag through the CLI backend seam, so chat bridges no longer show an inert thinking control. Fixes #77303. Thanks @Petr1t.

changes.title: Agent/subagents: refresh deferred final-delivery payloads 当 same-session completion output changes, so retried parent notifications use the final child summary 而不是 stale progress text. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/subagents: refresh deferred final-delivery payloads when same-session completion output changes, so retried parent notifications use the final child summary instead of stale progress text. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/media: route async music 和 video completion results back through the requester Agent, preserving automatic replies while requiring the message 工具 only 为了 message-工具-only group/channel delivery.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/media: route async music and video completion results back through the requester agent, preserving automatic replies while requiring the message tool only for message-tool-only group/channel delivery.

changes.title: active-内存: skip the 内存 sub-Agent gracefully 而不是 logging a confusing allowlist 错误 当 no 内存 插件 (`内存-core` 或 `内存-lancedb`) is loaded, so active-内存 使用 no 内存 backend no longer produces misleading "No callable tools remain" warnings 在 the 网关 log. 修复 #77506. Thanks @hclsys.
changes.rawTitle: active-memory: skip the memory sub-agent gracefully instead of logging a confusing allowlist error when no memory plugin (`memory-core` or `memory-lancedb`) is loaded, so active-memory with no memory backend no longer produces misleading "No callable tools remain" warnings in the gateway log. Fixes #77506. Thanks @hclsys.

changes.title: 内存/wiki: 保留 representation 从 both corpora 在 `corpus=all` searches while backfilling unused result capacity, so 内存 hits are not starved 通过 numerically higher wiki integer scores. 修复 #77337. Thanks @hclsys.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/wiki: preserve representation from both corpora in `corpus=all` searches while backfilling unused result capacity, so memory hits are not starved by numerically higher wiki integer scores. Fixes #77337. Thanks @hclsys.

changes.title: Docker/compose: pin container-side `OPENCLAW_CONFIG_DIR` 和 `OPENCLAW_WORKSPACE_DIR` 在 both 网关 和 CLI services so the host paths written 进入 `.env` 通过 `scripts/docker/setup.sh` (used as Compose bind-mount sources) cannot leak 进入 runtime code via the `env_file` import. 修复 regressions 在 macOS Docker setups where the first Agent reply died 使用 `EACCES: permission denied, mkdir '/Users'` because the host-style workspace 路径 got persisted 进入 `Agent.defaults.workspace`. 修复 #77436. Thanks @lonexreb.
changes.rawTitle: Docker/compose: pin container-side `OPENCLAW_CONFIG_DIR` and `OPENCLAW_WORKSPACE_DIR` on both gateway and CLI services so the host paths written into `.env` by `scripts/docker/setup.sh` (used as Compose bind-mount sources) cannot leak into runtime code via the `env_file` import. Fixes regressions on macOS Docker setups where the first agent reply died with `EACCES: permission denied, mkdir '/Users'` because the host-style workspace path got persisted into `agents.defaults.workspace`. Fixes #77436. Thanks @lonexreb.

changes.title: Telegram: clean up 工具-only draft previews 之后 assistant message boundaries so transient `Surfacing...` 工具-status bubbles do not linger 当 no matching final preview arrives. Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram: clean up tool-only draft previews after assistant message boundaries so transient `Surfacing...` tool-status bubbles do not linger when no matching final preview arrives. Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.title: Slack: report `unknown 错误` 而不是 `undefined` 在 socket-mode startup 重试 logs 和 label the 重试 reason explicitly.
changes.rawTitle: Slack: report `unknown error` instead of `undefined` in socket-mode startup retry logs and label the retry reason explicitly.

changes.title: Telegram: let explicit forum-topic `requireMention` settings override persisted `/activate` 和 `/deactivate` state, so per-topic mention gates work consistently. 修复 #49864. Thanks @Panniantong.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram: let explicit forum-topic `requireMention` settings override persisted `/activate` and `/deactivate` state, so per-topic mention gates work consistently. Fixes #49864. Thanks @Panniantong.

changes.title: Cron: surface failed isolated-run diagnostics 在 `cron show`, status, 和 run history 当 requested tools are unavailable, so blocked cron runs report the actual 工具-policy failure 而不是 a misleading green result. 修复 #75763. Thanks @RyanSandoval.
changes.rawTitle: Cron: surface failed isolated-run diagnostics in `cron show`, status, and run history when requested tools are unavailable, so blocked cron runs report the actual tool-policy failure instead of a misleading green result. Fixes #75763. Thanks @RyanSandoval.

changes.title: TUI/escape abort: track the 在-flight runId 之后 `chat.send` resolves so pressing Esc 期间 the gap 之前 the first 网关 event aborts the run 而不是 repeatedly printing `no active run`. 修复 #1296. Thanks @Lukavyi 和 @romneyda.
changes.rawTitle: TUI/escape abort: track the in-flight runId after `chat.send` resolves so pressing Esc during the gap before the first gateway event aborts the run instead of repeatedly printing `no active run`. Fixes #1296. Thanks @Lukavyi and @romneyda.

changes.title: TUI/render: 停止 the long-令牌 sanitizer 从 injecting literal spaces inside inline code spans, fenced code blocks, table borders, 和 bare hyphenated/dotted identifiers, so copied package names, entity IDs, 和 shell line-continuations stay byte-为了-byte intact while narrow-terminal protection still chunks unidentifiable long prose tokens. 修复 #48432, #39505. Thanks @DocOellerson, @xeusoc, @CCcassiusdjs, @akramcodez, @brokemac79, @romneyda.
changes.rawTitle: TUI/render: stop the long-token sanitizer from injecting literal spaces inside inline code spans, fenced code blocks, table borders, and bare hyphenated/dotted identifiers, so copied package names, entity IDs, and shell line-continuations stay byte-for-byte intact while narrow-terminal protection still chunks unidentifiable long prose tokens. Fixes #48432, #39505. Thanks @DocOellerson, @xeusoc, @CCcassiusdjs, @akramcodez, @brokemac79, @romneyda.

changes.title: 插件 skills: publish 插件-declared skills through the generated 插件 skills directory (`~/.openclaw/插件-skills/`) while keeping direct prompt loading intact, so Agent file-based discovery paths find 插件 skill `SKILL.md` files 和 inactive 插件 links are cleaned up. 修复 #77296. (#77328) Thanks @zhangguiping-xydt.
changes.rawTitle: Plugin skills: publish plugin-declared skills through the generated plugin skills directory (`~/.openclaw/plugin-skills/`) while keeping direct prompt loading intact, so agent file-based discovery paths find plugin skill `SKILL.md` files and inactive plugin links are cleaned up. Fixes #77296. (#77328) Thanks @zhangguiping-xydt.

changes.title: 网关/status: label Linux managed 网关 services as `systemd user`, making status output explicit about the user-service scope 而不是 implying a system-level unit. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/status: label Linux managed gateway services as `systemd user`, making status output explicit about the user-service scope instead of implying a system-level unit. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/install: 移除 the previous managed 插件 directory 当 a reinstall switches sources, so stale ClawHub 和 npm copies no longer keep duplicate 插件 ids 在 discovery 之后 the new install wins. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: remove the previous managed plugin directory when a reinstall switches sources, so stale ClawHub and npm copies no longer keep duplicate plugin ids in discovery after the new install wins. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/install: let official 插件 reinstall recovery repair source-only installed runtime shadows, so `openclaw 插件 install npm:@openclaw/Discord --force` can replace the bad package 而不是 stopping at stale 配置 validation. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: let official plugin reinstall recovery repair source-only installed runtime shadows, so `openclaw plugins install npm:@openclaw/discord --force` can replace the bad package instead of stopping at stale config validation. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: CLI/更新: stage pnpm-detected npm-layout global package updates through a clean npm prefix swap, keep 插件 install runtime imports behind a stable alias, 和 ship legacy install-runtime aliases back to `2026.3.22`, preventing stale overlay chunks 从 破坏性变更 插件 post-更新 sync. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/update: stage pnpm-detected npm-layout global package updates through a clean npm prefix swap, keep plugin install runtime imports behind a stable alias, and ship legacy install-runtime aliases back to `2026.3.22`, preventing stale overlay chunks from breaking plugin post-update sync. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/commands: 允许 the official ClawHub Codex 插件 package to keep reserved `/Codex` 命令 ownership, matching the existing npm-managed Codex package behavior. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/commands: allow the official ClawHub Codex plugin package to keep reserved `/codex` command ownership, matching the existing npm-managed Codex package behavior. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 认证/OpenAI Codex: rewrite invalidated per-Agent Codex 认证-order 和 session profile overrides toward a healthy relogin profile, so revoked OAuth认证 accounts do not stay pinned 之后 signing 在 重新. Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Auth/OpenAI Codex: rewrite invalidated per-agent Codex auth-order and session profile overrides toward a healthy relogin profile, so revoked OAuth accounts do not stay pinned after signing in again. Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.title: 插件/commands: scope QQBot framework slash commands to the QQBot channel so `/bot-*` 命令 handlers 和 native specs do not leak onto unrelated chat surfaces. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/commands: scope QQBot framework slash commands to the QQBot channel so `/bot-*` command handlers and native specs do not leak onto unrelated chat surfaces. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 修复: harden backend message action 网关 routing [AI]. (#76374) Thanks @pgondhi987.
changes.rawTitle: fix: harden backend message action gateway routing [AI]. (#76374) Thanks @pgondhi987.

changes.title: Gate QQBot streaming 命令 认证 [AI]. (#76375) Thanks @pgondhi987.
changes.rawTitle: Gate QQBot streaming command auth [AI]. (#76375) Thanks @pgondhi987.

changes.title: 插件/discovery: ignore managed npm 插件 packages that only expose TypeScript source entries 不适用 compiled runtime output, so stale/broken installs cannot hide a working bundled 或 reinstallable channel 插件 期间 setup. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/discovery: ignore managed npm plugin packages that only expose TypeScript source entries without compiled runtime output, so stale/broken installs cannot hide a working bundled or reinstallable channel plugin during setup. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: CLI/update: treat OpenClaw stable correction versions like `2026.5.3-1` as newer than their base stable release, so package updates no longer ask for downgrade confirmation. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/install: suppress dangerous-pattern scanner warnings 为了 trusted official OpenClaw npm installs, so installing `@openclaw/Discord` no longer prints credential-harvesting warnings 为了 the official package. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: suppress dangerous-pattern scanner warnings for trusted official OpenClaw npm installs, so installing `@openclaw/discord` no longer prints credential-harvesting warnings for the official package. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/commands: suppress dangerous-pattern scanner warnings 为了 trusted catalog npm installs 从 owner-gated `/插件 install` commands, so chat-driven installs match the CLI install trust 路径. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/commands: suppress dangerous-pattern scanner warnings for trusted catalog npm installs from owner-gated `/plugins install` commands, so chat-driven installs match the CLI install trust path. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/release: make the published npm runtime verifier reject blank `openclaw.runtimeExtensions` entries 而不是 treating them as absent 和 passing via inferred outputs. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/release: make the published npm runtime verifier reject blank `openclaw.runtimeExtensions` entries instead of treating them as absent and passing via inferred outputs. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/安全: ignore inline 和 block comments 当 matching source-rule context 在 插件 install scans, so comment-only `fetch`/`post` references near environment defaults do not block clean 插件. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/security: ignore inline and block comments when matching source-rule context in plugin install scans, so comment-only `fetch`/`post` references near environment defaults do not block clean plugins. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 诊断工具/插件: 移除 stale managed install records 为了 bundled 插件 even 当 the bundled 插件 is not explicitly configured, so 诊断工具 cleanup cannot leave orphaned install metadata behind. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/plugins: remove stale managed install records for bundled plugins even when the bundled plugin is not explicitly configured, so doctor cleanup cannot leave orphaned install metadata behind. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Web fetch: scope provider fallback cache entries 通过 the selected fetch provider so 配置 reloads cannot 复用 another provider's cached fallback payload. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Web fetch: scope provider fallback cache entries by the selected fetch provider so config reloads cannot reuse another provider's cached fallback payload. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Web search: honor late-bound `tools.web.search.enabled: false` 期间 工具 execution so 配置 reloads cannot leave an already-created `web_search` 工具 runnable. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Web search: honor late-bound `tools.web.search.enabled: false` during tool execution so config reloads cannot leave an already-created `web_search` tool runnable. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/packages: reject inferred built runtime entries that exist 但是 fail package-boundary checks 而不是 falling back to TypeScript source 为了 installed packages. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/packages: reject inferred built runtime entries that exist but fail package-boundary checks instead of falling back to TypeScript source for installed packages. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/loader: do not 重试 native-loaded JavaScript 插件 modules through the source transformer 之后 native evaluation has already reached a missing dependency, avoiding duplicate top-level side effects. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/loader: do not retry native-loaded JavaScript plugin modules through the source transformer after native evaluation has already reached a missing dependency, avoiding duplicate top-level side effects. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/packages: reject blank `openclaw.runtimeExtensions` entries 而不是 静默地 ignoring them 和 falling back to inferred TypeScript runtime entries. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/packages: reject blank `openclaw.runtimeExtensions` entries instead of silently ignoring them and falling back to inferred TypeScript runtime entries. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 诊断工具/插件: 移除 stale managed npm 插件 shadow entries 从 the managed package lock as well as `package.json` 和 `node_modules`, so future npm operations do not keep referencing repaired bundled-插件 shadows. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/plugins: remove stale managed npm plugin shadow entries from the managed package lock as well as `package.json` and `node_modules`, so future npm operations do not keep referencing repaired bundled-plugin shadows. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/runtime state: keep the 密钥 being registered 当 namespace eviction runs 在 the same millisecond as existing entries, so `register` 和 `registerIfAbsent` do not report success while evicting their own fresh value. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/runtime state: keep the key being registered when namespace eviction runs in the same millisecond as existing entries, so `register` and `registerIfAbsent` do not report success while evicting their own fresh value. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/providers: make bundled provider discovery honor restrictive `插件.允许` 通过 default 为了 new configs, while 诊断工具 migrates legacy restrictive allowlist configs to `插件.bundledDiscovery: "compat"` to 保留 upgrade behavior. Thanks @dougbtv.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/providers: make bundled provider discovery honor restrictive `plugins.allow` by default for new configs, while doctor migrates legacy restrictive allowlist configs to `plugins.bundledDiscovery: "compat"` to preserve upgrade behavior. Thanks @dougbtv.

changes.title: Control 界面/Talk: make failed Talk startup errors dismissable 和 clear the stale Talk 错误 state 当 dismissed, so missing realtime 语音 provider configuration does not leave a permanent chat banner. 修复 #77071. Thanks @ijoshdavis.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/Talk: make failed Talk startup errors dismissable and clear the stale Talk error state when dismissed, so missing realtime voice provider configuration does not leave a permanent chat banner. Fixes #77071. Thanks @ijoshdavis.

changes.title: Control 界面/Talk: 停止 和 clear failed realtime Talk sessions 当 dismissing runtime 错误 banners, so the next Talk click starts a fresh session 而不是 only stopping the stale one. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/Talk: stop and clear failed realtime Talk sessions when dismissing runtime error banners, so the next Talk click starts a fresh session instead of only stopping the stale one. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Control 界面/Talk: 重试 从 a failed realtime Talk session 在 the next Talk click 而不是 requiring a separate stale-session 停止 click first. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/Talk: retry from a failed realtime Talk session on the next Talk click instead of requiring a separate stale-session stop click first. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Canvas host: 保留 the 网关 TLS scheme 在 浏览器 canvas host URLs 和 startup mount logs, so direct HTTPS gateways do not advertise insecure canvas links. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Canvas host: preserve the Gateway TLS scheme in browser canvas host URLs and startup mount logs, so direct HTTPS gateways do not advertise insecure canvas links. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: WhatsApp/login: route login success 和 failure messages through the injected runtime, so setup/onboarding surfaces capture all login output 而不是 only the QR. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp/login: route login success and failure messages through the injected runtime, so setup/onboarding surfaces capture all login output instead of only the QR. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Google Chat: create an isolated Google 认证 transport per 认证 client, so google-认证-library interceptor mutations do not accumulate across Webhook verification 和 access-令牌 clients. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Google Chat: create an isolated Google auth transport per auth client, so google-auth-library interceptor mutations do not accumulate across webhook verification and access-token clients. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 诊断工具/插件: 移除 orphaned 或 recovered managed npm copies 的 bundled `@openclaw/*` 插件 期间 `诊断工具 --修复`, so stale package manifests cannot shadow the current bundled 插件 配置 schema.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/plugins: remove orphaned or recovered managed npm copies of bundled `@openclaw/*` plugins during `doctor --fix`, so stale package manifests cannot shadow the current bundled plugin config schema.

changes.title: Control 界面/性能: cap long-task 和 long-animation-frame diagnostics 在 the shared event log, so slow-render telemetry does not evict 网关/插件 events 从 the Debug 和 Overview views. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/performance: cap long-task and long-animation-frame diagnostics in the shared event log, so slow-render telemetry does not evict gateway/plugin events from the Debug and Overview views. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/startup: log the canvas host mount only 之后 the HTTP server has bound, so startup logs no longer report the canvas host as mounted 之前 it can serve requests.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: log the canvas host mount only after the HTTP server has bound, so startup logs no longer report the canvas host as mounted before it can serve requests.

changes.title: Control 界面/i18n: render the Sessions active filter tooltip 使用 the configured minute count 在 every locale 和 make the i18n check reject placeholder drift. Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/i18n: render the Sessions active filter tooltip with the configured minute count in every locale and make the i18n check reject placeholder drift. Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.title: Web fetch: late-bind `web_fetch` 配置 和 provider fallback metadata 从 the active runtime snapshot, matching `web_search` so long-lived tools do not use stale fetch provider settings. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Web fetch: late-bind `web_fetch` config and provider fallback metadata from the active runtime snapshot, matching `web_search` so long-lived tools do not use stale fetch provider settings. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Discord: clear stale startup probe bot/application status 当 the async bot probe throws, not just 当 it returns a degraded probe result. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Discord: clear stale startup probe bot/application status when the async bot probe throws, not just when it returns a degraded probe result. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Web search: scope explicit bundled `web_search` provider runtime loading through manifest ownership, so selecting DuckDuckGo/Gemini/etc. does not import unrelated bundled providers 或 log their optional dependency failures. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Web search: scope explicit bundled `web_search` provider runtime loading through manifest ownership, so selecting DuckDuckGo/Gemini/etc. does not import unrelated bundled providers or log their optional dependency failures. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/discovery: demote the source-only TypeScript runtime check 在 already-installed `origin: "global"` 插件 packages 从 a 配置-blocking 错误 to a warning 和 let the runtime fall through to the TypeScript source via jiti, so a single broken installed package no longer blocks `插件 install` 为了 unrelated 插件; install-time rejection 的 newly-installed source-only packages is unchanged. Thanks @romneyda.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/discovery: demote the source-only TypeScript runtime check on already-installed `origin: "global"` plugin packages from a config-blocking error to a warning and let the runtime fall through to the TypeScript source via jiti, so a single broken installed package no longer blocks `plugins install` for unrelated plugins; install-time rejection of newly-installed source-only packages is unchanged. Thanks @romneyda.

changes.title: Providers/OpenAI Codex: 停止 the OAuth认证 progress spinner 之前 showing the manual redirect paste prompt, so callback timeouts do not spam `浏览器 callback did not finish` across terminals.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI Codex: stop the OAuth progress spinner before showing the manual redirect paste prompt, so callback timeouts do not spam `Browser callback did not finish` across terminals.

changes.title: Providers/OpenAI Codex: fail closed 在 malformed `/Codex` control commands 和 diagnostics confirmations 之前 changing bindings, permissions, 模型 overrides, active turns, 或 feedback uploads. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI Codex: fail closed on malformed `/codex` control commands and diagnostics confirmations before changing bindings, permissions, model overrides, active turns, or feedback uploads. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Providers/OpenAI Codex: sanitize Codex app-server 命令 readouts, failure replies, approval prompts, elicitation prompts, 和 `request_user_input` text 之前 posting them back 进入 chat. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI Codex: sanitize Codex app-server command readouts, failure replies, approval prompts, elicitation prompts, and `request_user_input` text before posting them back into chat. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Providers/OpenAI Codex: 保留 local bound-turn image paths, reject stale same-thread turn notifications, enforce 选项-only user input prompts, 和 return failed dynamic 工具 results to Codex as unsuccessful 工具 calls. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI Codex: preserve local bound-turn image paths, reject stale same-thread turn notifications, enforce option-only user input prompts, and return failed dynamic tool results to Codex as unsuccessful tool calls. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Providers/DeepSeek: expose DeepSeek V4 `xhigh` 和 `max` thinking levels through the lightweight provider-policy surface, so Control 界面 `/think` pickers keep showing the max reasoning options 当 the runtime 插件 registry is not active. 修复 #77139. Thanks @bittoby.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/DeepSeek: expose DeepSeek V4 `xhigh` and `max` thinking levels through the lightweight provider-policy surface, so Control UI `/think` pickers keep showing the max reasoning options when the runtime plugin registry is not active. Fixes #77139. Thanks @bittoby.

changes.title: Release/beta smoke: 解决 the dispatched Telegram beta E2E run 从 `gh run list` 当 `gh workflow run` returns no run URL, so the maintainer helper does not fail immediately 之后 dispatch. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Release/beta smoke: resolve the dispatched Telegram beta E2E run from `gh run list` when `gh workflow run` returns no run URL, so the maintainer helper does not fail immediately after dispatch. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Media/images: keep HEIC/HEIF attachments fail-closed 当 optional Sharp conversion is unavailable 而不是 sending originals that still need conversion. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Media/images: keep HEIC/HEIF attachments fail-closed when optional Sharp conversion is unavailable instead of sending originals that still need conversion. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: fork the caller's current agent transcript into agent-mode meeting consultant sessions, so Meet replies inherit the context from the tool call that joined the meeting.

changes.title: iOS/mobile pairing: reject non-loopback `ws://` setup URLs 之前 QR/setup-code issuance 和 let the iOS 网关 settings screen scan QR codes 或 paste full setup-code messages. Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: iOS/mobile pairing: reject non-loopback `ws://` setup URLs before QR/setup-code issuance and let the iOS Gateway settings screen scan QR codes or paste full setup-code messages. Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.title: Control 界面: keep 网关 Access inputs 和 locale picker contained inside the card at narrow 和 tablet widths.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI: keep Gateway Access inputs and locale picker contained inside the card at narrow and tablet widths.

changes.title: Agent/trajectory: bound runtime trajectory capture 和 yield queued sidecar writes so oversized traces 停止 recording 而不是 monopolizing 网关 cleanup. 修复 #77124. Thanks @loyur.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/trajectory: bound runtime trajectory capture and yield queued sidecar writes so oversized traces stop recording instead of monopolizing Gateway cleanup. Fixes #77124. Thanks @loyur.

changes.title: Telegram/streaming: sanitize 工具-progress draft preview backticks 之前 shared compaction, so long backtick-heavy progress text still renders inside the safe code-formatted preview 而不是 collapsing to an ellipsis.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/streaming: sanitize tool-progress draft preview backticks before shared compaction, so long backtick-heavy progress text still renders inside the safe code-formatted preview instead of collapsing to an ellipsis.

changes.rawTitle: UI/chat: remove the unsupported `line-clamp` declaration from the chat queue text rule to eliminate Firefox console noise without changing visible truncation behavior. Thanks @ZanderH-code.

changes.title: Control 界面: 添加 explicit feedback 为了 repeated actions 通过 announcing session switches, flashing the active session selector, showing inline Save/Apply/更新 progress, 和 distinguishing filtered-empty session lists 从 genuinely empty session stores. Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI: add explicit feedback for repeated actions by announcing session switches, flashing the active session selector, showing inline Save/Apply/Update progress, and distinguishing filtered-empty session lists from genuinely empty session stores. Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.rawTitle: Agents/Pi: suppress persistence for synthetic mid-turn overflow continuation prompts, so transcript-retry recovery does not write the "continue from transcript" prompt as a new user turn. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Agents/tools: strip reasoning text from visible rich presentation titles, blocks, buttons, and select labels before message-tool sends, so structured channel payloads cannot leak hidden planning. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Telegram: keep reply-dispatch lazy provider runtime chunks behind stable dist names 和 delete `/reasoning stream` previews 之后 final delivery so package updates 和 live reasoning drafts do not leave Telegram turns broken 或 noisy. Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram: keep reply-dispatch lazy provider runtime chunks behind stable dist names and delete `/reasoning stream` previews after final delivery so package updates and live reasoning drafts do not leave Telegram turns broken or noisy. Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.title: Discord: start the 网关 monitor 不适用 waiting 为了 the startup bot/application probe, so WSL2 hosts 使用 a slow `/users/@me` REST 路径 still bring the channel online while status enrichment finishes asynchronously. 修复 #77103. Thanks @Suited78.
changes.rawTitle: Discord: start the gateway monitor without waiting for the startup bot/application probe, so WSL2 hosts with a slow `/users/@me` REST path still bring the channel online while status enrichment finishes asynchronously. Fixes #77103. Thanks @Suited78.

changes.title: Exec approvals: detect `env -S` split-string 命令-carrier risks 当 `-S`/`-s` is combined 使用 other env short options, so approval explanations do not miss split payloads hidden behind `env -iS...`. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Exec approvals: detect `env -S` split-string command-carrier risks when `-S`/`-s` is combined with other env short options, so approval explanations do not miss split payloads hidden behind `env -iS...`. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: log the concrete agent-mode TTS provider, model, voice, output format, and sample rate after speech synthesis, so Meet logs show which voice backend spoke each reply.

changes.title: 语音 Call: mark realtime calls completed 当 the realtime provider closes normally, so Twilio/OpenAI/Google realtime 停止 events do not leave active call records behind. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Voice Call: mark realtime calls completed when the realtime provider closes normally, so Twilio/OpenAI/Google realtime stop events do not leave active call records behind. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/更新: keep the shutdown close 路径 behind a stable runtime chunk 和 ship compatibility aliases 为了 recent `server-close-*` hashes, so manual npm package replacement cannot leave an already-running 网关 unable to shut down cleanly. 修复 #77087. Thanks @westlife219.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/update: keep the shutdown close path behind a stable runtime chunk and ship compatibility aliases for recent `server-close-*` hashes, so manual npm package replacement cannot leave an already-running Gateway unable to shut down cleanly. Fixes #77087. Thanks @westlife219.

changes.title: Control 界面/media: mint short-lived scoped tickets 为了 assistant media fetches 和 render ticketed URLs 而不是 exposing long-lived 认证 tokens 在 chat image URLs. 修复 #70830 和 #77097. Thanks @hclsys.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/media: mint short-lived scoped tickets for assistant media fetches and render ticketed URLs instead of exposing long-lived auth tokens in chat image URLs. Fixes #70830 and #77097. Thanks @hclsys.

changes.title: Exec approvals: treat POSIX `exec` as a 命令 carrier 为了 inline eval, shell-wrapper, 和 eval/source detection, so approval explanations 和 命令-risk checks do not miss payloads hidden behind `exec`. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Exec approvals: treat POSIX `exec` as a command carrier for inline eval, shell-wrapper, and eval/source detection, so approval explanations and command-risk checks do not miss payloads hidden behind `exec`. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: log the resolved audio provider model when starting Chrome and paired-node Meet talk-back bridges, so agent-mode joins show the STT model and bidi joins show the realtime voice model.

changes.rawTitle: Diagnostics: handle missing session-tail files in cron recovery context without tripping extension test typecheck. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: QA/Slack: update the Slack dispatch preview fallback test SDK mock for structured progress draft helpers, so the rich progress draft regression suite covers the new imports instead of failing before assertions run. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/loader: keep bundled plugin package `test-api.js` aliases behind private QA mode, so source transforms do not expose test-only public surfaces during normal plugin loading. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/startup: start cron 和 record the post-ready 内存 trace even 当 deferred maintenance timers fail 之后 readiness, so a non-fatal timer setup issue does not 静默地 leave scheduled jobs idle. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: start cron and record the post-ready memory trace even when deferred maintenance timers fail after readiness, so a non-fatal timer setup issue does not silently leave scheduled jobs idle. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Exec approvals: unwrap BSD/macOS `env -P <路径>` carrier commands 之前 approval-命令 和 strict inline-eval checks, so `/approve` shell execution 和 inline interpreter payloads are still blocked behind that env form.
changes.rawTitle: Exec approvals: unwrap BSD/macOS `env -P <path>` carrier commands before approval-command and strict inline-eval checks, so `/approve` shell execution and inline interpreter payloads are still blocked behind that env form.

changes.title: Agent/session status: keep semantic `session_status({ sessionKey: "current" })` 在 the live run session even 之前 that run has a persisted session-store entry, 而不是 falling back to the sandbox policy 密钥. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/session status: keep semantic `session_status({ sessionKey: "current" })` on the live run session even before that run has a persisted session-store entry, instead of falling back to the sandbox policy key. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Web search: keep first-class assistant `web_search` auto-detect 和 configured runtime providers visible 当 active runtime metadata 或 the active 插件 registry is incomplete. 修复 #77073. Thanks @joeykrug.
changes.rawTitle: Web search: keep first-class assistant `web_search` auto-detect and configured runtime providers visible when active runtime metadata or the active plugin registry is incomplete. Fixes #77073. Thanks @joeykrug.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/tools: mark manifest-optional sibling tools as optional even when they come from a shared non-optional factory, so cached/status/MCP metadata keeps opt-in tool policy accurate. Thanks @vincentkoc.
