changes.rawTitle: Matrix: keep `streaming.progress.toolProgress` scoped to progress draft mode, so partial and quiet Matrix previews do not lose tool progress unless `streaming.preview.toolProgress` is disabled. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Gateway/validation: isolate gateway server validation files, ignore unrelated startup logs in request-trace coverage, and fail fast on stuck shared-auth sockets, reducing false main-branch CI failures for contributors. Thanks @amknight.

changes.rawTitle: Diagnostics: include last progress, cron job/run ids, stopped cron job name, and the last assistant transcript snippet in stalled-session and stuck-session recovery logs so cron stalls show what was stopped.

changes.rawTitle: Streaming channels: add `streaming.preview.commandText: "status"` / `streaming.progress.commandText: "status"` to hide command/exec text in preview progress lines while keeping the released raw command text default. Fixes #77072.

changes.title: Agent/cron: let explicit cron `timeoutSeconds` drive both CLI no-output 和 embedded LLM idle watchdogs 而不是 being capped 通过 resume defaults. 修复 #76289.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/cron: let explicit cron `timeoutSeconds` drive both CLI no-output and embedded LLM idle watchdogs instead of being capped by resume defaults. Fixes #76289.

changes.title: 插件/catalog: suppress missing `channelConfigs` compatibility diagnostics 为了 external channel 插件 that are disabled, denied, 或 outside a restrictive allowlist. 修复 #76095.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/catalog: suppress missing `channelConfigs` compatibility diagnostics for external channel plugins that are disabled, denied, or outside a restrictive allowlist. Fixes #76095.

changes.title: Diagnostics: keep Webhook/message OTEL attributes 和 Prometheus delivery labels low-cardinality 和 omit raw chat/message IDs 从 spans, so progress-draft 和 message-工具 modes do not leak high-cardinality messaging identifiers.
changes.rawTitle: Diagnostics: keep webhook/message OTEL attributes and Prometheus delivery labels low-cardinality and omit raw chat/message IDs from spans, so progress-draft and message-tool modes do not leak high-cardinality messaging identifiers.

changes.title: Google Meet: 停止 advertising legacy `mode: "realtime"` to Agent 和 配置 UIs, while keeping it as a hidden compatibility alias 为了 `mode: "Agent"`, so new joins use the STT -> OpenClaw Agent -> TTS 路径 而不是 selecting the direct realtime 语音 fallback.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: stop advertising legacy `mode: "realtime"` to agents and config UIs, while keeping it as a hidden compatibility alias for `mode: "agent"`, so new joins use the STT -> OpenClaw agent -> TTS path instead of selecting the direct realtime voice fallback.

changes.title: Google Meet: 添加 `Chrome.audioBufferBytes` 为了 generated 命令-pair SoX audio commands 和 lower the default buffer 从 SoX's 8192 bytes to 4096 bytes to reduce Chrome talk-back latency.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: add `chrome.audioBufferBytes` for generated command-pair SoX audio commands and lower the default buffer from SoX's 8192 bytes to 4096 bytes to reduce Chrome talk-back latency.

changes.title: Google Meet: split realtime provider 配置 进入 Agent-mode transcription 和 bidi-mode 语音 providers, 和 migrate legacy Gemini Live bidi configs 使用 `诊断工具 --修复`, so Gemini Live can back direct bidi fallback 不适用 破坏性变更 the default OpenClaw Agent talk-back 路径.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: split realtime provider config into agent-mode transcription and bidi-mode voice providers, and migrate legacy Gemini Live bidi configs with `doctor --fix`, so Gemini Live can back direct bidi fallback without breaking the default OpenClaw agent talk-back path.

changes.title: Google Meet: keep waiting 为了 the Meet microphone to unmute 期间 join intro readiness 而不是 permanently skipping talk-back 当 Meet briefly reports the local mic as muted.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: keep waiting for the Meet microphone to unmute during join intro readiness instead of permanently skipping talk-back when Meet briefly reports the local mic as muted.

changes.title: Google Meet: expose `voiceCall.postDtmfSpeechDelayMs` 在 the 插件 manifest schema 和 setup hints, so manifest-based 配置 editing accepts the runtime-supported Twilio delay 密钥. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: expose `voiceCall.postDtmfSpeechDelayMs` in the plugin manifest schema and setup hints, so manifest-based config editing accepts the runtime-supported Twilio delay key. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Google Meet: keep explicit non-Google `realtime.provider` values as the transcription provider compatibility fallback 当 `realtime.transcriptionProvider` is unset. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: keep explicit non-Google `realtime.provider` values as the transcription provider compatibility fallback when `realtime.transcriptionProvider` is unset. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: make Twilio setup status require an enabled `voice-call` plugin entry instead of treating a missing entry as ready. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Telegram: render shared interactive reply buttons 在 reply delivery so 插件 approval messages show inline keyboards. (#76238) Thanks @keshavbotagent.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram: render shared interactive reply buttons in reply delivery so plugin approval messages show inline keyboards. (#76238) Thanks @keshavbotagent.

changes.title: Cron/sessions: keep cron metadata rows 不适用 an 在-disk transcript non-resumable until a transcript exists, so 诊断工具 和 `sessions cleanup --修复-missing` no longer report 或 prune pre-transcript cron rows as broken sessions. Refs #77011.
changes.rawTitle: Cron/sessions: keep cron metadata rows without an on-disk transcript non-resumable until a transcript exists, so doctor and `sessions cleanup --fix-missing` no longer report or prune pre-transcript cron rows as broken sessions. Refs #77011.

changes.title: Agent/CLI-runner: drop a saved `claude-CLI` resume sessionId at preparation time 当 its 在-disk transcript no longer exists 在 `~/.claude/projects/`, so a stale binding 从 a half-installed `更新.run` cannot trap follow-up runs (auto-reply / Telegram direct) 在 a `claude --resume` 超时 loop; the run starts fresh 和 the new sessionId is written back through the existing post-run flow. (#77030; refs #77011) Thanks @openperf.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/cli-runner: drop a saved `claude-cli` resume sessionId at preparation time when its on-disk transcript no longer exists in `~/.claude/projects/`, so a stale binding from a half-installed `update.run` cannot trap follow-up runs (auto-reply / Telegram direct) in a `claude --resume` timeout loop; the run starts fresh and the new sessionId is written back through the existing post-run flow. (#77030; refs #77011) Thanks @openperf.

changes.title: Release validation: install the cross-OS TypeScript harness through Windows-safe Node/npm shims so native Windows package checks reach the OpenClaw smoke suites 而不是 exiting 之前 artifact capture. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Release validation: install the cross-OS TypeScript harness through Windows-safe Node/npm shims so native Windows package checks reach the OpenClaw smoke suites instead of exiting before artifact capture. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Release validation: let Windows packaged-upgrade checks continue 之后 the shipped 2026.5.2 updater hits its native-module swap cleanup fallback, verifying the fallback-installed candidate through package metadata 和 downstream smoke 而不是 crashing 在 the immediate 更新-status probe. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Release validation: let Windows packaged-upgrade checks continue after the shipped 2026.5.2 updater hits its native-module swap cleanup fallback, verifying the fallback-installed candidate through package metadata and downstream smoke instead of crashing on the immediate update-status probe. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 诊断工具/插件: skip channel-derived official 插件 installs 当 another configured 插件 is the effective owner 为了 the same channel, so `诊断工具 --repair` does not reinstall `飞书` while `openclaw-lark` handles `channels.飞书`. 修复 #76623. Thanks @fuyizheng3120.

changes.title: 网关/sessions: memoize repeated thinking-选项 enrichment 和 skip unused cost fallback checks while listing sessions, reducing per-row work 在 large multi-Agent stores. 修复 #76931.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/sessions: memoize repeated thinking-option enrichment and skip unused cost fallback checks while listing sessions, reducing per-row work on large multi-agent stores. Fixes #76931.

changes.rawTitle: Gateway/sessions: bound default `sessions.list` RPC responses and report truncation metadata, preventing Slack-heavy long-lived stores from forcing unbounded Gateway row construction. Fixes #77062.

changes.title: Agent/tools: use 配置-only runtime snapshots 为了 插件 工具 registration 和 live runtime 配置 getters, avoiding expensive full secrets snapshot clones 在 the core-插件-tools prep 路径. 修复 #76295.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/tools: use config-only runtime snapshots for plugin tool registration and live runtime config getters, avoiding expensive full secrets snapshot clones on the core-plugin-tools prep path. Fixes #76295.

changes.title: Agent/tools: honor the effective 工具 denylist 之前 constructing optional PDF/media 工具 factories, so `tools.deny: ["pdf"]` skips PDF setup 之前 later policy filtering. 修复 #76997.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/tools: honor the effective tool denylist before constructing optional PDF/media tool factories, so `tools.deny: ["pdf"]` skips PDF setup before later policy filtering. Fixes #76997.

changes.title: MCP协议/插件 tools: apply global `tools.profile`, `tools.alsoAllow`, 和 `tools.deny` policy while exposing 插件 tools over the standalone MCP协议 bridge, so ACP clients do not see policy-hidden 插件 tools 或 miss opt-在 optional tools. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件 tools: honor explicit 工具 denylists while selecting 插件 工具 runtimes, so denied 插件 tools are not materialized 为了 direct 命令 或 网关 surfaces 之前 later policy filtering. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugin tools: honor explicit tool denylists while selecting plugin tool runtimes, so denied plugin tools are not materialized for direct command or gateway surfaces before later policy filtering. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件 tools: filter factory-returned tools 通过 manifest per-工具 optional policy, so optional sibling tools 从 a shared runtime factory stay hidden unless explicitly allowed. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugin tools: filter factory-returned tools by manifest per-tool optional policy, so optional sibling tools from a shared runtime factory stay hidden unless explicitly allowed. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/transcripts: 重试 context-overflow compaction 从 the current transcript only 之后 the inbound user turn was actually persisted, 和 keep WebChat Agent-run live delivery 从 writing duplicate Pi-managed assistant turns. 修复 #76424. (#77033)
changes.rawTitle: Agents/transcripts: retry context-overflow compaction from the current transcript only after the inbound user turn was actually persisted, and keep WebChat agent-run live delivery from writing duplicate Pi-managed assistant turns. Fixes #76424. (#77033)

changes.rawTitle: Agents/bootstrap: keep pending `BOOTSTRAP.md` and bootstrap truncation notices in system-prompt Project Context instead of copying setup text or raw warning diagnostics into WebChat user/runtime context. Fixes #76946.

changes.title: 网关/restart: verify listener PIDs 通过 argv 当 `lsof` reports only the Node process name, so stale 网关 cleanup can find macOS `cnode` listeners. 修复 #70664.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/restart: verify listener PIDs by argv when `lsof` reports only the Node process name, so stale gateway cleanup can find macOS `cnode` listeners. Fixes #70664.

changes.title: 网关/logging: expand leading `~` 在 `logging.file` 之前 creating the file logger, preventing startup 崩溃 loops 为了 home-relative log paths. 修复 #73587.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/logging: expand leading `~` in `logging.file` before creating the file logger, preventing startup crash loops for home-relative log paths. Fixes #73587.

changes.rawTitle: Channels/CLI: keep `openclaw channels list --json` usable when provider usage fetching fails, and report per-provider usage errors without aborting the channel list. Refs #67595.

changes.rawTitle: Channels/streaming: strip unmatched inline-code backticks from compacted raw progress draft lines, avoiding stray markdown markers after long command details are shortened. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 代理/debugging: 禁用 debug 代理 direct upstream forwarding 为了 代理 requests 和 CONNECT tunnels while managed 代理 mode is active unless `OPENCLAW_DEBUG_PROXY_ALLOW_DIRECT_CONNECT_WITH_MANAGED_PROXY=1` is explicitly set 为了 approved local diagnostics. Thanks @jesse-merhi 和 @mjamiv.
changes.rawTitle: Proxy/debugging: disable debug proxy direct upstream forwarding for proxy requests and CONNECT tunnels while managed proxy mode is active unless `OPENCLAW_DEBUG_PROXY_ALLOW_DIRECT_CONNECT_WITH_MANAGED_PROXY=1` is explicitly set for approved local diagnostics. Thanks @jesse-merhi and @mjamiv.

changes.title: Direct APNs: route direct HTTP/2 delivery through the active managed 代理 使用 redacted 代理 diagnostics, so push requests honor configured egress controls 和 `openclaw 代理 validate --apns-reachable` can prove APNs is reachable through the 代理 之前 deployment. (#74905) Thanks @jesse-merhi.
changes.rawTitle: Direct APNs: route direct HTTP/2 delivery through the active managed proxy with redacted proxy diagnostics, so push requests honor configured egress controls and `openclaw proxy validate --apns-reachable` can prove APNs is reachable through the proxy before deployment. (#74905) Thanks @jesse-merhi.

changes.title: Agent/subagents: detect prefix-only completion announce replies 和 fall back to the captured child result so requester chats no longer lose most 的 long sub-Agent reports 静默地. 修复 #76412. Thanks @inxaos 和 @davemorin.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/subagents: detect prefix-only completion announce replies and fall back to the captured child result so requester chats no longer lose most of long sub-agent reports silently. Fixes #76412. Thanks @inxaos and @davemorin.

changes.title: TUI: replace the stale-response watchdog notice 使用 plain user-facing copy so stalled replies no longer surface backend 或 streaming internals. (#77120) Thanks @davemorin.
changes.rawTitle: TUI: replace the stale-response watchdog notice with plain user-facing copy so stalled replies no longer surface backend or streaming internals. (#77120) Thanks @davemorin.

changes.title: 安全/Windows: validate `SystemRoot`/`WINDIR` env values through the Windows install-root validator 和 添加 them to the dangerous-host-env policy 当 resolving `icacls.exe`/`whoami.exe` 为了 `openclaw 安全 audit`, so workspace `.env` overrides 和 bare 命令 names cannot redirect Windows ACL helpers to attacker-controlled binaries. (#74458) Thanks @mmaps.
changes.rawTitle: Security/Windows: validate `SystemRoot`/`WINDIR` env values through the Windows install-root validator and add them to the dangerous-host-env policy when resolving `icacls.exe`/`whoami.exe` for `openclaw security audit`, so workspace `.env` overrides and bare command names cannot redirect Windows ACL helpers to attacker-controlled binaries. (#74458) Thanks @mmaps.

changes.title: 安全/Windows: pin Windows registry-probe `reg.exe` resolution to the canonical Windows install root 在 install-root probing, so `SystemRoot`/`WINDIR` env overrides cannot redirect registry queries 期间 Windows host detection. (#74454) Thanks @mmaps.
changes.rawTitle: Security/Windows: pin Windows registry-probe `reg.exe` resolution to the canonical Windows install root in install-root probing, so `SystemRoot`/`WINDIR` env overrides cannot redirect registry queries during Windows host detection. (#74454) Thanks @mmaps.

changes.title: QQBot: 保留 the framework 命令 authorization decision 当 converting framework 命令 contexts 进入 engine slash 命令 contexts, so downstream slash handlers see `commandAuthorized` matching the channel's resolved `isAuthorizedSender` 而不是 a hardcoded `true`. (#77453) Thanks @drobison00.
changes.rawTitle: QQBot: preserve the framework command authorization decision when converting framework command contexts into engine slash command contexts, so downstream slash handlers see `commandAuthorized` matching the channel's resolved `isAuthorizedSender` instead of a hardcoded `true`. (#77453) Thanks @drobison00.

changes.title: 安全/Windows: block `LOCALAPPDATA` 从 workspace `.env` 和 解决 Windows 更新-flow portable Git 路径 prepends 从 the trusted process-local `LOCALAPPDATA` only, so workspace-supplied values cannot redirect `git` discovery 期间 `openclaw 更新`. (#77470) Thanks @drobison00.
changes.rawTitle: Security/Windows: block `LOCALAPPDATA` from workspace `.env` and resolve Windows update-flow portable Git path prepends from the trusted process-local `LOCALAPPDATA` only, so workspace-supplied values cannot redirect `git` discovery during `openclaw update`. (#77470) Thanks @drobison00.

changes.title: 浏览器/SSRF: enforce the existing current-tab URL navigation policy 之前 tab-scoped debug, export, 和 read routes (console, page errors, network requests, trace start/停止, response body, screenshot, snapshot, storage, etc.) collect 从 an already-selected tab, so blocked tabs return a policy 错误 而不是 being read first 和 redacted only at response time. (#75731) Thanks @eleqtrizit.
changes.rawTitle: Browser/SSRF: enforce the existing current-tab URL navigation policy before tab-scoped debug, export, and read routes (console, page errors, network requests, trace start/stop, response body, screenshot, snapshot, storage, etc.) collect from an already-selected tab, so blocked tabs return a policy error instead of being read first and redacted only at response time. (#75731) Thanks @eleqtrizit.

changes.title: 安全/Windows: route the `.cmd`/`.bat` process wrapper through the shared Windows install-root resolver 而不是 `process.env.ComSpec`, so workspace dotenv-blocked `SystemRoot`/`WINDIR` overrides 和 unsafe values like UNC paths 或 路径-lists cannot redirect `cmd.exe` selection 在 Windows. (#77472) Thanks @drobison00.
changes.rawTitle: Security/Windows: route the `.cmd`/`.bat` process wrapper through the shared Windows install-root resolver instead of `process.env.ComSpec`, so workspace dotenv-blocked `SystemRoot`/`WINDIR` overrides and unsafe values like UNC paths or path-lists cannot redirect `cmd.exe` selection on Windows. (#77472) Thanks @drobison00.

changes.title: Agent/bootstrap: honor `BOOTSTRAP.md` content injected 通过 `Agent:bootstrap` hooks 当 deciding whether bootstrap is pending, so hook-provided required setup instructions are included 在 the system prompt. (#77501) Thanks @ificator.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/bootstrap: honor `BOOTSTRAP.md` content injected by `agent:bootstrap` hooks when deciding whether bootstrap is pending, so hook-provided required setup instructions are included in the system prompt. (#77501) Thanks @ificator.

items.title: Google Meet/语音 Call: make Twilio dial-在 joins speak through the realtime Gemini 语音 bridge 使用 paced audio streaming, backpressure-aware buffering, barge-在 queue clearing, 和 no TwiML fallback 期间 realtime speech, giving Meet participants a much snappier OpenClaw 语音 Agent. (#77064) Thanks @scoootscooob.
items.rawTitle: Google Meet/Voice Call: make Twilio dial-in joins speak through the realtime Gemini voice bridge with paced audio streaming, backpressure-aware buffering, barge-in queue clearing, and no TwiML fallback during realtime speech, giving Meet participants a much snappier OpenClaw voice agent. (#77064) Thanks @scoootscooob.

items.title: 插件/migration: emit catalog-backed install hints 当 `插件.entries` 或 `插件.允许` references an official external 插件 that is not installed, so upgraded configs point operators to `openclaw 插件 install <spec>` 而不是 telling them to 移除 valid 插件 配置. (#77483) Thanks @hclsys.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/migration: emit catalog-backed install hints when `plugins.entries` or `plugins.allow` references an official external plugin that is not installed, so upgraded configs point operators to `openclaw plugins install <spec>` instead of telling them to remove valid plugin config. (#77483) Thanks @hclsys.

items.title: Agent/性能: pass the resolved workspace through BTW, compaction, embedded-run 模型 generation, 和 PDF 模型 setup so explicit Agent-dir 模型 refreshes can 复用 the current workspace-scoped 插件 metadata snapshot 而不是 falling back to cold 插件 metadata scans. (#77519, #77532)
items.rawTitle: Agents/performance: pass the resolved workspace through BTW, compaction, embedded-run model generation, and PDF model setup so explicit agent-dir model refreshes can reuse the current workspace-scoped plugin metadata snapshot instead of falling back to cold plugin metadata scans. (#77519, #77532)

items.title: 网关/startup: keep 模型-catalog test helpers, run-session lookup code, QR pairing helpers, 和 TypeBox 内存-工具 schema construction out 的 hot startup import paths, reducing default 网关 benchmark 插件-load 和 内存 pressure.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: keep model-catalog test helpers, run-session lookup code, QR pairing helpers, and TypeBox memory-tool schema construction out of hot startup import paths, reducing default gateway benchmark plugin-load and memory pressure.

items.title: 诊断工具/插件: include `插件.允许`-only official 插件 ids 在 the release configured-插件 repair set, so `诊断工具 --修复` installs official external 插件 that are configured 但是 not yet loaded 而不是 removing them as stale 允许 entries. 修复 #77155. Thanks @hclsys.
items.rawTitle: Doctor/plugins: include `plugins.allow`-only official plugin ids in the release configured-plugin repair set, so `doctor --fix` installs official external plugins that are configured but not yet loaded instead of removing them as stale allow entries. Fixes #77155. Thanks @hclsys.

items.title: 诊断工具/sessions: clear auto-created stale session routing state 从 the sessions store 当 `诊断工具 --修复` sees 插件-owned 模型/runtime/认证/session bindings outside the current configured route, while leaving explicit user 模型 choices 为了 manual review. Refs #68615.

items.title: Providers/OpenRouter: keep DeepSeek V4 `reasoning_effort` 在 OpenRouter-supported values, mapping stale `max` thinking overrides to `xhigh` so `OpenRouter/deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro` no longer fails 使用 OpenRouter's invalid-effort 400. 修复 #77350. (#77423) Thanks @krllagent, @mushuiyu886, 和 @sallyom.

Fixes #77350. (#77423) Thanks @krllagent, @mushuiyu886, and @sallyom.

items.title: TUI/render: 停止 the long-令牌 sanitizer 从 injecting literal spaces inside inline code spans, fenced code blocks, table borders, 和 bare hyphenated/dotted identifiers, so copied package names, entity IDs, 和 shell line-continuations stay byte-为了-byte intact while narrow-terminal protection still chunks unidentifiable long prose tokens. 修复 #48432, #39505. Thanks @DocOellerson, @xeusoc, @CCcassiusdjs, @akramcodez, @brokemac79, @romneyda.
items.rawTitle: TUI/render: stop the long-token sanitizer from injecting literal spaces inside inline code spans, fenced code blocks, table borders, and bare hyphenated/dotted identifiers, so copied package names, entity IDs, and shell line-continuations stay byte-for-byte intact while narrow-terminal protection still chunks unidentifiable long prose tokens. Fixes #48432, #39505. Thanks @DocOellerson, @xeusoc, @CCcassiusdjs, @akramcodez, @brokemac79, @romneyda.

items.title: 认证/OpenAI Codex: rewrite invalidated per-Agent Codex 认证-order 和 session profile overrides toward a healthy relogin profile, so revoked OAuth认证 accounts do not stay pinned 之后 signing 在 重新. Thanks @BunsDev.

items.title: 配置/插件 auto-启用: prefer the claiming 插件 manifest id over a built-在 channel alias 当 auto-allowlisting a configured channel, so WeCom/Yuanbao-style aliases 解决 to the installed 插件 id. Thanks @Beandon13.

items.title: 插件/active-内存: skip session-store channel entries that contain `:` 当 resolving the recall subagent's channel, so QQ c2c Agent IDs (e.g. `c2c:10D4F7C2…`) 和 other scoped conversation IDs do not reach bundled-插件 `dirName` validation 和 崩溃 the recall run. The same guard already applied to explicit `channelId` params (#76704); this extends it to store-derived channels. (#77396) Thanks @hclsys.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/active-memory: skip session-store channel entries that contain `:` when resolving the recall subagent's channel, so QQ c2c agent IDs (e.g. `c2c:10D4F7C2…`) and other scoped conversation IDs do not reach bundled-plugin `dirName` validation and crash the recall run. The same guard already applied to explicit `channelId` params (#76704); this extends it to store-derived channels. (#77396) Thanks @hclsys.

items.title: Secrets/external channel contracts: also look 在 `<rootDir>/dist/` 当 resolving the `secret-contract-API` sidecar, so npm-published externalized channel 插件 (e.g. `@openclaw/Discord` since 2026.5.2) whose compiled artifacts live under `dist/` actually contribute their channel SecretRef contracts to the runtime snapshot. 不适用 this, env-backed `channels.Discord.令牌` SecretRefs 静默地 failed to 解决 at 网关 start 在 2026.5.3, leaving the channel `not configured` even though #76449 had landed the generic external-contract loader. Thanks @mogglemoss.
items.rawTitle: Secrets/external channel contracts: also look in `<rootDir>/dist/` when resolving the `secret-contract-api` sidecar, so npm-published externalized channel plugins (e.g. `@openclaw/discord` since 2026.5.2) whose compiled artifacts live under `dist/` actually contribute their channel SecretRef contracts to the runtime snapshot. Without this, env-backed `channels.discord.token` SecretRefs silently failed to resolve at gateway start on 2026.5.3, leaving the channel `not configured` even though #76449 had landed the generic external-contract loader. Thanks @mogglemoss.

items.title: Agent/CLI-runner: drop a saved `claude-CLI` resume sessionId at preparation time 当 its 在-disk transcript no longer exists 在 `~/.claude/projects/`, so a stale binding 从 a half-installed `更新.run` cannot trap follow-up runs (auto-reply / Telegram direct) 在 a `claude --resume` 超时 loop; the run starts fresh 和 the new sessionId is written back through the existing post-run flow. (#77030; refs #77011) Thanks @openperf.

(#77030; refs #77011) Thanks @openperf.

items.rawTitle: Plugins/Codex: preserve Codex-native OAuth routing for `/codex bind` app-server turns so bound sessions keep the selected Codex auth profile instead of falling back to public OpenAI credentials. (#76714) Thanks @keshavbotagent.

items.title: 网关/install: prefer supported system Node over nvm/fnm/volta/asdf/mise 当 regenerating managed 网关 services, so `网关 install --force` no longer recreates service definitions that 诊断工具 immediately flags as version-manager-backed. 修复 #76339. Thanks @brokemac79 和 @BunsDev.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/install: prefer supported system Node over nvm/fnm/volta/asdf/mise when regenerating managed gateway services, so `gateway install --force` no longer recreates service definitions that doctor immediately flags as version-manager-backed. Fixes #76339. Thanks @brokemac79 and @BunsDev.

items.title: 安全/Windows: validate `SystemRoot`/`WINDIR` env values through the Windows install-root validator 和 添加 them to the dangerous-host-env policy 当 resolving `icacls.exe`/`whoami.exe` 为了 `openclaw 安全 audit`, so workspace `.env` overrides 和 bare 命令 names cannot redirect Windows ACL helpers to attacker-controlled binaries. (#74458) Thanks @mmaps.
items.rawTitle: Security/Windows: validate `SystemRoot`/`WINDIR` env values through the Windows install-root validator and add them to the dangerous-host-env policy when resolving `icacls.exe`/`whoami.exe` for `openclaw security audit`, so workspace `.env` overrides and bare command names cannot redirect Windows ACL helpers to attacker-controlled binaries. (#74458) Thanks @mmaps.

items.title: 安全/Windows: pin Windows registry-probe `reg.exe` resolution to the canonical Windows install root 在 install-root probing, so `SystemRoot`/`WINDIR` env overrides cannot redirect registry queries 期间 Windows host detection. (#74454) Thanks @mmaps.
items.rawTitle: Security/Windows: pin Windows registry-probe `reg.exe` resolution to the canonical Windows install root in install-root probing, so `SystemRoot`/`WINDIR` env overrides cannot redirect registry queries during Windows host detection. (#74454) Thanks @mmaps.

items.title: 安全/Windows: route the `.cmd`/`.bat` process wrapper through the shared Windows install-root resolver 而不是 `process.env.ComSpec`, so workspace dotenv-blocked `SystemRoot`/`WINDIR` overrides 和 unsafe values like UNC paths 或 路径-lists cannot redirect `cmd.exe` selection 在 Windows. (#77472) Thanks @drobison00.
items.rawTitle: Security/Windows: route the `.cmd`/`.bat` process wrapper through the shared Windows install-root resolver instead of `process.env.ComSpec`, so workspace dotenv-blocked `SystemRoot`/`WINDIR` overrides and unsafe values like UNC paths or path-lists cannot redirect `cmd.exe` selection on Windows. (#77472) Thanks @drobison00.

items.title: Agent/cache: keep per-turn runtime context out 的 ordinary chat system prompts while still delivering hidden current-turn context, restoring prompt-cache 复用 在 chat continuations. 修复 #77431. Thanks @Udjin79.
items.rawTitle: Agents/cache: keep per-turn runtime context out of ordinary chat system prompts while still delivering hidden current-turn context, restoring prompt-cache reuse on chat continuations. Fixes #77431. Thanks @Udjin79.

items.title: Agent/Tools: 添加 post-compaction loop guard 在 `pi-embedded-runner` that arms 之后 auto-compaction-重试 和 aborts the run 使用 `compaction_loop_persisted` 当 the Agent emits the same `(工具, args, result)` triple `windowSize` times (default 3) within that window. 禁用 via existing `tools.loopDetection.enabled`; tune via `tools.loopDetection.postCompactionGuard.windowSize`. Targets the failure mode where context-overflow + compaction does not break a 工具-call loop. Refs #77474; carries forward #21597. Thanks @efpiva.
items.rawTitle: Agents/Tools: add post-compaction loop guard in `pi-embedded-runner` that arms after auto-compaction-retry and aborts the run with `compaction_loop_persisted` when the agent emits the same `(tool, args, result)` triple `windowSize` times (default 3) within that window. Disable via existing `tools.loopDetection.enabled`; tune via `tools.loopDetection.postCompactionGuard.windowSize`. Targets the failure mode where context-overflow + compaction does not break a tool-call loop. Refs #77474; carries forward #21597. Thanks @efpiva.

items.title: Agent/media: 避免 sending generated image, video, 和 music attachments twice 当 streamed reply text arrives 之前 the final `MEDIA:` directive.

items.title: Docker/compose: pin container-side `OPENCLAW_CONFIG_DIR` 和 `OPENCLAW_WORKSPACE_DIR` 在 both 网关 和 CLI services so the host paths written 进入 `.env` 通过 `scripts/docker/setup.sh` (used as Compose bind-mount sources) cannot leak 进入 runtime code via the `env_file` import. 修复 regressions 在 macOS Docker setups where the first Agent reply died 使用 `EACCES: permission denied, mkdir '/Users'` because the host-style workspace 路径 got persisted 进入 `Agent.defaults.workspace`. 修复 #77436. Thanks @lonexreb.
items.rawTitle: Docker/compose: pin container-side `OPENCLAW_CONFIG_DIR` and `OPENCLAW_WORKSPACE_DIR` on both gateway and CLI services so the host paths written into `.env` by `scripts/docker/setup.sh` (used as Compose bind-mount sources) cannot leak into runtime code via the `env_file` import. Fixes regressions on macOS Docker setups where the first agent reply died with `EACCES: permission denied, mkdir '/Users'` because the host-style workspace path got persisted into `agents.defaults.workspace`. Fixes #77436. Thanks @lonexreb.

items.rawTitle: Active Memory: give timeout partial transcript recovery enough abort-settle headroom so temporary recall summaries are returned before cleanup. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 网关/chat: clear the active reply-run guard 之前 draining queued same-session follow-up turns, so sequential `chat.send` calls no longer trip `ReplyRunAlreadyActiveError` every other request. 修复 #77485. Thanks @bws14email.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/chat: clear the active reply-run guard before draining queued same-session follow-up turns, so sequential `chat.send` calls no longer trip `ReplyRunAlreadyActiveError` every other request. Fixes #77485. Thanks @bws14email.

items.title: Control 界面/Talk: make failed Talk startup errors dismissable 和 clear the stale Talk 错误 state 当 dismissed, so missing realtime 语音 provider configuration does not leave a permanent chat banner. 修复 #77071. Thanks @ijoshdavis.
items.rawTitle: Control UI/Talk: make failed Talk startup errors dismissable and clear the stale Talk error state when dismissed, so missing realtime voice provider configuration does not leave a permanent chat banner. Fixes #77071. Thanks @ijoshdavis.

items.title: Google Meet: keep waiting 为了 the Meet microphone to unmute 期间 join intro readiness 而不是 permanently skipping talk-back 当 Meet briefly reports the local mic as muted.
items.rawTitle: Google Meet: keep waiting for the Meet microphone to unmute during join intro readiness instead of permanently skipping talk-back when Meet briefly reports the local mic as muted.

items.title: Media/Windows: open saved attachment temp files read/write 之前 fsync so Windows WebChat 和 `chat.send` media offloads no longer fail 使用 EPERM 期间 durability flush. (#76593) Thanks @qq230849622-a11y.
items.rawTitle: Media/Windows: open saved attachment temp files read/write before fsync so Windows WebChat and `chat.send` media offloads no longer fail with EPERM during durability flush. (#76593) Thanks @qq230849622-a11y.

items.title: Exec approvals: unwrap BSD/macOS `env -P <路径>` carrier commands 之前 approval-命令 和 strict inline-eval checks, so `/approve` shell execution 和 inline interpreter payloads are still blocked behind that env form.
items.rawTitle: Exec approvals: unwrap BSD/macOS `env -P <path>` carrier commands before approval-command and strict inline-eval checks, so `/approve` shell execution and inline interpreter payloads are still blocked behind that env form.

items.title: CLI/更新: use an absolute POSIX npm script shell 期间 package-manager updates, so restricted 路径 environments can still run dependency lifecycle scripts while updating 从 `--tag main`. 修复 #77530. Thanks @PeterTremonti.
items.rawTitle: CLI/update: use an absolute POSIX npm script shell during package-manager updates, so restricted PATH environments can still run dependency lifecycle scripts while updating from `--tag main`. Fixes #77530. Thanks @PeterTremonti.

items.title: Google Chat: normalize Google 认证 certificate response headers 之前 google-认证-library reads cache-control, so inbound Webhook 认证 no longer rejects 使用 `res?.headers.get is not a function`. 修复 #76880. Thanks @donbowman.
items.rawTitle: Google Chat: normalize Google auth certificate response headers before google-auth-library reads cache-control, so inbound webhook auth no longer rejects with `res?.headers.get is not a function`. Fixes #76880. Thanks @donbowman.

items.title: CLI/sessions: cap `openclaw sessions` output to the newest 100 rows 通过 default 和 添加 `--limit <n|all>` plus JSON pagination metadata, so repeated machine polling 的 large session stores cannot fan out 进入 unbounded per-row enrichment/output work. 修复 #77500. Thanks @Kaotic3.
items.rawTitle: CLI/sessions: cap `openclaw sessions` output to the newest 100 rows by default and add `--limit <n|all>` plus JSON pagination metadata, so repeated machine polling of large session stores cannot fan out into unbounded per-row enrichment/output work. Fixes #77500. Thanks @Kaotic3.

changes.title: 插件/file-transfer: 添加 bundled file-transfer 插件 使用 `file_fetch`, `dir_list`, `dir_fetch`, 和 `file_write` Agent tools 为了 binary file ops 在 paired nodes; default-deny per-node 路径 policy under `插件.entries.file-transfer.配置.nodes` 使用 operator approval, symlink traversal refused 通过 default (opt-在 `followSymlinks`), 和 a 16 MB byte ceiling per round-trip. (#74742) Thanks @omarshahine.

changes.title: 插件/更新: clean stale bundled load paths 为了 already-externalized pinned npm 和 ClawHub 插件 installs, so release-channel sync does not leave removed bundled paths ahead 的 the installed external package. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/update: clean stale bundled load paths for already-externalized pinned npm and ClawHub plugin installs, so release-channel sync does not leave removed bundled paths ahead of the installed external package. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/CLI: include package dependency install state 在 `openclaw 插件 list --json` so scripts can spot missing 插件 dependencies 不适用 runtime-loading 插件.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/CLI: include package dependency install state in `openclaw plugins list --json` so scripts can spot missing plugin dependencies without runtime-loading plugins.

changes.title: Telegram: accept 插件-owned numeric forum-topic targets 在 the Agent message 工具 和 keep reply-dispatch provider chunks behind a real stable runtime alias 期间 在-place package updates. 修复 #77137. Thanks @richardmqq.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram: accept plugin-owned numeric forum-topic targets in the agent message tool and keep reply-dispatch provider chunks behind a real stable runtime alias during in-place package updates. Fixes #77137. Thanks @richardmqq.

changes.title: Google Meet: 保留 `realtime.introMessage: ""` so realtime Chrome joins can stay silent 而不是 restoring the default spoken intro. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: preserve `realtime.introMessage: ""` so realtime Chrome joins can stay silent instead of restoring the default spoken intro. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Discord/status: 添加 degraded Discord transport 和 网关 event-loop starvation signals to `openclaw channels status`, `openclaw status --deep`, 和 fetch-超时 logs so intermittent socket resets do not look like a healthy running channel. (#76327) Thanks @joshavant.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/status: add degraded Discord transport and gateway event-loop starvation signals to `openclaw channels status`, `openclaw status --deep`, and fetch-timeout logs so intermittent socket resets do not look like a healthy running channel. (#76327) Thanks @joshavant.

changes.title: Providers/OpenRouter: 添加 opt-在 response caching params that send OpenRouter's `X-OpenRouter-Cache`, `X-OpenRouter-Cache-TTL`, 和 cache-clear headers only 在 verified OpenRouter routes. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenRouter: add opt-in response caching params that send OpenRouter's `X-OpenRouter-Cache`, `X-OpenRouter-Cache-TTL`, and cache-clear headers only on verified OpenRouter routes. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Providers/OpenRouter: expand app-attribution categories so OpenClaw advertises coding, programming, writing, chat, 和 personal-Agent usage 在 verified OpenRouter routes. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenRouter: expand app-attribution categories so OpenClaw advertises coding, programming, writing, chat, and personal-agent usage on verified OpenRouter routes. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/更新: 在 the beta OpenClaw 更新 channel, default-line npm 和 ClawHub 插件 updates try `@beta` first 和 fall back to default/latest 当 no 插件 beta release exists.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/update: on the beta OpenClaw update channel, default-line npm and ClawHub plugin updates try `@beta` first and fall back to default/latest when no plugin beta release exists.

changes.title: Channels/WhatsApp: 支持 explicit WhatsApp Channel/Newsletter `@newsletter` outbound message targets 使用 channel session metadata 而不是 DM routing. 修复 #13417; carries forward the narrow outbound target idea 从 #13424. Thanks @vincentkoc 和 @agentz-manfred.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/WhatsApp: support explicit WhatsApp Channel/Newsletter `@newsletter` outbound message targets with channel session metadata instead of DM routing. Fixes #13417; carries forward the narrow outbound target idea from #13424. Thanks @vincentkoc and @agentz-manfred.

changes.title: Exec approvals: 添加 a tree-sitter-backed shell 命令 explainer 为了 future approval 和 命令-review surfaces. (#75004) Thanks @jesse-merhi.
changes.rawTitle: Exec approvals: add a tree-sitter-backed shell command explainer for future approval and command-review surfaces. (#75004) Thanks @jesse-merhi.

changes.title: Agent/sandbox: store sandbox container 和 浏览器 registry entries as per-runtime shard files, reducing unrelated session lock contention while `openclaw 诊断工具 --修复` migrates legacy monolithic registry files. (#74831) Thanks @luckylhb90.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/sandbox: store sandbox container and browser registry entries as per-runtime shard files, reducing unrelated session lock contention while `openclaw doctor --fix` migrates legacy monolithic registry files. (#74831) Thanks @luckylhb90.

changes.title: 插件/ClawHub: annotate 429 errors 从 ClawHub 使用 the reset window 从 `RateLimit-Reset`/`重试-之后` 和 append a `Sign 在 为了 higher rate limits.` hint 当 the request was unauthenticated, so users can see 当 downloads will recover 和 how to lift the cap. Thanks @romneyda.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/ClawHub: annotate 429 errors from ClawHub with the reset window from `RateLimit-Reset`/`Retry-After` and append a `Sign in for higher rate limits.` hint when the request was unauthenticated, so users can see when downloads will recover and how to lift the cap. Thanks @romneyda.

changes.title: 插件/runtime state: 添加 `registerIfAbsent` 为了 atomic keyed-store dedupe claims that return whether a 插件 成功地 claimed a 密钥 不适用 overwriting an existing live value. Thanks @amknight.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/runtime state: add `registerIfAbsent` for atomic keyed-store dedupe claims that return whether a plugin successfully claimed a key without overwriting an existing live value. Thanks @amknight.

changes.title: 修复: harden backend message action 网关 routing [AI]. (#76374) Thanks @pgondhi987.
changes.rawTitle: fix: harden backend message action gateway routing [AI]. (#76374) Thanks @pgondhi987.

changes.title: Gate QQBot streaming 命令 认证 [AI]. (#76375) Thanks @pgondhi987.
changes.rawTitle: Gate QQBot streaming command auth [AI]. (#76375) Thanks @pgondhi987.

changes.title: 插件/discovery: ignore managed npm 插件 packages that only expose TypeScript source entries 不适用 compiled runtime output, so stale/broken installs cannot hide a working bundled 或 reinstallable channel 插件 期间 setup.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/discovery: ignore managed npm plugin packages that only expose TypeScript source entries without compiled runtime output, so stale/broken installs cannot hide a working bundled or reinstallable channel plugin during setup.

changes.title: CLI/更新: treat OpenClaw stable correction versions like `2026.5.3-1` as newer than their base stable release, so package updates no longer ask 为了 downgrade confirmation.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/update: treat OpenClaw stable correction versions like `2026.5.3-1` as newer than their base stable release, so package updates no longer ask for downgrade confirmation.

changes.title: 插件/install: suppress dangerous-pattern scanner warnings 为了 trusted official OpenClaw npm installs, so installing `@openclaw/Discord` no longer prints credential-harvesting warnings 为了 the official package.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: suppress dangerous-pattern scanner warnings for trusted official OpenClaw npm installs, so installing `@openclaw/discord` no longer prints credential-harvesting warnings for the official package.

changes.title: 插件/release: make the published npm runtime verifier reject blank `openclaw.runtimeExtensions` entries 而不是 treating them as absent 和 passing via inferred outputs. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/release: make the published npm runtime verifier reject blank `openclaw.runtimeExtensions` entries instead of treating them as absent and passing via inferred outputs. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/安全: ignore inline 和 block comments 当 matching source-rule context 在 插件 install scans, so comment-only `fetch`/`post` references near environment defaults do not block clean 插件. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/security: ignore inline and block comments when matching source-rule context in plugin install scans, so comment-only `fetch`/`post` references near environment defaults do not block clean plugins. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 诊断工具/插件: 移除 stale managed install records 为了 bundled 插件 even 当 the bundled 插件 is not explicitly configured, so 诊断工具 cleanup cannot leave orphaned install metadata behind. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/plugins: remove stale managed install records for bundled plugins even when the bundled plugin is not explicitly configured, so doctor cleanup cannot leave orphaned install metadata behind. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Web fetch: scope provider fallback cache entries 通过 the selected fetch provider so 配置 reloads cannot 复用 another provider's cached fallback payload. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Web fetch: scope provider fallback cache entries by the selected fetch provider so config reloads cannot reuse another provider's cached fallback payload. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Web search: honor late-bound `tools.web.search.enabled: false` 期间 工具 execution so 配置 reloads cannot leave an already-created `web_search` 工具 runnable. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Web search: honor late-bound `tools.web.search.enabled: false` during tool execution so config reloads cannot leave an already-created `web_search` tool runnable. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/packages: reject inferred built runtime entries that exist 但是 fail package-boundary checks 而不是 falling back to TypeScript source 为了 installed packages. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/packages: reject inferred built runtime entries that exist but fail package-boundary checks instead of falling back to TypeScript source for installed packages. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/loader: do not 重试 native-loaded JavaScript 插件 modules through the source transformer 之后 native evaluation has already reached a missing dependency, avoiding duplicate top-level side effects. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/loader: do not retry native-loaded JavaScript plugin modules through the source transformer after native evaluation has already reached a missing dependency, avoiding duplicate top-level side effects. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/安全: 停止 the install scanner 从 blocking official bundled 插件 packages 当 `process.env` access 和 normal API sends only appear 在 distant parts 的 the same compiled bundle.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/security: stop the install scanner from blocking official bundled plugin packages when `process.env` access and normal API sends only appear in distant parts of the same compiled bundle.

changes.title: 插件/packages: reject blank `openclaw.runtimeExtensions` entries 而不是 静默地 ignoring them 和 falling back to inferred TypeScript runtime entries. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/packages: reject blank `openclaw.runtimeExtensions` entries instead of silently ignoring them and falling back to inferred TypeScript runtime entries. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 诊断工具/插件: 移除 stale managed npm 插件 shadow entries 从 the managed package lock as well as `package.json` 和 `node_modules`, so future npm operations do not keep referencing repaired bundled-插件 shadows. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/plugins: remove stale managed npm plugin shadow entries from the managed package lock as well as `package.json` and `node_modules`, so future npm operations do not keep referencing repaired bundled-plugin shadows. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/runtime state: keep the 密钥 being registered 当 namespace eviction runs 在 the same millisecond as existing entries, so `register` 和 `registerIfAbsent` do not report success while evicting their own fresh value. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/runtime state: keep the key being registered when namespace eviction runs in the same millisecond as existing entries, so `register` and `registerIfAbsent` do not report success while evicting their own fresh value. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Control 界面/Talk: make failed Talk startup errors dismissable 和 clear the stale Talk 错误 state 当 dismissed, so missing realtime 语音 provider configuration does not leave a permanent chat banner. 修复 #77071. Thanks @ijoshdavis.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/Talk: make failed Talk startup errors dismissable and clear the stale Talk error state when dismissed, so missing realtime voice provider configuration does not leave a permanent chat banner. Fixes #77071. Thanks @ijoshdavis.

changes.title: Control 界面/Talk: 停止 和 clear failed realtime Talk sessions 当 dismissing runtime 错误 banners, so the next Talk click starts a fresh session 而不是 only stopping the stale one. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/Talk: stop and clear failed realtime Talk sessions when dismissing runtime error banners, so the next Talk click starts a fresh session instead of only stopping the stale one. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Control 界面/Talk: 重试 从 a failed realtime Talk session 在 the next Talk click 而不是 requiring a separate stale-session 停止 click first. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/Talk: retry from a failed realtime Talk session on the next Talk click instead of requiring a separate stale-session stop click first. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Canvas host: 保留 the 网关 TLS scheme 在 浏览器 canvas host URLs 和 startup mount logs, so direct HTTPS gateways do not advertise insecure canvas links. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Canvas host: preserve the Gateway TLS scheme in browser canvas host URLs and startup mount logs, so direct HTTPS gateways do not advertise insecure canvas links. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: WhatsApp/login: route login success 和 failure messages through the injected runtime, so setup/onboarding surfaces capture all login output 而不是 only the QR. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: WhatsApp/login: route login success and failure messages through the injected runtime, so setup/onboarding surfaces capture all login output instead of only the QR. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Google Chat: create an isolated Google 认证 transport per 认证 client, so google-认证-library interceptor mutations do not accumulate across Webhook verification 和 access-令牌 clients. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Google Chat: create an isolated Google auth transport per auth client, so google-auth-library interceptor mutations do not accumulate across webhook verification and access-token clients. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 诊断工具/插件: 移除 orphaned 或 recovered managed npm copies 的 bundled `@openclaw/*` 插件 期间 `诊断工具 --修复`, so stale package manifests cannot shadow the current bundled 插件 配置 schema.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/plugins: remove orphaned or recovered managed npm copies of bundled `@openclaw/*` plugins during `doctor --fix`, so stale package manifests cannot shadow the current bundled plugin config schema.

changes.title: Control 界面/性能: cap long-task 和 long-animation-frame diagnostics 在 the shared event log, so slow-render telemetry does not evict 网关/插件 events 从 the Debug 和 Overview views. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/performance: cap long-task and long-animation-frame diagnostics in the shared event log, so slow-render telemetry does not evict gateway/plugin events from the Debug and Overview views. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/startup: log the canvas host mount only 之后 the HTTP server has bound, so startup logs no longer report the canvas host as mounted 之前 it can serve requests.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: log the canvas host mount only after the HTTP server has bound, so startup logs no longer report the canvas host as mounted before it can serve requests.

changes.title: Control 界面/i18n: render the Sessions active filter tooltip 使用 the configured minute count 在 every locale 和 make the i18n check reject placeholder drift. Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/i18n: render the Sessions active filter tooltip with the configured minute count in every locale and make the i18n check reject placeholder drift. Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.title: Web fetch: late-bind `web_fetch` 配置 和 provider fallback metadata 从 the active runtime snapshot, matching `web_search` so long-lived tools do not use stale fetch provider settings. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Web fetch: late-bind `web_fetch` config and provider fallback metadata from the active runtime snapshot, matching `web_search` so long-lived tools do not use stale fetch provider settings. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Discord: clear stale startup probe bot/application status 当 the async bot probe throws, not just 当 it returns a degraded probe result. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Discord: clear stale startup probe bot/application status when the async bot probe throws, not just when it returns a degraded probe result. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Web search: scope explicit bundled `web_search` provider runtime loading through manifest ownership, so selecting DuckDuckGo/Gemini/etc. does not import unrelated bundled providers 或 log their optional dependency failures. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Web search: scope explicit bundled `web_search` provider runtime loading through manifest ownership, so selecting DuckDuckGo/Gemini/etc. does not import unrelated bundled providers or log their optional dependency failures. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/discovery: demote the source-only TypeScript runtime check 在 already-installed `origin: "global"` 插件 packages 从 a 配置-blocking 错误 to a warning 和 let the runtime fall through to the TypeScript source via jiti, so a single broken installed package no longer blocks `插件 install` 为了 unrelated 插件; install-time rejection 的 newly-installed source-only packages is unchanged. Thanks @romneyda.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/discovery: demote the source-only TypeScript runtime check on already-installed `origin: "global"` plugin packages from a config-blocking error to a warning and let the runtime fall through to the TypeScript source via jiti, so a single broken installed package no longer blocks `plugins install` for unrelated plugins; install-time rejection of newly-installed source-only packages is unchanged. Thanks @romneyda.

changes.title: Providers/OpenAI Codex: 停止 the OAuth认证 progress spinner 之前 showing the manual redirect paste prompt, so callback timeouts do not spam `浏览器 callback did not finish` across terminals.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/OpenAI Codex: stop the OAuth progress spinner before showing the manual redirect paste prompt, so callback timeouts do not spam `Browser callback did not finish` across terminals.

changes.title: Providers/DeepSeek: expose DeepSeek V4 `xhigh` 和 `max` thinking levels through the lightweight provider-policy surface, so Control 界面 `/think` pickers keep showing the max reasoning options 当 the runtime 插件 registry is not active. 修复 #77139. Thanks @bittoby.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/DeepSeek: expose DeepSeek V4 `xhigh` and `max` thinking levels through the lightweight provider-policy surface, so Control UI `/think` pickers keep showing the max reasoning options when the runtime plugin registry is not active. Fixes #77139. Thanks @bittoby.

changes.title: Release/beta smoke: 解决 the dispatched Telegram beta E2E run 从 `gh run list` 当 `gh workflow run` returns no run URL, so the maintainer helper does not fail immediately 之后 dispatch. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Release/beta smoke: resolve the dispatched Telegram beta E2E run from `gh run list` when `gh workflow run` returns no run URL, so the maintainer helper does not fail immediately after dispatch. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Media/images: keep HEIC/HEIF attachments fail-closed 当 optional Sharp conversion is unavailable 而不是 sending originals that still need conversion. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Media/images: keep HEIC/HEIF attachments fail-closed when optional Sharp conversion is unavailable instead of sending originals that still need conversion. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Google Meet: fork the caller's current Agent transcript 进入 Agent-mode meeting consultant sessions, so Meet replies inherit the context 从 the 工具 call that joined the meeting.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: fork the caller's current agent transcript into agent-mode meeting consultant sessions, so Meet replies inherit the context from the tool call that joined the meeting.

changes.title: iOS/mobile pairing: reject non-loopback `ws://` setup URLs 之前 QR/setup-code issuance 和 let the iOS 网关 settings screen scan QR codes 或 paste full setup-code messages. Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: iOS/mobile pairing: reject non-loopback `ws://` setup URLs before QR/setup-code issuance and let the iOS Gateway settings screen scan QR codes or paste full setup-code messages. Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.title: Control 界面: keep 网关 Access inputs 和 locale picker contained inside the card at narrow 和 tablet widths.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI: keep Gateway Access inputs and locale picker contained inside the card at narrow and tablet widths.

changes.title: Agent/trajectory: bound runtime trajectory capture 和 yield queued sidecar writes so oversized traces 停止 recording 而不是 monopolizing 网关 cleanup. 修复 #77124. Thanks @loyur.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/trajectory: bound runtime trajectory capture and yield queued sidecar writes so oversized traces stop recording instead of monopolizing Gateway cleanup. Fixes #77124. Thanks @loyur.

changes.title: Telegram/streaming: sanitize 工具-progress draft preview backticks 之前 shared compaction, so long backtick-heavy progress text still renders inside the safe code-formatted preview 而不是 collapsing to an ellipsis.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram/streaming: sanitize tool-progress draft preview backticks before shared compaction, so long backtick-heavy progress text still renders inside the safe code-formatted preview instead of collapsing to an ellipsis.

changes.title: 界面/chat: 移除 the unsupported `line-clamp` declaration 从 the chat queue text rule to eliminate Firefox console noise 不适用 changing visible truncation behavior. Thanks @ZanderH-code.
changes.rawTitle: UI/chat: remove the unsupported `line-clamp` declaration from the chat queue text rule to eliminate Firefox console noise without changing visible truncation behavior. Thanks @ZanderH-code.

changes.title: Agent/Pi: suppress persistence 为了 synthetic mid-turn overflow continuation prompts, so transcript-重试 recovery does not write the "continue 从 transcript" prompt as a new user turn. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Pi: suppress persistence for synthetic mid-turn overflow continuation prompts, so transcript-retry recovery does not write the "continue from transcript" prompt as a new user turn. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/tools: strip reasoning text 从 visible rich presentation titles, blocks, buttons, 和 select labels 之前 message-工具 sends, so structured channel payloads cannot leak hidden planning. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/tools: strip reasoning text from visible rich presentation titles, blocks, buttons, and select labels before message-tool sends, so structured channel payloads cannot leak hidden planning. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Telegram: keep reply-dispatch lazy provider runtime chunks behind stable dist names 和 delete `/reasoning stream` previews 之后 final delivery so package updates 和 live reasoning drafts do not leave Telegram turns broken 或 noisy. Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram: keep reply-dispatch lazy provider runtime chunks behind stable dist names and delete `/reasoning stream` previews after final delivery so package updates and live reasoning drafts do not leave Telegram turns broken or noisy. Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.title: Discord: start the 网关 monitor 不适用 waiting 为了 the startup bot/application probe, so WSL2 hosts 使用 a slow `/users/@me` REST 路径 still bring the channel online while status enrichment finishes asynchronously. 修复 #77103. Thanks @Suited78.
changes.rawTitle: Discord: start the gateway monitor without waiting for the startup bot/application probe, so WSL2 hosts with a slow `/users/@me` REST path still bring the channel online while status enrichment finishes asynchronously. Fixes #77103. Thanks @Suited78.

changes.title: Exec approvals: detect `env -S` split-string 命令-carrier risks 当 `-S`/`-s` is combined 使用 other env short options, so approval explanations do not miss split payloads hidden behind `env -iS...`. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Exec approvals: detect `env -S` split-string command-carrier risks when `-S`/`-s` is combined with other env short options, so approval explanations do not miss split payloads hidden behind `env -iS...`. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Google Meet: log the concrete Agent-mode TTS provider, 模型, 语音, output format, 和 sample rate 之后 speech synthesis, so Meet logs show which 语音 backend spoke each reply.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: log the concrete agent-mode TTS provider, model, voice, output format, and sample rate after speech synthesis, so Meet logs show which voice backend spoke each reply.

changes.title: 语音 Call: mark realtime calls completed 当 the realtime provider closes normally, so Twilio/OpenAI/Google realtime 停止 events do not leave active call records behind. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Voice Call: mark realtime calls completed when the realtime provider closes normally, so Twilio/OpenAI/Google realtime stop events do not leave active call records behind. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/更新: keep the shutdown close 路径 behind a stable runtime chunk 和 ship compatibility aliases 为了 recent `server-close-*` hashes, so manual npm package replacement cannot leave an already-running 网关 unable to shut down cleanly. 修复 #77087. Thanks @westlife219.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/update: keep the shutdown close path behind a stable runtime chunk and ship compatibility aliases for recent `server-close-*` hashes, so manual npm package replacement cannot leave an already-running Gateway unable to shut down cleanly. Fixes #77087. Thanks @westlife219.

changes.title: Control 界面/media: mint short-lived scoped tickets 为了 assistant media fetches 和 render ticketed URLs 而不是 exposing long-lived 认证 tokens 在 chat image URLs. 修复 #70830 和 #77097. Thanks @hclsys.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/media: mint short-lived scoped tickets for assistant media fetches and render ticketed URLs instead of exposing long-lived auth tokens in chat image URLs. Fixes #70830 and #77097. Thanks @hclsys.

changes.title: Exec approvals: treat POSIX `exec` as a 命令 carrier 为了 inline eval, shell-wrapper, 和 eval/source detection, so approval explanations 和 命令-risk checks do not miss payloads hidden behind `exec`. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Exec approvals: treat POSIX `exec` as a command carrier for inline eval, shell-wrapper, and eval/source detection, so approval explanations and command-risk checks do not miss payloads hidden behind `exec`. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: log the resolved audio provider model when starting Chrome and paired-node Meet talk-back bridges, so agent-mode joins show the STT model and bidi joins show the realtime voice model.

changes.rawTitle: Diagnostics: handle missing session-tail files in cron recovery context without tripping extension test typecheck. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: QA/Slack: 更新 the Slack dispatch preview fallback test SDK mock 为了 structured progress draft helpers, so the rich progress draft regression suite covers the new imports 而不是 failing 之前 assertions run. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: QA/Slack: update the Slack dispatch preview fallback test SDK mock for structured progress draft helpers, so the rich progress draft regression suite covers the new imports instead of failing before assertions run. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Release validation: 允许 focused QA live reruns to select Matrix 和 Telegram 不适用 running Slack, so known Slack credential-pool outages do not block non-Slack live proof. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Release validation: allow focused QA live reruns to select Matrix and Telegram without running Slack, so known Slack credential-pool outages do not block non-Slack live proof. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/loader: keep bundled 插件 package `test-API.js` aliases behind private QA mode, so source transforms do not expose test-only public surfaces 期间 normal 插件 loading. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/loader: keep bundled plugin package `test-api.js` aliases behind private QA mode, so source transforms do not expose test-only public surfaces during normal plugin loading. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/startup: start cron 和 record the post-ready 内存 trace even 当 deferred maintenance timers fail 之后 readiness, so a non-fatal timer setup issue does not 静默地 leave scheduled jobs idle. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/startup: start cron and record the post-ready memory trace even when deferred maintenance timers fail after readiness, so a non-fatal timer setup issue does not silently leave scheduled jobs idle. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Exec approvals: unwrap BSD/macOS `env -P <路径>` carrier commands 之前 approval-命令 和 strict inline-eval checks, so `/approve` shell execution 和 inline interpreter payloads are still blocked behind that env form.
changes.rawTitle: Exec approvals: unwrap BSD/macOS `env -P <path>` carrier commands before approval-command and strict inline-eval checks, so `/approve` shell execution and inline interpreter payloads are still blocked behind that env form.

changes.title: Agent/session status: keep semantic `session_status({ sessionKey: "current" })` 在 the live run session even 之前 that run has a persisted session-store entry, 而不是 falling back to the sandbox policy 密钥. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/session status: keep semantic `session_status({ sessionKey: "current" })` on the live run session even before that run has a persisted session-store entry, instead of falling back to the sandbox policy key. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: QA/Slack: 解决 bundled official 插件 public-surface package aliases 期间 source-mode QA runs, so release Slack live validation can load `@openclaw/Slack/API.js` 不适用 workspace symlinks. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: QA/Slack: resolve bundled official plugin public-surface package aliases during source-mode QA runs, so release Slack live validation can load `@openclaw/slack/api.js` without workspace symlinks. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Codex: pass the live run session 密钥 进入 app-server dynamic tools 当 sandbox policy uses a separate session 密钥, so `session_status({ sessionKey: "current" })` reports the active run 而不是 the sandbox policy 密钥. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Codex: pass the live run session key into app-server dynamic tools when sandbox policy uses a separate session key, so `session_status({ sessionKey: "current" })` reports the active run instead of the sandbox policy key. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Web search: keep first-class assistant `web_search` auto-detect 和 configured runtime providers visible 当 active runtime metadata 或 the active 插件 registry is incomplete. 修复 #77073. Thanks @joeykrug.
changes.rawTitle: Web search: keep first-class assistant `web_search` auto-detect and configured runtime providers visible when active runtime metadata or the active plugin registry is incomplete. Fixes #77073. Thanks @joeykrug.

changes.title: 插件/tools: mark manifest-optional sibling tools as optional even 当 they come 从 a shared non-optional factory, so cached/status/MCP协议 metadata keeps opt-在 工具 policy accurate. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/tools: mark manifest-optional sibling tools as optional even when they come from a shared non-optional factory, so cached/status/MCP metadata keeps opt-in tool policy accurate. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Matrix: keep `streaming.progress.toolProgress` scoped to progress draft mode, so partial 和 quiet Matrix previews do not lose 工具 progress unless `streaming.preview.toolProgress` is disabled. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Matrix: keep `streaming.progress.toolProgress` scoped to progress draft mode, so partial and quiet Matrix previews do not lose tool progress unless `streaming.preview.toolProgress` is disabled. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/validation: isolate 网关 server validation files, ignore unrelated startup logs 在 request-trace coverage, 和 fail fast 在 stuck shared-认证 sockets, reducing false main-branch CI failures 为了 contributors. Thanks @amknight.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/validation: isolate gateway server validation files, ignore unrelated startup logs in request-trace coverage, and fail fast on stuck shared-auth sockets, reducing false main-branch CI failures for contributors. Thanks @amknight.

changes.title: Channels/streaming: keep `streaming.progress.toolProgress` scoped to progress draft mode, so disabling compact progress lines does not silence partial/block preview 工具 updates. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/streaming: keep `streaming.progress.toolProgress` scoped to progress draft mode, so disabling compact progress lines does not silence partial/block preview tool updates. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/更新: treat OpenClaw stable correction versions like `2026.5.3-1` as stable releases 为了 npm installs, 插件 updates, 和 bundled-version comparisons, so `latest` can advance official 插件 不适用 prerelease opt-在. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/update: treat OpenClaw stable correction versions like `2026.5.3-1` as stable releases for npm installs, plugin updates, and bundled-version comparisons, so `latest` can advance official plugins without prerelease opt-in. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Control 界面: point the Appearance tweakcn browse action 和 docs at the live tweakcn editor route 而不是 the removed `/themes` page. 修复 #77048.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI: point the Appearance tweakcn browse action and docs at the live tweakcn editor route instead of the removed `/themes` page. Fixes #77048.

changes.title: Control 界面: render Dream Diary prose through the sanitized markdown pipeline, so diary bold/italic/header markdown no longer appears as literal source text. 修复 #62413.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI: render Dream Diary prose through the sanitized markdown pipeline, so diary bold/italic/header markdown no longer appears as literal source text. Fixes #62413.

changes.title: Control 界面: render 工具 results whose output arrives as text-block arrays 和 give expanded 工具 output a scrollable block, so read/exec output remains visible 在 WebChat. 修复 #77054.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI: render tool results whose output arrives as text-block arrays and give expanded tool output a scrollable block, so read/exec output remains visible in WebChat. Fixes #77054.

changes.title: MCP协议: include serialized conversation/message payloads 在 the primary text content 为了 `conversations_list` 和 `messages_read`, while preserving `structuredContent` 为了 capable clients. 修复 #77024.
changes.rawTitle: MCP: include serialized conversation/message payloads in the primary text content for `conversations_list` and `messages_read`, while preserving `structuredContent` for capable clients. Fixes #77024.

changes.title: Media: treat `EPERM` 从 the post-write media fsync step as best-effort, allowing WebChat 和 channel uploads to finish 在 Windows filesystems that reject `fsync` 之后 a successful write. 修复 #76844.
changes.rawTitle: Media: treat `EPERM` from the post-write media fsync step as best-effort, allowing WebChat and channel uploads to finish on Windows filesystems that reject `fsync` after a successful write. Fixes #76844.

changes.title: Media/Telegram: send 在-limit original images 当 optional image optimization is unavailable, so Telegram MEDIA replies 和 message-工具 image sends do not fail just because `sharp` is missing. 修复 #77081. (#77117) Thanks @pfrederiksen.
changes.rawTitle: Media/Telegram: send in-limit original images when optional image optimization is unavailable, so Telegram MEDIA replies and message-tool image sends do not fail just because `sharp` is missing. Fixes #77081. (#77117) Thanks @pfrederiksen.

changes.title: Diagnostics: include last progress, cron job/run ids, stopped cron job name, 和 the last assistant transcript snippet 在 stalled-session 和 stuck-session recovery logs so cron stalls show what was stopped.
changes.rawTitle: Diagnostics: include last progress, cron job/run ids, stopped cron job name, and the last assistant transcript snippet in stalled-session and stuck-session recovery logs so cron stalls show what was stopped.

changes.title: Streaming channels: 添加 `streaming.preview.commandText: "status"` / `streaming.progress.commandText: "status"` to hide 命令/exec text 在 preview progress lines while keeping the released raw 命令 text default. 修复 #77072.
changes.rawTitle: Streaming channels: add `streaming.preview.commandText: "status"` / `streaming.progress.commandText: "status"` to hide command/exec text in preview progress lines while keeping the released raw command text default. Fixes #77072.

changes.title: Agent/cron: let explicit cron `timeoutSeconds` drive both CLI no-output 和 embedded LLM idle watchdogs 而不是 being capped 通过 resume defaults. 修复 #76289.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/cron: let explicit cron `timeoutSeconds` drive both CLI no-output and embedded LLM idle watchdogs instead of being capped by resume defaults. Fixes #76289.

changes.title: 插件/catalog: suppress missing `channelConfigs` compatibility diagnostics 为了 external channel 插件 that are disabled, denied, 或 outside a restrictive allowlist. 修复 #76095.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/catalog: suppress missing `channelConfigs` compatibility diagnostics for external channel plugins that are disabled, denied, or outside a restrictive allowlist. Fixes #76095.

changes.title: Diagnostics: keep Webhook/message OTEL attributes 和 Prometheus delivery labels low-cardinality 和 omit raw chat/message IDs 从 spans, so progress-draft 和 message-工具 modes do not leak high-cardinality messaging identifiers.
changes.rawTitle: Diagnostics: keep webhook/message OTEL attributes and Prometheus delivery labels low-cardinality and omit raw chat/message IDs from spans, so progress-draft and message-tool modes do not leak high-cardinality messaging identifiers.

changes.title: Google Meet: 停止 advertising legacy `mode: "realtime"` to Agent 和 配置 UIs, while keeping it as a hidden compatibility alias 为了 `mode: "Agent"`, so new joins use the STT -> OpenClaw Agent -> TTS 路径 而不是 selecting the direct realtime 语音 fallback.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: stop advertising legacy `mode: "realtime"` to agents and config UIs, while keeping it as a hidden compatibility alias for `mode: "agent"`, so new joins use the STT -> OpenClaw agent -> TTS path instead of selecting the direct realtime voice fallback.

changes.title: Google Meet: 添加 `Chrome.audioBufferBytes` 为了 generated 命令-pair SoX audio commands 和 lower the default buffer 从 SoX's 8192 bytes to 4096 bytes to reduce Chrome talk-back latency.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: add `chrome.audioBufferBytes` for generated command-pair SoX audio commands and lower the default buffer from SoX's 8192 bytes to 4096 bytes to reduce Chrome talk-back latency.

changes.title: Google Meet: split realtime provider 配置 进入 Agent-mode transcription 和 bidi-mode 语音 providers, 和 migrate legacy Gemini Live bidi configs 使用 `诊断工具 --修复`, so Gemini Live can back direct bidi fallback 不适用 破坏性变更 the default OpenClaw Agent talk-back 路径.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: split realtime provider config into agent-mode transcription and bidi-mode voice providers, and migrate legacy Gemini Live bidi configs with `doctor --fix`, so Gemini Live can back direct bidi fallback without breaking the default OpenClaw agent talk-back path.

changes.title: Google Meet: keep waiting 为了 the Meet microphone to unmute 期间 join intro readiness 而不是 permanently skipping talk-back 当 Meet briefly reports the local mic as muted.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: keep waiting for the Meet microphone to unmute during join intro readiness instead of permanently skipping talk-back when Meet briefly reports the local mic as muted.

changes.title: Google Meet: expose `voiceCall.postDtmfSpeechDelayMs` 在 the 插件 manifest schema 和 setup hints, so manifest-based 配置 editing accepts the runtime-supported Twilio delay 密钥. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: expose `voiceCall.postDtmfSpeechDelayMs` in the plugin manifest schema and setup hints, so manifest-based config editing accepts the runtime-supported Twilio delay key. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Google Meet: keep explicit non-Google `realtime.provider` values as the transcription provider compatibility fallback 当 `realtime.transcriptionProvider` is unset. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: keep explicit non-Google `realtime.provider` values as the transcription provider compatibility fallback when `realtime.transcriptionProvider` is unset. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Google Meet: make Twilio setup status require an enabled `语音-call` 插件 entry 而不是 treating a missing entry as ready. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: make Twilio setup status require an enabled `voice-call` plugin entry instead of treating a missing entry as ready. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Telegram: render shared interactive reply buttons 在 reply delivery so 插件 approval messages show inline keyboards. (#76238) Thanks @keshavbotagent.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram: render shared interactive reply buttons in reply delivery so plugin approval messages show inline keyboards. (#76238) Thanks @keshavbotagent.

changes.title: Cron/sessions: keep cron metadata rows 不适用 an 在-disk transcript non-resumable until a transcript exists, so 诊断工具 和 `sessions cleanup --修复-missing` no longer report 或 prune pre-transcript cron rows as broken sessions. Refs #77011.
changes.rawTitle: Cron/sessions: keep cron metadata rows without an on-disk transcript non-resumable until a transcript exists, so doctor and `sessions cleanup --fix-missing` no longer report or prune pre-transcript cron rows as broken sessions. Refs #77011.

changes.title: Agent/CLI-runner: drop a saved `claude-CLI` resume sessionId at preparation time 当 its 在-disk transcript no longer exists 在 `~/.claude/projects/`, so a stale binding 从 a half-installed `更新.run` cannot trap follow-up runs (auto-reply / Telegram direct) 在 a `claude --resume` 超时 loop; the run starts fresh 和 the new sessionId is written back through the existing post-run flow. (#77030; refs #77011) Thanks @openperf.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/cli-runner: drop a saved `claude-cli` resume sessionId at preparation time when its on-disk transcript no longer exists in `~/.claude/projects/`, so a stale binding from a half-installed `update.run` cannot trap follow-up runs (auto-reply / Telegram direct) in a `claude --resume` timeout loop; the run starts fresh and the new sessionId is written back through the existing post-run flow. (#77030; refs #77011) Thanks @openperf.

changes.title: Release validation: install the cross-OS TypeScript harness through Windows-safe Node/npm shims so native Windows package checks reach the OpenClaw smoke suites 而不是 exiting 之前 artifact capture. Thanks @vincentkoc.
