changes.title: CLI/诊断工具: load the configured 内存-slot 插件 当 resolving 内存 diagnostics so bundled `内存-core` no longer triggers a false “no active 内存 插件” warning 在 standalone `诊断工具` / `status` runs. 修复 #76367. Thanks @neeravmakwana.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/doctor: load the configured memory-slot plugin when resolving memory diagnostics so bundled `memory-core` no longer triggers a false “no active memory plugin” warning on standalone `doctor` / `status` runs. Fixes #76367. Thanks @neeravmakwana.

changes.title: 网关: 保留 stack diagnostics 当 `chat.send` 或 Agent attachment parsing/staging fails, improving image-send failure triage. Refs #63432. (#75135) Thanks @keen0206.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway: preserve stack diagnostics when `chat.send` or agent attachment parsing/staging fails, improving image-send failure triage. Refs #63432. (#75135) Thanks @keen0206.

changes.title: Agent/idle-超时: 添加 a cost-runaway breaker to the outer embedded-run 重试 loop that halts further attempts 之后 5 consecutive idle timeouts 不适用 completed 模型 progress, so a wedged provider can no longer fan paid 模型 calls out across the same run; completed text 或 工具-call progress resets the breaker, 但是 partial 工具-argument 令牌 dribbles do not. 修复 #76293. Thanks @ThePuma312.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/idle-timeout: add a cost-runaway breaker to the outer embedded-run retry loop that halts further attempts after 5 consecutive idle timeouts without completed model progress, so a wedged provider can no longer fan paid model calls out across the same run; completed text or tool-call progress resets the breaker, but partial tool-argument token dribbles do not. Fixes #76293. Thanks @ThePuma312.

changes.title: Heartbeats/Codex: 停止 sending the legacy `HEARTBEAT_OK` prompt instruction 当 heartbeat turns have the structured `heartbeat_respond` 工具, while keeping the text sentinel 为了 legacy automatic heartbeat replies. Thanks @pashpashpash.
changes.rawTitle: Heartbeats/Codex: stop sending the legacy `HEARTBEAT_OK` prompt instruction when heartbeat turns have the structured `heartbeat_respond` tool, while keeping the text sentinel for legacy automatic heartbeat replies. Thanks @pashpashpash.

changes.title: Heartbeats/Codex: keep structured heartbeat prompts aligned 使用 actual `heartbeat_respond` 工具 availability 和 keep 工具-disabled commitment check-ins 在 the legacy ack 路径. Thanks @pashpashpash 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Heartbeats/Codex: keep structured heartbeat prompts aligned with actual `heartbeat_respond` tool availability and keep tool-disabled commitment check-ins on the legacy ack path. Thanks @pashpashpash and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent runtimes: fail explicit 插件 runtime selections honestly 当 the requested harness is unavailable 而不是 静默地 falling back to the embedded PI runtime. Thanks @pashpashpash.
changes.rawTitle: Agent runtimes: fail explicit plugin runtime selections honestly when the requested harness is unavailable instead of silently falling back to the embedded PI runtime. Thanks @pashpashpash.

changes.title: Maintainer workflow: push prepared PR heads through GitHub's verified commit API 通过 default 和 require an explicit override 之前 git-protocol pushes can publish unsigned commits. Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Maintainer workflow: push prepared PR heads through GitHub's verified commit API by default and require an explicit override before git-protocol pushes can publish unsigned commits. Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.title: 飞书: 解决 setup/status probes through the selected/default account so multi-account configs 使用 account-scoped app credentials show as configured 和 probeable. 修复 #72930. Thanks @brokemac79.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu: resolve setup/status probes through the selected/default account so multi-account configs with account-scoped app credentials show as configured and probeable. Fixes #72930. Thanks @brokemac79.

changes.title: 网关/responses: emit every client 工具 call 从 `/v1/responses` JSON 和 SSE responses 当 the Agent invokes multiple client tools 在 a single turn, so multi-工具 plans, graph orchestration calls, 和 similar batched flows no longer drop every call 但是 the last. 修复 #52288. Thanks @CharZhou 和 @bonelli.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/responses: emit every client tool call from `/v1/responses` JSON and SSE responses when the agent invokes multiple client tools in a single turn, so multi-tool plans, graph orchestration calls, and similar batched flows no longer drop every call but the last. Fixes #52288. Thanks @CharZhou and @bonelli.

changes.title: 网关/Agent: enforce `session.sendPolicy=deny` 在 网关 Agent requests only 当 `deliver: true`, so non-delivery smoke checks 和 internal Agent runs are no longer rejected 使用 `send blocked 通过 session policy` while outbound delivery remains gated. 修复 #73381. Thanks @wenxu007.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/agent: enforce `session.sendPolicy=deny` on gateway agent requests only when `deliver: true`, so non-delivery smoke checks and internal agent runs are no longer rejected with `send blocked by session policy` while outbound delivery remains gated. Fixes #73381. Thanks @wenxu007.

changes.title: Slack/reactions: treat missing no_reaction 移除 responses as idempotent success 和 route own-reaction cleanup through the 移除 helper, so concurrent cleanup no longer surfaces Slack race errors. 修复 #50733. (#76304) Thanks @martingarramon 和 @Hollychou924.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/reactions: treat missing no_reaction remove responses as idempotent success and route own-reaction cleanup through the remove helper, so concurrent cleanup no longer surfaces Slack race errors. Fixes #50733. (#76304) Thanks @martingarramon and @Hollychou924.

changes.title: 飞书: include media `file_key` 和 `image_key` values 在 inbound dedupe so reused message IDs still process distinct media attachments while true retries stay suppressed. 修复 #75057. Thanks @SymbolStar.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu: include media `file_key` and `image_key` values in inbound dedupe so reused message IDs still process distinct media attachments while true retries stay suppressed. Fixes #75057. Thanks @SymbolStar.

changes.title: Control 界面/网关: 避免 full session-list reloads 为了 locally applied message-phase session updates, carry known session keys through transcript-file 更新 events, 和 defer media provider listing 当 explicit generation 模型 配置 is present. Refs #76236, #76203, #76188, #76107, 和 #76166. Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/Gateway: avoid full session-list reloads for locally applied message-phase session updates, carry known session keys through transcript-file update events, and defer media provider listing when explicit generation model config is present. Refs #76236, #76203, #76188, #76107, and #76166. Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.title: Install/更新: prune the obsolete `插件-runtime-deps` state directory 期间 packaged postinstall so upgrades 从 pre-2026.5.2 releases reclaim old bundled-插件 dependency caches 不适用 touching external 插件 installs.
changes.rawTitle: Install/update: prune the obsolete `plugin-runtime-deps` state directory during packaged postinstall so upgrades from pre-2026.5.2 releases reclaim old bundled-plugin dependency caches without touching external plugin installs.

changes.title: Auto-reply/queue: treat reset-triggered `/new` 和 `/reset` turns as interrupt runs across active-run queue handling, so steer/followup modes cannot delay a fresh session behind existing work. 修复 #74093. (#74144) Thanks @ruji9527 和 @yelog.
changes.rawTitle: Auto-reply/queue: treat reset-triggered `/new` and `/reset` turns as interrupt runs across active-run queue handling, so steer/followup modes cannot delay a fresh session behind existing work. Fixes #74093. (#74144) Thanks @ruji9527 and @yelog.

changes.title: Cron: persist repaired startup runtime state back to `jobs-state.json` so a valid future `nextRunAtMs` 使用 missing `updatedAtMs` no longer triggers repeated external health-check repairs 之后 网关 restart. 修复 #76461. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Cron: persist repaired startup runtime state back to `jobs-state.json` so a valid future `nextRunAtMs` with missing `updatedAtMs` no longer triggers repeated external health-check repairs after Gateway restart. Fixes #76461. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Cron: 保留 manual `cron.run` IDs 在 `cron.runs` history so manual run acknowledgements can be correlated 使用 finished run records. 修复 #76276.
changes.rawTitle: Cron: preserve manual `cron.run` IDs in `cron.runs` history so manual run acknowledgements can be correlated with finished run records. Fixes #76276.

changes.title: CLI/devices: request `operator.admin` 为了 `openclaw devices approve <requestId>` only 当 the exact pending device request would mint 或 inherit admin-scoped operator access, while keeping lower-scope approvals 在 the pairing scope.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/devices: request `operator.admin` for `openclaw devices approve <requestId>` only when the exact pending device request would mint or inherit admin-scoped operator access, while keeping lower-scope approvals on the pairing scope.

changes.title: 内存/embedding: broaden the embedding reindex 重试 classifier to include transient socket-layer errors (`fetch failed`, `ECONNRESET`, `socket hang up`, `UND_ERR_*`, `closed`) so 内存 reindex survives provider network hiccups 而不是 aborting mid-run. Related #56815, #44166. (#76311) Thanks @buyitsydney.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/embedding: broaden the embedding reindex retry classifier to include transient socket-layer errors (`fetch failed`, `ECONNRESET`, `socket hang up`, `UND_ERR_*`, `closed`) so memory reindex survives provider network hiccups instead of aborting mid-run. Related #56815, #44166. (#76311) Thanks @buyitsydney.

changes.title: 内存/sessions: keep rotated 和 deleted session transcripts (`.jsonl.reset.<iso>` / `.jsonl.deleted.<iso>`) searchable end-to-end 通过 indexing their real content 在 `buildSessionEntry` 而不是 short-circuiting to empty entries, 和 通过 mapping archive hit paths back to their live transcript stem 期间 `memory_search` visibility filtering so hits are no longer dropped at the guard. `.jsonl.bak.<iso>` backups 和 compaction checkpoints remain opaque. Refs #56131. Thanks @buyitsydney.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/sessions: keep rotated and deleted session transcripts (`.jsonl.reset.<iso>` / `.jsonl.deleted.<iso>`) searchable end-to-end by indexing their real content in `buildSessionEntry` instead of short-circuiting to empty entries, and by mapping archive hit paths back to their live transcript stem during `memory_search` visibility filtering so hits are no longer dropped at the guard. `.jsonl.bak.<iso>` backups and compaction checkpoints remain opaque. Refs #56131. Thanks @buyitsydney.

changes.title: 内存/sessions: emit a `sessionTranscriptUpdate` event 当 `archiveFileOnDisk` rotates a live session transcript 进入 `.jsonl.reset.<iso>` / `.jsonl.deleted.<iso>` / `.jsonl.bak.<iso>`, 和 bypass the delta-bytes / delta-messages threshold gate 在 `processSessionDeltaBatch` 为了 usage-counted archive paths (`.jsonl.reset.<iso>` 和 `.jsonl.deleted.<iso>`). 不适用 the bypass the archive event was forwarded to the listener 但是 dropped at the threshold check, because an archive is a one-shot file-rename mutation rather than an incremental append 和 would typically land below the default `deltaBytes: 100000` / `deltaMessages: 50` reindex thresholds. Archives 现在 feed the 内存 sync incremental 路径 the same way `appendMessage` / compaction / 工具-result rewrite / chat inject / 命令 execution events already do. Refs #56131. Thanks @buyitsydney.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/sessions: emit a `sessionTranscriptUpdate` event when `archiveFileOnDisk` rotates a live session transcript into `.jsonl.reset.<iso>` / `.jsonl.deleted.<iso>` / `.jsonl.bak.<iso>`, and bypass the delta-bytes / delta-messages threshold gate in `processSessionDeltaBatch` for usage-counted archive paths (`.jsonl.reset.<iso>` and `.jsonl.deleted.<iso>`). Without the bypass the archive event was forwarded to the listener but dropped at the threshold check, because an archive is a one-shot file-rename mutation rather than an incremental append and would typically land below the default `deltaBytes: 100000` / `deltaMessages: 50` reindex thresholds. Archives now feed the memory sync incremental path the same way `appendMessage` / compaction / tool-result rewrite / chat inject / command execution events already do. Refs #56131. Thanks @buyitsydney.

changes.title: 内存/search: keep sqlite-vec optional 在 packaged installs 和 point missing-extension recovery at the valid `Agent.defaults.memorySearch.store.vector.extensionPath` 设置. Thanks @willemsej 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/search: keep sqlite-vec optional in packaged installs and point missing-extension recovery at the valid `agents.defaults.memorySearch.store.vector.extensionPath` setting. Thanks @willemsej and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关: keep directly requested 插件 tools invokable under restrictive 工具 profiles while preserving explicit deny lists 和 the HTTP safety deny list, preventing catalog/invoke mismatches that surface as "工具 not available". Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway: keep directly requested plugin tools invokable under restrictive tool profiles while preserving explicit deny lists and the HTTP safety deny list, preventing catalog/invoke mismatches that surface as "Tool not available". Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.title: 网关/更新: 允许 beta binaries to refresh 网关 services 当 the 配置 was last written 通过 the matching stable release version, avoiding false newer-配置 downgrade blocks 期间 beta channel updates.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/update: allow beta binaries to refresh gateway services when the config was last written by the matching stable release version, avoiding false newer-config downgrade blocks during beta channel updates.

changes.title: Channels: keep Matrix 和 Mattermost bundled 在 the core package 而不是 advertising external npm installs 之前 those channels are cut over. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Channels: keep Matrix and Mattermost bundled in the core package instead of advertising external npm installs before those channels are cut over. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Bonjour: 禁用 LAN mDNS advertising 之后 a repeated stuck-announcing recovery 而不是 repeatedly restarting ciao 和 saturating the 网关 event loop.
changes.rawTitle: Bonjour: disable LAN mDNS advertising after a repeated stuck-announcing recovery instead of repeatedly restarting ciao and saturating the Gateway event loop.

changes.title: Channels/setup: label installable channel picker hints as remote npm installs 和 hide remote install hints 为了 bundled 插件 that already ship 使用 OpenClaw.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/setup: label installable channel picker hints as remote npm installs and hide remote install hints for bundled plugins that already ship with OpenClaw.

changes.title: CLI/更新: refuse package updates launched 从 the active 网关 process tree 之前 stopping the managed 网关 service, avoiding self-terminated 在-lane updates that leave old 网关 code running. 修复 #75691. (#75819) Thanks @ai-hpc.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/update: refuse package updates launched from the active gateway process tree before stopping the managed Gateway service, avoiding self-terminated in-lane updates that leave old Gateway code running. Fixes #75691. (#75819) Thanks @ai-hpc.

changes.title: CLI/插件: 停止 treating the non-插件 `认证` 命令 root as a bundled 插件 id, so restrictive `插件.允许` configs no longer tell users to 添加 stale `认证` 插件 entries.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/plugins: stop treating the non-plugin `auth` command root as a bundled plugin id, so restrictive `plugins.allow` configs no longer tell users to add stale `auth` plugin entries.

changes.title: 诊断工具/插件: 更新 configured 插件 installs whose stale manifests still declare channels 不适用 `channelConfigs`, so beta upgrades repair old Discord-style package payloads 期间 `诊断工具 --修复`.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/plugins: update configured plugin installs whose stale manifests still declare channels without `channelConfigs`, so beta upgrades repair old Discord-style package payloads during `doctor --fix`.

changes.title: 诊断工具/插件: repair configured external 插件 installs whose persisted install record points at a missing package directory, so upgrades reconcile phantom npm metadata 之前 插件 runtime validation. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/plugins: repair configured external plugin installs whose persisted install record points at a missing package directory, so upgrades reconcile phantom npm metadata before plugin runtime validation. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Active Memory: keep non-empty `memory_search` results from being fast-failed as empty when debug telemetry reports zero hits.

changes.title: Active 内存: 保留 the target Agent context 当 building embedded recall 插件 tools so `memory_search` 和 `memory_get` stay available 为了 explicit recall sessions. 修复 #76343. Thanks @Countermarch.
changes.rawTitle: Active Memory: preserve the target agent context when building embedded recall plugin tools so `memory_search` and `memory_get` stay available for explicit recall sessions. Fixes #76343. Thanks @Countermarch.

changes.title: 插件/externalization: repair missing configured 插件 installs 从 npm 通过 default, reserve ClawHub downloads 为了 explicit `clawhubSpec` metadata, 和 cover Agent-runtime/env-selected 插件 repair. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/externalization: repair missing configured plugin installs from npm by default, reserve ClawHub downloads for explicit `clawhubSpec` metadata, and cover agent-runtime/env-selected plugin repair. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Tools/llm-task: keep JSON-only embedded model runs from tripping inherited tool allowlists when tools are intentionally disabled, while preserving runtime `toolsAllow` failures. Fixes #74019. Thanks @amknight.

changes.rawTitle: Tools/profiles: make `tools.profile: "full"` grant all tools including optional plugin tools such as browser, so the full profile no longer silently drops plugin-provided tools that require an explicit allowlist entry. Fixes #76507. Thanks @amknight.

changes.rawTitle: Feishu: keep timeout env parsing separate from the HTTP client wrapper so package security scans no longer report a false env-harvesting hit during install. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Upgrade/配置: validate configured web-search providers 和 statically suppressed 模型/provider pairs against the active 插件 set at 配置 load, so stale 插件 state fails loud 之前 runtime fallback.
changes.rawTitle: Upgrade/config: validate configured web-search providers and statically suppressed model/provider pairs against the active plugin set at config load, so stale plugin state fails loud before runtime fallback.

changes.rawTitle: Status/update: resolve beta update-channel checks from the installed version when config still says `stable`, and let `status --deep` reuse live gateway channel credential state instead of warning on command-path-only token misses.

changes.rawTitle: Doctor/plugins: preserve unmanaged third-party plugin `node_modules` during `doctor --fix`, while still pruning OpenClaw-managed runtime dependency caches.

changes.rawTitle: Gateway/restart: add `openclaw gateway restart --force` and `--wait <duration>`, log active task run IDs before restart deferral timers, and report timeout restarts as explicit forced restarts.

changes.rawTitle: Discord: persist slash-command deploy hashes across process restarts so unchanged command sets skip redeploy and avoid restart-loop 429s.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/externalization: keep ACPX, Google Chat, and LINE publishable plugin dist trees out of the core npm package file list.

changes.rawTitle: Gateway/CLI: make `openclaw gateway start` repair stale managed service definitions that point at old OpenClaw versions, missing binaries, or temporary installer paths before starting.

changes.title: Heartbeat/scheduler: make heartbeat phase scheduling active-hours-aware so the scheduler seeks forward to the first 在-window phase slot 而不是 arming timers 为了 quiet-hours slots 和 relying solely 在 the runtime guard. Non-UTC `activeHours.timezone` values (e.g. `Asia/Shanghai`) 现在 正确地 influence 当 the next heartbeat timer fires, avoiding wasted quiet-hours ticks 和 long dormant gaps 之后 网关 restarts. 修复 #75487. Thanks @amknight.
changes.rawTitle: Heartbeat/scheduler: make heartbeat phase scheduling active-hours-aware so the scheduler seeks forward to the first in-window phase slot instead of arming timers for quiet-hours slots and relying solely on the runtime guard. Non-UTC `activeHours.timezone` values (e.g. `Asia/Shanghai`) now correctly influence when the next heartbeat timer fires, avoiding wasted quiet-hours ticks and long dormant gaps after gateway restarts. Fixes #75487. Thanks @amknight.

items.title: Agent/subagents: detect prefix-only completion announce replies 和 fall back to the captured child result so requester chats no longer lose most 的 long sub-Agent reports 静默地. 修复 #76412. Thanks @inxaos 和 @davemorin.

items.title: Agent/sessions: keep delayed `sessions_send` A2A replies alive 之后 soft wait-window timeouts, while preserving terminal run timeouts 和 avoiding stale target replies 在 requester sessions. 修复 #76443. Thanks @ryswork1993 和 @vincentkoc.

items.title: Agent/compaction: 添加 an optional bundled compaction notifier hook 和 重试 once 从 the compacted transcript 当 automatic compaction leaves a turn 不适用 a final visible reply. (#76651) Thanks @simplyclever914.
items.rawTitle: Agents/compaction: add an optional bundled compaction notifier hook and retry once from the compacted transcript when automatic compaction leaves a turn without a final visible reply. (#76651) Thanks @simplyclever914.

items.title: Agent/incomplete-turn: detect 和 surface a warning 当 the Agent's final text 之后 a 工具-call chain is 静默地 dropped because the post-工具 assistant response was never produced, 而不是 completing the turn 使用 only the pre-工具 analysis text. 修复 #76477. Thanks @amknight.
items.rawTitle: Agents/incomplete-turn: detect and surface a warning when the agent's final text after a tool-call chain is silently dropped because the post-tool assistant response was never produced, instead of completing the turn with only the pre-tool analysis text. Fixes #76477. Thanks @amknight.

items.title: 网关: 保留 stack diagnostics 当 `chat.send` 或 Agent attachment parsing/staging fails, improving image-send failure triage. Refs #63432. (#75135) Thanks @keen0206.
items.rawTitle: Gateway: preserve stack diagnostics when `chat.send` or agent attachment parsing/staging fails, improving image-send failure triage. Refs #63432. (#75135) Thanks @keen0206.

items.title: 网关/responses: emit every client 工具 call 从 `/v1/responses` JSON 和 SSE responses 当 the Agent invokes multiple client tools 在 a single turn, so multi-工具 plans, graph orchestration calls, 和 similar batched flows no longer drop every call 但是 the last. 修复 #52288. Thanks @CharZhou 和 @bonelli.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/responses: emit every client tool call from `/v1/responses` JSON and SSE responses when the agent invokes multiple client tools in a single turn, so multi-tool plans, graph orchestration calls, and similar batched flows no longer drop every call but the last. Fixes #52288. Thanks @CharZhou and @bonelli.

items.title: 网关/Agent: enforce `session.sendPolicy=deny` 在 网关 Agent requests only 当 `deliver: true`, so non-delivery smoke checks 和 internal Agent runs are no longer rejected 使用 `send blocked 通过 session policy` while outbound delivery remains gated. 修复 #73381. Thanks @wenxu007.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/agent: enforce `session.sendPolicy=deny` on gateway agent requests only when `deliver: true`, so non-delivery smoke checks and internal agent runs are no longer rejected with `send blocked by session policy` while outbound delivery remains gated. Fixes #73381. Thanks @wenxu007.

items.title: Cron: persist repaired startup runtime state back to `jobs-state.json` so a valid future `nextRunAtMs` 使用 missing `updatedAtMs` no longer triggers repeated external health-check repairs 之后 网关 restart. 修复 #76461. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Cron: persist repaired startup runtime state back to `jobs-state.json` so a valid future `nextRunAtMs` with missing `updatedAtMs` no longer triggers repeated external health-check repairs after Gateway restart. Fixes #76461. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: Agent/sessions: 保留 terminal lifecycle state 当 final run metadata persists 从 a stale 在-内存 snapshot, preventing `main` sessions 从 staying stuck as running 之后 completed 或 timed-out turns.

items.title: Heartbeat/scheduler: make heartbeat phase scheduling active-hours-aware so the scheduler seeks forward to the first 在-window phase slot 而不是 arming timers 为了 quiet-hours slots 和 relying solely 在 the runtime guard. Non-UTC `activeHours.timezone` values (e.g. `Asia/Shanghai`) 现在 正确地 influence 当 the next heartbeat timer fires, avoiding wasted quiet-hours ticks 和 long dormant gaps 之后 网关 restarts. 修复 #75487. Thanks @amknight.
items.rawTitle: Heartbeat/scheduler: make heartbeat phase scheduling active-hours-aware so the scheduler seeks forward to the first in-window phase slot instead of arming timers for quiet-hours slots and relying solely on the runtime guard. Non-UTC `activeHours.timezone` values (e.g. `Asia/Shanghai`) now correctly influence when the next heartbeat timer fires, avoiding wasted quiet-hours ticks and long dormant gaps after gateway restarts. Fixes #75487. Thanks @amknight.

items.title: Providers/Arcee AI: mark Trinity Large Thinking as 工具-incompatible so main-session runs use the same text-only request shape that made subagent runs recover, avoiding the remaining main-session response-shape mismatch 之后 the #62848 transport failover 修复. 修复 #62851 和 #62847; carries forward #62848. items.title: Control 界面/Talk: 修复 Talk (OpenAI Realtime WebRTC) CORS failure 通过 stripping server-side-only attribution headers (`originator`, `version`, `User-Agent`) 从 浏览器 offer headers; `API.OpenAI.com/v1/realtime/calls` only allows `authorization` 和 `content-type` 在 its CORS preflight, so forwarding these headers caused the 浏览器 SDP exchange to fail. 修复 #76435. Thanks @hclsys.
items.rawTitle: Control UI/Talk: fix Talk (OpenAI Realtime WebRTC) CORS failure by stripping server-side-only attribution headers (`originator`, `version`, `User-Agent`) from browser offer headers; `api.openai.com/v1/realtime/calls` only allows `authorization` and `content-type` in its CORS preflight, so forwarding these headers caused the browser SDP exchange to fail. Fixes #76435. Thanks @hclsys.

items.title: 内存/sessions: emit a `sessionTranscriptUpdate` event 当 `archiveFileOnDisk` rotates a live session transcript 进入 `.jsonl.reset.<iso>` / `.jsonl.deleted.<iso>` / `.jsonl.bak.<iso>`, 和 bypass the delta-bytes / delta-messages threshold gate 在 `processSessionDeltaBatch` 为了 usage-counted archive paths (`.jsonl.reset.<iso>` 和 `.jsonl.deleted.<iso>`). 不适用 the bypass the archive event was forwarded to the listener 但是 dropped at the threshold check, because an archive is a one-shot file-rename mutation rather than an incremental append 和 would typically land below the default `deltaBytes: 100000` / `deltaMessages: 50` reindex thresholds. Archives 现在 feed the 内存 sync incremental 路径 the same way `appendMessage` / compaction / 工具-result rewrite / chat inject / 命令 execution events already do. Refs #56131. Thanks @buyitsydney.
items.rawTitle: Memory/sessions: emit a `sessionTranscriptUpdate` event when `archiveFileOnDisk` rotates a live session transcript into `.jsonl.reset.<iso>` / `.jsonl.deleted.<iso>` / `.jsonl.bak.<iso>`, and bypass the delta-bytes / delta-messages threshold gate in `processSessionDeltaBatch` for usage-counted archive paths (`.jsonl.reset.<iso>` and `.jsonl.deleted.<iso>`). Without the bypass the archive event was forwarded to the listener but dropped at the threshold check, because an archive is a one-shot file-rename mutation rather than an incremental append and would typically land below the default `deltaBytes: 100000` / `deltaMessages: 50` reindex thresholds. Archives now feed the memory sync incremental path the same way `appendMessage` / compaction / tool-result rewrite / chat inject / command execution events already do. Refs #56131. Thanks @buyitsydney.

Related #56815, #44166. (#76311) Thanks @buyitsydney.

Related #56815, #44166. (#76311) Thanks @buyitsydney.

changes.rawTitle: OpenAI/Google Meet: fail realtime voice connection attempts when the socket closes before `session.updated`, avoiding stuck Meet joins waiting on a bridge that never became ready. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: QA/cache: require the full `CACHE-OK <suffix>` marker 之前 live cache probes 停止 retrying, so suffix-only prose cannot hide a broken probe response. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: QA/cache: require the full `CACHE-OK <suffix>` marker before live cache probes stop retrying, so suffix-only prose cannot hide a broken probe response. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Slack/Matrix: 避免 creating blank progress-draft messages 当 `streaming.progress.label=false` 和 progress 工具 lines are disabled. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/Matrix: avoid creating blank progress-draft messages when `streaming.progress.label=false` and progress tool lines are disabled. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: QA/Matrix: keep the mock OpenAI 工具-progress provider aligned 使用 exact-marker Matrix prompts so the hardened live preview scenario still forces a deterministic read 之前 final delivery. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: QA/Matrix: keep the mock OpenAI tool-progress provider aligned with exact-marker Matrix prompts so the hardened live preview scenario still forces a deterministic read before final delivery. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: OpenAI/Google Meet: wait 为了 realtime 语音 `session.已更新` 之前 treating the bridge as connected, so Meet joins do not return 使用 audio queued behind an unconfigured realtime session. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: OpenAI/Google Meet: wait for realtime voice `session.updated` before treating the bridge as connected, so Meet joins do not return with audio queued behind an unconfigured realtime session. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/catalog: merge official external catalog descriptors 进入 partial package channel 配置 metadata, so lagging WeCom/Yuanbao manifests keep their own schema while still exposing host-supplied labels 和 setup text. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/catalog: merge official external catalog descriptors into partial package channel config metadata, so lagging WeCom/Yuanbao manifests keep their own schema while still exposing host-supplied labels and setup text. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/catalog: supplement lagging official external WeCom 和 Yuanbao npm manifests 使用 channel 配置 descriptors 和 declared 工具 contracts 从 the OpenClaw catalog, so trusted package sweeps no longer fail because external package metadata trails the host contract. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/catalog: supplement lagging official external WeCom and Yuanbao npm manifests with channel config descriptors and declared tool contracts from the OpenClaw catalog, so trusted package sweeps no longer fail because external package metadata trails the host contract. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/install: let trusted official `@openclaw/*` catalog installs recover 当 npm `latest` points at a prerelease 通过 falling back to the newest stable version, 或 通过 selecting the newest exact prerelease 为了 prerelease-only launch packages 使用 a warning 而不是 making beta/development 插件 sweeps fail at install time. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: let trusted official `@openclaw/*` catalog installs recover when npm `latest` points at a prerelease by falling back to the newest stable version, or by selecting the newest exact prerelease for prerelease-only launch packages with a warning instead of making beta/development plugin sweeps fail at install time. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Google Meet: grant Chrome media permissions against the actual Meet tab, start the local realtime audio bridge only 之后 Meet joins, expose realtime transcripts 在 status/logs, 和 force explicit audio responses 使用 current OpenAI realtime output-audio events so BlackHole capture does not keep the OpenClaw participant muted 或 silent.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: grant Chrome media permissions against the actual Meet tab, start the local realtime audio bridge only after Meet joins, expose realtime transcripts in status/logs, and force explicit audio responses with current OpenAI realtime output-audio events so BlackHole capture does not keep the OpenClaw participant muted or silent.

changes.title: 内存/LanceDB: declare `apache-arrow` 在 the bundled 内存 插件 package so LanceDB installs include its runtime peer. 修复 #76910. Thanks @afiqfiles-max.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/LanceDB: declare `apache-arrow` in the bundled memory plugin package so LanceDB installs include its runtime peer. Fixes #76910. Thanks @afiqfiles-max.

changes.title: CLI/devices: 重试 explicit device-pair approval 使用 `operator.admin` 之后 a pairing-scope ownership denial, so existing admin-capable paired-device tokens can recover new Control 界面/浏览器 pairing 之后 upgrades 而不是 requiring manual JSON edits. 修复 #76956. Thanks @neo19482.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/devices: retry explicit device-pair approval with `operator.admin` after a pairing-scope ownership denial, so existing admin-capable paired-device tokens can recover new Control UI/browser pairing after upgrades instead of requiring manual JSON edits. Fixes #76956. Thanks @neo19482.

changes.title: Google Meet: use the local call-control microphone button 而不是 disabled remote participant mute buttons, 和 block realtime speech 当 the OpenClaw Meet microphone remains muted.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: use the local call-control microphone button instead of disabled remote participant mute buttons, and block realtime speech when the OpenClaw Meet microphone remains muted.

changes.title: Google Meet: refresh realtime 浏览器 state 期间 status 和 重试 delayed speech 之后 Meet finishes joining, so a just-opened 在-call tab no longer leaves speech stuck behind stale `not-在-call` health.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: refresh realtime browser state during status and retry delayed speech after Meet finishes joining, so a just-opened in-call tab no longer leaves speech stuck behind stale `not-in-call` health.

changes.title: 插件/install: recover the install ledger 从 the managed npm root 当 `插件/installs.json` is empty 或 partial, so reinstalling Discord 和 Codex no longer makes the other installed 插件 disappear.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: recover the install ledger from the managed npm root when `plugins/installs.json` is empty or partial, so reinstalling Discord and Codex no longer makes the other installed plugin disappear.

changes.title: Google Meet: grant Meet media permissions through the Playwright 浏览器 context 当 CDP grants do not affect the attached Chrome page, 和 report 在-call microphone/speaker permission problems 而不是 marking realtime speech ready.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: grant Meet media permissions through the Playwright browser context when CDP grants do not affect the attached Chrome page, and report in-call microphone/speaker permission problems instead of marking realtime speech ready.

changes.title: QA/Slack: fail the live mention-gating scenario 在 any unexpected SUT reply, even 当 the reply does not echo the expected marker. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: QA/Slack: fail the live mention-gating scenario on any unexpected SUT reply, even when the reply does not echo the expected marker. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: QA/Matrix: steer the live 工具-progress preview check away 从 `HEARTBEAT.md` 和 report final preview candidates 当 the live marker reply misses the exact 令牌. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: QA/Matrix: steer the live tool-progress preview check away from `HEARTBEAT.md` and report final preview candidates when the live marker reply misses the exact token. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: QA/Matrix: let the live 工具-progress preview check verify progress replacement events 不适用 depending 在 the preview saying `Working`. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: QA/Matrix: let the live tool-progress preview check verify progress replacement events without depending on the preview saying `Working`. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Tlon: expose `groupInviteAllowlist` 在 the channel 配置 schema 和 clarify that group invite auto-accept fails closed 不适用 an invite allowlist. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Tlon: expose `groupInviteAllowlist` in the channel config schema and clarify that group invite auto-accept fails closed without an invite allowlist. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Control 界面/WebChat: collapse duplicate 在-flight internal text sends onto the active 网关 run so rapid repeat submits do not start fresh `Agent:main:main` dispatches. 修复 #75737. Thanks @dsdsddd1 和 @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/WebChat: collapse duplicate in-flight internal text sends onto the active Gateway run so rapid repeat submits do not start fresh `agent:main:main` dispatches. Fixes #75737. Thanks @dsdsddd1 and @BunsDev.

changes.title: Mattermost: accept the documented `channels.mattermost.streaming` 配置 和 honor `streaming: "off"` 通过 disabling draft preview posts. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Mattermost: accept the documented `channels.mattermost.streaming` config and honor `streaming: "off"` by disabling draft preview posts. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Mattermost: expose streaming progress 配置 labels 和 help text 在 generated channel 配置 metadata so Control 界面/docs can explain the new `channels.mattermost.streaming.progress.*` fields. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Mattermost: expose streaming progress config labels and help text in generated channel config metadata so Control UI/docs can explain the new `channels.mattermost.streaming.progress.*` fields. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Mattermost: honor `channels.mattermost.streaming.progress.toolProgress=false` 在 progress draft mode so compact 工具 status lines stay hidden until final delivery. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Mattermost: honor `channels.mattermost.streaming.progress.toolProgress=false` in progress draft mode so compact tool status lines stay hidden until final delivery. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Microsoft Teams: honor progress draft 工具 lines 在 native Teams progress streams 和 suppress standalone 工具 messages 当 `channels.msteams.streaming.progress.toolProgress=false`. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Microsoft Teams: honor progress draft tool lines in native Teams progress streams and suppress standalone tool messages when `channels.msteams.streaming.progress.toolProgress=false`. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Discord: keep progress draft boundary callbacks bound 期间 streaming replies, so extension lint stays green while progress previews transition 之间 assistant 和 reasoning blocks. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Discord: keep progress draft boundary callbacks bound during streaming replies, so extension lint stays green while progress previews transition between assistant and reasoning blocks. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Discord: 解决 SecretRef-backed bot tokens 从 the active runtime snapshot 为了 named accounts 和 keep unresolved configured tokens 从 crashing status 或 health checks. (#76987) Thanks @joshavant.
changes.rawTitle: Discord: resolve SecretRef-backed bot tokens from the active runtime snapshot for named accounts and keep unresolved configured tokens from crashing status or health checks. (#76987) Thanks @joshavant.

changes.title: Channels/streaming: expose `streaming.progress.label`, `labels`, `maxLines`, 和 `toolProgress` 在 bundled channel 配置 metadata so progress draft settings appear 在 配置, docs, 和 control surfaces. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/streaming: expose `streaming.progress.label`, `labels`, `maxLines`, and `toolProgress` in bundled channel config metadata so progress draft settings appear in config, docs, and control surfaces. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Channels/streaming: normalize whitespace 和 case 为了 `streaming.progress.label: "auto"` so progress draft labels keep using the built-在 label pool 而不是 rendering a literal `auto` title. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/streaming: normalize whitespace and case for `streaming.progress.label: "auto"` so progress draft labels keep using the built-in label pool instead of rendering a literal `auto` title. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/Codex: 保留 Codex-native OAuth认证 routing 为了 `/Codex bind` app-server turns so bound sessions keep the selected Codex 认证 profile 而不是 falling back to public OpenAI credentials. (#76714) Thanks @keshavbotagent.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Codex: preserve Codex-native OAuth routing for `/codex bind` app-server turns so bound sessions keep the selected Codex auth profile instead of falling back to public OpenAI credentials. (#76714) Thanks @keshavbotagent.

changes.title: 网关/install: prefer supported system Node over nvm/fnm/volta/asdf/mise 当 regenerating managed 网关 services, so `网关 install --force` no longer recreates service definitions that 诊断工具 immediately flags as version-manager-backed. 修复 #76339. Thanks @brokemac79.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/install: prefer supported system Node over nvm/fnm/volta/asdf/mise when regenerating managed gateway services, so `gateway install --force` no longer recreates service definitions that doctor immediately flags as version-manager-backed. Fixes #76339. Thanks @brokemac79.

changes.title: Cron/status: render explicit `delivery.mode: "none"` jobs as no-delivery previews 和 label cron session history distinctly 而不是 showing fallback delivery 或 direct-session rows. 修复 #76945.
changes.rawTitle: Cron/status: render explicit `delivery.mode: "none"` jobs as no-delivery previews and label cron session history distinctly instead of showing fallback delivery or direct-session rows. Fixes #76945.

changes.title: 网关/usage: serve `usage.cost` 和 `sessions.usage` 从 a durable transcript aggregate cache 使用 lock-safe background refreshes 和 localized stale-cache status, so large usage views 避免 repeated full scans. (#76650) Thanks @Marvinthebored.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/usage: serve `usage.cost` and `sessions.usage` from a durable transcript aggregate cache with lock-safe background refreshes and localized stale-cache status, so large usage views avoid repeated full scans. (#76650) Thanks @Marvinthebored.

changes.title: 插件/hooks: let `插件.entries.<id>.hooks.timeoutMs` 和 `插件.entries.<id>.hooks.timeouts` bound 插件 typed hooks 从 operator 配置, so slow hooks can be tuned 不适用 patching installed 插件 code. 修复 #76778. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/hooks: let `plugins.entries.<id>.hooks.timeoutMs` and `plugins.entries.<id>.hooks.timeouts` bound plugin typed hooks from operator config, so slow hooks can be tuned without patching installed plugin code. Fixes #76778. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Telegram: 添加 `channels.Telegram.mediaGroupFlushMs` at the top level 和 per account so operators can tune album buffering 而不是 being stuck 使用 the hard-coded 500ms media-group flush window. 修复 #76149. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram: add `channels.telegram.mediaGroupFlushMs` at the top level and per account so operators can tune album buffering instead of being stuck with the hard-coded 500ms media-group flush window. Fixes #76149. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 配置/messages: coerce boolean `messages.visibleReplies` 和 `messages.groupChat.visibleReplies` values to the documented enum modes so an intuitive toggle no longer invalidates 配置 和 drops channel startup. 修复 #75390. Thanks @scottgl9.
changes.rawTitle: Config/messages: coerce boolean `messages.visibleReplies` and `messages.groupChat.visibleReplies` values to the documented enum modes so an intuitive toggle no longer invalidates config and drops channel startup. Fixes #75390. Thanks @scottgl9.

changes.title: Agent/network: 允许 trusted web-search providers 和 configured 模型-provider hosts to work behind Surge/Clash/sing-box fake-IP DNS 通过 accepting RFC 2544 和 IPv6 ULA synthetic answers only 为了 the request's scoped hostname, 不适用 broad private-network access. Refs #76530 和 #76549. Thanks @zqchris.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/network: allow trusted web-search providers and configured model-provider hosts to work behind Surge/Clash/sing-box fake-IP DNS by accepting RFC 2544 and IPv6 ULA synthetic answers only for the request's scoped hostname, without broad private-network access. Refs #76530 and #76549. Thanks @zqchris.

changes.title: Providers: honor env-代理 settings 为了 guarded provider 模型 fetches 当 no explicit dispatcher policy is configured, preserving explicit transport overrides. 修复 #70453. (#72480) Thanks @mjamiv.
changes.rawTitle: Providers: honor env-proxy settings for guarded provider model fetches when no explicit dispatcher policy is configured, preserving explicit transport overrides. Fixes #70453. (#72480) Thanks @mjamiv.

changes.title: Web fetch: 添加 a default-off `tools.web.fetch.useTrustedEnvProxy` opt-在 为了 代理-only environments so `web_fetch` can let an operator-controlled HTTP(S) 代理 解决 DNS while preserving default strict DNS pinning 和 hostname policy checks. Refs #58034 和 #62560. Thanks @cosmicnet 和 @mjamiv.
changes.rawTitle: Web fetch: add a default-off `tools.web.fetch.useTrustedEnvProxy` opt-in for proxy-only environments so `web_fetch` can let an operator-controlled HTTP(S) proxy resolve DNS while preserving default strict DNS pinning and hostname policy checks. Refs #58034 and #62560. Thanks @cosmicnet and @mjamiv.

changes.title: 飞书: accept 和 honor `channels.飞书.blockStreaming` at the top level 和 per account, while keeping the legacy default off so 飞书 cards no longer reject documented 配置 或 静默地 drop block replies. 修复 #75555. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu: accept and honor `channels.feishu.blockStreaming` at the top level and per account, while keeping the legacy default off so Feishu cards no longer reject documented config or silently drop block replies. Fixes #75555. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/更新: 避免 `launchctl kickstart -k` immediately 之后 fresh macOS 更新 bootstraps, 和 unlink dangling global 插件-runtime symlinks 期间 packaged postinstall 和 `诊断工具 --修复` so upgrades no longer SIGTERM the newly booted 网关 或 leave bundled 插件 imports pointed at pruned `插件-runtime-deps` trees. Completes #76261 和 修复 #76466. (#76929)
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/update: avoid `launchctl kickstart -k` immediately after fresh macOS update bootstraps, and unlink dangling global plugin-runtime symlinks during packaged postinstall and `doctor --fix` so upgrades no longer SIGTERM the newly booted Gateway or leave bundled plugin imports pointed at pruned `plugin-runtime-deps` trees. Completes #76261 and fixes #76466. (#76929)

changes.title: Google Chat: normalize custom Google 认证 transport headers 之前 google-认证/gaxios interceptors run, restoring Webhook 令牌 verification 当 certificate retrieval expects Fetch `Headers`. 修复 #76742. Thanks @donbowman.
changes.rawTitle: Google Chat: normalize custom Google auth transport headers before google-auth/gaxios interceptors run, restoring webhook token verification when certificate retrieval expects Fetch `Headers`. Fixes #76742. Thanks @donbowman.

changes.title: 诊断工具/插件: reset stale `插件.slots.内存` 和 `插件.slots.contextEngine` references 期间 `诊断工具 --修复`, so cleanup 的 missing 插件 配置 does not leave unrecoverable slot owners behind. 修复 #76550 和 #76551. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/plugins: reset stale `plugins.slots.memory` and `plugins.slots.contextEngine` references during `doctor --fix`, so cleanup of missing plugin config does not leave unrecoverable slot owners behind. Fixes #76550 and #76551. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Docs/WhatsApp: merge the duplicate top-level `web` objects 在 the 网关 channel 配置 example so copy-pasted WhatsApp 配置 keeps both `web.WhatsApp` 和 reconnect settings. 修复 #76619. Thanks @WadydX.
changes.rawTitle: Docs/WhatsApp: merge the duplicate top-level `web` objects in the gateway channel config example so copy-pasted WhatsApp config keeps both `web.whatsapp` and reconnect settings. Fixes #76619. Thanks @WadydX.

changes.title: 插件/Anthropic: expose Claude thinking profiles 从 the bundled provider-policy artifact so non-runtime callers keep Opus 4.7 `adaptive`, `xhigh`, 和 `max` 而不是 downgrading to `high`. 修复 #76779. Thanks @tomascupr 和 @iAbhi001.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/Anthropic: expose Claude thinking profiles from the bundled provider-policy artifact so non-runtime callers keep Opus 4.7 `adaptive`, `xhigh`, and `max` instead of downgrading to `high`. Fixes #76779. Thanks @tomascupr and @iAbhi001.

changes.title: 插件/tools: honor `tools.alsoAllow` as an optional 插件 工具 discovery hint 不适用 treating its internal 允许-all default as permission to load every manifest-marked optional 插件 工具. 修复 #76616.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/tools: honor `tools.alsoAllow` as an optional plugin tool discovery hint without treating its internal allow-all default as permission to load every manifest-marked optional plugin tool. Fixes #76616.

changes.title: Discord/native commands: skip slash-命令 registration 和 cleanup REST calls 当 `channels.Discord.commands.native=false`, letting low-power gateways start 不适用 waiting 在 disabled native-命令 lifecycle requests. 修复 #76202. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/native commands: skip slash-command registration and cleanup REST calls when `channels.discord.commands.native=false`, letting low-power gateways start without waiting on disabled native-command lifecycle requests. Fixes #76202. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: CLI/插件: reject unowned 命令 roots such as `openclaw foo` 之前 managed 代理 startup 和 full 插件 CLI runtime loading while preserving manifest-owned 和 CLI-metadata-owned 插件 commands. 修复 #75287. Thanks @neilofneils404.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/plugins: reject unowned command roots such as `openclaw foo` before managed proxy startup and full plugin CLI runtime loading while preserving manifest-owned and CLI-metadata-owned plugin commands. Fixes #75287. Thanks @neilofneils404.

changes.title: CLI/message: skip local configured-channel 插件 preload 为了 explicit 网关-owned message actions, letting normalized CLI delivery delegate to the 网关 不适用 initializing channel runtime 在 the short-lived CLI process. 修复 #75477.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/message: skip local configured-channel plugin preload for explicit gateway-owned message actions, letting normalized CLI delivery delegate to the gateway without initializing channel runtime in the short-lived CLI process. Fixes #75477.

changes.title: 插件/commands: normalize empty 插件 命令 handler results 和 let Telegram native 插件 commands send the empty-response fallback 而不是 throwing 当 a handler returns `undefined`. 修复 #74800. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/commands: normalize empty plugin command handler results and let Telegram native plugin commands send the empty-response fallback instead of throwing when a handler returns `undefined`. Fixes #74800. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/tools: cold-load selected 插件 工具 registries 当 the active registry only has partial 工具 coverage, so wildcard-expanded allowlists no longer hide installed 插件 tools 从 `tools.effective`. 修复 #76780. Thanks @lilesjtu.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/tools: cold-load selected plugin tool registries when the active registry only has partial tool coverage, so wildcard-expanded allowlists no longer hide installed plugin tools from `tools.effective`. Fixes #76780. Thanks @lilesjtu.

changes.title: 插件/tools: compare cached 和 runtime 插件 工具 name conflicts 使用 normalized core 工具 names, so case variants 的 core tools are blocked 而不是 leaking duplicate 工具 registrations. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/tools: compare cached and runtime plugin tool name conflicts with normalized core tool names, so case variants of core tools are blocked instead of leaking duplicate tool registrations. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/OpenRouter: advertise DeepSeek V4 thinking levels, including `xhigh` 和 `max`, through the runtime 和 lightweight provider policy surfaces so `/think` validation no longer rejects OpenRouter-routed DeepSeek V4 模型. 修复 #74788. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/OpenRouter: advertise DeepSeek V4 thinking levels, including `xhigh` and `max`, through the runtime and lightweight provider policy surfaces so `/think` validation no longer rejects OpenRouter-routed DeepSeek V4 models. Fixes #74788. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Status/sessions: ignore malformed non-string persisted session provider/模型 metadata 而不是 throwing while rendering status summaries. 修复 #76206. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Status/sessions: ignore malformed non-string persisted session provider/model metadata instead of throwing while rendering status summaries. Fixes #76206. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: CLI/配置: 移除 only the targeted array element 为了 `openclaw 配置 unset array[index]` 而不是 replaying the unset 期间 配置 write 和 deleting the shifted next element. 修复 #76290. Thanks @SymbolStar 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/config: remove only the targeted array element for `openclaw config unset array[index]` instead of replaying the unset during config write and deleting the shifted next element. Fixes #76290. Thanks @SymbolStar and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/语音-call: treat abnormal local 网关 close code 1006 as a standalone CLI fallback case, so `voicecall smoke` 和 related commands can still run the provider check 路径 当 the 网关 socket closes 之前 returning a response.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/voice-call: treat abnormal local Gateway close code 1006 as a standalone CLI fallback case, so `voicecall smoke` and related commands can still run the provider check path when the Gateway socket closes before returning a response.

changes.title: CLI/诊断工具: migrate legacy per-channel `streaming.progress` 配置 进入 `streaming.preview.toolProgress`, so upgrades 使用 stale Discord 或 Telegram streaming keys validate 重新 而不是 blocking 插件 commands.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/doctor: migrate legacy per-channel `streaming.progress` config into `streaming.preview.toolProgress`, so upgrades with stale Discord or Telegram streaming keys validate again instead of blocking plugin commands.

changes.title: 插件/release: reject ClawHub code-插件 packages that contain TypeScript runtime entries 不适用 compiled `dist/*.js` output, 和 run package-local runtime-build checks 期间 npm 和 ClawHub 插件 release previews.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/release: reject ClawHub code-plugin packages that contain TypeScript runtime entries without compiled `dist/*.js` output, and run package-local runtime-build checks during npm and ClawHub plugin release previews.

changes.title: 插件/更新: keep beta-installed OpenClaw package updates 在 the beta 插件 channel even 当 配置 still says stable, so Discord 和 other externalized 插件 更新 从 compiled `@beta` packages 而不是 stale source-only `latest` artifacts.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/update: keep beta-installed OpenClaw package updates on the beta plugin channel even when config still says stable, so Discord and other externalized plugins update from compiled `@beta` packages instead of stale source-only `latest` artifacts.

changes.title: Agent/tools: 停止 treating `tools.deny: ["write"]` as an implicit `apply_patch` deny; operators who want to block patch writes should deny `apply_patch` 或 `group:fs` explicitly. 修复 #76749. (#76795) Thanks @Nek-12 和 @hclsys.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/tools: stop treating `tools.deny: ["write"]` as an implicit `apply_patch` deny; operators who want to block patch writes should deny `apply_patch` or `group:fs` explicitly. Fixes #76749. (#76795) Thanks @Nek-12 and @hclsys.

changes.title: 插件/release: verify published 插件 npm tarballs expose compiled runtime entries 之后 publish, catching TS-only package artifacts 之前 release closeout. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/release: verify published plugin npm tarballs expose compiled runtime entries after publish, catching TS-only package artifacts before release closeout. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: CLI/message: exit cleanly 使用 a nonzero status 当 message-命令 插件 registry loading fails 之前 dispatch, preventing `openclaw-message` children 从 staying alive 之后 插件 load errors. 修复 #76168.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/message: exit cleanly with a nonzero status when message-command plugin registry loading fails before dispatch, preventing `openclaw-message` children from staying alive after plugin load errors. Fixes #76168.

changes.title: 插件/配置: report configured 插件 that are present 但是 blocked 通过 路径-safety checks as blocked 而不是 stale `插件 not found` entries, 和 deduplicate repeated blocked-candidate warnings 期间 discovery. 修复 #76144. Thanks @mayank6136.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/config: report configured plugins that are present but blocked by path-safety checks as blocked instead of stale `plugin not found` entries, and deduplicate repeated blocked-candidate warnings during discovery. Fixes #76144. Thanks @mayank6136.

changes.title: 网关/更新: recover an installed-但是-unloaded macOS LaunchAgent 之后 package updates, rerun 网关 health/version/channel readiness checks, 和 print restart, reinstall, 和 rollback guidance 之前 reporting 更新 failure. (#76790) Thanks @jonathanlindsay.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/update: recover an installed-but-unloaded macOS LaunchAgent after package updates, rerun Gateway health/version/channel readiness checks, and print restart, reinstall, and rollback guidance before reporting update failure. (#76790) Thanks @jonathanlindsay.

changes.title: CLI/插件: explain 当 a missing 插件 命令 alias belongs to a bundled 插件 that is disabled 通过 default, including the `openclaw 插件 启用 <插件>` repair 命令. (#76835)
changes.rawTitle: CLI/plugins: explain when a missing plugin command alias belongs to a bundled plugin that is disabled by default, including the `openclaw plugins enable <plugin>` repair command. (#76835)

changes.title: 网关/Bonjour: auto-start LAN multicast discovery only 在 macOS hosts while preserving explicit `openclaw 插件 启用 bonjour` startup elsewhere, so Linux servers 和 containers that do not need LAN discovery 避免 default mDNS probing 和 watchdog churn. Refs #74209.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/Bonjour: auto-start LAN multicast discovery only on macOS hosts while preserving explicit `openclaw plugins enable bonjour` startup elsewhere, so Linux servers and containers that do not need LAN discovery avoid default mDNS probing and watchdog churn. Refs #74209.

changes.title: 网关/macOS: 停止 `诊断工具` 和 LaunchAgent recovery 从 running `launchctl kickstart -k` 之后 a fresh bootstrap, avoiding an immediate SIGTERM 的 the just-started 网关 while still nudging already-loaded launchd jobs. 修复 #76261. Thanks @solosage1.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/macOS: stop `doctor` and LaunchAgent recovery from running `launchctl kickstart -k` after a fresh bootstrap, avoiding an immediate SIGTERM of the just-started gateway while still nudging already-loaded launchd jobs. Fixes #76261. Thanks @solosage1.

changes.title: Google Meet: route stateful CLI session commands through the 网关-owned runtime so joined realtime sessions survive 之后 the starting CLI process exits. 修复 #76344. Thanks @coltonharris-wq.
changes.rawTitle: Google Meet: route stateful CLI session commands through the gateway-owned runtime so joined realtime sessions survive after the starting CLI process exits. Fixes #76344. Thanks @coltonharris-wq.

changes.title: 内存/status: split builtin sqlite-vec store readiness 从 embedding-provider readiness 在 `内存 status --deep` 和 `openclaw status`, so local vector-store failures no longer look like provider failures 和 provider failures no longer hide a healthy local vector store.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/status: split builtin sqlite-vec store readiness from embedding-provider readiness in `memory status --deep` and `openclaw status`, so local vector-store failures no longer look like provider failures and provider failures no longer hide a healthy local vector store.

changes.title: CLI/诊断工具: trust a ready 网关 内存 probe 当 CLI-side active 内存 backend resolution is unavailable, preventing false "No active 内存 插件 is registered" warnings 为了 healthy runtime setups. 修复 #76792. Thanks @som-686.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/doctor: trust a ready gateway memory probe when CLI-side active memory backend resolution is unavailable, preventing false "No active memory plugin is registered" warnings for healthy runtime setups. Fixes #76792. Thanks @som-686.

changes.title: 内存/status: keep plain `openclaw 内存 status` 和 `openclaw 内存 status --json` 在 the cheap read-only 路径 通过 reserving vector 和 embedding provider probes 为了 `--deep` 或 `--index`. 修复 #76769. Thanks @daruire.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/status: keep plain `openclaw memory status` and `openclaw memory status --json` on the cheap read-only path by reserving vector and embedding provider probes for `--deep` or `--index`. Fixes #76769. Thanks @daruire.

changes.title: Telegram: suppress stale same-session replies 当 a newer accepted message arrives 之前 an older 在-flight Telegram dispatch finalizes. 修复 #76642. Thanks @chinar-amrutkar.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram: suppress stale same-session replies when a newer accepted message arrives before an older in-flight Telegram dispatch finalizes. Fixes #76642. Thanks @chinar-amrutkar.

changes.title: 网关/diagnostics: throttle repeated long-running active-work session warnings so healthy cron 或 subagent runs no longer print the same `recovery=none` line every heartbeat.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/diagnostics: throttle repeated long-running active-work session warnings so healthy cron or subagent runs no longer print the same `recovery=none` line every heartbeat.

changes.title: 网关/diagnostics: keep non-blocking active-work 和 transient event-loop max-spike liveness diagnostics out 的 the default 网关 console while preserving structured diagnostic events 和 warnings 为了 queued, stalled, 和 recovery-eligible work.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/diagnostics: keep non-blocking active-work and transient event-loop max-spike liveness diagnostics out of the default gateway console while preserving structured diagnostic events and warnings for queued, stalled, and recovery-eligible work.

changes.title: Slack: collapse routine Socket Mode pong-超时 reconnects 进入 one OpenClaw reconnect line 和 suppress the duplicate Slack SDK pong warning.
changes.rawTitle: Slack: collapse routine Socket Mode pong-timeout reconnects into one OpenClaw reconnect line and suppress the duplicate Slack SDK pong warning.

changes.title: 网关/diagnostics: abort-drain embedded runs 之后 an extended no-progress stall so a single dead session no longer leaves queued Discord/channel turns blocked behind repeated `recovery=none` liveness warnings.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/diagnostics: abort-drain embedded runs after an extended no-progress stall so a single dead session no longer leaves queued Discord/channel turns blocked behind repeated `recovery=none` liveness warnings.

changes.title: 插件/ClawHub: accept the live artifact resolver `kind`/`sha256` field names alongside the typed `artifactKind`/`artifactSha256` form so `ClawHub:` installs 的 npm-pack 和 legacy ZIP packages no longer miss downloadable artifacts. Thanks @romneyda.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/ClawHub: accept the live artifact resolver `kind`/`sha256` field names alongside the typed `artifactKind`/`artifactSha256` form so `clawhub:` installs of npm-pack and legacy ZIP packages no longer miss downloadable artifacts. Thanks @romneyda.

changes.title: Control 界面/Sessions: 避免 full `sessions.list` reloads 为了 chat-turn `sessions.changed` payloads, so large session stores no longer 添加 multi-second delays while chat responses are being delivered. (#76676) Thanks @VACInc.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/Sessions: avoid full `sessions.list` reloads for chat-turn `sessions.changed` payloads, so large session stores no longer add multi-second delays while chat responses are being delivered. (#76676) Thanks @VACInc.

changes.title: 网关/watch: run `诊断工具 --修复 --non-interactive` once 和 重试 当 the dev 网关 child exits 期间 startup, so stale local 插件 install/配置 state does not leave the tmux watch session disappearing 不适用 a repair attempt.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/watch: run `doctor --fix --non-interactive` once and retry when the dev Gateway child exits during startup, so stale local plugin install/config state does not leave the tmux watch session disappearing without a repair attempt.

changes.title: 诊断工具/Telegram: warn 当 selected Telegram quote replies can suppress `streaming.preview.toolProgress`, 和 document the `replyToMode` trade-off 不适用 changing runtime delivery. 修复 #73487. Thanks @GodsBoy.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/Telegram: warn when selected Telegram quote replies can suppress `streaming.preview.toolProgress`, and document the `replyToMode` trade-off without changing runtime delivery. Fixes #73487. Thanks @GodsBoy.

changes.title: Channels/Discord: send a best-effort native typing cue immediately 之后 an inbound DM is accepted, so slow pre-dispatch turns show Discord liveness 之前 queueing, context assembly, 模型, 或 工具 work starts. 修复 #76417. Thanks @mlopez14.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/Discord: send a best-effort native typing cue immediately after an inbound DM is accepted, so slow pre-dispatch turns show Discord liveness before queueing, context assembly, model, or tool work starts. Fixes #76417. Thanks @mlopez14.

changes.title: 插件/install: reject source-only TypeScript package installs 和 installed 插件 packages that are missing compiled runtime output, so broken npm artifacts fail at install/discovery time 而不是 falling through jiti 和 surfacing later as unavailable providers. 修复 #76720.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: reject source-only TypeScript package installs and installed plugin packages that are missing compiled runtime output, so broken npm artifacts fail at install/discovery time instead of falling through jiti and surfacing later as unavailable providers. Fixes #76720.

changes.title: 插件/配置: deduplicate identical manifest compatibility diagnostics 当 an explicitly configured 插件 overrides another discovered candidate, so external channel 插件 do not print the same missing `channelConfigs` warning repeatedly 期间 install 和 启用. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/config: deduplicate identical manifest compatibility diagnostics when an explicitly configured plugin overrides another discovered candidate, so external channel plugins do not print the same missing `channelConfigs` warning repeatedly during install and enable. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Discord/status: honor explicit `messages.statusReactions.enabled: true` 在 工具-only guild channels so queued ack reactions can progress through thinking/done lifecycle reactions 而不是 stopping at the initial emoji. Thanks @Marvinthebored.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/status: honor explicit `messages.statusReactions.enabled: true` in tool-only guild channels so queued ack reactions can progress through thinking/done lifecycle reactions instead of stopping at the initial emoji. Thanks @Marvinthebored.

changes.title: Discord/native commands: compare Discord-normalized slash-命令 descriptions 和 localized descriptions 期间 reconcile so CJK 或 multiline 命令 text no longer triggers redundant startup PATCH bursts 和 rate-limit 429s. 修复 #76587. Thanks @zhengsx.
changes.rawTitle: Discord/native commands: compare Discord-normalized slash-command descriptions and localized descriptions during reconcile so CJK or multiline command text no longer triggers redundant startup PATCH bursts and rate-limit 429s. Fixes #76587. Thanks @zhengsx.

changes.title: Agent/OpenAI: omit Chat Completions `reasoning_effort` 为了 `gpt-5.4-mini` only 当 function tools are present while preserving 工具-free Chat 和 Responses reasoning 支持, preventing Telegram-routed fallback runs 从 hanging 之后 OpenAI rejects 工具 payloads. 修复 #76176. Thanks @ThisIsAdilah 和 @chinar-amrutkar.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/OpenAI: omit Chat Completions `reasoning_effort` for `gpt-5.4-mini` only when function tools are present while preserving tool-free Chat and Responses reasoning support, preventing Telegram-routed fallback runs from hanging after OpenAI rejects tool payloads. Fixes #76176. Thanks @ThisIsAdilah and @chinar-amrutkar.

changes.title: Telegram: 复用 the successful startup `getMe` probe 为了 grammY polling startup 和 continue 进入 `getUpdates` 之后 recoverable `deleteWebhook` cleanup failures, reducing high-latency Bot API control-plane calls 之前 long polling starts. Refs #76388. Thanks @jackiedepp.
changes.rawTitle: Telegram: reuse the successful startup `getMe` probe for grammY polling startup and continue into `getUpdates` after recoverable `deleteWebhook` cleanup failures, reducing high-latency Bot API control-plane calls before long polling starts. Refs #76388. Thanks @jackiedepp.

changes.title: 网关/diagnostics: merge session id/密钥 aliases 在 diagnostic session state 和 activity tracking so completed runs no longer leave stale queued work behind that keeps liveness samples at warning level.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/diagnostics: merge session id/key aliases in diagnostic session state and activity tracking so completed runs no longer leave stale queued work behind that keeps liveness samples at warning level.

changes.title: Agent/模型: forward 模型 `maxTokens` as the default output-令牌 limit 为了 OpenAI-compatible Responses 和 Completions transports 当 no runtime override is provided, preventing provider defaults 从 静默地 truncating larger outputs. (#76645) Thanks @joeyfrasier.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/models: forward model `maxTokens` as the default output-token limit for OpenAI-compatible Responses and Completions transports when no runtime override is provided, preventing provider defaults from silently truncating larger outputs. (#76645) Thanks @joeyfrasier.

changes.title: macOS CLI/onboarding: honor sensitive wizard text steps 在 `openclaw-mac wizard` 使用 termios no-echo input, suppressing saved credential previews while preserving long API keys 和 网关 tokens. 修复 #76698. Thanks @anurag-bg-neu 和 @sallyom.
changes.rawTitle: macOS CLI/onboarding: honor sensitive wizard text steps in `openclaw-mac wizard` with termios no-echo input, suppressing saved credential previews while preserving long API keys and gateway tokens. Fixes #76698. Thanks @anurag-bg-neu and @sallyom.

changes.title: Control 界面/Skills: 修复 skill detail modal 静默地 failing to open 在 all browsers 通过 deferring `showModal()` until the dialog element is connected to the DOM; the Lit `ref` callback fired 之前 connection causing a `DOMException: HTMLDialogElement.showModal: Dialog element is not connected` 在 every skill click. Thanks @nickmopen.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/Skills: fix skill detail modal silently failing to open in all browsers by deferring `showModal()` until the dialog element is connected to the DOM; the Lit `ref` callback fired before connection causing a `DOMException: HTMLDialogElement.showModal: Dialog element is not connected` on every skill click. Thanks @nickmopen.

changes.title: 网关/更新: run `诊断工具 --non-interactive --修复` 之后 Control 界面 global package updates 之前 reporting success, so legacy 配置 is migrated 之前 the 网关 restart. Thanks @stevenchouai.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/update: run `doctor --non-interactive --fix` after Control UI global package updates before reporting success, so legacy config is migrated before the gateway restart. Thanks @stevenchouai.

changes.title: 网关/cron: 停止 a lazy cron startup that loses a hot-reload race, preventing the old cron service 从 starting 之后 reload has already replaced cron state.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/cron: stop a lazy cron startup that loses a hot-reload race, preventing the old cron service from starting after reload has already replaced cron state.

changes.title: CLI/插件: warn 当 npm 插件 installs remain shadowed 通过 a failing 配置-selected source 和 surface the repair 路径 在 `插件 诊断工具`. Thanks @LindalyX-Lee.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/plugins: warn when npm plugin installs remain shadowed by a failing config-selected source and surface the repair path in `plugins doctor`. Thanks @LindalyX-Lee.

changes.title: Agent/Telegram: 保留 explicit reply 和 quote context 在 embedded 模型 prompts 不适用 letting quoted text drive prompt-local image loading. 修复 #76419. (#76659) Thanks @cheechnd.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/Telegram: preserve explicit reply and quote context in embedded model prompts without letting quoted text drive prompt-local image loading. Fixes #76419. (#76659) Thanks @cheechnd.

changes.title: Active 内存: apply `setupGraceTimeoutMs` to the embedded recall runner as well as the outer prompt-build watchdog, so very-cold first recalls keep the configured setup grace end-to-end. (#74480) Thanks @volcano303.
changes.rawTitle: Active Memory: apply `setupGraceTimeoutMs` to the embedded recall runner as well as the outer prompt-build watchdog, so very-cold first recalls keep the configured setup grace end-to-end. (#74480) Thanks @volcano303.

changes.title: Channels/飞书: cap how long the per-chat sequential queue blocks subsequent same-密钥 tasks behind a single 在-flight task (5 min default), so a single hung dispatch no longer leaves later same-chat messages 在 `queued` state until 网关 restart; the stuck task continues running 但是 is evicted 从 the blocking chain 和 a warning is logged. 修复 #70133. (#76687) Thanks @martingarramon 和 @bek91.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/Feishu: cap how long the per-chat sequential queue blocks subsequent same-key tasks behind a single in-flight task (5 min default), so a single hung dispatch no longer leaves later same-chat messages in `queued` state until gateway restart; the stuck task continues running but is evicted from the blocking chain and a warning is logged. Fixes #70133. (#76687) Thanks @martingarramon and @bek91.

changes.title: Active 内存: skip scoped Telegram forum-topic conversation ids (containing `:`) 当 resolving the embedded recall run channel, falling back to `messageProvider` instead, so Active 内存 no longer throws a bundled-插件 dirName validation 错误 在 forum-topic sessions. 修复 #76704.
changes.rawTitle: Active Memory: skip scoped Telegram forum-topic conversation ids (containing `:`) when resolving the embedded recall run channel, falling back to `messageProvider` instead, so Active Memory no longer throws a bundled-plugin dirName validation error in forum-topic sessions. Fixes #76704.

changes.title: Agent/tools: defer automatic PDF 模型/认证 resolution until the PDF 工具 is used, keeping Agent-turn 工具 prep 从 probing 认证 profiles 在 messages 不适用 PDFs while preserving explicit PDF 模型 registration. 修复 #76644. Thanks @hclsys.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/tools: defer automatic PDF model/auth resolution until the PDF tool is used, keeping agent-turn tool prep from probing auth profiles on messages without PDFs while preserving explicit PDF model registration. Fixes #76644. Thanks @hclsys.

changes.title: CLI/配置: keep JSON dry-run patches validating touched channel configuration against bundled channel schemas even 当 the patch only contains SecretRef objects.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/config: keep JSON dry-run patches validating touched channel configuration against bundled channel schemas even when the patch only contains SecretRef objects.

changes.title: 插件/tools: keep disabled bundled 工具 插件 out 的 explicit runtime allowlist ownership 和 fall back 从 loaded-但是-empty channel registries to 工具-bearing 插件 registries, so Active 内存 can use bundled `内存-core` search/get tools even 当 `内存-lancedb` is disabled. 修复 #76603. Thanks @jwong-art.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/tools: keep disabled bundled tool plugins out of explicit runtime allowlist ownership and fall back from loaded-but-empty channel registries to tool-bearing plugin registries, so Active Memory can use bundled `memory-core` search/get tools even when `memory-lancedb` is disabled. Fixes #76603. Thanks @jwong-art.

changes.title: 插件/install: run `npm install` 从 the managed npm-root manifest so installing one `@openclaw/*` 插件 preserves already installed sibling 插件 而不是 pruning them. 修复 #76571. (#76602) Thanks @byungskers 和 @crpol.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: run `npm install` from the managed npm-root manifest so installing one `@openclaw/*` plugin preserves already installed sibling plugins instead of pruning them. Fixes #76571. (#76602) Thanks @byungskers and @crpol.

changes.title: 插件/context-engine: include the selected `插件.slots.contextEngine` 插件 在 the 网关 startup load plan so external context-engine 插件 不适用 `activation.onStartup` 在 their manifest are loaded 之前 any Agent turn resolves the active engine; prevents the "Context engine X is not registered; falling back to default engine legacy" warning 之后 网关 startup. 修复 #76576. Thanks @hclsys.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/context-engine: include the selected `plugins.slots.contextEngine` plugin in the gateway startup load plan so external context-engine plugins without `activation.onStartup` in their manifest are loaded before any agent turn resolves the active engine; prevents the "Context engine X is not registered; falling back to default engine legacy" warning after gateway startup. Fixes #76576. Thanks @hclsys.

changes.title: 插件/tools: restore 在-demand registry load 为了 路径-based 插件 (origin "配置") so 工具 factories registered via `插件.load.paths` are resolved at Agent request time 当 no pre-warmed channel registry is present; prevents "unknown method" errors 之后 网关 startup. 修复 #76598. Thanks @hclsys.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/tools: restore on-demand registry load for path-based plugins (origin "config") so tool factories registered via `plugins.load.paths` are resolved at agent request time when no pre-warmed channel registry is present; prevents "unknown method" errors after gateway startup. Fixes #76598. Thanks @hclsys.

changes.title: 插件/hooks: include explicitly enabled hook-capable 插件 在 the 网关 startup runtime scope so embedded PI runs can see their `before_prompt_build` 和 `agent_end` hooks. 修复 #76649. Thanks @wwf3045 和 @MkDev11.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/hooks: include explicitly enabled hook-capable plugins in the Gateway startup runtime scope so embedded PI runs can see their `before_prompt_build` and `agent_end` hooks. Fixes #76649. Thanks @wwf3045 and @MkDev11.

changes.title: 插件/OpenCode: expose Claude thinking profiles through the lightweight provider policy surface so directive 和 session validation keep `xhigh`, `adaptive`, 和 `max` 为了 `opencode/claude-opus-4-7` 而不是 remapping `xhigh` to `high`. 修复 #76648. Thanks @aaajiao.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/OpenCode: expose Claude thinking profiles through the lightweight provider policy surface so directive and session validation keep `xhigh`, `adaptive`, and `max` for `opencode/claude-opus-4-7` instead of remapping `xhigh` to `high`. Fixes #76648. Thanks @aaajiao.

changes.title: Channels/QQ Bot: 解决 structured `clientSecret` SecretRefs 之前 QQ 令牌 exchange, expose the QQ Bot secret contract to secrets tooling, 和 reject legacy `secretref:/...` marker strings. (#74772) Thanks @xialonglee.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/QQ Bot: resolve structured `clientSecret` SecretRefs before QQ token exchange, expose the QQ Bot secret contract to secrets tooling, and reject legacy `secretref:/...` marker strings. (#74772) Thanks @xialonglee.

changes.title: Agent: keep active streamed provider replies alive 通过 refreshing guarded fetch timeouts 在 raw body chunks 和 surface true prompt stream timeouts as explicit errors 而不是 partial assistant fragments. 修复 #76307. (#76633) Thanks @MkDev11.
changes.rawTitle: Agents: keep active streamed provider replies alive by refreshing guarded fetch timeouts on raw body chunks and surface true prompt stream timeouts as explicit errors instead of partial assistant fragments. Fixes #76307. (#76633) Thanks @MkDev11.
