changes.rawTitle: Plugins/externalization: keep official ACPX, Google Chat, and LINE install specs on production package names, leaving beta-tag probing to the explicit OpenClaw beta update channel. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: CLI/doctor: keep missing-plugin repair from overriding official catalog metadata with runtime fallbacks, so ACPX repairs preserve the official npm spec during the externalization rollout. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: CLI/doctor: match stale bundled-plugin install records by exact parsed package name so doctor does not remove external npm or ClawHub records that only share an OpenClaw package-name prefix.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/catalog: preserve ClawHub install specs when generating the packaged channel catalog so future storepack-first channel plugins keep their remote source instead of becoming npm-only. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/catalog: pin bare npm specs from prerelease external channel catalog entries to the catalog entry version, so beta catalogs do not silently install the latest stable package.

changes.title: Control 界面/Talk: 修复 Talk (OpenAI Realtime WebRTC) CORS failure 通过 stripping server-side-only attribution headers (`originator`, `version`, `User-Agent`) 从 浏览器 offer headers; `API.OpenAI.com/v1/realtime/calls` only allows `authorization` 和 `content-type` 在 its CORS preflight, so forwarding these headers caused the 浏览器 SDP exchange to fail. 修复 #76435. Thanks @hclsys.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/Talk: fix Talk (OpenAI Realtime WebRTC) CORS failure by stripping server-side-only attribution headers (`originator`, `version`, `User-Agent`) from browser offer headers; `api.openai.com/v1/realtime/calls` only allows `authorization` and `content-type` in its CORS preflight, so forwarding these headers caused the browser SDP exchange to fail. Fixes #76435. Thanks @hclsys.

changes.rawTitle: Chat delivery: make `/verbose on|full|off` changes affect subsequent tool-use chat bubbles again, including channels with draft preview tool progress enabled, while preserving one-shot verbose directives.

(#75059, #75372) Thanks @shashank-poola 和 @romneyda.

Fixes #74782. (#75059, #75372) Thanks @shashank-poola and @romneyda.

changes.title: Codex/WhatsApp: keep the `message` dynamic 工具 available 当 Codex source replies are configured 为了 message-工具 delivery, so coding-profile chat Agent do not complete turns privately 不适用 a visible channel reply. 修复 #76660. (#76663) Thanks @VishalJ99.
changes.rawTitle: Codex/WhatsApp: keep the `message` dynamic tool available when Codex source replies are configured for message-tool delivery, so coding-profile chat agents do not complete turns privately without a visible channel reply. Fixes #76660. (#76663) Thanks @VishalJ99.

changes.title: Codex/heartbeat: send heartbeat-specific initiative guidance through Codex turn-scoped collaboration-mode instructions, keeping ordinary message-工具 chat turns 在 Default mode 不适用 heartbeat prompt leakage. Thanks @pashpashpash.
changes.rawTitle: Codex/heartbeat: send heartbeat-specific initiative guidance through Codex turn-scoped collaboration-mode instructions, keeping ordinary message-tool chat turns in Default mode without heartbeat prompt leakage. Thanks @pashpashpash.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/onboarding: trust optional official plugin and web-search installs selected from the official catalog so npm security scanning treats them like other source-linked official install paths. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent/web_search: keep installed runtime provider discovery enabled 当 web-search metadata is missing, so externally installed official providers such as Brave remain visible to Agent 和 cron turns 而不是 falling back to bundled-only lookup. 修复 #76626. Thanks @amknight.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/web_search: keep installed runtime provider discovery enabled when web-search metadata is missing, so externally installed official providers such as Brave remain visible to agent and cron turns instead of falling back to bundled-only lookup. Fixes #76626. Thanks @amknight.

changes.title: Tests/插件: expose the Discord npm onboarding Docker lane as a package script 和 assert planned Docker lanes point at real scripts, so external-channel onboarding coverage can actually run. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Tests/plugins: expose the Discord npm onboarding Docker lane as a package script and assert planned Docker lanes point at real scripts, so external-channel onboarding coverage can actually run. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/ClawHub: explain unreleased ClawHub plugin artifacts as a rollout-state fallback to `npm:` installs instead of leaking raw archive metadata fields. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Tests/onboarding: assert packaged channel onboarding leaves `openclaw channels status --json` and plain `openclaw status` showing the configured channel, covering the empty Channels table regression path. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Microsoft Teams: persist sent-message markers across Gateway restarts so follow-up replies to recent bot messages keep resolving the original conversation instead of dropping out after restart, with marker TTLs preserved on best-effort recovery. (#75585) Thanks @amknight.

changes.rawTitle: Matrix: persist pending approval reaction targets across Gateway restarts so room approvers can still approve or deny outstanding prompts after OpenClaw comes back online. (#75586) Thanks @amknight.

changes.rawTitle: Channels/onboarding: map third-party official WeCom and Yuanbao catalog entries to their published plugin ids so npm installs pass expected-plugin validation. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Plugin SDK: restore the Mattermost and Matrix compatibility subpaths used by the pinned Yuanbao channel package so external installs can module-load after npm install. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/install: keep managed npm-root 安全 scans 从 treating earlier 插件 `openclaw` peer links as failures, so one external 插件 install cannot poison later official npm installs. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: keep managed npm-root security scans from treating earlier plugin `openclaw` peer links as failures, so one external plugin install cannot poison later official npm installs. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 内存 LanceDB: 允许 installed-但是-unconfigured 插件 metadata to load so onboarding 和 setup flows can prompt 为了 embedding 配置 而不是 failing the 插件 registry first. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory LanceDB: allow installed-but-unconfigured plugin metadata to load so onboarding and setup flows can prompt for embedding config instead of failing the plugin registry first. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: CLI/插件: keep `插件 启用` 和 `插件 禁用` 从 creating unconfigured channel 配置 sections, so channel 插件 使用 required setup fields no longer fail validation 期间 lifecycle probes. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/plugins: keep `plugins enable` and `plugins disable` from creating unconfigured channel config sections, so channel plugins with required setup fields no longer fail validation during lifecycle probes. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 诊断工具/配置: set `messages.groupChat.visibleReplies: "message_tool"` 期间 compatibility repair 为了 configured-channel configs that omit a visible-reply policy, so upgrades can persist the intended 工具-only group/channel reply default. Thanks @kagura-Agent.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/config: set `messages.groupChat.visibleReplies: "message_tool"` during compatibility repair for configured-channel configs that omit a visible-reply policy, so upgrades can persist the intended tool-only group/channel reply default. Thanks @kagura-agent.

changes.title: Agent/sessions: keep delayed `sessions_send` A2A replies alive 之后 soft wait-window timeouts, while preserving terminal run timeouts 和 avoiding stale target replies 在 requester sessions. 修复 #76443. Thanks @ryswork1993 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/sessions: keep delayed `sessions_send` A2A replies alive after soft wait-window timeouts, while preserving terminal run timeouts and avoiding stale target replies in requester sessions. Fixes #76443. Thanks @ryswork1993 and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: TUI/Control 界面: 修复 `/think` 命令 showing only base thinking levels 当 the active session uses a different 模型 从 the default, so provider-specific levels like DeepSeek V4 Pro's `xhigh` 和 `max` are 现在 visible 和 selectable. 修复 #76482. Thanks @amknight.
changes.rawTitle: TUI/Control UI: fix `/think` command showing only base thinking levels when the active session uses a different model from the default, so provider-specific levels like DeepSeek V4 Pro's `xhigh` and `max` are now visible and selectable. Fixes #76482. Thanks @amknight.

changes.title: CLI/sessions: keep intentional empty Agent replies silent 之后 工具-delivered channel output, 而不是 surfacing a misleading "No reply 从 Agent." fallback. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/sessions: keep intentional empty agent replies silent after tool-delivered channel output, instead of surfacing a misleading "No reply from agent." fallback. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 配置/诊断工具: cap `.clobbered.*` forensic snapshots per 配置 路径 和 serialize snapshot writes so repeated `诊断工具 --修复` recovery loops cannot flood the 配置 directory. 修复 #76454; carries forward #65649. Thanks @JUSTICEESSIELP, @rsnow, 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Config/doctor: cap `.clobbered.*` forensic snapshots per config path and serialize snapshot writes so repeated `doctor --fix` recovery loops cannot flood the config directory. Fixes #76454; carries forward #65649. Thanks @JUSTICEESSIELP, @rsnow, and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 飞书: suppress duplicate text 当 replies send native 语音 media, 保留 captions 为了 ordinary audio files, 和 send fallback text plus attachment links 当 `audioAsVoice` transcode/upload fallback produces a generic file.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu: suppress duplicate text when replies send native voice media, preserve captions for ordinary audio files, and send fallback text plus attachment links when `audioAsVoice` transcode/upload fallback produces a generic file.

changes.title: TTS/插件: activate configured 和 inherited speech provider 插件 期间 网关 startup, so Microsoft 和 Local CLI 语音 replies work immediately 之后 persona selection 而不是 staying invisible 在 the startup 插件 set. 修复 #76481. Thanks @amknight.
changes.rawTitle: TTS/plugins: activate configured and inherited speech provider plugins during Gateway startup, so Microsoft and Local CLI voice replies work immediately after persona selection instead of staying invisible in the startup plugin set. Fixes #76481. Thanks @amknight.

changes.title: 飞书: keep packaged 飞书 startup 从 bundling the Lark SDK's ESM `__dirname` 路径 通过 loading the SDK as a 插件-local runtime dependency. 修复 #76291 和 #76494. (#76392) Thanks @zqchris.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu: keep packaged Feishu startup from bundling the Lark SDK's ESM `__dirname` path by loading the SDK as a plugin-local runtime dependency. Fixes #76291 and #76494. (#76392) Thanks @zqchris.

changes.title: 插件/npm: build package-local runtime dist files 为了 publishable 插件 和 停止 listing root-package-excluded 插件 sidecars 在 the core package metadata, so npm 插件 installs such as `@openclaw/diffs` 和 `@openclaw/Discord` no longer publish source-only runtime payloads. 修复 #76426. Thanks @PrinceOfEgypt.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/npm: build package-local runtime dist files for publishable plugins and stop listing root-package-excluded plugin sidecars in the core package metadata, so npm plugin installs such as `@openclaw/diffs` and `@openclaw/discord` no longer publish source-only runtime payloads. Fixes #76426. Thanks @PrinceOfEgypt.

changes.title: Channels/secrets: 解决 SecretRef-backed channel credentials through external 插件 secret contracts 之后 the 插件 split, covering runtime startup, target discovery, Webhook 认证, disabled-account enumeration, 和 late-bound web_search 配置. 修复 #76371. (#76449) Thanks @joshavant 和 @neeravmakwana.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/secrets: resolve SecretRef-backed channel credentials through external plugin secret contracts after the plugin split, covering runtime startup, target discovery, webhook auth, disabled-account enumeration, and late-bound web_search config. Fixes #76371. (#76449) Thanks @joshavant and @neeravmakwana.

changes.title: Docker/网关: pass Docker setup `.env` values 进入 网关 和 CLI containers 和 保留 exec SecretRef `passEnv` keys 在 managed service plans, so 1Password Connect-backed Discord tokens keep resolving 之后 诊断工具 或 插件 repair. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Docker/Gateway: pass Docker setup `.env` values into gateway and CLI containers and preserve exec SecretRef `passEnv` keys in managed service plans, so 1Password Connect-backed Discord tokens keep resolving after doctor or plugin repair. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Control 界面/WebChat: explain compaction boundaries 在 chat history 和 link directly to session checkpoint controls so pre-compaction turns no longer look 静默地 lost 之后 refresh. 修复 #76415. Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/WebChat: explain compaction boundaries in chat history and link directly to session checkpoint controls so pre-compaction turns no longer look silently lost after refresh. Fixes #76415. Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.title: Agent/compaction: 添加 an optional bundled compaction notifier hook 和 重试 once 从 the compacted transcript 当 automatic compaction leaves a turn 不适用 a final visible reply. (#76651) Thanks @simplyclever914.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/compaction: add an optional bundled compaction notifier hook and retry once from the compacted transcript when automatic compaction leaves a turn without a final visible reply. (#76651) Thanks @simplyclever914.

changes.title: Agent/incomplete-turn: detect 和 surface a warning 当 the Agent's final text 之后 a 工具-call chain is 静默地 dropped because the post-工具 assistant response was never produced, 而不是 completing the turn 使用 only the pre-工具 analysis text. 修复 #76477. Thanks @amknight.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/incomplete-turn: detect and surface a warning when the agent's final text after a tool-call chain is silently dropped because the post-tool assistant response was never produced, instead of completing the turn with only the pre-tool analysis text. Fixes #76477. Thanks @amknight.

changes.title: Channels/WhatsApp: attach native outbound mention metadata 为了 group text 和 media captions 通过 resolving `@+<digits>` 和 `@<digits>` tokens against WhatsApp participant data, including LID groups. 修复 #39879; carries forward #56863. Thanks @kengi1437, @joe2643, 和 @fridayck.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/WhatsApp: attach native outbound mention metadata for group text and media captions by resolving `@+<digits>` and `@<digits>` tokens against WhatsApp participant data, including LID groups. Fixes #39879; carries forward #56863. Thanks @kengi1437, @joe2643, and @fridayck.

changes.title: Channels/WhatsApp: require outbound mention tokens to end at a word boundary so phone-number prefixes inside longer strings no longer trigger hidden native mentions.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/WhatsApp: require outbound mention tokens to end at a word boundary so phone-number prefixes inside longer strings no longer trigger hidden native mentions.

changes.title: 插件/uninstall: 移除 empty managed git install parent directories 之后 deleting cloned 插件 repos 和 cover npm/git uninstall residue 在 Docker 插件 lifecycle tests. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/uninstall: remove empty managed git install parent directories after deleting cloned plugin repos and cover npm/git uninstall residue in Docker plugin lifecycle tests. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/install: 解决 bare official external 插件 IDs such as `brave` through the official catalog 当 no bundled source is available, so packaged installs fetch the intended scoped npm package 而不是 an unrelated unscoped package. 修复 #76373. Thanks @bek91 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: resolve bare official external plugin IDs such as `brave` through the official catalog when no bundled source is available, so packaged installs fetch the intended scoped npm package instead of an unrelated unscoped package. changes.title: 插件/install: require OpenClaw-owned install provenance 之前 granting official npm 插件 scanner trust, so direct npm package names no longer bypass launch-code scanning while catalog, onboarding, 和 诊断工具 installs stay trusted. Thanks @fede-kamel 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: require OpenClaw-owned install provenance before granting official npm plugin scanner trust, so direct npm package names no longer bypass launch-code scanning while catalog, onboarding, and doctor installs stay trusted. Thanks @fede-kamel and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Network 代理: 保留 target TLS hostname validation 为了 Node HTTPS requests routed through the managed HTTP 代理, so Discord-style CONNECT traffic no longer validates certificates against the local 代理 host. 修复 #74809. (#76442) Thanks @jesse-merhi 和 @abnershang.
changes.rawTitle: Network proxy: preserve target TLS hostname validation for Node HTTPS requests routed through the managed HTTP proxy, so Discord-style CONNECT traffic no longer validates certificates against the local proxy host. Fixes #74809. (#76442) Thanks @jesse-merhi and @abnershang.

changes.title: 网关/sessions: keep `sessions.list` rows lightweight 通过 bounding title/preview hydration to transcript head/tail reads 和 caching manifest 模型-id normalization plus setup fallback metadata against the active 插件 snapshot. Thanks @vincentkoc 和 @rolandrscheel.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/sessions: keep `sessions.list` rows lightweight by bounding title/preview hydration to transcript head/tail reads and caching manifest model-id normalization plus setup fallback metadata against the active plugin snapshot. Thanks @vincentkoc and @rolandrscheel.

changes.title: 网关/性能: cache per-run verbose-level session reads, skip a redundant `lsof` scan 在 `网关 --force` 当 no listener was killed, 和 make the 网关 startup benchmark print usage 为了 `--help`.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/performance: cache per-run verbose-level session reads, skip a redundant `lsof` scan in `gateway --force` when no listener was killed, and make the Gateway startup benchmark print usage for `--help`.

changes.title: 网关/sessions: keep Agent runtime metadata 在 lightweight `sessions.list` rows 和 skip per-row transcript usage fallback, display 模型 inference, 和 插件 projection, avoiding identity loss 和 event-loop stalls 在 large session stores. Thanks @Marvinthebored 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/sessions: keep agent runtime metadata on lightweight `sessions.list` rows and skip per-row transcript usage fallback, display model inference, and plugin projection, avoiding identity loss and event-loop stalls in large session stores. Thanks @Marvinthebored and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关/模型: keep read-only `模型.list` fallbacks 在 persisted/current metadata, configured rows, registry-compatible fallbacks, 和 static 认证 checks while preserving full-catalog image attachment capability checks. 修复 #76382; refs #76360 和 #75707. Thanks @trojy13, @RayWoo, @AnathemaOfficial, @Marvinthebored, 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/models: keep read-only `models.list` fallbacks on persisted/current metadata, configured rows, registry-compatible fallbacks, and static auth checks while preserving full-catalog image attachment capability checks. Fixes #76382; refs #76360 and #75707. Thanks @trojy13, @RayWoo, @AnathemaOfficial, @Marvinthebored, and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: CLI/插件: reject missing 插件 ids 之前 配置 writes 在 `插件 启用` 和 `插件 禁用` so a typo no longer persists a stale 配置 entry. (#73554) Thanks @ai-hpc.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/plugins: reject missing plugin ids before config writes in `plugins enable` and `plugins disable` so a typo no longer persists a stale config entry. (#73554) Thanks @ai-hpc.

changes.title: Agent/sessions: 保留 delivered trailing assistant replies 期间 session-file repair so Telegram/WebChat history is not rewritten to drop already-delivered responses. 修复 #76329. Thanks @obviyus.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/sessions: preserve delivered trailing assistant replies during session-file repair so Telegram/WebChat history is not rewritten to drop already-delivered responses. Fixes #76329. Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: 网关/chat history: 保留 oversized transcript turns as explicit omitted-message placeholders while avoiding large JSONL parse stalls. Thanks @Marvinthebored 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/chat history: preserve oversized transcript turns as explicit omitted-message placeholders while avoiding large JSONL parse stalls. Thanks @Marvinthebored and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: CLI/诊断工具: load the configured 内存-slot 插件 当 resolving 内存 diagnostics so bundled `内存-core` no longer triggers a false “no active 内存 插件” warning 在 standalone `诊断工具` / `status` runs. 修复 #76367. Thanks @neeravmakwana.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/doctor: load the configured memory-slot plugin when resolving memory diagnostics so bundled `memory-core` no longer triggers a false “no active memory plugin” warning on standalone `doctor` / `status` runs. Fixes #76367. Thanks @neeravmakwana.

changes.title: 网关: 保留 stack diagnostics 当 `chat.send` 或 Agent attachment parsing/staging fails, improving image-send failure triage. Refs #63432. (#75135) Thanks @keen0206.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway: preserve stack diagnostics when `chat.send` or agent attachment parsing/staging fails, improving image-send failure triage. Refs #63432. (#75135) Thanks @keen0206.

changes.title: Agent/idle-超时: 添加 a cost-runaway breaker to the outer embedded-run 重试 loop that halts further attempts 之后 5 consecutive idle timeouts 不适用 completed 模型 progress, so a wedged provider can no longer fan paid 模型 calls out across the same run; completed text 或 工具-call progress resets the breaker, 但是 partial 工具-argument 令牌 dribbles do not. 修复 #76293. Thanks @ThePuma312.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/idle-timeout: add a cost-runaway breaker to the outer embedded-run retry loop that halts further attempts after 5 consecutive idle timeouts without completed model progress, so a wedged provider can no longer fan paid model calls out across the same run; completed text or tool-call progress resets the breaker, but partial tool-argument token dribbles do not. Fixes #76293. Thanks @ThePuma312.

changes.title: Heartbeats/Codex: align structured heartbeat prompts 使用 actual `heartbeat_respond` 工具 availability, 停止 sending legacy `HEARTBEAT_OK` 当 the 工具 exists, 和 keep 工具-disabled commitment check-ins 在 the legacy ack 路径. Thanks @pashpashpash 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Heartbeats/Codex: align structured heartbeat prompts with actual `heartbeat_respond` tool availability, stop sending legacy `HEARTBEAT_OK` when the tool exists, and keep tool-disabled commitment check-ins on the legacy ack path. Thanks @pashpashpash and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Agent runtimes: fail explicit 插件 runtime selections honestly 当 the requested harness is unavailable 而不是 静默地 falling back to the embedded PI runtime. Thanks @pashpashpash.
changes.rawTitle: Agent runtimes: fail explicit plugin runtime selections honestly when the requested harness is unavailable instead of silently falling back to the embedded PI runtime. Thanks @pashpashpash.

changes.title: Maintainer workflow: push prepared PR heads through GitHub's verified commit API 通过 default 和 require an explicit override 之前 git-protocol pushes can publish unsigned commits. Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Maintainer workflow: push prepared PR heads through GitHub's verified commit API by default and require an explicit override before git-protocol pushes can publish unsigned commits. Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.title: 飞书: 解决 setup/status probes through the selected/default account so multi-account configs 使用 account-scoped app credentials show as configured 和 probeable. 修复 #72930. Thanks @brokemac79.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu: resolve setup/status probes through the selected/default account so multi-account configs with account-scoped app credentials show as configured and probeable. Fixes #72930. Thanks @brokemac79.

changes.title: 网关/responses: emit every client 工具 call 从 `/v1/responses` JSON 和 SSE responses 当 the Agent invokes multiple client tools 在 a single turn, so multi-工具 plans, graph orchestration calls, 和 similar batched flows no longer drop every call 但是 the last. 修复 #52288. Thanks @CharZhou 和 @bonelli.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/responses: emit every client tool call from `/v1/responses` JSON and SSE responses when the agent invokes multiple client tools in a single turn, so multi-tool plans, graph orchestration calls, and similar batched flows no longer drop every call but the last. Fixes #52288. Thanks @CharZhou and @bonelli.

changes.title: 网关/Agent: enforce `session.sendPolicy=deny` 在 网关 Agent requests only 当 `deliver: true`, so non-delivery smoke checks 和 internal Agent runs are no longer rejected 使用 `send blocked 通过 session policy` while outbound delivery remains gated. 修复 #73381. Thanks @wenxu007.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/agent: enforce `session.sendPolicy=deny` on gateway agent requests only when `deliver: true`, so non-delivery smoke checks and internal agent runs are no longer rejected with `send blocked by session policy` while outbound delivery remains gated. Fixes #73381. Thanks @wenxu007.

changes.title: Slack/reactions: treat missing no_reaction 移除 responses as idempotent success 和 route own-reaction cleanup through the 移除 helper, so concurrent cleanup no longer surfaces Slack race errors. 修复 #50733. (#76304) Thanks @martingarramon 和 @Hollychou924.
changes.rawTitle: Slack/reactions: treat missing no_reaction remove responses as idempotent success and route own-reaction cleanup through the remove helper, so concurrent cleanup no longer surfaces Slack race errors. Fixes #50733. (#76304) Thanks @martingarramon and @Hollychou924.

changes.title: 飞书: include media `file_key` 和 `image_key` values 在 inbound dedupe so reused message IDs still process distinct media attachments while true retries stay suppressed. 修复 #75057. Thanks @SymbolStar.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu: include media `file_key` and `image_key` values in inbound dedupe so reused message IDs still process distinct media attachments while true retries stay suppressed. Fixes #75057. Thanks @SymbolStar.

changes.title: Control 界面/网关: 避免 full session-list reloads 为了 locally applied message-phase session updates, carry known session keys through transcript-file 更新 events, 和 defer media provider listing 当 explicit generation 模型 配置 is present. Refs #76236, #76203, #76188, #76107, 和 #76166. Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Control UI/Gateway: avoid full session-list reloads for locally applied message-phase session updates, carry known session keys through transcript-file update events, and defer media provider listing when explicit generation model config is present. changes.title: Install/更新: prune the obsolete `插件-runtime-deps` state directory 期间 packaged postinstall so upgrades 从 pre-2026.5.2 releases reclaim old bundled-插件 dependency caches 不适用 touching external 插件 installs.
changes.rawTitle: Install/update: prune the obsolete `plugin-runtime-deps` state directory during packaged postinstall so upgrades from pre-2026.5.2 releases reclaim old bundled-plugin dependency caches without touching external plugin installs.

changes.title: Auto-reply/queue: treat reset-triggered `/new` 和 `/reset` turns as interrupt runs across active-run queue handling, so steer/followup modes cannot delay a fresh session behind existing work. 修复 #74093. (#74144) Thanks @ruji9527 和 @yelog.
changes.rawTitle: Auto-reply/queue: treat reset-triggered `/new` and `/reset` turns as interrupt runs across active-run queue handling, so steer/followup modes cannot delay a fresh session behind existing work. Fixes #74093. (#74144) Thanks @ruji9527 and @yelog.

changes.title: Cron: persist repaired startup runtime state back to `jobs-state.json` so a valid future `nextRunAtMs` 使用 missing `updatedAtMs` no longer triggers repeated external health-check repairs 之后 网关 restart. 修复 #76461. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Cron: persist repaired startup runtime state back to `jobs-state.json` so a valid future `nextRunAtMs` with missing `updatedAtMs` no longer triggers repeated external health-check repairs after Gateway restart. Fixes #76461. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Cron: 保留 manual `cron.run` IDs 在 `cron.runs` history so manual run acknowledgements can be correlated 使用 finished run records. 修复 #76276.
changes.rawTitle: Cron: preserve manual `cron.run` IDs in `cron.runs` history so manual run acknowledgements can be correlated with finished run records. Fixes #76276.

changes.title: CLI/devices: request `operator.admin` 为了 `openclaw devices approve <requestId>` only 当 the exact pending device request would mint 或 inherit admin-scoped operator access, while keeping lower-scope approvals 在 the pairing scope.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/devices: request `operator.admin` for `openclaw devices approve <requestId>` only when the exact pending device request would mint or inherit admin-scoped operator access, while keeping lower-scope approvals on the pairing scope.

changes.title: 内存/embedding: broaden the embedding reindex 重试 classifier to include transient socket-layer errors (`fetch failed`, `ECONNRESET`, `socket hang up`, `UND_ERR_*`, `closed`) so 内存 reindex survives provider network hiccups 而不是 aborting mid-run. Related #56815, #44166. (#76311) Thanks @buyitsydney.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/embedding: broaden the embedding reindex retry classifier to include transient socket-layer errors (`fetch failed`, `ECONNRESET`, `socket hang up`, `UND_ERR_*`, `closed`) so memory reindex survives provider network hiccups instead of aborting mid-run. Related #56815, #44166. (#76311) Thanks @buyitsydney.

changes.title: 内存/sessions: keep rotated 和 deleted transcripts (`.jsonl.reset.<iso>` / `.jsonl.deleted.<iso>`) searchable 通过 indexing archive content, mapping archive hits back to live transcript stems, emitting transcript 更新 events 在 archive rotation, 和 bypassing incremental delta thresholds 为了 one-shot archive mutations while keeping backups 和 compaction checkpoints opaque. Refs #56131. Thanks @buyitsydney.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/sessions: keep rotated and deleted transcripts (`.jsonl.reset.<iso>` / `.jsonl.deleted.<iso>`) searchable by indexing archive content, mapping archive hits back to live transcript stems, emitting transcript update events on archive rotation, and bypassing incremental delta thresholds for one-shot archive mutations while keeping backups and compaction checkpoints opaque. Refs #56131. Thanks @buyitsydney.

changes.title: 内存/search: keep sqlite-vec optional 在 packaged installs 和 point missing-extension recovery at the valid `Agent.defaults.memorySearch.store.vector.extensionPath` 设置. Thanks @willemsej 和 @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Memory/search: keep sqlite-vec optional in packaged installs and point missing-extension recovery at the valid `agents.defaults.memorySearch.store.vector.extensionPath` setting. Thanks @willemsej and @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 网关: keep directly requested 插件 tools invokable under restrictive 工具 profiles while preserving explicit deny lists 和 the HTTP safety deny list, preventing catalog/invoke mismatches that surface as "工具 not available". Thanks @BunsDev.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway: keep directly requested plugin tools invokable under restrictive tool profiles while preserving explicit deny lists and the HTTP safety deny list, preventing catalog/invoke mismatches that surface as "Tool not available". Thanks @BunsDev.

changes.title: 网关/更新: 允许 beta binaries to refresh 网关 services 当 the 配置 was last written 通过 the matching stable release version, avoiding false newer-配置 downgrade blocks 期间 beta channel updates.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/update: allow beta binaries to refresh gateway services when the config was last written by the matching stable release version, avoiding false newer-config downgrade blocks during beta channel updates.

changes.title: Channels: keep Matrix 和 Mattermost bundled 在 the core package 而不是 advertising external npm installs 之前 those channels are cut over. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Channels: keep Matrix and Mattermost bundled in the core package instead of advertising external npm installs before those channels are cut over. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Bonjour: 禁用 LAN mDNS advertising 之后 a repeated stuck-announcing recovery 而不是 repeatedly restarting ciao 和 saturating the 网关 event loop.
changes.rawTitle: Bonjour: disable LAN mDNS advertising after a repeated stuck-announcing recovery instead of repeatedly restarting ciao and saturating the Gateway event loop.

changes.title: Channels/setup: label installable channel picker hints as remote npm installs 和 hide remote install hints 为了 bundled 插件 that already ship 使用 OpenClaw.
changes.rawTitle: Channels/setup: label installable channel picker hints as remote npm installs and hide remote install hints for bundled plugins that already ship with OpenClaw.

changes.title: CLI/更新: refuse package updates launched 从 the active 网关 process tree 之前 stopping the managed 网关 service, avoiding self-terminated 在-lane updates that leave old 网关 code running. 修复 #75691. (#75819) Thanks @ai-hpc.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/update: refuse package updates launched from the active gateway process tree before stopping the managed Gateway service, avoiding self-terminated in-lane updates that leave old Gateway code running. Fixes #75691. (#75819) Thanks @ai-hpc.

changes.title: CLI/插件: 停止 treating the non-插件 `认证` 命令 root as a bundled 插件 id, so restrictive `插件.允许` configs no longer tell users to 添加 stale `认证` 插件 entries.
changes.rawTitle: CLI/plugins: stop treating the non-plugin `auth` command root as a bundled plugin id, so restrictive `plugins.allow` configs no longer tell users to add stale `auth` plugin entries.

changes.title: 诊断工具/插件: 更新 configured 插件 installs whose stale manifests still declare channels 不适用 `channelConfigs`, so beta upgrades repair old Discord-style package payloads 期间 `诊断工具 --修复`.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/plugins: update configured plugin installs whose stale manifests still declare channels without `channelConfigs`, so beta upgrades repair old Discord-style package payloads during `doctor --fix`.

changes.title: 诊断工具/插件: repair configured external 插件 installs whose persisted install record points at a missing package directory, so upgrades reconcile phantom npm metadata 之前 插件 runtime validation. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/plugins: repair configured external plugin installs whose persisted install record points at a missing package directory, so upgrades reconcile phantom npm metadata before plugin runtime validation. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Active 内存: keep non-empty `memory_search` results 从 being fast-failed as empty 当 debug telemetry reports zero hits.
changes.rawTitle: Active Memory: keep non-empty `memory_search` results from being fast-failed as empty when debug telemetry reports zero hits.

changes.title: Active 内存: 保留 the target Agent context 当 building embedded recall 插件 tools so `memory_search` 和 `memory_get` stay available 为了 explicit recall sessions. 修复 #76343. Thanks @Countermarch.
changes.rawTitle: Active Memory: preserve the target agent context when building embedded recall plugin tools so `memory_search` and `memory_get` stay available for explicit recall sessions. Fixes #76343. Thanks @Countermarch.

changes.title: 插件/externalization: repair missing configured 插件 installs 从 npm 通过 default, reserve ClawHub downloads 为了 explicit `clawhubSpec` metadata, 和 cover Agent-runtime/env-selected 插件 repair. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/externalization: repair missing configured plugin installs from npm by default, reserve ClawHub downloads for explicit `clawhubSpec` metadata, and cover agent-runtime/env-selected plugin repair. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/install: 允许 official catalog-matched npm channel 插件 such as 飞书 to pass the trusted install scanner 路径 while keeping spoofed package names blocked. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: allow official catalog-matched npm channel plugins such as Feishu to pass the trusted install scanner path while keeping spoofed package names blocked. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Tools/llm-task: keep JSON-only embedded 模型 runs 从 tripping inherited 工具 allowlists 当 tools are intentionally disabled, while preserving runtime `toolsAllow` failures. 修复 #74019. Thanks @amknight.
changes.rawTitle: Tools/llm-task: keep JSON-only embedded model runs from tripping inherited tool allowlists when tools are intentionally disabled, while preserving runtime `toolsAllow` failures. Fixes #74019. Thanks @amknight.

changes.title: Tools/profiles: make `tools.profile: "full"` grant all tools including optional 插件 tools such as 浏览器, so the full profile no longer 静默地 drops 插件-provided tools that require an explicit allowlist entry. 修复 #76507. Thanks @amknight.
changes.rawTitle: Tools/profiles: make `tools.profile: "full"` grant all tools including optional plugin tools such as browser, so the full profile no longer silently drops plugin-provided tools that require an explicit allowlist entry. Fixes #76507. Thanks @amknight.

changes.title: 飞书: keep 超时 env parsing separate 从 the HTTP client wrapper so package 安全 scans no longer report a false env-harvesting hit 期间 install. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Feishu: keep timeout env parsing separate from the HTTP client wrapper so package security scans no longer report a false env-harvesting hit during install. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Upgrade/配置: validate configured web-search providers 和 statically suppressed 模型/provider pairs against the active 插件 set at 配置 load, so stale 插件 state fails loud 之前 runtime fallback.
changes.rawTitle: Upgrade/config: validate configured web-search providers and statically suppressed model/provider pairs against the active plugin set at config load, so stale plugin state fails loud before runtime fallback.

changes.title: Status/更新: 解决 beta 更新-channel checks 从 the installed version 当 配置 still says `stable`, 和 let `status --deep` 复用 live 网关 channel credential state 而不是 warning 在 命令-路径-only 令牌 misses.
changes.rawTitle: Status/update: resolve beta update-channel checks from the installed version when config still says `stable`, and let `status --deep` reuse live gateway channel credential state instead of warning on command-path-only token misses.

changes.title: 诊断工具/插件: 保留 unmanaged third-party 插件 `node_modules` 期间 `诊断工具 --修复`, while still pruning OpenClaw-managed runtime dependency caches.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/plugins: preserve unmanaged third-party plugin `node_modules` during `doctor --fix`, while still pruning OpenClaw-managed runtime dependency caches.

changes.title: 网关/restart: 添加 `openclaw 网关 restart --force` 和 `--wait <duration>`, log active task run IDs 之前 restart deferral timers, 和 report 超时 restarts as explicit forced restarts.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/restart: add `openclaw gateway restart --force` and `--wait <duration>`, log active task run IDs before restart deferral timers, and report timeout restarts as explicit forced restarts.

changes.title: Discord: persist slash-命令 deploy hashes across process restarts so unchanged 命令 sets skip redeploy 和 避免 restart-loop 429s.
changes.rawTitle: Discord: persist slash-command deploy hashes across process restarts so unchanged command sets skip redeploy and avoid restart-loop 429s.

changes.rawTitle: Providers/LM Studio: normalize binary `off`/`on` reasoning metadata from Gemma 4 and other local models to LM Studio's accepted OpenAI-compatible `reasoning_effort` values.

changes.title: 插件/externalization: keep official external install docs, 更新 examples, 和 live Codex npm checks 在 default npm tags 而不是 `@beta`. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/externalization: keep official external install docs, update examples, and live Codex npm checks on default npm tags instead of `@beta`. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/externalization: keep ACPX, Google Chat, 和 LINE publishable 插件 dist trees out 的 the core npm package file list.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/externalization: keep ACPX, Google Chat, and LINE publishable plugin dist trees out of the core npm package file list.

changes.title: 插件/ClawHub: fall back to version metadata 当 the artifact resolver route is missing 和 keep the Docker ClawHub fixture aligned 使用 npm-pack artifact resolution, avoiding false version-not-found failures 期间 插件 install validation. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/ClawHub: fall back to version metadata when the artifact resolver route is missing and keep the Docker ClawHub fixture aligned with npm-pack artifact resolution, avoiding false version-not-found failures during plugin install validation. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: Providers/OpenAI-Codex: honor `providerConfig.baseUrl` 在 the dynamic-模型 synthesis fallback so Codex providers configured 使用 a custom upstream (为了 example a forwarding 代理) no longer 静默地 bypass the configured URL 当 the registry has no template row to clone 为了 the requested 模型 id. (#76428) Thanks @arniesaha.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/openai-codex: honor `providerConfig.baseUrl` in the dynamic-model synthesis fallback so codex providers configured with a custom upstream (for example a forwarding proxy) no longer silently bypass the configured URL when the registry has no template row to clone for the requested model id. (#76428) Thanks @arniesaha.

changes.title: Status/channels: show configured channels 在 `openclaw status` 和 配置-only `openclaw channels status` output even 当 the 网关 is unreachable, avoiding empty Channels tables 在 WSL 和 other no-网关 paths. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Status/channels: show configured channels in `openclaw status` and config-only `openclaw channels status` output even when the Gateway is unreachable, avoiding empty Channels tables on WSL and other no-Gateway paths. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/ClawHub: explain unavailable explicit ClawHub ClawPack artifact downloads with a temporary npm install hint while ClawHub artifact routing rolls out. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Media: accept home-relative `MEDIA:~/...` attachment paths while preserving existing file-read policy, traversal checks, and media type validation. Fixes #73796. Thanks @fabkury.

changes.rawTitle: Onboarding/search: install official external web-search plugins such as Brave before saving provider config, and make doctor repair reconcile selected external search providers whose npm payload is missing. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/externalization: add official npm-first catalogs for externalized channel, provider, and generic plugins, keep unpublished ACPX/Google Chat/LINE bundled, and make missing-plugin repair honor npm-first metadata while ClawHub pack files roll out. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.title: 插件/更新: detect tracked 插件 install records whose package directories disappeared 期间 `openclaw 更新`, reinstall them 之前 normal 插件 updates, 和 fail the 更新 if any install record still points at missing disk payloads.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/update: detect tracked plugin install records whose package directories disappeared during `openclaw update`, reinstall them before normal plugin updates, and fail the update if any install record still points at missing disk payloads.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/registry: hash manifest and package metadata when validating persisted plugin registries so fast same-size rewrites cannot leave stale plugin metadata trusted.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/registry: canonicalize install-record provenance paths before trust diagnostics, so npm plugins installed under symlinked temp/state roots no longer warn as untracked local code.

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: let official external Discord reinstall requests pass the invalid-config guard and run stale-channel repair, so upgrades can recover missing external plugin state directly.

changes.rawTitle: CLI/infer: reject local `codex/*` one-shot model probes before simple-completion dispatch and point operators at the Codex app-server runtime path instead of ending with an empty-output error.

changes.title: Agent/sessions: 保留 terminal lifecycle state 当 final run metadata persists 从 a stale 在-内存 snapshot, preventing `main` sessions 从 staying stuck as running 之后 completed 或 timed-out turns.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/sessions: preserve terminal lifecycle state when final run metadata persists from a stale in-memory snapshot, preventing `main` sessions from staying stuck as running after completed or timed-out turns.

changes.title: 网关/CLI: make `openclaw 网关 start` repair stale managed service definitions that point at old OpenClaw versions, missing binaries, 或 temporary installer paths 之前 starting.
changes.rawTitle: Gateway/CLI: make `openclaw gateway start` repair stale managed service definitions that point at old OpenClaw versions, missing binaries, or temporary installer paths before starting.

changes.title: Heartbeat/scheduler: make heartbeat phase scheduling active-hours-aware so the scheduler seeks forward to the first 在-window phase slot 而不是 arming timers 为了 quiet-hours slots 和 relying solely 在 the runtime guard. Non-UTC `activeHours.timezone` values (e.g. `Asia/Shanghai`) 现在 正确地 influence 当 the next heartbeat timer fires, avoiding wasted quiet-hours ticks 和 long dormant gaps 之后 网关 restarts. 修复 #75487. Thanks @amknight.
changes.rawTitle: Heartbeat/scheduler: make heartbeat phase scheduling active-hours-aware so the scheduler seeks forward to the first in-window phase slot instead of arming timers for quiet-hours slots and relying solely on the runtime guard. Non-UTC `activeHours.timezone` values (e.g. `Asia/Shanghai`) now correctly influence when the next heartbeat timer fires, avoiding wasted quiet-hours ticks and long dormant gaps after gateway restarts. Fixes #75487. Thanks @amknight.

changes.title: Providers/Arcee AI: mark Trinity Large Thinking as 工具-incompatible so main-session runs use the same text-only request shape that made subagent runs recover, avoiding the remaining main-session response-shape mismatch 之后 the #62848 transport failover 修复. 修复 #62851 和 #62847; carries forward #62848. Thanks @Adam-Researchh.
changes.rawTitle: Providers/Arcee AI: mark Trinity Large Thinking as tool-incompatible so main-session runs use the same text-only request shape that made subagent runs recover, avoiding the remaining main-session response-shape mismatch after the #62848 transport failover fix. Fixes #62851 and #62847; carries forward #62848. Thanks @Adam-Researchh.

changes.title: Status: show the `OpenAI-Codex` OAuth认证 profile 为了 `OpenAI/gpt-*` sessions running through the native Codex runtime 而不是 reporting 认证 as unknown. (#76197) Thanks @mbelinky.
changes.rawTitle: Status: show the `openai-codex` OAuth profile for `openai/gpt-*` sessions running through the native Codex runtime instead of reporting auth as unknown. (#76197) Thanks @mbelinky.

changes.rawTitle: Gateway: avoid repeated plugin tool descriptor config hashing so large runtime configs do not block reply startup and trigger reconnect/timeouts. (#75944) Thanks @joshavant.

changes.title: 插件/externalization: keep diagnostics ClawHub packages 和 persisted bundled-插件 relocation 在 npm-first install metadata 为了 launch, 和 omit Discord 从 the core package 现在 that its external package is published. Thanks @vincentkoc.
changes.rawTitle: Plugins/externalization: keep diagnostics ClawHub packages and persisted bundled-plugin relocation on npm-first install metadata for launch, and omit Discord from the core package now that its external package is published. Thanks @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Setup/TUI: bound the Terminal hatch bootstrap run so a stalled provider request times out instead of leaving first-run hatching stuck behind the watchdog. (#76241) Thanks @joshavant.

changes.rawTitle: Cron/CLI runtimes: route isolated cron jobs through configured per-agent CLI runtimes only when the resolved model provider is compatible, so OpenAI job overrides no longer inherit a mismatched Claude CLI backend. Thanks @vishutdhar.

changes.rawTitle: Parallels/Windows update smoke: escape the stale post-swap import regex in the generated PowerShell script so expected `ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND` update handoffs continue to post-update health checks. (#75315)

changes.rawTitle: Plugins/install: pin npm plugin installs to the verified resolved version and reject package-lock version or integrity drift, so mutable tags cannot race integrity checks into accepting a different artifact. Thanks @Lucenx9.

changes.rawTitle: Channels/Telegram: force a fresh final message when a visible non-preview bubble (tool/block/error) was delivered after the active answer preview, so multi-step assistant replies no longer end up with the final answer above intermediate output. changes.rawTitle: Plugins/update: keep externalized bundled npm bridge updates on the normal plugin security scanner path instead of granting source-linked official trust without artifact provenance. (#76765) Thanks @Lucenx9.

changes.rawTitle: Agents/reply context: label replied-to messages as the current user message target in model-visible metadata, so short replies are grounded to their explicit reply target instead of nearby chat history. (#76817) Thanks @obviyus.

changes.title: 诊断工具/插件: install configured missing official 插件 such as Discord 和 Brave 期间 诊断工具/更新 repair, auto-启用 repaired provider 插件, 保留 配置 当 a download fails, 和 停止 auto-启用 从 inventing 插件 entries 当 no manifest declares a configured channel. 修复 #76872. Thanks @jack-stormentswe.
changes.rawTitle: Doctor/plugins: install configured missing official plugins such as Discord and Brave during doctor/update repair, auto-enable repaired provider plugins, preserve config when a download fails, and stop auto-enable from inventing plugin entries when no manifest declares a configured channel. Fixes #76872. Thanks @jack-stormentswe.

items.title: 插件/file-transfer: 添加 bundled file-transfer 插件 使用 `file_fetch`, `dir_list`, `dir_fetch`, 和 `file_write` Agent tools 为了 binary file ops 在 paired nodes; default-deny per-node 路径 policy under `插件.entries.file-transfer.配置.nodes` 使用 operator approval, symlink traversal refused 通过 default (opt-在 `followSymlinks`), 和 a 16 MB byte ceiling per round-trip. (#74742) Thanks @omarshahine.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/file-transfer: add bundled file-transfer plugin with `file_fetch`, `dir_list`, `dir_fetch`, and `file_write` agent tools for binary file ops on paired nodes; default-deny per-node path policy under `plugins.entries.file-transfer.config.nodes` with operator approval, symlink traversal refused by default (opt-in `followSymlinks`), and a 16 MB byte ceiling per round-trip. (#74742) Thanks @omarshahine.

items.title: 网关/性能: trim startup 和 Control 界面 hot paths 通过 lazy-loading 插件/runtime discovery, cron, schema, shutdown, sessions, 和 模型 metadata work only 当 needed.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/performance: trim startup and Control UI hot paths by lazy-loading plugin/runtime discovery, cron, schema, shutdown, sessions, and model metadata work only when needed.

items.title: Install/更新: recover broken macOS LaunchAgent upgrades, reject source-only 插件 packages 之前 runtime load, 和 repair stale 网关/插件 state 期间 updates 和 诊断工具 runs.
items.rawTitle: Install/update: recover broken macOS LaunchAgent upgrades, reject source-only plugin packages before runtime load, and repair stale Gateway/plugin state during updates and doctor runs.

items.title: 诊断工具/配置: `诊断工具 --修复` 现在 commits safe legacy migrations even 当 unrelated validation issues (e.g. a missing 插件) 防止 full validation 从 passing, so `Agent.defaults.llm` 和 other known-legacy keys are always cleaned up 通过 `诊断工具 --修复` regardless 的 other 配置 problems. 修复 #76798. (#76800) Thanks @hclsys.
items.rawTitle: Doctor/config: `doctor --fix` now commits safe legacy migrations even when unrelated validation issues (e.g. a missing plugin) prevent full validation from passing, so `agents.defaults.llm` and other known-legacy keys are always cleaned up by `doctor --fix` regardless of other config problems. Fixes #76798. (#76800) Thanks @hclsys.

items.title: 网关/性能: lazy-load early runtime discovery 和 shutdown-hook helpers, defer maintenance timers until 之后 readiness, 和 trim duplicate 插件 auto-启用 work 期间 网关 startup.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/performance: lazy-load early runtime discovery and shutdown-hook helpers, defer maintenance timers until after readiness, and trim duplicate plugin auto-enable work during Gateway startup.

items.title: 插件/ClawHub: annotate 429 errors 使用 reset Windows 和 unauthenticated higher-rate-limit hints, so operators can tell 当 downloads recover 和 当 signing 在 helps. Thanks @romneyda.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/ClawHub: annotate 429 errors with reset windows and unauthenticated higher-rate-limit hints, so operators can tell when downloads recover and when signing in helps. Thanks @romneyda.

items.title: 插件 tools: keep 认证-unavailable optional tools hidden even 当 another default 工具 从 the same 插件 is available 和 `tools.alsoAllow` names the optional 工具. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Plugin tools: keep auth-unavailable optional tools hidden even when another default tool from the same plugin is available and `tools.alsoAllow` names the optional tool. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 内存/LanceDB: declare `apache-arrow` 在 the bundled 内存 插件 package so LanceDB installs include its runtime peer. 修复 #76910. Thanks @afiqfiles-max.
items.rawTitle: Memory/LanceDB: declare `apache-arrow` in the bundled memory plugin package so LanceDB installs include its runtime peer. Fixes #76910. Thanks @afiqfiles-max.

items.title: 插件/Codex: 保留 Codex-native OAuth认证 routing 为了 `/Codex bind` app-server turns so bound sessions keep the selected Codex 认证 profile 而不是 falling back to public OpenAI credentials. (#76714) Thanks @keshavbotagent.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/Codex: preserve Codex-native OAuth routing for `/codex bind` app-server turns so bound sessions keep the selected Codex auth profile instead of falling back to public OpenAI credentials. (#76714) Thanks @keshavbotagent.

items.title: 网关/install: prefer supported system Node over nvm/fnm/volta/asdf/mise 当 regenerating managed 网关 services, so `网关 install --force` no longer recreates service definitions that 诊断工具 immediately flags as version-manager-backed. 修复 #76339. Thanks @brokemac79.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/install: prefer supported system Node over nvm/fnm/volta/asdf/mise when regenerating managed gateway services, so `gateway install --force` no longer recreates service definitions that doctor immediately flags as version-manager-backed. Fixes #76339. Thanks @brokemac79.

items.title: 插件/hooks: let `插件.entries.<id>.hooks.timeoutMs` 和 `插件.entries.<id>.hooks.timeouts` bound 插件 typed hooks 从 operator 配置, so slow hooks can be tuned 不适用 patching installed 插件 code. 修复 #76778. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/hooks: let `plugins.entries.<id>.hooks.timeoutMs` and `plugins.entries.<id>.hooks.timeouts` bound plugin typed hooks from operator config, so slow hooks can be tuned without patching installed plugin code. Fixes #76778. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 网关/更新: 避免 `launchctl kickstart -k` immediately 之后 fresh macOS 更新 bootstraps, 和 unlink dangling global 插件-runtime symlinks 期间 packaged postinstall 和 `诊断工具 --修复` so upgrades no longer SIGTERM the newly booted 网关 或 leave bundled 插件 imports pointed at pruned `插件-runtime-deps` trees. Completes #76261 和 修复 #76466. (#76929)
items.rawTitle: Gateway/update: avoid `launchctl kickstart -k` immediately after fresh macOS update bootstraps, and unlink dangling global plugin-runtime symlinks during packaged postinstall and `doctor --fix` so upgrades no longer SIGTERM the newly booted Gateway or leave bundled plugin imports pointed at pruned `plugin-runtime-deps` trees. Completes #76261 and fixes #76466. (#76929)

items.title: 诊断工具/插件: reset stale `插件.slots.内存` 和 `插件.slots.contextEngine` references 期间 `诊断工具 --修复`, so cleanup 的 missing 插件 配置 does not leave unrecoverable slot owners behind. 修复 #76550 和 #76551. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Doctor/plugins: reset stale `plugins.slots.memory` and `plugins.slots.contextEngine` references during `doctor --fix`, so cleanup of missing plugin config does not leave unrecoverable slot owners behind. Fixes #76550 and #76551. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 插件/Anthropic: expose Claude thinking profiles 从 the bundled provider-policy artifact so non-runtime callers keep Opus 4.7 `adaptive`, `xhigh`, 和 `max` 而不是 downgrading to `high`. 修复 #76779. Thanks @tomascupr 和 @iAbhi001.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/Anthropic: expose Claude thinking profiles from the bundled provider-policy artifact so non-runtime callers keep Opus 4.7 `adaptive`, `xhigh`, and `max` instead of downgrading to `high`. Fixes #76779. Thanks @tomascupr and @iAbhi001.

items.title: 插件/tools: honor `tools.alsoAllow` as an optional 插件 工具 discovery hint 不适用 treating its internal 允许-all default as permission to load every manifest-marked optional 插件 工具. 修复 #76616.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/tools: honor `tools.alsoAllow` as an optional plugin tool discovery hint without treating its internal allow-all default as permission to load every manifest-marked optional plugin tool. Fixes #76616.

items.title: CLI/插件: reject unowned 命令 roots such as `openclaw foo` 之前 managed 代理 startup 和 full 插件 CLI runtime loading while preserving manifest-owned 和 CLI-metadata-owned 插件 commands. 修复 #75287. Thanks @neilofneils404.
items.rawTitle: CLI/plugins: reject unowned command roots such as `openclaw foo` before managed proxy startup and full plugin CLI runtime loading while preserving manifest-owned and CLI-metadata-owned plugin commands. Fixes #75287. Thanks @neilofneils404.

items.title: 插件/tools: cold-load selected 插件 工具 registries 当 the active registry only has partial 工具 coverage, so wildcard-expanded allowlists no longer hide installed 插件 tools 从 `tools.effective`. 修复 #76780. Thanks @lilesjtu.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/tools: cold-load selected plugin tool registries when the active registry only has partial tool coverage, so wildcard-expanded allowlists no longer hide installed plugin tools from `tools.effective`. Fixes #76780. Thanks @lilesjtu.

items.title: 插件/tools: compare cached 和 runtime 插件 工具 name conflicts 使用 normalized core 工具 names, so case variants 的 core tools are blocked 而不是 leaking duplicate 工具 registrations. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/tools: compare cached and runtime plugin tool name conflicts with normalized core tool names, so case variants of core tools are blocked instead of leaking duplicate tool registrations. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 插件/OpenRouter: advertise DeepSeek V4 thinking levels, including `xhigh` 和 `max`, through the runtime 和 lightweight provider policy surfaces so `/think` validation no longer rejects OpenRouter-routed DeepSeek V4 模型. 修复 #74788. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/OpenRouter: advertise DeepSeek V4 thinking levels, including `xhigh` and `max`, through the runtime and lightweight provider policy surfaces so `/think` validation no longer rejects OpenRouter-routed DeepSeek V4 models. Fixes #74788. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 插件/语音-call: treat abnormal local 网关 close code 1006 as a standalone CLI fallback case, so `voicecall smoke` 和 related commands can still run the provider check 路径 当 the 网关 socket closes 之前 returning a response.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/voice-call: treat abnormal local Gateway close code 1006 as a standalone CLI fallback case, so `voicecall smoke` and related commands can still run the provider check path when the Gateway socket closes before returning a response.

items.title: 插件/release: reject ClawHub code-插件 packages that contain TypeScript runtime entries 不适用 compiled `dist/*.js` output, 和 run package-local runtime-build checks 期间 npm 和 ClawHub 插件 release previews.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/release: reject ClawHub code-plugin packages that contain TypeScript runtime entries without compiled `dist/*.js` output, and run package-local runtime-build checks during npm and ClawHub plugin release previews.

items.rawTitle: Plugins/release: verify published plugin npm tarballs expose compiled runtime entries after publish, catching TS-only package artifacts before release closeout. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 插件/配置: report configured 插件 that are present 但是 blocked 通过 路径-safety checks as blocked 而不是 stale `插件 not found` entries, 和 deduplicate repeated blocked-candidate warnings 期间 discovery. 修复 #76144. Thanks @mayank6136.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/config: report configured plugins that are present but blocked by path-safety checks as blocked instead of stale `plugin not found` entries, and deduplicate repeated blocked-candidate warnings during discovery. Fixes #76144. Thanks @mayank6136.

items.title: CLI/插件: explain 当 a missing 插件 命令 alias belongs to a bundled 插件 that is disabled 通过 default, including the `openclaw 插件 启用 <插件>` repair 命令. (#76835)
items.rawTitle: CLI/plugins: explain when a missing plugin command alias belongs to a bundled plugin that is disabled by default, including the `openclaw plugins enable <plugin>` repair command. (#76835)

items.rawTitle: CLI/doctor: trust a ready gateway memory probe when CLI-side active memory backend resolution is unavailable, preventing false "No active memory plugin is registered" warnings for healthy runtime setups. Fixes #76792. Thanks @som-686.

items.title: 插件/ClawHub: accept the live artifact resolver `kind`/`sha256` field names alongside the typed `artifactKind`/`artifactSha256` form so `ClawHub:` installs 的 npm-pack 和 legacy ZIP packages no longer miss downloadable artifacts. Thanks @romneyda.
items.rawTitle: Plugins/ClawHub: accept the live artifact resolver `kind`/`sha256` field names alongside the typed `artifactKind`/`artifactSha256` form so `clawhub:` installs of npm-pack and legacy ZIP packages no longer miss downloadable artifacts. Thanks @romneyda.

items.title: 网关/watch: run `诊断工具 --修复 --non-interactive` once 和 重试 当 the dev 网关 child exits 期间 startup, so stale local 插件 install/配置 state does not leave the tmux watch session disappearing 不适用 a repair attempt.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/watch: run `doctor --fix --non-interactive` once and retry when the dev Gateway child exits during startup, so stale local plugin install/config state does not leave the tmux watch session disappearing without a repair attempt.

items.title: CLI/插件: warn 当 npm 插件 installs remain shadowed 通过 a failing 配置-selected source 和 surface the repair 路径 在 `插件 诊断工具`. Thanks @LindalyX-Lee.
items.rawTitle: CLI/plugins: warn when npm plugin installs remain shadowed by a failing config-selected source and surface the repair path in `plugins doctor`. Thanks @LindalyX-Lee.

items.rawTitle: Plugins/install: run `npm install` from the managed npm-root manifest so installing one `@openclaw/*` plugin preserves already installed sibling plugins instead of pruning them. Fixes #76571. (#76602) Thanks @byungskers and @crpol.

items.title: 插件/context-engine: include the selected `插件.slots.contextEngine` 插件 在 the 网关 startup load plan so external context-engine 插件 不适用 `activation.onStartup` 在 their manifest are loaded 之前 any Agent turn resolves the active engine; prevents the "Context engine X is not registered; falling back to default engine legacy" warning 之后 网关 startup. 修复 #76576. items.rawTitle: Plugins/context-engine: include the selected `plugins.slots.contextEngine` plugin in the gateway startup load plan so external context-engine plugins without `activation.onStartup` in their manifest are loaded before any agent turn resolves the active engine; prevents the "Context engine X is not registered; falling back to default engine legacy" warning after gateway startup. Fixes #76576. Thanks @hclsys.

items.title: 插件/OpenCode: expose Claude thinking profiles through the lightweight provider policy surface so directive 和 session validation keep `xhigh`, `adaptive`, 和 `max` 为了 `opencode/claude-opus-4-7` 而不是 remapping `xhigh` to `high`. 修复 #76648. Thanks @aaajiao.

items.title: CLI/诊断工具: match stale bundled-插件 install records 通过 exact parsed package name so 诊断工具 does not 移除 external npm 或 ClawHub records that only share an OpenClaw package-name prefix.
items.rawTitle: CLI/doctor: match stale bundled-plugin install records by exact parsed package name so doctor does not remove external npm or ClawHub records that only share an OpenClaw package-name prefix.

items.rawTitle: CLI/onboarding: mask credential inputs (model-auth provider API keys, gateway tokens and passwords, web-search provider keys, and skill env-var values) in the interactive `openclaw onboard` wizard so pasted secrets no longer echo into terminal scrollback, `Start-Transcript` logs, or screenshots; existing tokens/passwords are preserved through a masked-preview confirm step before the sensitive prompt. items.rawTitle: Memory LanceDB: allow installed-but-unconfigured plugin metadata to load so onboarding and setup flows can prompt for embedding config instead of failing the plugin registry first. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.rawTitle: Plugins/uninstall: remove empty managed git install parent directories after deleting cloned plugin repos and cover npm/git uninstall residue in Docker plugin lifecycle tests. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.rawTitle: Gateway/sessions: keep `sessions.list` rows lightweight by bounding title/preview hydration to transcript head/tail reads and caching manifest model-id normalization plus setup fallback metadata against the active plugin snapshot. Thanks @vincentkoc and @rolandrscheel.

items.rawTitle: Gateway/sessions: keep agent runtime metadata on lightweight `sessions.list` rows and skip per-row transcript usage fallback, display model inference, and plugin projection, avoiding identity loss and event-loop stalls in large session stores. items.rawTitle: Memory/search: keep sqlite-vec optional in packaged installs and point missing-extension recovery at the valid `agents.defaults.memorySearch.store.vector.extensionPath` setting. Thanks @willemsej and @vincentkoc.

items.rawTitle: Plugins/externalization: keep ACPX, Google Chat, and LINE publishable plugin dist trees out of the core npm package file list.
