changes.rawTitle: Gateway: preserve stack diagnostics when `chat.send` or agent attachment parsing/staging fails, improving image-send failure triage. Refs #63432. (#75135) Thanks @keen0206.

changes.title: Agent/idle-超时: 添加 a cost-runaway breaker to the outer embedded-run 重试 loop that halts further attempts 之后 5 consecutive idle timeouts 不适用 completed 模型 progress, so a wedged provider can no longer fan paid 模型 calls out across the same run; completed text 或 工具-call progress resets the breaker, 但是 partial 工具-argument 令牌 dribbles do not. 修复 #76293. Thanks @ThePuma312.
changes.rawTitle: Agents/idle-timeout: add a cost-runaway breaker to the outer embedded-run retry loop that halts further attempts after 5 consecutive idle timeouts without completed model progress, so a wedged provider can no longer fan paid model calls out across the same run; completed text or tool-call progress resets the breaker, but partial tool-argument token dribbles do not. Fixes #76293. Thanks @ThePuma312.

changes.title: Heartbeats/Codex: align structured heartbeat prompts 使用 actual `heartbeat_respond` 工具 availability, 停止 sending legacy `HEARTBEAT_OK` 当 the 工具 exists, 和 keep 工具-disabled commitment check-ins 在 the legacy ack 路径. Thanks @pashpashpash 和 @vincentkoc.

changes.rawTitle: Agent runtimes: fail explicit plugin runtime selections honestly when the requested harness is unavailable instead of silently falling back to the embedded PI runtime. Thanks @pashpashpash.

changes.title: 网关/Agent: enforce `session.sendPolicy=deny` 在 网关 Agent requests only 当 `deliver: true`, so non-delivery smoke checks 和 internal Agent runs are no longer rejected 使用 `send blocked 通过 session policy` while outbound delivery remains gated. 修复 #73381. Thanks @wenxu007.

items.title: 网关/性能: cache per-run verbose-level session reads, skip a redundant `lsof` scan 在 `网关 --force` 当 no listener was killed, 和 make the 网关 startup benchmark print usage 为了 `--help`.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/performance: cache per-run verbose-level session reads, skip a redundant `lsof` scan in `gateway --force` when no listener was killed, and make the Gateway startup benchmark print usage for `--help`.

items.title: CLI/更新: refuse package updates launched 从 the active 网关 process tree 之前 stopping the managed 网关 service, avoiding self-terminated 在-lane updates that leave old 网关 code running. 修复 #75691. (#75819) Thanks @ai-hpc.
items.rawTitle: CLI/update: refuse package updates launched from the active gateway process tree before stopping the managed Gateway service, avoiding self-terminated in-lane updates that leave old Gateway code running. Fixes #75691. (#75819) Thanks @ai-hpc.

items.title: 网关/status: 添加 concrete service, 配置, listener-owner, 和 log collection next steps 当 网关 probes fail 和 Bonjour finds no local 网关, so frozen 或 port-conflict reports include the data needed 为了 root-cause triage. Refs #49012. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/status: add concrete service, config, listener-owner, and log collection next steps when gateway probes fail and Bonjour finds no local gateway, so frozen or port-conflict reports include the data needed for root-cause triage. Refs #49012. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: Agent/sandbox: store sandbox container 和 浏览器 registry entries as per-runtime shard files, reducing unrelated session lock contention while `openclaw 诊断工具 --修复` migrates legacy monolithic registry files. (#74831) Thanks @luckylhb90.
items.rawTitle: Agents/sandbox: store sandbox container and browser registry entries as per-runtime shard files, reducing unrelated session lock contention while `openclaw doctor --fix` migrates legacy monolithic registry files. (#74831) Thanks @luckylhb90.

items.title: Google Meet: grant Chrome media permissions against the actual Meet tab, start the local realtime audio bridge only 之后 Meet joins, expose realtime transcripts 在 status/logs, 和 force explicit audio responses 使用 current OpenAI realtime output-audio events so BlackHole capture does not keep the OpenClaw participant muted 或 silent.
items.rawTitle: Google Meet: grant Chrome media permissions against the actual Meet tab, start the local realtime audio bridge only after Meet joins, expose realtime transcripts in status/logs, and force explicit audio responses with current OpenAI realtime output-audio events so BlackHole capture does not keep the OpenClaw participant muted or silent.

items.title: CLI/devices: 重试 explicit device-pair approval 使用 `operator.admin` 之后 a pairing-scope ownership denial, so existing admin-capable paired-device tokens can recover new Control 界面/浏览器 pairing 之后 upgrades 而不是 requiring manual JSON edits. 修复 #76956. Thanks @neo19482.
items.rawTitle: CLI/devices: retry explicit device-pair approval with `operator.admin` after a pairing-scope ownership denial, so existing admin-capable paired-device tokens can recover new Control UI/browser pairing after upgrades instead of requiring manual JSON edits. Fixes #76956. Thanks @neo19482.

items.title: Google Meet: refresh realtime 浏览器 state 期间 status 和 重试 delayed speech 之后 Meet finishes joining, so a just-opened 在-call tab no longer leaves speech stuck behind stale `not-在-call` health.
items.rawTitle: Google Meet: refresh realtime browser state during status and retry delayed speech after Meet finishes joining, so a just-opened in-call tab no longer leaves speech stuck behind stale `not-in-call` health.

items.title: Google Meet: grant Meet media permissions through the Playwright 浏览器 context 当 CDP grants do not affect the attached Chrome page, 和 report 在-call microphone/speaker permission problems 而不是 marking realtime speech ready.
items.rawTitle: Google Meet: grant Meet media permissions through the Playwright browser context when CDP grants do not affect the attached Chrome page, and report in-call microphone/speaker permission problems instead of marking realtime speech ready.

items.title: Control 界面/Skills: 修复 skill detail modal 静默地 failing to open 在 all browsers 通过 deferring `showModal()` until the dialog element is connected to the DOM; the Lit `ref` callback fired 之前 connection causing a `DOMException: HTMLDialogElement.showModal: Dialog element is not connected` 在 every skill click. Thanks @nickmopen.
items.rawTitle: Control UI/Skills: fix skill detail modal silently failing to open in all browsers by deferring `showModal()` until the dialog element is connected to the DOM; the Lit `ref` callback fired before connection causing a `DOMException: HTMLDialogElement.showModal: Dialog element is not connected` on every skill click. Thanks @nickmopen.

items.title: Control 界面/Talk: 修复 Talk (OpenAI Realtime WebRTC) CORS failure 通过 stripping server-side-only attribution headers (`originator`, `version`, `User-Agent`) 从 浏览器 offer headers; `API.OpenAI.com/v1/realtime/calls` only allows `authorization` 和 `content-type` 在 its CORS preflight, so forwarding these headers caused the 浏览器 SDP exchange to fail. 修复 #76435. Thanks @hclsys.
items.rawTitle: Control UI/Talk: fix Talk (OpenAI Realtime WebRTC) CORS failure by stripping server-side-only attribution headers (`originator`, `version`, `User-Agent`) from browser offer headers; `api.openai.com/v1/realtime/calls` only allows `authorization` and `content-type` in its CORS preflight, so forwarding these headers caused the browser SDP exchange to fail. Fixes #76435. Thanks @hclsys.

items.title: Tools/profiles: make `tools.profile: "full"` grant all tools including optional 插件 tools such as 浏览器, so the full profile no longer 静默地 drops 插件-provided tools that require an explicit allowlist entry. 修复 #76507. Thanks @amknight.
items.rawTitle: Tools/profiles: make `tools.profile: "full"` grant all tools including optional plugin tools such as browser, so the full profile no longer silently drops plugin-provided tools that require an explicit allowlist entry. Fixes #76507. Thanks @amknight.

items.title: QA/cache: require the full `CACHE-OK <suffix>` marker 之前 live cache probes 停止 retrying, so suffix-only prose cannot hide a broken probe response. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: QA/cache: require the full `CACHE-OK <suffix>` marker before live cache probes stop retrying, so suffix-only prose cannot hide a broken probe response. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: 内存/status: split builtin sqlite-vec store readiness 从 embedding-provider readiness 在 `内存 status --deep` 和 `openclaw status`, so local vector-store failures no longer look like provider failures 和 provider failures no longer hide a healthy local vector store.
items.rawTitle: Memory/status: split builtin sqlite-vec store readiness from embedding-provider readiness in `memory status --deep` and `openclaw status`, so local vector-store failures no longer look like provider failures and provider failures no longer hide a healthy local vector store.

items.title: 内存/status: keep plain `openclaw 内存 status` 和 `openclaw 内存 status --json` 在 the cheap read-only 路径 通过 reserving vector 和 embedding provider probes 为了 `--deep` 或 `--index`. 修复 #76769. Thanks @daruire.
items.rawTitle: Memory/status: keep plain `openclaw memory status` and `openclaw memory status --json` on the cheap read-only path by reserving vector and embedding provider probes for `--deep` or `--index`. Fixes #76769. Thanks @daruire.

items.title: 内存/embedding: broaden the embedding reindex 重试 classifier to include transient socket-layer errors (`fetch failed`, `ECONNRESET`, `socket hang up`, `UND_ERR_*`, `closed`) so 内存 reindex survives provider network hiccups 而不是 aborting mid-run. Related #56815, #44166. (#76311) Thanks @buyitsydney.
items.rawTitle: Memory/embedding: broaden the embedding reindex retry classifier to include transient socket-layer errors (`fetch failed`, `ECONNRESET`, `socket hang up`, `UND_ERR_*`, `closed`) so memory reindex survives provider network hiccups instead of aborting mid-run. Related #56815, #44166. (#76311) Thanks @buyitsydney.

items.title: 内存/sessions: keep rotated 和 deleted transcripts (`.jsonl.reset.<iso>` / `.jsonl.deleted.<iso>`) searchable 通过 indexing archive content, mapping archive hits back to live transcript stems, emitting transcript 更新 events 在 archive rotation, 和 bypassing incremental delta thresholds 为了 one-shot archive mutations while keeping backups 和 compaction checkpoints opaque. Refs #56131. Thanks @buyitsydney.
items.rawTitle: Memory/sessions: keep rotated and deleted transcripts (`.jsonl.reset.<iso>` / `.jsonl.deleted.<iso>`) searchable by indexing archive content, mapping archive hits back to live transcript stems, emitting transcript update events on archive rotation, and bypassing incremental delta thresholds for one-shot archive mutations while keeping backups and compaction checkpoints opaque. Refs #56131. Thanks @buyitsydney.

items.title: 内存-core: treat exhausted file watcher limits as non-fatal 为了 builtin 内存 auto-sync while preserving fatal handling 为了 unrelated disk-full errors. (#73357) Thanks @solodmd.
items.rawTitle: Memory-core: treat exhausted file watcher limits as non-fatal for builtin memory auto-sync while preserving fatal handling for unrelated disk-full errors. (#73357) Thanks @solodmd.

items.title: Control 界面/WebChat: collapse duplicate 在-flight internal text sends onto the active 网关 run so rapid repeat submits do not start fresh `Agent:main:main` dispatches. 修复 #75737. Thanks @dsdsddd1 和 @BunsDev.
items.rawTitle: Control UI/WebChat: collapse duplicate in-flight internal text sends onto the active Gateway run so rapid repeat submits do not start fresh `agent:main:main` dispatches. Fixes #75737. Thanks @dsdsddd1 and @BunsDev.

items.title: 网关/macOS: 停止 `诊断工具` 和 LaunchAgent recovery 从 running `launchctl kickstart -k` 之后 a fresh bootstrap, avoiding an immediate SIGTERM 的 the just-started 网关 while still nudging already-loaded launchd jobs. 修复 #76261. Thanks @solosage1.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/macOS: stop `doctor` and LaunchAgent recovery from running `launchctl kickstart -k` after a fresh bootstrap, avoiding an immediate SIGTERM of the just-started gateway while still nudging already-loaded launchd jobs. Fixes #76261. Thanks @solosage1.

items.title: Google Meet: route stateful CLI session commands through the 网关-owned runtime so joined realtime sessions survive 之后 the starting CLI process exits. 修复 #76344. Thanks @coltonharris-wq.
items.rawTitle: Google Meet: route stateful CLI session commands through the gateway-owned runtime so joined realtime sessions survive after the starting CLI process exits. Fixes #76344. Thanks @coltonharris-wq.

items.title: 网关/diagnostics: throttle repeated long-running active-work session warnings so healthy cron 或 subagent runs no longer print the same `recovery=none` line every heartbeat.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/diagnostics: throttle repeated long-running active-work session warnings so healthy cron or subagent runs no longer print the same `recovery=none` line every heartbeat.

items.title: Agent/sessions: keep delayed `sessions_send` A2A replies alive 之后 soft wait-window timeouts, while preserving terminal run timeouts 和 avoiding stale target replies 在 requester sessions. 修复 #76443. Thanks @ryswork1993 和 @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Agents/sessions: keep delayed `sessions_send` A2A replies alive after soft wait-window timeouts, while preserving terminal run timeouts and avoiding stale target replies in requester sessions. Fixes #76443. Thanks @ryswork1993 and @vincentkoc.

items.title: Agent/compaction: 添加 an optional bundled compaction notifier hook 和 重试 once 从 the compacted transcript 当 automatic compaction leaves a turn 不适用 a final visible reply. (#76651) Thanks @simplyclever914.
items.rawTitle: Agents/compaction: add an optional bundled compaction notifier hook and retry once from the compacted transcript when automatic compaction leaves a turn without a final visible reply. (#76651) Thanks @simplyclever914.

items.title: Agent/incomplete-turn: detect 和 surface a warning 当 the Agent's final text 之后 a 工具-call chain is 静默地 dropped because the post-工具 assistant response was never produced, 而不是 completing the turn 使用 only the pre-工具 analysis text. 修复 #76477. Thanks @amknight.
items.rawTitle: Agents/incomplete-turn: detect and surface a warning when the agent's final text after a tool-call chain is silently dropped because the post-tool assistant response was never produced, instead of completing the turn with only the pre-tool analysis text. Fixes #76477. Thanks @amknight.

items.title: 网关: 保留 stack diagnostics 当 `chat.send` 或 Agent attachment parsing/staging fails, improving image-send failure triage. Refs #63432. (#75135) Thanks @keen0206.
items.rawTitle: Gateway: preserve stack diagnostics when `chat.send` or agent attachment parsing/staging fails, improving image-send failure triage. Refs #63432. (#75135) Thanks @keen0206.

items.title: 网关/responses: emit every client 工具 call 从 `/v1/responses` JSON 和 SSE responses 当 the Agent invokes multiple client tools 在 a single turn, so multi-工具 plans, graph orchestration calls, 和 similar batched flows no longer drop every call 但是 the last. 修复 #52288. Thanks @CharZhou 和 @bonelli.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/responses: emit every client tool call from `/v1/responses` JSON and SSE responses when the agent invokes multiple client tools in a single turn, so multi-tool plans, graph orchestration calls, and similar batched flows no longer drop every call but the last. Fixes #52288. Thanks @CharZhou and @bonelli.

items.title: 网关/Agent: enforce `session.sendPolicy=deny` 在 网关 Agent requests only 当 `deliver: true`, so non-delivery smoke checks 和 internal Agent runs are no longer rejected 使用 `send blocked 通过 session policy` while outbound delivery remains gated. 修复 #73381. Thanks @wenxu007.
items.rawTitle: Gateway/agent: enforce `session.sendPolicy=deny` on gateway agent requests only when `deliver: true`, so non-delivery smoke checks and internal agent runs are no longer rejected with `send blocked by session policy` while outbound delivery remains gated. Fixes #73381. Thanks @wenxu007.

items.title: Cron: persist repaired startup runtime state back to `jobs-state.json` so a valid future `nextRunAtMs` 使用 missing `updatedAtMs` no longer triggers repeated external health-check repairs 之后 网关 restart. 修复 #76461. Thanks @vincentkoc.
items.rawTitle: Cron: persist repaired startup runtime state back to `jobs-state.json` so a valid future `nextRunAtMs` with missing `updatedAtMs` no longer triggers repeated external health-check repairs after Gateway restart. Fixes #76461. Thanks @vincentkoc.

items.title: Agent/sessions: 保留 terminal lifecycle state 当 final run metadata persists 从 a stale 在-内存 snapshot, preventing `main` sessions 从 staying stuck as running 之后 completed 或 timed-out turns.
items.rawTitle: Agents/sessions: preserve terminal lifecycle state when final run metadata persists from a stale in-memory snapshot, preventing `main` sessions from staying stuck as running after completed or timed-out turns.

items.title: Heartbeat/scheduler: make heartbeat phase scheduling active-hours-aware so the scheduler seeks forward to the first 在-window phase slot 而不是 arming timers 为了 quiet-hours slots 和 relying solely 在 the runtime guard. Non-UTC `activeHours.timezone` values (e.g. `Asia/Shanghai`) 现在 正确地 influence 当 the next heartbeat timer fires, avoiding wasted quiet-hours ticks 和 long dormant gaps 之后 网关 restarts. 修复 #75487. Thanks @amknight.
items.rawTitle: Heartbeat/scheduler: make heartbeat phase scheduling active-hours-aware so the scheduler seeks forward to the first in-window phase slot instead of arming timers for quiet-hours slots and relying solely on the runtime guard. Non-UTC `activeHours.timezone` values (e.g. `Asia/Shanghai`) now correctly influence when the next heartbeat timer fires, avoiding wasted quiet-hours ticks and long dormant gaps after gateway restarts. Fixes #75487. Thanks @amknight.

items.title: Providers/Arcee AI: mark Trinity Large Thinking as 工具-incompatible so main-session runs use the same text-only request shape that made subagent runs recover, avoiding the remaining main-session response-shape mismatch 之后 the #62848 transport failover 修复. 修复 #62851 和 #62847; carries forward #62848. Thanks @Adam-Researchh.
items.rawTitle: Providers/Arcee AI: mark Trinity Large Thinking as tool-incompatible so main-session runs use the same text-only request shape that made subagent runs recover, avoiding the remaining main-session response-shape mismatch after the #62848 transport failover fix. Fixes #62851 and #62847; carries forward #62848. Thanks @Adam-Researchh.

items.title: Web fetch: 添加 a default-off `tools.web.fetch.useTrustedEnvProxy` opt-在 为了 代理-only environments so `web_fetch` can let an operator-controlled HTTP(S) 代理 解决 DNS while preserving default strict DNS pinning 和 hostname policy checks. Refs #58034 和 #62560. Thanks @cosmicnet 和 @mjamiv.
items.rawTitle: Web fetch: add a default-off `tools.web.fetch.useTrustedEnvProxy` opt-in for proxy-only environments so `web_fetch` can let an operator-controlled HTTP(S) proxy resolve DNS while preserving default strict DNS pinning and hostname policy checks. Refs #58034 and #62560. Thanks @cosmicnet and @mjamiv.

items.title: CLI/devices: request `operator.admin` 为了 `openclaw devices approve <requestId>` only 当 the exact pending device request would mint 或 inherit admin-scoped operator access, while keeping lower-scope approvals 在 the pairing scope.
items.rawTitle: CLI/devices: request `operator.admin` for `openclaw devices approve <requestId>` only when the exact pending device request would mint or inherit admin-scoped operator access, while keeping lower-scope approvals on the pairing scope.

items.title: Setup/TUI: bound the Terminal hatch bootstrap run so a stalled provider request times out 而不是 leaving first-run hatching stuck behind the watchdog. (#76241) Thanks @joshavant.
items.rawTitle: Setup/TUI: bound the Terminal hatch bootstrap run so a stalled provider request times out instead of leaving first-run hatching stuck behind the watchdog. (#76241) Thanks @joshavant.

items.title: Active 内存: apply `setupGraceTimeoutMs` to the embedded recall runner as well as the outer prompt-build watchdog, so very-cold first recalls keep the configured setup grace end-to-end. (#74480) Thanks @volcano303.
items.rawTitle: Active Memory: apply `setupGraceTimeoutMs` to the embedded recall runner as well as the outer prompt-build watchdog, so very-cold first recalls keep the configured setup grace end-to-end. (#74480) Thanks @volcano303.

items.title: Control 界面/WebChat: explain compaction boundaries 在 chat history 和 link directly to session checkpoint controls so pre-compaction turns no longer look 静默地 lost 之后 refresh. 修复 #76415. Thanks @BunsDev.
items.rawTitle: Control UI/WebChat: explain compaction boundaries in chat history and link directly to session checkpoint controls so pre-compaction turns no longer look silently lost after refresh. Fixes #76415. Thanks @BunsDev.

items.title: Auto-reply/queue: treat reset-triggered `/new` 和 `/reset` turns as interrupt runs across active-run queue handling, so steer/followup modes cannot delay a fresh session behind existing work. 修复 #74093. (#74144) Thanks @ruji9527 和 @yelog.
items.rawTitle: Auto-reply/queue: treat reset-triggered `/new` and `/reset` turns as interrupt runs across active-run queue handling, so steer/followup modes cannot delay a fresh session behind existing work. Fixes #74093. (#74144) Thanks @ruji9527 and @yelog.

items.title: Cron: 保留 manual `cron.run` IDs 在 `cron.runs` history so manual run acknowledgements can be correlated 使用 finished run records. 修复 #76276.
items.rawTitle: Cron: preserve manual `cron.run` IDs in `cron.runs` history so manual run acknowledgements can be correlated with finished run records. Fixes #76276.

items.title: Media: accept home-relative `MEDIA:~/...` attachment paths while preserving existing file-read policy, traversal checks, 和 media type validation. 修复 #73796. Thanks @fabkury.
items.rawTitle: Media: accept home-relative `MEDIA:~/...` attachment paths while preserving existing file-read policy, traversal checks, and media type validation. Fixes #73796. Thanks @fabkury.

items.title: Active 内存: keep non-empty `memory_search` results 从 being fast-failed as empty 当 debug telemetry reports zero hits.
items.rawTitle: Active Memory: keep non-empty `memory_search` results from being fast-failed as empty when debug telemetry reports zero hits.

items.title: Parallels/Windows 更新 smoke: escape the stale post-swap import regex 在 the generated PowerShell script so expected `ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND` 更新 handoffs continue to post-更新 health checks. (#75315)
items.rawTitle: Parallels/Windows update smoke: escape the stale post-swap import regex in the generated PowerShell script so expected `ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND` update handoffs continue to post-update health checks. (#75315)
